Genesis1:1 Mu ntangiriro Imana yaremye ijuru n’isi.
Genesis1:2 Isi yari ikivangavange kitagira ishusho kandi iriho ubusa. Umwijima wari ubundikiye inyanja y’amazi
Genesis1:3 Imana iravuga iti «Nihabeho urumuri!» Urumuri rubaho.
Genesis1:4 Imana ibona ko urumuri ari rwiza
Genesis1:5 Urumuri irwita amanywa
Genesis1:6 Imana iravuga iti «Nihabeho ikirere hagati y’amazi
Genesis1:7 Imana ihanga ikirere maze itandukanya amazi ari mu nsi y’ikirere n’amazi ari hejuru y’ikirere. Biba bityo.
Genesis1:8 Ikirere Imana icyita ijuru. Burira buracya
Genesis1:9 Imana iravuga iti «Amazi ari mu nsi y’ijuru nateranire hamwe
Genesis1:10 Ahumutse Imana ihita ubutaka
Genesis1:11 Imana iravuga iti «Ubutaka nibumere ubwatsi butoshye
Genesis1:12 Ubutaka bumera ubwatsi butoshye
Genesis1:13 Burira buracya
Genesis1:14 Imana iravuga iti «Nihabeho ibinyarumuri mu kirere cy’ijuru
Genesis1:15 byakire mu kirere cy’ijuru
Genesis1:16 Nuko Imana ihanga ibinyarumuri binini bibiri: ikinyarumuri kinini kugira ngo kigenge amanywa
Genesis1:17 Imana ibishyira mu kirere cy’ijuru kugira ngo bimurikire isi
Genesis1:18 no kugira ngo bigenge amanywa n’ijoro
Genesis1:19 Burira buracya
Genesis1:20 Imana iravuga iti «Amazi najagatemo utunyamaswa tuzima
Genesis1:21 Imana irema ibikoko nyamunini by’inyanja
Genesis1:22 Imana ibiha umugisha
Genesis1:23 Burira buracya
Genesis1:24 Imana iravuga iti «Ubutaka nibubyare inyamaswa nzima zikurikije amoko yazo: izishobora gutungwa
Genesis1:25 Imana ihanga inyamaswa z’ishyamba
Genesis1:26 Imana iravuga iti «Noneho duhange Muntu mu ishusho ryacu
Genesis1:27 Nuko Imana irema Muntu mu ishusho ryayo
Genesis1:28 Imana ibaha umugisha
Genesis1:29 Imana iravuga iti «Dore mbahaye icyatsi cyose cyera imbuto ku isi hose
Genesis1:30 Inyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi
Genesis1:31 Imana ireba ibyo yari imaze gukora byose isanga ari byiza rwose. Burira buracya
Genesis2:1 Ijuru n’isi n’ibirimo byose byashojwe bityo.
Genesis2:2 Ku munsi wa karindwi Imana isoza umurimo yakoraga
Genesis2:3 Imana iha umugisha umunsi wa karindwi irawiyegurira
Genesis2:4 Ngayo amavu n’amavuko y’ijuru n’isi
Genesis2:5 ku isi nta n’agahuru ko mu gasozi kaharangwaga
Genesis2:6 Ariko isoko yapfupfunukaga mu kuzimu ikabobeza hejuru y’ubutaka hose.
Genesis2:7 Nuko Uhoraho Imana abumba Muntu mu ibumba rivuye mu gitaka
Genesis2:8 Ubwo Uhoraho Imana atera ubusitani iburasirazuba
Genesis2:9 Uhoraho Imana ameza mu gitaka ibiti by’amoko yose binogeye amaso
Genesis2:10 Uruzi rwaturukaga muri Edeni
Genesis2:11 Izina ry’uruzi rwa mbere ni Pishoni; ni rwo ruzenguruka igihugu cyose cya Hawila
Genesis2:12 kandi zahabu y’icyo gihugu ni nziza cyane; kibamo n’amabuye y’agaciro
Genesis2:13 Izina ry’uruzi rwa kabiri ni Gihoni; ni rwo ruzenguruka igihugu cya Kushi.
Genesis2:14 Uruzi rwa gatatu ni Tigiri; ni rwo rutemba runyura mu burasirazuba bwa Ashuru. Uruzi rwa kane ni Efurati.
Genesis2:15 Uhoraho Imana ashyira Muntu mu busitani bwa Edeni
Genesis2:16 Nuko Uhoraho Imana ategeka Muntu
Genesis2:17 ariko igiti cy’ubumenyi bw’icyiza n’ikibi ntuzakiryeho
Genesis2:18 Nuko Uhoraho Imana aravuga ati «Si byiza ko Muntu aba wenyine
Genesis2:19 Uhoraho Imana abumba mu gitaka inyamaswa zose zo mu ishyamba
Genesis2:20 Muntu yita amazina ibitungwa byose
Genesis2:21 Nuko Uhoraho Imana atera Muntu gusinzira ibitotsi bikomeye
Genesis2:22 Urwo rubavu Uhoraho Imana avanye mu mugabo
Genesis2:23 Umugabo ariyamira aravuga ati «Noneho dore igufwa ryo mu magufwa yanjye
Genesis2:24 Ni cyo gituma umugabo asiga se na nyina
Genesis2:25 Bombi bari bambaye ubusa
Genesis3:1 Inzoka yari inyaryenge kurenza izindi nyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi Uhoraho yari yahanze. Ibaza umugore
Genesis3:2 Umugore asubiza inzoka
Genesis3:3 naho ku mbuto z’igiti kiri hagati y’ubusitani
Genesis3:4 Inzoka ibwira umugore
Genesis3:5 Ahubwo Imana izi ko umunsi mwaziriyeho
Genesis3:6 Umugore arareba asanga cya giti kiryoshye
Genesis3:7 Nuko amaso yabo bombi arahumuka
Genesis3:8 Ngo bumve Uhoraho Imana wagendagendaga mu busitani mu mafu y’igicamunsi
Genesis3:9 Uhoraho Imana ahamagara Muntu aramubaza ati «Uri hehe?»
Genesis3:10 Undi arasubiza ati «Numvise ijwi ryawe mu busitani
Genesis3:11 Uhoraho Imana ati «Ni nde waguhishuriye ko wambaye ubusa? Aho ntiwariye ku giti nari nakubujije kuryaho?»
Genesis3:12 Muntu arasubiza ati «Umugore wanshyize iruhande
Genesis3:13 Uhoraho Imana abwira umugore
Genesis3:14 Uhoraho Imana abwira inzoka ati «Kuko wakoze ibyo
Genesis3:15 Nshyize inzigo hagati yawe n’umugore
Genesis3:16 Abwira umugore ati «Nzongera imiruho yawe igihe utwite
Genesis3:17 Hanyuma abwira Muntu ati «Kuko witaye ku magambo y’umugore wawe ukarya ku giti nari nakubujije nkubwira nti ’Ntuzakiryeho’
Genesis3:18 buzakwerera amahwa n’ibitovu
Genesis3:19 Umugati wawe uzawurya wiyushye akuya kugeza ubwo uzasubira mu gitaka
Genesis3:20 Nuko Muntu yita izina umugore we
Genesis3:21 Uhoraho Imana akanira Muntu n’umugore we impu arazibambika:
Genesis3:22 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Dore Muntu yabaye nk’umwe muri twe
Genesis3:23 Uhoraho Imana amwirukana mu busitani bwa Edeni
Genesis3:24 Nuko yirukana Muntu
Genesis4:1 Muntu abonana na Eva
Genesis4:2 Ku buheta abyara Abeli murumuna we. Abeli aba umushumba w’amatungo naho Kayini aba umuhinzi w’ubutaka.
Genesis4:3 Igihe kirahita
Genesis4:4 Abeli na we azana uburiza mu matungo ye
Genesis4:5 ariko ntiyashima Kayini n’amaturo ye. Kayini biramurakaza cyane
Genesis4:6 Uhoraho abaza Kayini ati «Urakajwe n’iki? Kandi ni iki cyatumye uhinduka utyo mu maso?
Genesis4:7 Nugenza neza
Genesis4:8 Kayini abwira murumuna we Abeli
Genesis4:9 Uhoraho abaza Kayini ati «Abeli murumuna wawe ari hehe?» Undi ati «Simbizi! Mbese ndi umurinzi wa murumuna wanjye?»
Genesis4:10 Uhoraho ati «Wakoze ibiki? Amaraso ya murumuna wawe wamennye
Genesis4:11 Ubu ngubu ubaye ikivume ku butaka
Genesis4:12 Nuhinga ubutaka
Genesis4:13 Kayini abwira Uhoraho
Genesis4:14 Dore unyirukanye kuri ubu butaka
Genesis4:15 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Yewe
Genesis4:16 Nuko Kayini ava mu maso y’Uhoraho
Genesis4:17 Kayini abonana n’umugore we
Genesis4:18 Henoki abyara Iradi; Iradi abyara Mehuyayeli
Genesis4:19 Nuko Lameki azana abagore babiri; umwe akitwa Ada
Genesis4:20 Ada abyara Yabali; ni we wabaye sekuruza w’abatura mu mahema bakagira amatungo.
Genesis4:21 Murumuna we yitwa Tubali; ni we wabaye sekuruza w’abacuranga inanga
Genesis4:22 Sila we abyara TubaliKayini; ni we wabaye sekuruza w’abacuzi bose b’umuringa n’ubutare. Mushiki wa Tubali‐Kayini yari Nahama.
Genesis4:23 Lameki abwira abagore be
Genesis4:24 Ubwo Kayini yahorewe karindwi
Genesis4:25 Adamu abonana n’umugore we; umugore abyara umuhungu amwita Seti
Genesis4:26 Seti na we abyara umuhungu amwita Enoshi. Nuko kuva ubwo batangira kwambaza Izina ry’Uhoraho.

Genesis6:1 Abantu batangira kugwira ku isi
Genesis6:2 abahungu b’Imana babona abakobwa b’abantu ari beza. Ni bwo bihitiyemo abo bishakiye babagira abagore babo.
Genesis6:3 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati «Umwuka wanjye ntuzongera kuguma mu muntu ngo arambe igihe kirekire; ni ikinyamubiri

Genesis6:5 Uhoraho arareba asanga ububi bw’abantu bwakwiriye ku isi; ibitekerezo by’umutima wabo nta bindi bitari ubugizi bwa nabi.
Genesis6:6 Uhoraho yicuza kuba yarashyize umuntu ku isi
Genesis6:7 Ni ko kuvuga
Genesis6:8 Nowa ariko agira ubutoni mu maso y’Uhoraho.
Genesis6:9 Dore rero amateka ya Nowa. Nowa yari umuntu w’intungane
Genesis6:10 Nowa abyara abahungu batatu: Semu

Genesis6:12 Imana irebye isi isanga yarandavuye
Genesis6:13 Imana ibwira Nowa
Genesis6:14 Iyubakire ubwato mu biti by’imizonobari. Uzabugabanyemo ibyumba. Hanyuma ubuhomeshe ubujeni imbere n’inyuma.
Genesis6:15 Dore ukuntu uzubaka ubwato: buzagira uburebure bw’imikono magana atatu
Genesis6:16 Ubwato uzabuhe igisenge
Genesis6:17 Jyewe dore ngiye guteza ku isi umwuzure w’amazi yo gutsemba ikinyabuzima cyose gihumekera aha mu nsi y’ijuru
Genesis6:18 Ariko nzagirana nawe Isezerano. Uzinjire mu bwato
Genesis6:19 Mu binyabuzima byose
Genesis6:20 Inyoni ukurikije amoko yazo
Genesis6:21 Naho wowe
Genesis6:22 Nowa agenza atyo; uko Imana yari yamutegetse

Genesis7:5 Nowa akora byose uko Uhoraho yari yamutegetse.

Genesis7:24 Amazi akomeza kwiyongera ku isi iminsi ijana na mirongo itanu yose.

Exodus1:1 Dore amazina y’abana ba Israheli baje mu Misiri hamwe na Yakobo. Bahageze buri muntu ari kumwe n’urugo rwe.
Exodus1:2 Abo ni Rubeni
Exodus1:3 Isakari
Exodus1:4 Dani na Nefutali; Gadi na Asheri.
Exodus1:5 Abantu bakomoka kuri Yakobo bari mirongo irindwi bose hamwe; Yozefu we yari asanzwe atuye mu Misiri.
Exodus1:6 Nuko Yozefu arapfa kimwe n’abavandimwe be bose
Exodus1:7 Abayisraheli barororoka
Exodus1:8 Ubwo mu gihugu cya Misiri haza kwima undi mwami utari waramenye Yozefu.

Exodus1:10 Nimucyo tuwigire ubwenge

Exodus1:12 Nyamara uko babakandamizaga
Exodus1:13 Abanyamisiri bakoresha Abayisraheli by’agahato n’ubugome
Exodus1:14 babatera kuzinukwa ubuzima bwabo ku mpamvu y’uburetwa bukabije: nko gukata ibumba
Exodus1:15 Mu Bahebureyi hari abagore babiri bazi kubyaza
Exodus1:16 «Igihe muzajya mubyaza abagore b’Abahebureyi

Exodus1:19 Abagore basubiza Farawo
Exodus1:20 Imana igirira neza abo babyaza. Nuko umuryango uriyongera
Exodus1:21 Abo bagore babiri b’ababyaza
Exodus1:22 Ni bwo Farawo ahaye igihugu cye cyose itegeko

Exodus2:2 Uwo mugore arasama
Exodus2:3 Kubera ko yari atagishoboye gukomeza kumuhishahisha

Exodus2:6 Ngo agapfundure
Exodus2:7 Ubwo mushiki w’umwana abwira umukobwa wa Farawo

Exodus2:11 Muri icyo gihe

Exodus2:23 Hashira imyaka myinshi
Exodus2:24 Imana yumva imiborogo yabo
Exodus2:25 Imana ireba Abayisraheli
Exodus3:1 Musa yari aragiye ubushyo bwa sebukwe Yetero umuherezabitambo w’i Madiyani. Ayobora ubushyo hirya y’ubutayu
Exodus3:2 Nuko Umumalayika w’Uhoraho amubonekera mu kibatsi cy’umuriro waka mu gihuru rwagati. Musa aritegereza
Exodus3:3 Musa aravuga ati «Reka njyeyo ndebe aka kataraboneka
Exodus3:4 Uhoraho abona aje hafi kureba ibyo ari byo. Nuko Imana imuhamagarira mu gihuru rwagati iti «Musa! Musa!» Undi ati «Ndi hano.»
Exodus3:5 Nuko Imana iramubwira iti «Wikwegera hano! Ndetse kuramo inkweto zawe
Exodus3:6 Irongera iti «Ndi Imana ya so
Exodus3:7 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Amagorwa y’umuryango wanjye uri mu Misiri narayitegereje
Exodus3:8 Ndamanutse ngo mbagobotore mu maboko y’Abanyamisiri
Exodus3:9 None ngaha induru y’Abayisraheli yangezeho
Exodus3:10 Ubu ngubu rero genda: ngutumye kuri Farawo kugira ngo uvane mu Misiri Abayisraheli
Exodus3:11 Musa abwira Imana
Exodus3:12 Imana iravuga iti «Ndi kumwe nawe; kandi dore ikizakubera ikimenyetso ko ari jye wagutumye: Numara kuvana umuryango wanjye mu Misiri
Exodus3:13 Musa abwira Imana
Exodus3:14 Nuko Imana ibwira Musa
Exodus3:15 Imana yongera kubwira Musa
Exodus3:16 Genda rero ukoranye abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli
Exodus3:17 ‘Nzabakura mu magorwa murimo mu Misiri
Exodus3:18 Bazumva ijwi ryawe
Exodus3:19 Nzi neza ko umwami wa Misiri atazareka mugenda
Exodus3:20 Nzarambura rero ukuboko kwanjye
Exodus3:21 Nzatuma iyo mbaga ibona agahenge ku Banyamisiri
Exodus3:22 Ahubwo buri mugore azasange mugenzi we baturanye cyangwa umucumbikiye
Exodus4:1 Musa arasubiza ati «Ntibazanyemera
Exodus4:2 Uhoraho rero aramubwira ati «Ufite iki mu ntoki?» Undi ati «Ni inkoni.»
Exodus4:3 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati «Yijugunye hasi.» Ayijugunya hasi maze ihinduka inzoka
Exodus4:4 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus4:5 Uhoraho ati «Ibyo ni ukugira ngo bazamenye ko wabonekewe n’Uhoraho Imana y’abakurambere babo
Exodus4:6 Uhoraho yongera kumubwira ati «Shyira ikiganza mu gituza cyawe.» Undi ashyira ikiganza mu gituza cye; hanyuma akivanaho
Exodus4:7 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Subiza ikiganza mu gituza cyawe.» Undi asubiza ikiganza mu gituza cye; hanyuma akivanaho asanga cyongeye kuba kizima nk’umubiri we usanzwe.
Exodus4:8 Nuko aramubwira ati «Niba rero batakwemeye
Exodus4:9 Niba kandi batemeye ibyo bimenyetso byombi
Exodus4:10 Musa abwira Uhoraho
Exodus4:11 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Ni nde wahaye umuntu umunwa wo kuvuga cyangwa akamugira ikiragi
Exodus4:12 None rero genda; jye ndi kumwe n’umunwa wawe
Exodus4:13 Ubwo Musa aravuga ati «Nyamuna Mutegetsi wanjye
Exodus4:14 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Musa
Exodus4:15 Uzamubwire ibyo agomba kuvuga
Exodus4:16 Ni we uzavugana na rubanda mu mwanya wawe
Exodus4:17 Naho iyi nkoni uyifate mu ntoki
Exodus4:18 Musa aragenda
Exodus4:19 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu gihugu cya Madiyani
Exodus4:20 Musa agira umugore we n’abahungu be
Exodus4:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus4:22 Ubwo uzabwire Farawo
Exodus4:23 Rekura umwana wanjye agende
Exodus4:24 Mu rugendo
Exodus4:25 Ni bwo Sipora yenze isarabwayi
Exodus4:26 Nuko Uhoraho aramureka. Ubwo Sipora nyine yari amaze kuvuga ngo «umugabo w’amaraso»
Exodus4:27 Uhoraho abwira Aroni
Exodus4:28 Musa arondorera Aroni amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yaramutumye
Exodus4:29 Musa na Aroni baragenda
Exodus4:30 Aroni abarondorera amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yarabwiye Musa
Exodus4:31 Nuko imbaga iremera; bamenya ko Uhoraho yasuye Abayisraheli
Exodus5:1 Hanyuma Musa na Aroni basanga Farawo
Exodus5:2 Farawo arabasubiza ati «Uhoraho ni nde byo kugira ngo numvire ijwi rye
Exodus5:3 Baravuga bati «Imana y’Abahebureyi yaratubonekeye. Duhe uruhusa rwo gukora urugendo rw’iminsi itatu mu butayu
Exodus5:4 Naho umwami wa Misiri arababwira ati «Mwebwe
Exodus5:5 Farawo arongera ati «Dore ubu bene wanyu babaye ishyano ryose mu gihugu
Exodus5:6 Muri icyo gihe Farawo aha abakoresha n’abagenzuzi b’imirimo ya rubanda itegeko
Exodus5:7 «Mwikomeza guha rubanda ibyatsi byo kubumbisha amatafari
Exodus5:8 Nyamara muzabace umubare w’amatafari ungana n’uwo basanzwe babumba
Exodus5:9 Abo bantu nimubicishe uburetwa
Exodus5:10 Abakoresha n’abagenzuzi baraza babwira rubanda
Exodus5:11 ngo ‘Nimugende ubwanyu
Exodus5:12 Rubanda banyanyagira mu gihugu cya Misiri batoragura udufunzo two gukekaguramo ibyatsi.
Exodus5:13 Abakoresha barabatotaga bavuga bati «Nimurangize icyate cyanyu
Exodus5:14 Abanyamisiri bakubita abagenzuzi b’Abayisraheli bari barashyizweho n’abakoresha ba Farawo. Bakavuga bati «Ni iki cyatumye ari ejo ari na none mutarangiza umubare w’amatafari utegetswe nk’uko mwabigenzaga mbere?»
Exodus5:15 Abagenzuzi b’Abayisraheli bajya kuregera Farawo
Exodus5:16 Ntibagiha abagaragu bawe ibyatsi
Exodus5:17 Farawo arabasubiza ati «Hoshi muri abanebwe! Ni yo mpamvu ituma muvuga ngo ‘Turashaka kujya gutura Uhoraho ibitambo!’
Exodus5:18 Noneho ubu ngubu nimujye gukora. Ntibazabaha ibyatsi
Exodus5:19 Abagenzuzi b’Abayisraheli basanga bari mu kaga
Exodus5:20 Bagisohoka kwa Farawo
Exodus5:21 Barababwira bati «Uhoraho narebe
Exodus5:22 Ubwo Musa yongera gusanga Uhoraho
Exodus5:23 Kuva aho nagiriye kuvugana na Farawo mu izina ryawe
Exodus6:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus6:2 Imana ivugana na Musa
Exodus6:3 Nabonekeye Abrahamu
Exodus6:4 Nagiranye Isezerano na bo
Exodus6:5 Numvise kandi imiborogo y’Abayisraheli
Exodus6:6 Ni cyo gituma uzabwira Abayisraheli uti ‘Ndi Uhoraho! Nzabavana mu buretwa bw’Abanyamisiri
Exodus6:7 Nzabagira umuryango wanjye bwite
Exodus6:8 Nzabinjiza mu gihugu narahiye kuzaha Abrahamu
Exodus6:9 Musa abwira Abayisraheli atyo; nyamara ntibamwumva
Exodus6:10 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Musa ati
Exodus6:11 «Jya kubwira Farawo
Exodus6:12 Musa asubiza Uhoraho
Exodus6:13 Uhoraho yongera kuvugana na Musa na Aroni
Exodus6:14 Dore amazina y’abatware b’imiryango yabo: Bene Rubeni imfura ya Israheli ni Henoki
Exodus6:15 Bene Simewoni ni Yemweli
Exodus6:16 Dore amazina ya bene Levi
Exodus6:17 Bene Gerishoni ni Libuni
Exodus6:18 Bene Kehati ni Amuramu
Exodus6:19 Bene Merari ni Mahuli na Mushe. Abo ngabo ni amazu yo kwa Levi
Exodus6:20 Amuramu arongora Yokebedi nyirasenge
Exodus6:21 Bene Yishari ni Kore
Exodus6:22 Bene Uziyeli ni Mishayeli
Exodus6:23 Aroni arongora Elizabeti umukobwa wa Aminadabu
Exodus6:24 Bene Kore ni Asiri
Exodus6:25 Eleyazari mwene Aroni arongora umwe mu bakobwa ba Putiyeli; babyarana Pinehasi. Ngabo abatware b’amazu y’Abalevi
Exodus6:26 Aroni na Musa abo ni bo Uhoraho yabwiye
Exodus6:27 Ni bo bavuganye na Farawo umwami wa Misiri
Exodus6:28 Igihe Uhoraho avuganiye na Musa mu gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus6:29 yaramubwiye
Exodus6:30 Nuko Musa asubiza Uhoraho ati «Dore nifitiye ururimi rugobwe

Exodus7:2 Wowe uzajye uvuga icyo ngutegetse cyose
Exodus7:3 Jyewe rero nzatera umutima wa Farawo kunangira. Nzagwiza ibimenyetso byanjye n’ibitangaza byanjye mu gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus7:4 ariko Farawo nta bwo azabumva. Nzaramburira ukuboko kwanjye kuri Misiri
Exodus7:5 Abanyamisiri bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho
Exodus7:6 Musa na Aroni bagenza batyo: uko Uhoraho yari yabategetse aba ari ko bakora.
Exodus7:7 Musa yari amaze imyaka mirongo inani
Exodus7:8 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni
Exodus7:9 «Farawo nababwira avuga ngo ’Nimubitangire icyemezo’
Exodus7:10 Nuko rero Musa na Aroni baza kwa Farawo; bagenza uko Uhoraho yari yabategetse. Aroni ajugunya inkoni ye imbere ya Farawo n’imbere y’abagaragu be
Exodus7:11 Ubwo Farawo atumiza abahanga n’abapfumu be; maze abapfumu ba Misiri na bo babigenza batyo
Exodus7:12 buri muntu ajugunya inkoni ye hasi
Exodus7:13 Nyamara umutima wa Farawo ugumya kunangira
Exodus7:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus7:15 Usange rero Farawo mu gitondo
Exodus7:16 Umubwire uti ’Uhoraho Imana y’Abahebureyi yakuntumyeho kukubwira
Exodus7:17 Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Dore icyo uzamenyeraho ko ndi Uhoraho: ngiye gukubitisha amazi yo mu Ruzi inkoni mfite mu ntoki
Exodus7:18 Amafi y’uruzi ari bupfe
Exodus7:19 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus7:20 Musa na Aroni bakora icyo Uhoraho yari ategetse. Aroni abangura inkoni ye
Exodus7:21 Amafi yari mu Ruzi arapfa
Exodus7:22 Nyamara abapfumu ba Misiri bagenza batyo na bo
Exodus7:23 Farawo arikubita aragenda
Exodus7:24 Abanyamisiri bafukura ahegereye Uruzi ngo babone amazi yo kunywa
Exodus7:25 Kuva igihe Uhoraho akubitiye Uruzi
Exodus7:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus7:27 Niba kandi wanze kuwurekura ngo ugende
Exodus7:28 Uruzi ruzajagatamo imitubu; izazamuka
Exodus7:29 Imitubu izatondagira kuri wowe
Exodus8:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa

Exodus8:3 Nyamara abapfumu na bo babikora batyo ku mayeri yabo
Exodus8:4 Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni
Exodus8:5 Musa asubiza Farawo

Exodus8:19 Nzaca urugabano hagati y’imbaga yanjye n’iyawe; kandi icyo kimenyetso kizaba ejo.’»
Exodus8:20 Uhoraho abigenza atyo. Haduka ibibugu gica
Exodus8:21 Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni

Exodus8:23 Turashaka kwigira mu ntera y’urugendo rw’iminsi itatu mu butayu

Exodus8:26 Musa asezera kuri Farawo
Exodus8:27 Uhoraho abigenza nk’uko Musa abimusabye
Exodus8:28 Nyamara Farawo na none yanga kuva ku izima ntiyareka rubanda ngo bagende.

Exodus9:2 niba kandi wanze kubarekura ngo bagende

Exodus9:5 Nuko Uhoraho agena igihe

Exodus9:7 Farawo arabaririza
Exodus9:8 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni

Exodus9:10 Benda rero umurayi w’itanura
Exodus9:11 Na ba bapfumu ntibashobora guhinguka imbere ya Musa ku mpamvu y’ibibyimba
Exodus9:12 Nyamara Uhoraho atera umutima wa Farawo kunangira
Exodus9:13 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus9:14 Kuko ubu ngubu ho
Exodus9:15 Iyo mbishaka

Exodus9:18 dore ejo kuri aya magingo nzagusha urubura rw’urucukirane
Exodus9:19 None rero
Exodus9:20 Mu bagaragu ba Farawo

Exodus11:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus11:2 Ubwire rubanda
Exodus11:3 Nuko Uhoraho atera Abanyamisiri kubakira neza. Na Musa kandi ubwe yarebwagaho igihangange mu gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus11:4 Musa aravuga ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Mu ijoro rishyira igicuku
Exodus11:5 maze icyavutse uburiza cyose mu gihugu cya Misiri kizapfe
Exodus11:6 Mu gihugu cya Misiri hose hazacura imiborogo
Exodus11:7 Nyamara mu Bayisraheli bose nta n’imbwa izamokera umuntu cyangwa inyamaswa

Exodus11:9 Uhoraho yungamo abwira Musa

Exodus12:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni bari mu gihugu cya Misiri
Exodus12:2 «Uku kwezi kuzababere intangiriro y’amezi
Exodus12:3 Nimubwire imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli
Exodus12:4 Niba urugo rurimo abantu bake kuri iryo tungo
Exodus12:5 Iryo tungo rizabe ridafite inenge
Exodus12:6 Muzarigumane kugeza ku munsi wa cumi n’ine w’uku kwezi
Exodus12:7 Bazende ku maraso y’iryo tungo
Exodus12:8 Bazarye inyama zaryo muri iryo joro. Bazazirye zokeje
Exodus12:9 Ntimuzagire icyo murya cyazo ari kibisi cyangwa se cyatetswe mu mazi: byose bizabe byokeje gusa
Exodus12:10 Mugomba kuzaba mwarangije butaracya; kandi nihagira ibisaguka mu gitondo
Exodus12:11 Iryo tungo muzarirya mutya: muzabe mukenyeje umukoba
Exodus12:12 Muri iryo joro
Exodus12:13 Amaraso azababera ikimenyetso ku mazu muzaba murimo. Nzabona amaraso
Exodus12:14 Uwo munsi uzababere urwibutso; buri mwaka muzajye mukora urugendo rwo kujya gusingiza Uhoraho. Muzajye muhimbaza uwo munsi uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana. Ngiryo itegeko ridakuka mbahaye.’»
Exodus12:15 Uhoraho yungamo ati «Mu minsi irindwi
Exodus12:16 Ku munsi wa mbere muzagire ikoraniro ritagatifu
Exodus12:17 Muzubahirize umunsi mukuru w’imigati idasembuye
Exodus12:18 Mu kwezi kwa mbere
Exodus12:19 Mu minsi irindwi ntihazagire imisemburo iba mu mazu yanyu. Kandi nihagira urya umugati usembuye
Exodus12:20 Ntimuzagire icyo murya na kinzinya kirimo umusemburo. Aho muzaba mutuye hose
Exodus12:21 Musa atumiza abakuru bose b’imiryango ya Israheli
Exodus12:22 Muzende umushandiko w’icyuhagiro
Exodus12:23 Igihe Uhoraho azambukiranya Misiri kugira ngo ayoreke
Exodus12:24 Ibyo maze kubabwira ni itegeko muzakurikiza
Exodus12:25 Igihe rero muzaba mwarinjiye mu gihugu Uhoraho azabaha nk’uko yabivuze mbere
Exodus12:26 Abana banyu nibababaza ngo: Uwo muhango mukoze uvuga iki?
Exodus12:27 muzabasubize muti ’Ni igitambo cya Pasika dutuye Uhoraho; kuko yahise imbere y’ingo z’Abayisraheli igihe bari mu Misiri
Exodus12:28 Hanyuma Abayisraheli barataha
Exodus12:29 Igicuku rero kinishye
Exodus12:30 Muri iryo joro
Exodus12:31 Nuko Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni nijoro
Exodus12:32 Mushorere kandi n’amatungo yanyu
Exodus12:33 Abanyamisiri bashushubikanya Abayisraheli ngo babavire mu gihugu ako kanya. Koko rero baravugaga bati «Twese tugiye gupfira gushira!»
Exodus12:34 Imbaga y’Abayisraheli ihagurukana icyanga cy’imigati kitaratangira gututumba; ibyibo babipfunyika mu bishura byabo
Exodus12:35 Abayisraheli bari bagenjeje uko Musa yari yababwiye: bari batiye Abanyamisiri ibintu bya feza
Exodus12:36 kuko Uhoraho yari yatumye Abanyamisiri borohera imbaga ye
Exodus12:37 Abayisraheli bahaguruka i Ramusesi berekeza i Sukoti; bagenda ari abagabo nk’ibihumbi magana atandatu
Exodus12:38 Byongeye
Exodus12:39 Icyanga cy’imigati bari bavanye mu Misiri baracyotsa
Exodus12:40 Abayisraheli bamaze imyaka magana ane na mirongo itatu mu Misiri.
Exodus12:41 Iyo myaka yose imaze gushira
Exodus12:42 Ryabaye ijoro ryo gutaramira Uhoraho igihe abavanye mu Misiri. Kuva ubwo
Exodus12:43 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni
Exodus12:44 Umucakara wese uzaba yaraguzwe ifeza
Exodus12:45 Naho umushyitsi n’umucanshuro
Exodus12:46 Muzayirire mu nzu nyirizina. Ntihazagire inyama zayo musohokana hanze
Exodus12:47 Imbaga yose ya Israheli izahimbaze Pasika.
Exodus12:48 Nihagira umusuhuke ucumbitse iwawe
Exodus12:49 Itegeko rero rizaba rimwe ku muturage no ku musuhuke uzaba abatuyemo.»
Exodus12:50 Abayisraheli bose bakora uko Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa na Aroni; babigenza batyo.
Exodus12:51 Nuko kuri uwo munsi nyine
Exodus13:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa aya magambo
Exodus13:2 «Uburiza bwose muri Israheli
Exodus13:3 Musa abwira rubanda
Exodus13:4 kuko musohotse ubu ngubu mu kwezi kw’Amahundo.
Exodus13:5 Igihe rero Uhoraho azaba yakwinjije mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani
Exodus13:6 Uzamare iminsi irindwi utunzwe gusa n’imigati idasembuye; maze ku munsi wa karindwi hazabe umunsi mukuru wo gusingiza Uhoraho.
Exodus13:7 Bazamara iminsi irindwi barya imigati idasembuye. Ntihazagire umugati usembuye uboneka iwawe
Exodus13:8 Kuri uwo munsi uzasobanurire umwana wawe
Exodus13:9 Uhoraho yagukuye mu Misiri abigirishije imbaraga z’ukuboko kwe. Ngicyo ikizakubera nk’ikimenyetso mu kiganza cyawe
Exodus13:10 Uzubahirize iryo tegeko igihe cyaryo kigeze
Exodus13:11 Igihe rero Uhoraho azaba yakwinjije mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani
Exodus13:12 uzature Uhoraho ikivutse uburiza cyose ku mugore
Exodus13:13 Icyakora uburiza bwose bw’indogobe
Exodus13:14 Igihe rero umwana wawe azakubaza ngo: ’Ibi ngibi bivuga iki?’ uzamusubize uti ’Ni uko Uhoraho yatuvanye mu Misiri
Exodus13:15 Koko rero
Exodus13:16 Ibyo bizakubera nk’ikimenyetso mu kiganza cyawe
Exodus13:17 Farawo amaze kurekura imbaga y’Abayisraheli ngo bigendere
Exodus13:18 Imana rero inyuza rubanda mu nzira iziguye
Exodus13:19 Musa yimukana amagufwa ya Yozefu
Exodus13:20 Bahaguruka rero i Sukoti
Exodus13:21 Uhoraho ubwe yabagendaga imbere: ku manywa yabaga ari mu nkingi y’agacu kugira ngo abayobore inzira
Exodus13:22 Inkingi y’agacu ntiyaburaga na rimwe kujya rubanda imbere ku manywa
Exodus14:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus14:2 «Bwira Abayisraheli bahindure icyerekezo
Exodus14:3 Maze Farawo azabone ubwigamba ku Bayisraheli ngo: Dore bayobagurikiye mu gihugu
Exodus14:4 Ubwo nzatera umutima wa Farawo kunangira
Exodus14:5 Umwami wa Misiri aza kumenya ko umuryango w’Abayisraheli wacitse. Ubwo ngubwo umutima wa Farawo n’uw’abagaragu be urabirinduka; maze baravuga bati «Byagenze bite rwose kugira ngo tureke Abayisraheli bagenda
Exodus14:6 Nuko Farawo azirikisha amafarasi ku igare rye
Exodus14:7 Yajyanye amagare magana atandatu y’indobanure

Exodus25:13 Uzabaze imijishi mu giti cy’umunyinya

Exodus25:15 Imijishi izagume mu bifunga by’ubushyinguro
Exodus25:16 Uzashyire mu bushyinguro urwibutso nzaguha.
Exodus25:17 Uzakore urwicurizo muri zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus25:18 Uzakore n’Abakerubimu babiri muri zahabu
Exodus25:19 Abo Bakerubimu uzabashyire umwe ku ruhande rumwe
Exodus25:20 Abakerubimu bazagire amababa aramburiye hejuru
Exodus25:21 Uzashyire urwicurizo hejuru y’ubushyinguro
Exodus25:22 Aho ngaho nzajya mpabonanira nawe
Exodus25:23 Uzakore ameza mu giti cy’umunyinya
Exodus25:24 Uzayomekeho zahabu iyunguruye hanyuma uzayazengurutseho umusozo wa zahabu.
Exodus25:25 Hagati y’amaguru y’ameza uzatambikeho utubaho tungana no mu kiganza
Exodus25:26 Uzakore ibifunga bine bya zahabu
Exodus25:27 Ibifunga bizaba hafi y’utubaho dutambitse ku maguru
Exodus25:28 Imijishi uzayikore mu biti by’iminyinya
Exodus25:29 Uzakore kandi amasahani yayo
Exodus25:30 Hejuru y’ameza uzateguraho imigati y’umumuriko
Exodus25:31 Uzakore ikinyarumuri muri zahabu iyunguruye. Ibice byose by’icyo kinyarumuri bazabicure bifatanye: ikirenge n’uruti byacyo
Exodus25:32 Amashami atandatu azashingira ku mpande: amashami atatu y’ikinyarumuri ku ruhande rumwe rwacyo
Exodus25:33 Kuri buri shami hazabe imitako ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo. Bizagende bityo kuri ya mashami atandatu y’ikinyarumuri.
Exodus25:34 Uruti rw’ikinyarumuri ubwarwo ruzagire imitako ine ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo.
Exodus25:35 Hazabe umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri ya mbere ashingiye ku ruti rwacyo
Exodus25:36 Ibice byose by’icyo kinyarumuri
Exodus25:37 Uzakore amatara yacyo arindwi
Exodus25:38 Ibikoresho bigenewe gutunganya ayo matara bizabe bikozwe muri zahabu iyunguruye.
Exodus25:39 Ikinyarumuri kizakorwe n’italenta imwe ya zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus25:40 Itegereze
Exodus26:1 Ingoro ubwayo izabe igizwe n’imyenda cumi. Iyo myenda izadodwe n’abahanga bazi gukoresha hariri inetereye
Exodus26:2 Buri mwenda uzareshya n’imikono makumyabiri n’umunani mu burebure
Exodus26:3 Muri iyo myenda bazateranya itanu ukwayo
Exodus26:4 Hanyuma uzakore imikondo igizwe n’utugozi tw’ubwoya butukura busobekeranye.
Exodus26:5 Uzashyire imikondo mirongo itanu ku ruhande rumwe rw’urufatane rwa mbere
Exodus26:6 Byongeye
Exodus26:7 Ubundi
Exodus26:8 Iyo myenda yose uko ari cumi n’umwe izaba ingana: imikono mirongo itatu mu burebure
Exodus26:9 Muri iyo myenda bazateranya itanu ukwayo
Exodus26:10 Uzashyire imikondo mirongo itanu ku ruhande rw’urufatane rwa mbere
Exodus26:11 Uzakore n’ibifungo mirongo itanu by’umuringa
Exodus26:12 Kuko iyo myenda igizwe n’ubwoya bw’ihene isumba iya mbere mu burebure
Exodus26:13 no mu mpande zayo zombi. Bityo ihema ryose rizasakarwe neza.
Exodus26:14 Ndetse uzaryongereho n’impu z’amasekurume n’iz’ibihura.
Exodus26:15 Uzashinge kandi n’inkuta z’imbaho zibajwe mu biti by’umunyinya
Exodus26:16 Buri rubaho ruzagire uburebure bw’imikono cumi
Exodus26:17 Kandi izo mbaho uzazifatanye zibe indumane
Exodus26:18 Imbaho makumyabiri zifatanye zizashyigikira Ingoro mu ruhande rwerekera muri Negevu
Exodus26:19 Mu nsi ya buri rubaho uko ari makumyabiri
Exodus26:20 No ku rundi ruhande
Exodus26:21 hamwe n’ibishyigikizo byazo mirongo ine bya feza: ibishyigikizo bibiri mu nsi y’urubaho rumwe
Exodus26:22 Naho mu ruhande rw’uburengerazuba
Exodus26:23 No mu maguni y’Ingoro
Exodus26:24 zirusha izindi gufatana kubera inkwikiriro zazo nyinshi.
Exodus26:25 Inyuma y’Ingoro rero hazabe imbaho munani
Exodus26:26 Uzakore kandi imitambiko mu biti by’iminyinya
Exodus26:27 n’imitambiko itanu igenewe imbaho z’urundi ruhande rw’Ingoro n’imitambiko itanu igenewe imbaho z’uruhande rw’inyuma y’Ingoro
Exodus26:28 Hazabe umutambiko umwe wambukiranya imbaho zose
Exodus26:29 Imbaho uzazomekeho zahabu
Exodus26:30 Uzubake Ingoro ukurikije urugero werekewe hejuru y’umusozi.
Exodus26:31 Uzakore umubambiko w’umwenda w’isine
Exodus26:32 Uzawumanike ku nkingi enye z’ibiti by’umunyinya zometseho zahabu
Exodus26:33 Uzashyire umubambiko mu nsi ya bya bifunga; maze aho ngaho inyuma y’umubambiko
Exodus26:34 Uzashyire urwicurizo hejuru y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano mu mbere y’Ingoro.
Exodus26:35 Utereke ameza hino y’umubambiko mu ruhande rw’amajyaruguru y’Ingoro. Naho ikinyarumuri uzagishyire ku ruhande rw’amajyepfo
Exodus26:36 Umuryango w’ihema uzawukorere uwundi mubambiko mu bwoya bw’isine
Exodus26:37 Uwo mubambiko uzawukorere inkingi eshanu z’ibiti by’iminyinya
Exodus27:1 Uzubake urutambiro mu biti by’iminyinya
Exodus27:2 Ku nguni zarwo uko ari enye
Exodus27:3 Urutambiro uzarukorere ibyungo byo gukuburiramo ivu ryarwo
Exodus27:4 Urutambiro uzarukorere uruzitiro mu twuma tw’umuringa
Exodus27:5 Urwo ruzitiro ruzazenguruka urutambiro
Exodus27:6 Uzakorere urutambiro imijishi mu giti cy’umunyinya
Exodus27:7 Bazinjize iyo mijishi mu bifunga
Exodus27:8 Uzarukore mu mbaho
Exodus27:9 Uzubake kandi urugo ruzengurutse Ingoro. Mu ruhande rw’amajyepfo yayo
Exodus27:10 Iyo mibambiko izafatwe n’inkingi makumyabiri
Exodus27:11 Bityo kandi

Exodus28:2 Umuvandimwe wawe Aroni

Exodus28:4 Dore imyambaro bazakora: umusesuragituza
Exodus28:5 Bazabikore muri zahabu

Exodus28:19 Mu musitari wa gatatu hashyirwe opali
Exodus28:20 Mu musitari wa kane hashyirwe: ikrizoliti

Exodus34:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus34:2 Uzabe witeguye ejo mu gitondo cya kare
Exodus34:3 Ntihazagire umuntu uzamukana nawe; ntihazagire n’ukandagira kuri uwo musozi aho ariho hose; ndetse n’amatungo magufi cyangwa maremare ntazarishe ahegereye uyu musozi.»
Exodus34:4 Nuko Musa abaza ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye nk’ibya mbere. Arazinduka
Exodus34:5 Nuko Uhoraho amanuka mu gacu
Exodus34:6 Uhoraho rero anyura imbere ya Musa
Exodus34:7 Imana igaragariza ubuntu bwayo ibisekuru ibihumbi n’ibihumbi
Exodus34:8 Ako kanya Musa akubita amavi ku butaka
Exodus34:9 Nuko aravuga ati «Nyagasani
Exodus34:10 Uhoraho rero aravuga ati «Ngiye kugirana nawe Isezerano! Mu ruhame rw’umuryango wawe wose
Exodus34:11 Urakurikize neza ibyo ngutegeka uyu munsi. Dore nzirukana imbere yawe Umuhemori
Exodus34:12 Uzirinde kugirana isezerano n’abaturage b’igihugu ugiyemo
Exodus34:13 Ahubwo muzahirike intambiro zabo
Exodus34:14 Ntuzagire rero indi mana upfukamira
Exodus34:15 Uramenye ntuzagirane isezerano n’abatuye icyo gihugu
Exodus34:16 N’umuhungu wawe ntuzamusabire mu bakobwa babo
Exodus34:17 Ntuziremere imana zicuzwe mu cyuma.
Exodus34:18 Uzubahirize iminsi mikuru y’imigati idasembuye. Mu minsi irindwi uzarye imigati idasembuye nk’uko nabigutegetse
Exodus34:19 Umuhungu wavutse uburiza wese ni uwanjye
Exodus34:20 Uburiza bw’indogobe uzabucunguze umwana w’intama; niba utayibucunguje
Exodus34:21 Uzakore imirimo iminsi itandatu
Exodus34:22 Uzubahirize umunsi mukuru w’Ibyumweru ubigirira kurya umuganura w’ingano zeze. Uzubahirize n’umunsi mukuru w’Ihunika mu ndunduro y’umwaka.
Exodus34:23 Gatatu mu mwaka
Exodus34:24 Koko rero nimara kwirukana amahanga imbere yawe
Exodus34:25 Ntuzanture igitambo cy’amaraso giherekejwe n’imigati isembuye; kandi igitambo uturiye umunsi mukuru wa Pasika ntikizarenge ijoro ngo kigere mu gitondo.
Exodus34:26 Uzazane mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho Imana yawe umuganura w’imbuto zeze mu murima wawe. Ntuzateke umwana w’ihene mu mahenehene ya nyina.»
Exodus34:27 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Exodus34:28 Musa agumana aho ngaho n’Uhoraho iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine
Exodus34:29 Musa amanuka ku musozi wa Sinayi afite mu ntoki ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye byanditseho Isezerano. Ubwo yamanukaga
Exodus34:30 Aroni n’Abayisraheli bose babona Musa
Exodus34:31 Musa arabahamagara; Aroni n’abatware bose b’imbaga bagaruka bamusanga
Exodus34:32 Hanyuma Abayisraheli bose baramwegera
Exodus34:33 Musa arangije kubibabwira
Exodus34:34 Iyo Musa yabaga yinjiye imbere y’Uhoraho ngo avugane na we
Exodus34:35 Abayisraheli babonaga mu maso ha Musa harabagirana. Nuko Musa agasubiza igitambaro mu maso
Exodus35:1 Musa ahamagaza imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli
Exodus35:2 Mu minsi itandatu muzakore imirimo
Exodus35:3 Ntimuzacana umuriro mu nzu yanyu n’imwe ku munsi w’isabato.»
Exodus35:4 Musa abwira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli aya magambo
Exodus35:5 Nimugabanye ku bintu byanyu ituro ry’Uhoraho. Umuntu wese w’umutima utagundira azazanira Uhoraho imfashanyo ye: zahabu
Exodus35:6 imyenda y’isine
Exodus35:7 impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina
Exodus35:8 n’amavuta y’imizeti yo gucana itara
Exodus35:9 amabuye y’agaciro
Exodus35:10 N’abakozi banyu bose b’abahanga nibaze
Exodus35:11 Ibyo ni Ingoro n’ihema ryayo
Exodus35:12 ubushyinguro n’imijishi yabwo
Exodus35:13 ameza hamwe n’imijishi yayo n’ibikoresho byayo byose
Exodus35:14 ikinyarumuri cyo kumurika
Exodus35:15 urutambiro rw’imibavu n’imijishi; amavuta yo gusiga n’imibavu yo gutwika; umubambiko ukinze ku muryango w’Ingoro;
Exodus35:16 urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa n’uruzitiro rwarwo rw’umuringa
Exodus35:17 imibambiko ikingiye urugo
Exodus35:18 imiganda y’Ingoro
Exodus35:19 imyambaro y’ibirori igenewe imihango mu Ngoro
Exodus35:20 Nuko ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli rimaze kuva iruhande rwa Musa
Exodus35:21 ab’umutima ukeye kandi wuzuye ubuntu bose baraza
Exodus35:22 Haza abagabo kimwe n’abagore; ab’umutima ugira ubuntu bazana amaherena
Exodus35:23 Bazana n’ibindi bafite imuhira: imyenda y’isine
Exodus35:24 Abari bateganyije bose ituro rya feza n’umuringa
Exodus35:25 Abagore bose bari bafite ubuhanga bwo gukaraga ubudodo
Exodus35:26 Abagore bose bari babifitiye ubuhanga
Exodus35:27 Abatware b’imiryango bazana amabuye y’agaciro
Exodus35:28 bazana imibavu n’amavuta y’imizeti bigenewe amatara
Exodus35:29 Mbese Abayisraheli bose
Exodus35:30 Nyuma Musa abwira Abayisraheli
Exodus35:31 Yamwujujemo umwuka w’Imana
Exodus35:32 kugira ngo ahimbe ibikoresho by’agaciro
Exodus35:33 kugira ngo aconge amabuye y’indobanure
Exodus35:34 Yashyize kandi mu mutima we ingabire yo kubyigisha
Exodus35:35 Bombi yabujujemo ubwenge bwo gukora imirimo yose yo gusharaga
Exodus36:1 Besaleli
Exodus36:2 Musa ahamagaza Besaleli
Exodus36:3 Musa abaha amaturo yose Abayisraheli bari barazaniye gutunganya imirimo y’ubwubatsi bw’Ingoro kandi buri gitondo imbaga igakomeza kuzanira Musa amaturo yishakiye.
Exodus36:4 Nuko abo bahanga bakoraga imirimo y’Ingoro
Exodus36:5 «Imbaga iratura ibirengeje kure ibya ngombwa bigenewe kurangiza imirimo Uhoraho yategetse gukora!»
Exodus36:6 Musa atanga itegeko
Exodus36:7 kuko ibyo bari bazanye byari bihagije ku mirimo yose yagombaga gukorwa
Exodus36:8 Nuko abakozi bose barushaga abandi ubuhanga bashinga Ingoro. Bategura imyenda cumi muri hariri ihotoye
Exodus36:9 Uburebure bw’umwenda bwari imikono makumyabiri n’umunani. Ubugari bw’umwenda bukaba imikono ine. Imyenda yose yaraeshyaga.
Exodus36:10 Bafatanya itanu muri iyo myenda
Exodus36:11 Bashyira utugozi tw’umuhemba w’ibihogo ku muguno w’umwenda waherukaga urufatane rwa mbere; babigenza batyo no ku mwenda wabanzirizaga urufatane rwa kabiri.
Exodus36:12 Bapfundika utugozi mirongo itanu ku mwenda waherukaga urufatane rwa mbere; bapfundika n’utugozi mirongo itanu ku mwenda wabanzirizaga urufatane rwa kabiri
Exodus36:13 Bakora ibifungo mirongo itanu bya zahabu bafungisha urufatane rwa mbere ku rundi
Exodus36:14 Bakora kandi n’indi myenda y’ubwoya bw’ihene
Exodus36:15 Uburebure bw’umwenda bwari imikono mirongo itatu
Exodus36:16 Muri iyo myenda bateranya itanu ukwayo
Exodus36:17 Bashyira utugozi mirongo itanu ku musozo w’umwenda waherukaga urufatane rumwe; bashyira kandi utugozi mirongo itanu ku musozo w’umwenda wabanzirizaga urufatane rwa kabiri.
Exodus36:18 Bakora n’ibifungo mirongo itanu by’umuringa byo gufungisha ibyo bifatane byombi. Bityo ihema ryose rikaba risakawe neza.
Exodus36:19 Byongeye ihema barikorera umutwikiro w’impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina
Exodus36:20 Ingoro kandi bayikorera inkuta z’imbaho mu biti by’iminyinya zishinze impagarike.
Exodus36:21 Uburebure bw’urubaho bwari imikono cumi
Exodus36:22 Kuri buri rubaho hari inkwikiriro ebyiri zifatanye rumwe ku rundi. Babigenza batyo ku mbaho zose z’Ingoro.
Exodus36:23 Bategurira Ingoro imbaho makumyabiri ku ruhande rw’amajyepfo.
Exodus36:24 Mu nsi y’izo mbaho makumyabiri
Exodus36:25 Ku ruhande rwa kabiri rw’Ingoro rwerekeye amajyaruguru
Exodus36:26 kimwe n’ibishyigikizo byazo mirongo ine bya feza
Exodus36:27 N’urukuta rw’inyuma y’Ingoro barutegurira imbaho esheshatu
Exodus36:28 bategura n’imbaho ebyiri zigenewe inguni z’inyuma y’Ingoro.
Exodus36:29 Izo zarushaga izindi gufatana kubera inkwikiriro zazo nyinshi.
Exodus36:30 Bityo hari imbaho munani kumwe n’ibishyigikizo byazo bya feza
Exodus36:31 Bakora n’imitambiko mu biti by’iminyinya: itanu igenewe imbaho o ku ruhande rwa mbere rw’Ingoro
Exodus36:32 itanu igenewe imbaho zo ku ruhande rwa kabiri rw’Ingoro
Exodus36:33 Bategura umutambiko umwe wambukiranyaga imbaho
Exodus36:34 Imbaho bazomekaho zahabu
Exodus36:35 Bakora umubambiko mu bwoya bw’isine
Exodus36:36 Bawubariza inkingi enye z’umunyinya zometseho zahabu
Exodus36:37 Umuryango w’ihema bawudodera uwundi mubambiko watatswe n’umuhanga mu bwoya bw’isine
Exodus36:38 Uwo mubambiko bawukorera inkingi eshanu
Exodus37:1 Besaleli abaza ubushyinguro mu giti cy’umunyinya. Uburebure bwabwo bwari imikono ibiri n’igice
Exodus37:2 Imbere n’inyuma
Exodus37:3 Abucurira ibifunga bine bya zahabu bigenewe amaguru yabwo
Exodus37:4 Abaza imijishi mu giti cy’umunyinya maze ayomekaho zahabu.
Exodus37:5 Mu bifunga biri ku mpande z’ubushyinguro yinjizamo imijishi yo kubuheka.
Exodus37:6 Akora urwicurizo muri zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus37:7 Akora Abakerubimu babiri muri zahabu. Abacura muri zahabu itsitse
Exodus37:8 Umukerubimu umwe ku mutwe umwe n’undi Mukerubimu ku wundi mutwe. Abashyira ku mitwe yombi y’urwicurizo
Exodus37:9 Abakerubimu bari bafite amababa aramburiye hejuru y’urwicurizo
Exodus37:10 Akora ameza mu giti cy’umunyinya. Uburebure bwayo bwari imikono ibiri
Exodus37:11 Ayomekaho zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus37:12 Hagati y’amaguru y’ameza atambikaho utubaho tungana no mu kiganza
Exodus37:13 Ameza ayacurira ibifunga bine bya zahabu
Exodus37:14 Iruhande rw’imitambiko
Exodus37:15 Akora imijishi mu biti by’iminyinya
Exodus37:16 Akora ibikoresho bigenewe ameza: amasahani
Exodus37:17 Hanyuma Besaleli akora ikinyarumuri muri zahabu iyunguruye. Ikirenge cyacyo n’uruti rwacyo
Exodus37:18 Amashami atandatu yari ashingiye ku mpande zacyo: amashami atatu mu ruhande rumwe rw’ikinyarumuri
Exodus37:19 Ku ishami rimwe hari imitako itatu ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo
Exodus37:20 Uruti ubwarwo rw’ikinyarumuri rwari rufite imitako ine ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo.
Exodus37:21 Hari umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri ya mbere ashingiye ku ruti rwacyo
Exodus37:22 Iyo mibumburo n’ayo mashami byari bifatanye n’ikinyarumuri; byose byari bicuze muri zahabu itsitse kandi iyunguruye.
Exodus37:23 Akora amatara yacyo arindwi
Exodus37:24 Akoresha italenta imwe ya zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus37:25 Akora urutambiro rw’imibavu mu giti cy’umunyinya; uburebure bwarwo bwari umukono umwe
Exodus37:26 Arwomekaho zahabu iyunguruye ku ruhande rwo hejuru
Exodus37:27 Arukorera ibifunga muri zahabu mu nsi y’umuguno warwo
Exodus37:28 Akora imijishi mu biti by’iminyinya maze ayomekaho zahabu.
Exodus37:29 Ategura amavuta agenewe isigwa ritagatifu
Exodus38:1 Akora urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa
Exodus38:2 Ku mfuruka zarwo enye
Exodus38:3 Akora ibikoresho byose by’urutambiro: ibyungo byo kuyoreramo ivu
Exodus38:4 Urutambiro arukorera uruzitiro rw’utwuma tw’umuringa
Exodus38:5 Acura ibifunga bine bigenewe imfuruka enye z’uruzitiro rw’umuringa ngo byinjizwemo imijishi.
Exodus38:6 Akora imijishi mu biti by’iminyinya
Exodus38:7 Yinjiza imijishi mu bifunga
Exodus38:8 Akora igikarabiro mu muringa
Exodus38:9 Yubaka urugo rukikije Ingoro. Mu ruhande rw’amajyepfo yayo
Exodus38:10 Iyo mibambiko yari ifashwe n’inkingi makumyabiri
Exodus38:11 Mu ruhande rw’amajyaruguru hari imibambiko ifite uburebure bw’imikono ijana
Exodus38:12 Mu ruhande rw’uburengerazuba hari imibambiko ifite uburebure bw’imikono mirongo itanu hamwe n’inkingi cumi n’ibishyigikizo byazo cumi; intendekero zo ku nkingi n’ibifunga byabyo
Exodus38:13 No mu ruhande rw’uburasirazuba
Exodus38:14 hakaba imikono cumi n’itanu y’imibamiko mu ruhande rumwe
Exodus38:15 Ubwo rero mu ruhande rumwe rw’irembo ry’urugo no mu rundi ruhande hari hameze kimwe: imikono cumi n’itanu y’imibambiko
Exodus38:16 Imibambiko yose yakingirizaga urugo yari ikozwe muri hariri ihotoye.
Exodus38:17 Ibishyigikizo by’inkingi byari bikozwe mu muringa
Exodus38:18 Umwenda w’irembo ry’urugo wari uboshywe mu bwoya bw’isine
Exodus38:19 Inkingi zazo enye n’ibishyigikizo byazo bine byari bikozwe mu muringa
Exodus38:20 Inkingi zose z’Ingoro n’iz’urugo zari mu muringa.
Exodus38:21 Dore umubare w’ibintu byakoreshejwe bubaka Ingoro
Exodus38:22 Besaleli mwene Uri
Exodus38:23 Yabifashijwemo na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki
Exodus38:24 Zahabu yose bari batuye kandi yakoreshejwe umurimo wo kubaka Ingoro
Exodus38:25 Feza yazanywe igihe babaruraga ikoraniro
Exodus38:26 Buri muntu wari ufite imyaka makumyabiri cyangwa ayirengeje
Exodus38:27 Amatalenta ijana ya feza yakoreshejwe gucuramo ibishyigikizo by’Ingoro n’ibishyigikizo by’umubambiko; ibishyigikizo ijana ku matalenta ijana bihwanye rero n’italenta imwe ku gishyigikizo kimwe.
Exodus38:28 Naho ya masikeli igihumbi magana arindwi mirongo irindwi n’atanu ya feza
Exodus38:29 Umuringa bari batuye wanganaga n’amatalenta mirongo irindwi n’amasikeli ibihumbi bibiri magana ane.
Exodus38:30 Bayakoresha ibishyigikizo by’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus38:31 ibishyigikizo by’urugo rukikije Ingoro
Exodus39:1 Badoda imyambaro mu bwoya bw’isine
Exodus39:2 Bakora umusanganyagihimba muri zahabu
Exodus39:3 Zahabu bayihwahuza inyundo
Exodus39:4 Bakora n’imishumi ibiri iteye ku mitwe yombi y’umusanganyagihimba igenewe kuwufatisha ku ntugu.
Exodus39:5 Umukandara wawo uciye hejuru
Exodus39:6 Batunganya amabuye y’agaciro
Exodus39:7 Bashyira ayo mabuye ku mishumi y’intugu ifata umusanganyagihimba
Exodus39:8 Hanyuma bakora umusesuragituza wahimbanywe ubuhanga
Exodus39:9 Wari ufite impande zireshya
Exodus39:10 Bawutakaho imisitari ine y’amabuye. Umusitari wa mbere wariho isarudoni
Exodus39:11 umusitari wa kabiri wariho malakita
Exodus39:12 umusitari wa gatatu wariho opali
Exodus39:13 umusitari wa kane wariho ikirizoliti
Exodus39:14 Amabuye yari ahwanye n’amazina y’abana ba Israheli uko ari cumi na babiri. Yari asharazwe nko muri kashe
Exodus39:15 Umusesuragituza bawucurira imikufi ya zahabu iyunguruye iboshye nk’utuziriko.
Exodus39:16 Bakora utugotesho tubiri twa zahabu n’ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu
Exodus39:17 Imitwe ya ya mikufi ibiri ya zahabu bayinjiza mu tugotesho twombi.
Exodus39:18 Nuko babishyira hejuru y’imishumi y’intugu z’umusanganyagihimba
Exodus39:19 Bakora ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu
Exodus39:20 Barongera bakora ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu
Exodus39:21 Umusesuragituza bawupfundikisha ibifunga byawo ku bifunga by’umusanganyagihimba
Exodus39:22 Bakora igishura cy’umusanganyagituza
Exodus39:23 Mu gishura rwagati
Exodus39:24 Ku musozo wo hasi batendekaho amapfundo y’ubwoya bw’isine
Exodus39:25 Bakora amayugi ya zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus39:26 iyugi rimwe n’ipfundo rimwe
Exodus39:27 Baboha n’amakanzu ya hariri
Exodus39:28 Bakora igitambaro cy’umutwe muri hariri
Exodus39:29 imikandara ya hariri ihotoye n’ubwoya bw’isine
Exodus39:30 Bakora ikamba muri zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus39:31 Bashyiraho injishi y’umuhemba w’ibihogo yo kurifunga ku gitambaro cyo mu mutwe
Exodus39:32 Nguko uko imirimo yose y’Ingoro n’iy’ihema ry’ibonaniro yarangiye. Abayisraheli batunganyije byose
Exodus39:33 Bamurikira Musa ibigize Ingoro ari byo ibi ngibi: ihema n’ibikoresho byaryo
Exodus39:34 umutwikiro w’impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina
Exodus39:35 ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano hamwe n’imijishi yabwo
Exodus39:36 ameza hamwe n’ibikoresho byayo n’imigati y’umumuriko;
Exodus39:37 ikinyarumuri cya zahabu iyunguruye
Exodus39:38 urutambiro rwa zahabu
Exodus39:39 urutambiro rw’umuringa
Exodus39:40 imibambiko y’urugo rukikije Ingoro
Exodus39:41 imyambaro mitagatifu igenewe imihango yo mu Ngoro
Exodus39:42 Abayisraheli bakoze iyo mirimo yose bakurikije ibyo Uhoraho yari yarategetse Musa.
Exodus39:43 Musa areba ibyakozwe byose
Exodus40:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa aya magambo
Exodus40:2 «Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere
Exodus40:3 Uzarishyiremo ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano
Exodus40:4 Uzazane ameza
Exodus40:5 Urutambirourwa zahabu rugenewe imibavu uzarutereke imbere y’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano
Exodus40:6 Urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa uzarutereke imbere y’umuryango w’Ingoro
Exodus40:7 Igikarabiro uzagitereke hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’urutambiro
Exodus40:8 Uzatunganye urugo hirya no hino
Exodus40:9 Uzende amavuta yo gusiga
Exodus40:10 Uzasige amavuta urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa
Exodus40:11 Uzasige amavuta igikarabiro hamwe n’urugata rwacyo
Exodus40:12 Uzigize Aroni n’abahungu be imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:13 hanyuma wambike Aroni imyambaro mitagatifu
Exodus40:14 N’abahungu be
Exodus40:15 ubasige amavuta nk’uko uzaba wasize se amavuta
Exodus40:16 Musa arumvira
Exodus40:17 Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere k’umwaka wa kabiri Ingoro irashingwa.
Exodus40:18 Musa ashinga Ingoro; ashinga ibishyigikizo byayo
Exodus40:19 Arambura ihema hejuru y’Ingoro
Exodus40:20 Yenda amabuye y’Isezerano
Exodus40:21 Nuko ajyana ubushyinguro mu Ngoro; amanika umubambiko muri yo rwagati
Exodus40:22 Atereka ameza mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:23 maze ayateguraho urutonde rw’imigati imbere y’Uhoraho
Exodus40:24 Ashyira ikinyarumuri mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:25 nuko agishyiraho amatara imbere y’Uhoraho
Exodus40:26 Ashinga urutambiro rwa zahabu mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:27 nuko atwikiraho imibavu
Exodus40:28 Abambika umwenda ku muryango w’ihema.
Exodus40:29 Ashinga urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa ku muryango w’Ingoro
Exodus40:30 Ashyira igikarabiro hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’urutambiro
Exodus40:31 Musa
Exodus40:32 Igihe cyose binjiraga mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:33 Atunganya urugo ruzengurutse Ingoro n’urutambiro
Exodus40:34 Ubwo rero agacu kabudika ku ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:35 Musa ntiyashobora kwinjira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:36 Iyo agacu kavaga ku Ngoro
Exodus40:37 Naho iyo agacu kabaga katavuye ku Ngoro ngo kazamuke hejuru
Exodus40:38 Koko rero
Leviticus1:1 Uhoraho ahamagara Musa maze amubwirira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro ati
Leviticus1:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Muri mwe nihagira uzanira Uhoraho ituro
Leviticus1:3 Niba ashaka gutura igitambo gitwikwa cyo mu matungo maremare
Leviticus1:4 maze arambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo
Leviticus1:5 Iryo tungo azarisogotera imbere y’Uhoraho
Leviticus1:6 Icyo gitambo bazagikuraho uruhu
Leviticus1:7 maze bene Aroni umuherezabitambo bacane umuriro ku rutambiro bawugerekeho inkwi.
Leviticus1:8 Hanyuma ya mirwi
Leviticus1:9 Ibyo mu nda
Leviticus1:10 Niba hari ushaka gutura igitambo gitwikwa cyo mu matungo magufiya yo mu bana b’intama cyangwa b’ihene
Leviticus1:11 Azayicira imbere y’Uhoraho ahagana mu majyaruguru y’urutambiro
Leviticus1:12 Nyuma y’ibyo
Leviticus1:13 Ibyo mu nda
Leviticus1:14 Niba ashaka gutura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa cy’inyoni
Leviticus1:15 Umuherezabitambo azabijyana ku rutambiro
Leviticus1:16 Hanyuma
Leviticus1:17 Iyo nyoni bazayisaturira hagati y’amababa
Leviticus2:1 «Nihagira umuntu uzanira Uhoraho ikoro ry’ibihingwa
Leviticus2:2 ayishyikirize abaherezabitambo ari bo bene Aroni. Kuri iyo fu ivanze n’amavuta
Leviticus2:3 Ibisagutse kuri iryo turo
Leviticus2:4 Nuzana ikoro ry’umutsima watetswe mu ifuru
Leviticus2:5 Nuzana ituro ry’ikintu cyatetswe ku ipanu
Leviticus2:6 Mbere yo kubitura
Leviticus2:7 Nuzana ituro ryakaranzwe ku ipanu
Leviticus2:8 Uzazana iryo turo ryateguriwe Uhoraho rityo
Leviticus2:9 Umuherezabitambo azagabanya kuri iryo turo iby’umuhango
Leviticus2:10 Ibisagutse kuri iryo turo
Leviticus2:11 Ikoro ryose muzatura Uhoraho ntirizabe ari umutsima wavuganywe n’umusemburo. Koko rero
Leviticus2:12 Cyakora
Leviticus2:13 Ituro ryose uzazana
Leviticus2:14 Nuzanira Uhoraho ituro ry’umuganura
Leviticus2:15 Iryo turo uzarisukemo amavuta
Leviticus2:16 Hanyuma
Leviticus3:1 Umuntu natura igitambo cy’ubuhoro agikuye mu matungo maremare
Leviticus3:2 Arambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo
Leviticus3:3 Ibizava kuri icyo gitambo cy’ubuhoro babiture Uhoraho bibe igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongotse burundu
Leviticus3:4 n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’ikinure kizifasheho n’igifashe ku byaziha
Leviticus3:5 Hanyuma
Leviticus3:6 Umuntu natura igitambo cy’ubuhoro agikuye mu matungo magufi
Leviticus3:7 Niba ari umwana w’intama ashaka gutangaho ituro
Leviticus3:8 awurambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus3:9 Kuri icyo gitambo cy’ubuhoro
Leviticus3:10 hamwe n’impyiko zombi n’urugimbu rwazo rufatanye n’ibyaziha. Urugimbu rwo ku mwijima na rwo barwomoreho rusange impyiko.
Leviticus3:11 Hanyuma
Leviticus3:12 Niba ari ihene ashaka gutura
Leviticus3:13 ayirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus3:14 Ibizaba ituro ry’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu ni ikinure kiri ku mara
Leviticus3:15 n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’urugimbu ruzifasheho n’urufashe ku byaziha. Urugimbu rwo ku mwijima barwomoreho rusange impyiko.
Leviticus3:16 Izo nyama zose
Leviticus3:17 Iryo ni itegeko ridakuka kuri mwebwe
Leviticus4:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus4:2 ’Nihagira umuntu ukora icyaha kubera uburangare
Leviticus4:3 Niba uguye mu cyaha ari umuherezabitambo wasizwe amavuta
Leviticus4:4 Icyo kimasa cy’igisore azakijyana ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Leviticus4:5 Umuherezabitambo wasizwe amavuta azafata ku maraso y’icyo kimasa cy’igisore
Leviticus4:6 Umuherezabitambo azakoza urutoki rwe muri ya maraso
Leviticus4:7 Hanyuma
Leviticus4:8 Kuri icyo kimasa cyatuweho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha
Leviticus4:9 n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’ikinure kizifasheho n’igifashe ku byaziha. Urugimbu rwo ku mwijima na rwo bazarwomoreho rusange impyiko.
Leviticus4:10 Mbese izo nyama zose bazazikureho nk’uko babigenza ku kimasa gituweho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Hanyuma
Leviticus4:11 Uruhu rw’icyo kimasa
Leviticus4:12 mbese ibyasigaye kuri icyo kimasa byose
Leviticus4:13 Niba ari imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli yacumuye itabizi ariko icyo cyaha ntikimenyekane
Leviticus4:14 icyo cyaha nikimenyekana
Leviticus4:15 maze abakuru b’ikoraniro bakirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus4:16 Umuherezabitambo wasizwe amavuta azajyane igice kimwe cy’amaraso ya cya kimasa ku ihema ry’ibonaniro.
Leviticus4:17 Uwo muherezabitambo azakoze urutoki mu maraso yageruye maze imbere y’Uhoraho ayamishe incuro ndwi ku ruhande rugaragara rw’umubambiko.
Leviticus4:18 Hanyuma azafate kuri ayo maraso
Leviticus4:19 Inyama zose ziriho ibinure azazikebe
Leviticus4:20 Icyo kimasa azakigirira nk’uko yagenjereje cya kimasa kindi cyatuweho impongano y’icyaha. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera ku ikoraniro umuhango wo gukiza icyaha
Leviticus4:21 Icyo kimasa arategeke kukijyana kure y’ingando
Leviticus4:22 Niba ari umutware w’umuryango wacumuye kubera uburangare agaca kuri rimwe mu mategeko y’Uhoraho Imana ye
Leviticus4:23 maze bakamumenyesha icyaha yakoze
Leviticus4:24 ayirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe
Leviticus4:25 Nuko
Leviticus4:26 Inyama zose ziriho ibinure azazitwikire ku rutambiro nk’uko yagenjeje za zindi z’igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera ku mutware umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha yakoze
Leviticus4:27 Niba ari umuntu wo muri rubanda rusanzwe wacumuye kubera uburangare
Leviticus4:28 maze bakamumenyesha icyaha cye
Leviticus4:29 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha
Leviticus4:30 Umuherezabitambo azakoze urutoki rwe mu maraso yacyo
Leviticus4:31 Inyama zose zifite ibinure azazikebeho
Leviticus4:32 Niba ari umwana w’intama ashaka guturaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha
Leviticus4:33 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha
Leviticus4:34 Umuherezabitambo azakoze urutoki rwe mu maraso y’icyo gitambo
Leviticus4:35 Inyama zose zifite ibinure azazikureho
Leviticus5:1 Iyo barahije umuntu ngo avuge ukuri ariko we akicecekera
Leviticus5:2 Nanone kandi
Leviticus5:3 Nanone kandi umuntu nakora ku kintu cyandujwe n’undi muntu atabizi — ku kintu cyose gihumanya — maze akaza kubimenya
Leviticus5:4 Nanone kandi umuntu navugana ubuhubutsi; agashinga indahiro atitondeye
Leviticus5:5 Nihagira rero ukora icyaha abitewe n’uko yagwiriwe na kimwe muri ibyo bintu
Leviticus5:6 hanyuma akazanira Uhoraho igitambo cy’impongano
Leviticus5:7 Niba umuntu afite amikoro make
Leviticus5:8 Azazizanira umuherezabitambo abanze gutura iy’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha: icyo azaba atuye azakivuna ijosi
Leviticus5:9 Nyuma
Leviticus5:10 Naho intungura ya kabiri
Leviticus5:11 Niba umuntu adashoboye kubona intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri
Leviticus5:12 Azayishyikirize umuherezabitambo; umuherezabitambo ayoreho iyuzuye urushyi y’umuhango
Leviticus5:13 Iyo umuntu yakoze icyaha kimwe muri biriya
Leviticus5:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus5:15 «Umuntu nakora ishyano biturutse ku burangare akabigira yima Uhoraho ibyamugenewe
Leviticus5:16 Ibyo azaba yaragomwe ingoro
Leviticus5:17 Niba umuntu yakoze icyaha atabizi
Leviticus5:18 azazanire umuherezabitambo imfizi y’intama idafite inenge itoranyijwe mu matungo magufi
Leviticus5:19 Icyo ni igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro
Leviticus5:20 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus5:21 «Nihagira umuntu ucumura agahemukira Uhoraho
Leviticus5:22 cyangwa se abeshya kugira ngo yitwarire ikintu cyatakaye akagitoragura
Leviticus5:23 uwacumuye atyo akisiga icyaha
Leviticus5:24 cyangwa ikintu cyose cyatumye agira indahiro y’ibinyoma. Azabisubize byose nyirabyo
Leviticus5:25 Naho ku byerekeye igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro igenewe Uhoraho
Leviticus5:26 Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera kuri uwo muntu umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho igicumuro cye
Leviticus6:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus6:2 «Uhe Aroni n’abahungu be aya mabwiriza: Dore imihango yerekeye igitambo gitwikwa: igitambo gitwikwa kizagume ijoro ryose ku nkekwe icanye ku rutambiro burinde bucya
Leviticus6:3 Umuherezabitambo rero azambare ikanzu ye ya hariri n’amakabutura ya hariri
Leviticus6:4 Hanyuma yiyambure iyo myenda
Leviticus6:5 Naho wa muriro wo ku rutambiro
Leviticus6:6 Ku rutambiro
Leviticus6:7 Dore rero imihango yerekeye ituro ry’ibiribwa: Bene Aroni ni bo bazarihereza Uhoraho
Leviticus6:8 Ku ifu y’ituro
Leviticus6:9 Ibizasigara
Leviticus6:10 Kirazira kubikoramo umutsima usembuye. Uwo ni wo mugabane mbahaye ku maturo nturwa
Leviticus6:11 Umuntu wese wo muri bene Aroni ashobora kukiryaho. Kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi
Leviticus6:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus6:13 «Dore ituro Aroni kimwe n’abahungu be azazanira Uhoraho ku munsi azasigwaho amavuta: icya cumi cya efa y’ifu ni cyo kizaba ituro rihoraho
Leviticus6:14 Iryo turo rizategurirwe ku ipanu
Leviticus6:15 Umuherezabitambo wo mu bana ba Aroni uzasigwa amavuta ngo azamuzungure
Leviticus6:16 Ituro ry’umuherezabitambo riherezwa ryose
Leviticus6:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus6:18 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Aroni n’abahungu be ku byerekeye imihango y’impongano y’icyaha: igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha kizasogoterwe aho basanzwe bicira ibitambo bitwikwa
Leviticus6:19 Umuherezabitambo ni we uyobora imihango y’icyo gitambo
Leviticus6:20 Umuntu wese uzakora ku nyama z’icyo gitambo
Leviticus6:21 Inkono cyatetswemo niba iy’ibumba muzayimene
Leviticus6:22 Umuntu wo mu baherezabitambo wese ashobora kurya kuri icyo gitambo: ni ikintu gitagatifu rwose.
Leviticus6:23 Naho igitambo cyose bazafataho amaraso bakayazana mu ihema ry’ibonaniro kugira ngo bayakoreshe umuhango wo guhanagurira ibyaha ahantu hatagatifu
Leviticus7:1 Dore imihango igenga igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro. Ni ikintu gitagatifu rwose.
Leviticus7:2 Igitambo cyo kwigorora bazakicira aho basanzwe bicira ibitambo bitwikwa
Leviticus7:3 Inyama zose ziriho ibinure azitangeho ituro; ari umurizo
Leviticus7:4 ari impyiko zombi hamwe n’urukiryi. Umwijima wo

Leviticus7:9 Ituro ryokerejwe ku ziko
Leviticus7:10 Kandi amaturo yose
Leviticus7:11 Dore kandi imihango igenga igitambo cy’ubuhoro giturwa Uhoraho.
Leviticus7:12 Nikiba ikijyanirana no gushimira Uhoraho
Leviticus7:13 Azongereho kandi n’utugati tw’ifu tuvitse mu mavuta. Imigati idasembuye
Leviticus7:14 Bazafata akagati ka buri bwoko
Leviticus7:15 Naho inyama za cya gitambo cy’ubuhoro cyo gushimira
Leviticus7:16 Hari ubwo igitambo gishobora guturwa ari icyo guhigura umuhigo
Leviticus7:17 Ariko ku munsi wa gatatu izizaba zasagutse zose

Leviticus7:19 Ubundi kandi
Leviticus7:20 Naho rero
Leviticus7:21 Nanone kandi

Leviticus7:24 Ibinure by’itungo ryapfuye cyangwa iby’iryatanyaguwe n’inyamaswa
Leviticus7:25 Koko rero
Leviticus7:26 Aho muzaba mutuye hose
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu uzabicaho akanywa amaraso ayo ari yo yose azacibwe muri bene wabo.»
Leviticus7:28 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus7:29 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Uzazanira Uhoraho igitambo
Leviticus7:30 Uwo muntu ubwe
Leviticus7:31 Izo nyama zose z’ibinure rero
Leviticus7:32 Byongeye kandi
Leviticus7:33 Iryo tako ry’iburyo rizabe umugabane w’uwo muri bene Aroni uzaba yakoze umuhango wo kumurika amaraso n’ibinure by’igitambo cy’ubuhoro.
Leviticus7:34 Koko rero
Leviticus7:35 Urwo ni rwo ruhare rwa Aroni n’abahungu be ku bitambo by’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho. Ni wo mugabane wabo kuva umunsi bazaba bagizwe abaherezabitambo
Leviticus7:36 Ni ko Uhoraho yategetse Abayisraheli: uwo mugabane uzaharirwa bene Aroni guhera umunsi azaba yabasutseho amavuta y’isigwa. Kuva ku gisekuruza kugera ku kindi
Leviticus7:37 Ngiryo rero itegeko rigenga umuhango w’ibitambo by’impongano y’icyaha
Leviticus7:38 Iryo tegeko Uhoraho yarihereye Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi. Kuri uwo munsi nyine

Leviticus8:4 Musa agenza uko Uhoraho yari yamutegetse

Leviticus8:16 Hanyuma Musa yafashe ibinure byose biri ku mara

Leviticus8:18 Musa yiyegereje na ya sekurume y’intama y’igitambo gitwikwa
Leviticus8:19 Nuko amaraso yayo ayamisha impande zose z’urutambiro.
Leviticus8:20 Ya sekurume y’intama
Leviticus8:21 Amara n’amaguru abyogesha amazi
Leviticus8:22 Musa yongeye kwiyegereza isekurume y’intama ya kabiri yari igenewe umuhango wo gushyiraho umuherezabitambo mushyashya. Aroni n’abahungu be bamaze kuyiramburiraho ibiganza ku mutwe

Leviticus8:24 Musa yigiza hino bene Aroni
Leviticus8:25 Musa yakoranyirije hamwe inyama zose z’ibinure

Leviticus8:28 Barangije

Leviticus8:32 Ibizasigara ku nyama no ku migati
Leviticus8:33 Mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi
Leviticus8:34 uko byagenze uyu munsi. Koko Uhoraho yabitegetse kugira ngo mugirirweho umuhango wo guhanagurwaho ibyaha.
Leviticus8:35 Muzaguma imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro umunsi n’ijoro
Leviticus8:36 Aroni n’abahungu be bubahiriza amategeko Uhoraho yari yatanze
Leviticus9:1 Ku munsi wa munani
Leviticus9:2 Musa rero abwira Aroni
Leviticus9:3 Hanyuma uzabwira Abayisraheli aya magambo
Leviticus9:4 Mufate kandi ikimasa hamwe n’isekurume y’intama byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro imbere y’Uhoraho. Ntimwibagirwe kandi n’ituro ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Impamvu y’ibyo byose ni uko uyu munsi ariho Uhoraho ari bubabonekere.’»
Leviticus9:5 Abayisraheli bazana imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro ibyo Musa yari yategetse byose
Leviticus9:6 Nuko Musa aravuga ati «Dore ibyo Uhoraho yabategetse gukora kugira ngo ikuzo rye ribigaragarize.»

Leviticus12:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Umugore nasama inda akabyara umuhungu
Leviticus12:3 Ku munsi wa munani
Leviticus12:4 hanyuma nyina amare iminsi mirongo itatu n’itatu ategereje ko amaraso ye asukurwa. Ntazagire ikintu gitagatifu akoraho cyangwa ngo ajye mu Ngoro
Leviticus12:5 Nabyara umukobwa
Leviticus12:6 Igihe cy’isukurwa rye nikirangira
Leviticus12:7 Ibyo byose umuherezabitambo abimurika imbere y’Uhoraho
Leviticus12:8 «Niba uwo mubyeyi adashobora kubona umwana w’intama
Leviticus13:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni
Leviticus13:2 «Ku mubiri w’umuntu nihavukaho ikibyimba
Leviticus13:3 Umuherezabitambo asuzume iyo ndwara yo ku mubiri. Niba ubwoya bwo muri icyo gisebe bwererana
Leviticus13:4 Iyo ku mubiri hari ibara ryera
Leviticus13:5 Ku munsi wa karindwi
Leviticus13:6 Ku munsi wa karindwi umuherezabitambo amusuzuma bundi bushya. Iyo asanze uburwayi bwasibanganye
Leviticus13:7 Ariko umuherezabitambo najya kwemeza ko uwo murwayi atahumanye
Leviticus13:8 azongere yisuzumishe ku muherezabitambo bundi bushya. Isekera rero niriba ryarasatiriye undi mubiri
Leviticus13:9 Nihagira umuntu ufatwa n’indwara yo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe
Leviticus13:10 maze amusuzume. Nasanga ku mubiri we inyama zanamye mu kibyimba cyererana
Leviticus13:11 bizaba ari ibibembe byamwaritse mu mubiri. Ubwo umuherezabitambo azahita atangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye. Ntazirushye yigora ngo aramuha akato
Leviticus13:12 Nyamara niba ibyo bibembe byasheshe ku mubiri wose bikawupfukirana kuva ku mutwe kugeza ku birenge
Leviticus13:13 umuherezabitambo azasuzuma ubwo burwayi. Ibibembe nibiba bikwiriye ku mubiri wose n’ubwoya bukaba bwahindutse umweru
Leviticus13:14 Ariko ku mubiri we inyama nizanama
Leviticus13:15 Inyama iyo zanamye ziranduza
Leviticus13:16 Iyo izo nyama zanamye zongeye zigahinduka umweru
Leviticus13:17 maze akisuzumisha. Kuko rero aharwaye hazaba habaye umweru
Leviticus13:18 Niba ku mubiri w’umuntu harigeze ikibyimba ariko kigakira
Leviticus13:19 nyuma mu nkovu hakavukamo uruheri rwererana cyangwa hakazaho ibara ry’umweru uvanze n’ikigina
Leviticus13:20 uwo muntu nyine azisuzumishe ku muherezabitambo. Iryo bara niba ryaracengeye mu mubiri kandi n’ubwoya bwarahindutse umweru
Leviticus13:21 Ariko nanone niba asuzumye agasanga nta rwoya rw’umweru ruhari
Leviticus13:22 Niba iryo bara rikomeje gusatira undi mubiri
Leviticus13:23 Niba ariko ryagumye hamwe ntirisatire undi mubiri
Leviticus13:24 Urundi rugero rw’indwara yo ku mubiri: umuntu natwikwa n’umuriro maze mu gisebe hakavukamo ibara ry’umweru w’ikigina
Leviticus13:25 umuherezabitambo azamusuzume. Nasanga ubwoya bwarahindutse umweru kandi igisebe na cyo gicengera mu mubiri
Leviticus13:26 Ariko kandi nasuzuma agasanga nta bwoya bwera buhari
Leviticus13:27 Ku munsi wa karindwi umuherezabitambo azasuzuma
Leviticus13:28 Ariko
Leviticus13:29 Umugabo cyangwa umugore nibafatwa n’igisebe ku mutwe cyangwa ku kananwa
Leviticus13:30 umuherezabitambo azabasuzume. Icyo gisebe nikiba gisa n’icyacengeye mu mubiri
Leviticus13:31 Ariko nanone
Leviticus13:32 Ku munsi wa karindwi
Leviticus13:33 umuherezabitambo asaba umurwayi kwiyogoshesha ahandi hose agasiga aharwaye. Hanyuma umuherezabitambo arongera agaha uwo murwayi akato mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi.
Leviticus13:34 Ku munsi wa karindwi
Leviticus13:35 Ariko rero
Leviticus13:36 umuherezabitambo arongera akamusuzuma. Kuko rero ibihushi bizaba byasatiriye undi mubiri
Leviticus13:37 Ariko rero iyo asanze harameze ubwoya bw’umukara
Leviticus13:38 Ku mubiri w’umugabo cyangwa w’umugore nihazaho ibibara byera
Leviticus13:39 umuherezabitambo azabisuzume. Ibyo bibara byo ku ruhu nibiba bifite ibara ry’umweru w’ikigina
Leviticus13:40 Niba umuntu apfutse imisatsi
Leviticus13:41 Niba umuntu apfutse umusatsi w’imbere
Leviticus13:42 Nyamara muri urwo ruhara rwo mu gihorihori cyangwa mu masoso
Leviticus13:43 Umuherezabitambo azasuzuma iyo ndwara. Niba icyo gisebe cyo mu gihorihori cyangwa mu masoso gifite ibara ry’umweru w’ikigina
Leviticus13:44 uwo muntu aba yaranduye kuko ari umunyabibembe. Uwo murwayi aba yafashwe n’ibibembe ku mutwe; umuherezabitambo rero atangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye.
Leviticus13:45 Umubembe wafashwe n’iyo ndwara yambara imyenda y’ibishwangi ntasokoze umusatsi we
Leviticus13:46 Aba yaranduye kuko nyine indwara yamufashe iba ihumanya. Azatura ukwe wenyine
Leviticus13:47 Hari ubwo umwambaro ukoze mu bwoya bw’intama cyangwa muri hariri ushobora kugwaho ibirabagwe by’ibibembe.
Leviticus13:48 Ari ku mwambaro udoze mu mwenda
Leviticus13:49 ibyo bibara nibiba icyatsi kibisi cyangwa umutuku bizaba ari ibirabagwe by’ibibembe. Umuherezabitambo azagomba kubisuzuma.
Leviticus13:50 Umuherezabitambo namara gusuzuma icyo kintu cyanduye
Leviticus13:51 Ku munsi wa karindwi
Leviticus13:52 Uwo mwambaro
Leviticus13:53 Ariko rero
Leviticus13:54 ategeka kumesa icyo kintu cyanduye
Leviticus13:55 Iyo bamaze kumesa
Leviticus13:56 Ariko nibamara kumesa
Leviticus13:57 Nyuma y’ibyo cya kibara nikigaruka kuri uwo mwambaro
Leviticus13:58 Umwambaro udoze mu mwenda
Leviticus13:59 Ngayo amategeko yerekeye ibirabagwe by’ibibembe bitunguka ku mwambaro udoze mu bwoya bw’intama cyangwa muri hariri

Leviticus14:2 «Dore umuhango muzakurikiza

Leviticus14:18 Amavuta asigaye ku rushyi

Leviticus14:23 Ku munsi wa munani

Leviticus14:26 Umuherezabitambo asuka amavuta make mu kiganza cy’ibumoso.
Leviticus14:27 Ayo mavuta yo ku rushyi rw’ibumoso
Leviticus14:28 Naho ayo mavuta ari ku rushyi
Leviticus14:29 Amavuta asigaye ku rushyi
Leviticus14:30 Uwisukurisha naba yazanye inuma cyangwa intungura
Leviticus14:31 imwe izaturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha
Leviticus14:32 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye umubembe w’umukene utashobora kubona ibya ngombwa byajyana n’umuhango wo kumusukura.
Leviticus14:33 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni
Leviticus14:34 «Nimumara kugera mu gihugu cya Kanahani nabeguriye
Leviticus14:35 nyiri iyo nzu nyine azajya kubimenyesha umuherezabitambo. Azamubwira ati «Nabonye ibibara bisa n’iby’ibibembe mu nzu yanjye.»
Leviticus14:36 Umuherezabitambo azategeka ko iyo nzu bayikuramo ibirimo byose
Leviticus14:37 Nasanga bisa n’ibicengera mu rukuta
Leviticus14:38 umuherezabitambo azasohoka
Leviticus14:39 Ku munsi wa karindwi
Leviticus14:40 umuherezabitambo azategeka ko amabuye yanduye bayomora
Leviticus14:41 Ibitaka byose byanduriye ku nkuta mu nzu imbere
Leviticus14:42 Bazashaka andi mabuye bayasimbuze aya mbere
Leviticus14:43 Hari ubwo bakomora ya mabuye
Leviticus14:44 Icyo gihe umuherezabitambo azagenda yongere asuzume. Nasanga ibyo bibara byariyongereye
Leviticus14:45 muzayisenye. Ibizayivaho
Leviticus14:46 Igihe cyose iyo nzu izaba ifunze

Leviticus14:49 Kugira ngo ahumanure iyo nzu
Leviticus14:50 Inyoni ya mbere azayicira hejuru y’urwabya rurimo amazi yo mu isoko.
Leviticus14:51 Amashami y’ibiti bya sederi na hisopo
Leviticus14:52 Nguko uko azahumanura iyo nzu

Leviticus14:56 ari ikibyimba

Leviticus19:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Leviticus19:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Muzabe intungane
Leviticus19:3 Buri muntu muri mwe azubahe se na nyina
Leviticus19:4 Ntimuzayoboke ibigirwamana cyangwa ngo mucure amashusho yabyo. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus19:5 Nimutura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ubuhoro
Leviticus19:6 Muzakirya umunsi cyatuweho ndetse na bukeye bwaho. Ibyaramuka bisigaye
Leviticus19:7 Uwabirengaho akakirya no ku munsi wa gatatu
Leviticus19:8 ndetse ahubwo icyaha cyo kuba yandaritse igitambo cy’Uhoraho
Leviticus19:9 Nimusarura imirima yanyu
Leviticus19:10 kandi numara gusarura imbuto z’imizabibu yawe
Leviticus19:11 Ntuzibe mugenzi wawe
Leviticus19:12 Ntuzarahize izina ryanjye mu binyoma
Leviticus19:13 Ntuzariganye mugenzi wawe cyangwa ngo umwibe; igihembo azaba yakoreye ntuzakirarane utakimuhaye.
Leviticus19:14 Ntuzatuke igipfamatwi cyangwa ngo ushyire umutego imbere y’impumyi. Nugenza utyo
Leviticus19:15 Nimuca imanza ntimukaziyobye
Leviticus19:16 Uzirinde gusebya umuryango uvukamo
Leviticus19:17 Ntuzagirire umutima mubi umuvandimwe wawe
Leviticus19:18 Uzirinde kwihorera no kugirira inzika abo mu muryango wawe. Ahubwo uzakunde mugenzi wawe nkawe ubwawe. Ndi Uhoraho.
Leviticus19:19 Muzakurikize amategeko yanjye. Amatungo yawe naba adahuje ubwoko
Leviticus19:20 Hari ubwo umugabo ashobora kuryamana n’umuja w’inshoreke y’undi mugabo. Iyo uwo mugore atacunguwe cyangwa ngo ahabwe ubwigenge
Leviticus19:21 Uwo mugabo wakoze icyaha ajyana isekurume y’intama ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Leviticus19:22 Umuherezabitambo yifashisha iyo sekurume y’intama y’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro
Leviticus19:23 Nimugera mu gihugu cya Kanahani
Leviticus19:24 Umwaka wa kane nugera
Leviticus19:25 Mu mwaka wa gatanu
Leviticus19:26 Ntimuzagire icyo murya kirimo amaraso. Muzirinde kuragura cyangwa gushika.
Leviticus19:27 Ntuzogoshe uruziga mu mpande z’umusatsi wawe
Leviticus19:28 Nihagira umuntu upfa
Leviticus19:29 Ntuzagayishe umukobwa wawe umushora mu busambanyi. Ibyo byatuma igihugu cyose cyandura uwo muco mubi maze kikuzuramo ingeso mbi.
Leviticus19:30 Muzizihize iminsi yanjye ya sabato
Leviticus19:31 Ntimuziyambaze abazimu cyangwa ngo mubisunge kuko byabaviramo kwandura. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus19:32 Umutwe wejeje imvi ujye uhaguruka uwubahirize
Leviticus19:33 Umusuhuke naza gutura mu gihugu cyanyu

Leviticus19:35 Nimukoresha ibipimo

Leviticus20:18 Umugabo naryamana n’umugore uri mu mihango y’abakobwa
Leviticus20:19 Ntuzasambanye nyoko wanyu cyangwa nyogosenge. Uzabikora azaba yambitse ubusa uwo basangiye umubiri umwe; bombi rero

Leviticus27:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Hari ubwo umuntu ashobora kugirana umuhigo n’Uhoraho

Leviticus27:4 Umugore uri hagati y’iyo myaka
Leviticus27:5 Uri hagati y’imyaka itanu na makumyabiri
Leviticus27:6 Umwana uri hagati y’ukwezi kumwe n’imyaka itanu
Leviticus27:7 Umuntu ufite imyaka mirongo itandatu cyangwa irenga
Leviticus27:8 Hari ubwo uwo muntu wahize umuhigo yaba ari umukene
Leviticus27:9 Hari ubwo itungo na ryo ryateganirizwa guhigura umuhigo. Niba ari rimwe muri ya yandi ashobora guturwa Uhoraho
Leviticus27:10 Nta we ushobora kurisimbuza ikindi kintu cyangwa ngo arigurane irindi. Iryiza ntirishobora gusimbura iribi
Leviticus27:11 Naho ryaba ari itungo ryanduye ryo muri ya yandi adashobora guturwa Uhoraho
Leviticus27:12 barizanira umuherezabitambo akaba ari we ugena igiciro cyaryo akurikije ko ari ryiza cyangwa ribi. Icyo gihe kandi icyo umuherezabitambo yemeye ntigisubirwaho.
Leviticus27:13 Iyo nyir’itungo ashaka kurigombora
Leviticus27:14 Inzu yawe yaba mbi cyangwa nziza
Leviticus27:15 Ariko nanone
Leviticus27:16 Umuntu nashaka kwegurira Uhoraho umurima wo mu isambu ye

Leviticus27:18 Iyo uwo murima weguriwe Uhoraho nyuma ya yubile
Leviticus27:19 Nanone kandi
Leviticus27:20 Ariko rero
Leviticus27:21 Ahubwo iyo yubile igeze
Leviticus27:22 Hari ushobora kwegurira Uhoraho umurima yiguriye utari uwo mu isambu y’abasekuruza be.
Leviticus27:23 Icyo gihe
Leviticus27:24 Iyo umwaka wa yubile ugeze
Leviticus27:25 Igiciro cyose kizajya kigurwa amasikeli y’Ingoro. Sikeli imwe kandi ingana na gera makumyabiri.
Leviticus27:26 Birumvikana ko nta muntu ushobora kwegurira Uhoraho icyavutse uburiza mu matungo ye
Leviticus27:27 Iyo ari itungo ryahumanye ugashaka kurigombora
Leviticus27:28 Byongeye
Leviticus27:29 Umuntu na we
Leviticus27:30 Ituro rya kimwe cy’icumi mugabanya ku myaka y’imirima yanyu no ku mbuto z’ibiti
Leviticus27:31 Iyo ushaka kugira icyo ugombora kiri muri iryo turo
Leviticus27:32 Naho ku byerekeye amatungo yawe maremare cyangwa amagufi
Leviticus27:33 Yaba meza
Leviticus27:34 Ayo ni yo mategeko Uhoraho yahereye Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi
Numbers1:1 Ku wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri kw’umwaka wa kabiri
Numbers1:2 «Mukore ibarura ry’imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli. Mujye muri buri muryango
Numbers1:3 maze mubare abantu bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’abayirengeje kandi bashoboye kujya ku rugamba. Wowe na Aroni muzababarure mukurikije imitwe y’ingabo zabo.
Numbers1:4 Muzifashishe umuntu umwe wa buri muryango
Numbers1:5 Dore amazina y’abo bantu muzifashisha: kwa Rubeni ni Elisuri mwene Shedewuri;
Numbers1:6 kwa Simewoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Shurishadayi;
Numbers1:7 kwa Yuda ni Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu;
Numbers1:8 kwa Isakari ni Netaneli mwene Suwari;
Numbers1:9 kwa Zabuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni;
Numbers1:10 naho muri bene Yozefu: kwa Efurayimu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi no kwa Manase ni Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri;
Numbers1:11 kwa Benyamini ni Abidani mwene Gidewoni;
Numbers1:12 kwa Dani ni Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi;
Numbers1:13 kwa Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okrani;
Numbers1:14 kwa Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Dewuyeli;
Numbers1:15 kwa Nefutali ni Ahira mwene Eyinani.»
Numbers1:16 Ngabo abari bahagarariye imbaga ari na bo bakuru b’imiryango ya ba sekuruza
Numbers1:17 Musa na Aroni rero bafata abo bantu batoranijwe
Numbers1:18 Ubwo Musa na Aroni bakoranya imbaga yose
Numbers1:19 Mbese nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa
Numbers1:20 Bamaze kubarura bene Rubeni
Numbers1:21 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Rubeni yose
Numbers1:22 Bene Simewoni: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:23 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Simewoni yose
Numbers1:24 Bene Gadi: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:25 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Gadi yose
Numbers1:26 Bene Yuda: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:27 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Yuda yose
Numbers1:28 Bene Isakari: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:29 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Isakari yose
Numbers1:30 Bene Zabuloni: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:31 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Zabuloni yose
Numbers1:32 Naho bene Yozefu: kwa Efurayimu
Numbers1:33 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Efurayimu yose
Numbers1:34 Kwa Manase: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:35 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Manase yose
Numbers1:36 Bene Benyamini: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:37 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Benyamini yose
Numbers1:38 Bene Dani: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:39 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Dani yose
Numbers1:40 Bene Asheri: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:41 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Asheri yose
Numbers1:42 Bene Nefutali: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:43 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Nefutali yose
Numbers1:44 Iyo ni yo mibare y’ababaruwe na Musa na Aroni
Numbers1:45 Umubare w’abari bagejeje bose ku myaka makumyabiri n’irenga
Numbers1:46 ni 603.550.
Numbers1:47 Cyakora abo mu muryango wa Levi
Numbers1:48 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers1:49 «Umuryango wa Levi wonyine ntuzawubare
Numbers1:50 Ahubwo Abalevi uzabashinge imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano
Numbers1:51 Ingoro y’Uhoraho nijya guhaguruka
Numbers1:52 Abayisraheli bazagandike buri wese mu ngando ye
Numbers1:53 Abalevi bonyine bazagandika hirya no hino y’Ingoro y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano
Numbers1:54 Abayisraheli bagenza batyo; bakora ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa byose.
Numbers2:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni
Numbers2:2 «Buri Muyisraheli azagandike mu mutwe w’ingabo we
Numbers2:3 Abazagandika imbere y’abandi iburasirazuba
Numbers2:4 umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 74
Numbers2:5 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe
Numbers2:6 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 54
Numbers2:7 Umutware wa bene Zabuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni
Numbers2:8 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 57
Numbers2:9 Abantu bari muri iyo mitwe y’ingabo uko ari itatu yo mu ngando ya Yuda
Numbers2:10 Imitwe y’ingabo yo mu ngando ya Rubeni izaherera mu majyepfo. Umutware wa bene Rubeni ni Elishuri mwene Shedewuri
Numbers2:11 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 46
Numbers2:12 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe ni umuryango wa Simewoni hamwe n’uwa Gadi. Umutware wa bene Simewoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Shurishadayi
Numbers2:13 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 59
Numbers2:14 Umutware wa bene Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Rewuyeli
Numbers2:15 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 45
Numbers2:16 Abantu bari muri iyo mitwe y’ingabo uko ari itatu yo mu ngando ya Rubeni
Numbers2:17 Nyuma hazagenda ihema ry’ibonaniro rikurikirwe n’inteko y’Abalevi izaba iri hagati y’izindi nteko. Muzagende mukurikije uko muri mu ngando
Numbers2:18 Imitwe y’ingabo yo mu ngando ya Efurayimu izaherera mu burengerazuba. Umutware wa bene Efurayimu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi
Numbers2:19 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 40
Numbers2:20 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe
Numbers2:21 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 32
Numbers2:22 Umutware wa bene Benyamini ni Avidani mwene Gidewoni
Numbers2:23 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 35
Numbers2:24 Abantu bari muri iyo mitwe y’ingabo uko ari itatu yo mu ngando ya Efurayimu
Numbers2:25 Imitwe y’ingabo yo mu ngando ya Dani
Numbers2:26 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 62
Numbers2:27 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe ni umuryango wa Asheri hamwe n’uwa Nefutali. Umutware wa bene Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okrani
Numbers2:28 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 41
Numbers2:29 Umutware wa bene Nefutali ni Ahira mwene Eyinani
Numbers2:30 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 53
Numbers2:31 Abantu bari muri iyo ngando ya Dani ni 157
Numbers2:32 Ngabo rero abana ba Israheli uko babaruriwe mu mazu yabo; umubare rusange w’ingabo zose zabaruriwe mu ngando no mu mitwe yazo ni 603.550.
