Numbers3:1 Dore urubyaro rwa Aroni n’urwa Musa
Numbers3:2 Dore kandi amazina ya bene Aroni: imfura ni Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Ngayo amazina ya bene Aroni
Numbers3:4 Nadabu na Avihu bapfiriye mu butayu bwa Sinayi imbere y’Uhoraho kuko bari bamutuye ibyotezo bitamukwiye; bapfa nta gahungu basize. Eleyazari na Itamari rero
Numbers3:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers3:6 «Igiza hino Abalevi
Numbers3:7 Bazamukorera we n’imbaga yose mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers3:8 Bazita ku bikoresho byose by’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers3:9 Abalevi uzashyikiriza Aroni n’abahungu be
Numbers3:10 Aroni n’abahungu be
Numbers3:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers3:12 «Jyewe ubwanjye nitoreye bene Levi mu Bayisraheli bose
Numbers3:13 Kuko icyitwa uburiza cyose ari icyanjye: kuva umunsi nishe icyitwa uburiza cyose mu gihugu cya Misiri
Numbers3:14 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu butayu bwa Sinayi
Numbers3:15 «Barura Abalevi ukurikije imiryango yabo n’amazu yabo. Uzabarura Abalevi bose b’igitsinagabo
Numbers3:16 Musa rero ababarura akurikije itegeko ry’Uhoraho nk’uko yari yabibwirijwe.
Numbers3:17 Dore rero amazina ya bene Levi: Gerishoni
Numbers3:18 Bene Gerishoni
Numbers3:19 Bene Kehati
Numbers3:20 Bene Merari
Numbers3:21 Abakomoka kuri Gerishoni ni inzu y’Abalibini n’iy’Abashimeyi. Ayo ni yo yari amazu y’Abagerishoni.
Numbers3:22 Ab’igitsinagabo bose hamwe uhereye ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe
Numbers3:23 Amazu y’Abagerishoni yagandikaga inyuma y’Ingoro mu burengerazuba.
Numbers3:24 Umutware w’umuryango w’Abagerishoni yari Eliyasafu mwene Layeli.
Numbers3:25 Mu ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers3:26 imyenda n’umubambiko byo ku irembo ry’urugo rukikije Ingoro n’urutambiro
Numbers3:27 Abakomokaga kuri Kehati ni inzu y’Abamuramu
Numbers3:28 Ab’igitsinagabo bose
Numbers3:29 Amazu y’Abakehati yagandikaga iruhande rw’Ingoro
Numbers3:30 Umutware w’umuryango w’Abakehati yari Elisafani mwene Uziyeli.
Numbers3:31 Bari bashinzwe ibi bikurikira: ubushyinguro
Numbers3:32 Umutware w’ikirenga w’Abalevi
Numbers3:33 Abakomokaga kuri Merari
Numbers3:34 Abamerari b’igitsinagabo bose
Numbers3:35 Amazu y’Abamerari yagandikaga iruhande rw’Ingoro
Numbers3:36 Abamerari bari bashinzwe ibi bikurikira: inkomanizo z’Ingoro
Numbers3:37 Bari bashinzwe kandi inkingi zose z’inkike izengurutse ingombe
Numbers3:38 Abagandikaga imbere y’Ingoro
Numbers3:39 Umubare w’Abalevi bose uko babaruwe mu mazu yabo na Musa na Aroni
Numbers3:40 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers3:41 Uzanzigamire Abalevi mu mwanya w’abana b’uburiza b’Abayisraheli. Ndi Uhoraho. Uzanzigamire kandi n’amatungo y’Abalevi mu mwanya w’uburiza bw’amatungo ya Israheli.»
Numbers3:42 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse
Numbers3:43 Abana b’uburiza b’igitsinagabo; abandikiwe amazina bahereye ku mpinja z’ukwezi kumwe

Numbers3:45 «Ufate Abalevi mu mwanya w’abana b’uburiza b’Abayisraheli
Numbers3:46 Kugira ngo bariya bana b’uburiza 273 barenga ku mubare w’Abalevi bacungurwe
Numbers3:47 uzahabwe kuri buri muntu
Numbers3:48 Iyo feza uzayiha Aroni n’abahungu be

Numbers5:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers5:6 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Umugabo cyangwa umugore
Numbers5:7 Bazicuza icyaha bazaba bakoze; maze uwacumuye kuri mugenzi we amusubize ibyo yamutwaye byose
Numbers5:8 Niba uwacumuweho adafite umubyeyi baha iyo ndishyi
Numbers5:9 Ibizagerurwa ku maturo yose y’Abayisraheli
Numbers5:10 Ibyo buri muntu agenera Ingoro
Numbers5:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers5:12 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Hari ubwo umugore yakwifata nabi agahemukira umugabo we
Numbers5:13 akaryamana n’undi rwihishwa
Numbers5:14 Niba rero umugabo we agize urwikekwe
Numbers5:15 azamushyikirize umuherezabitambo
Numbers5:16 Umuherezabitambo azigiza umugore hafi
Numbers5:17 Umuherezabitambo azavome ku mazi y’umugisha
Numbers5:18 Umuherezabitambo azazana uwo mugore imbere y’Uhoraho maze amukure igitambaro mu mutwe
Numbers5:19 Umuherezabitambo arahize uwo mugore
Numbers5:20 Nyamara niba warifashe nabi
Numbers5:21 Umuherezabitambo azamutongera amurahiza ati ’Uhoraho azakugire urugero rw’abavumwe bose mu muryango wawe
Numbers5:22 Aya mazi y’umuvumo agucengere mu nda
Numbers5:23 Maze iyo mivumo
Numbers5:24 Ayo mazi asharira y’umuvumo ayahe wa mugore ayanywe; amucengeremo asharira.
Numbers5:25 Umuherezabitambo azakura mu biganza by’uwo mugore ituro ritewe no gufuha
Numbers5:26 Umuherezabitambo azagabanya kuri ya fu y’ituro urushyi rumwe rw’urwibutso
Numbers5:27 Namara kuyanywa dore uko bizagenda: niba yariyanduje agahemukira umugabo we
Numbers5:28 Ariko niba uwo mugore ataritesheje agaciro
Numbers5:29 Iryo ni itegeko ryerekeye gufuhira umugore wifata nabi akitesha agaciro abeshya umugabo we
Numbers5:30 cyangwa umugabo wagize urwikekwe agatangira gufuhira umugore we. Umugabo azamujyana imbere y’Uhoraho
Numbers5:31 Umugabo azaba umuziracyaha

Numbers6:2 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Niba umugabo cyangwa umugore yiyemeje kwiyegurira Uhoraho nk’uko abanazireya babigenza
Numbers6:3 agomba kureka divayi n’izindi nzoga zisindisha zose. Uwo munazireya ntazanywe siki na divayi
Numbers6:4 Igihe cyose akiri muri ayo masezerano
Numbers6:5 Muri icyo gihe cyose azaba yiyeguriye Uhoraho
Numbers6:6 Muri icyo gihe cyose azaba yariyeguriye Uhoraho
Numbers6:7 Yaba se cyangwa nyina
Numbers6:8 Muri icyo gihe cyose azaba yariyeguriye Uhoraho

Numbers6:11 Umuherezabitambo azatura imwe ho igitambo kubera icyo cyaha
Numbers6:12 maze yongere yiyegurire Uhoraho igihe kingana n’icyo yari yaramuteganirije. Azazana n’intama y’umwaka umwe iturweho igitambo cyo kwigorora ku Mana. Iminsi yabanjirije gusukurwa kwe
Numbers6:13 Dore itegeko ryerekeye umunazireya: umunsi usoza igihe cye cyo kwiyegurira Imana

Numbers6:20 Umuherezabitambo azazamura ayo maturo matagatifu

Numbers7:2 Abatware bahagarariye imiryango ya Israheli

Numbers7:5 «Akira ayo maturo bakuzaniye; azakoreshwa imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Uzabishinga Abalevi
Numbers7:6 Musa yakira amagare n’ibimasa
Numbers7:7 Aha abahungu ba Gerishoni amagare abiri n’ibimasa bine
Numbers7:8 Ayandi magare ane n’ibindi bimasa munani abiha umuherezabitambo Itamari mwene Aroni
Numbers7:9 Ntiyagira icyo aha abahungu ba Kehati
Numbers7:10 Abatware bazanye amaturo yo gutaha urutambiro ku munsi rwasutsweho amavuta y’isigwa; maze bigiza amaturo yabo imbere yarwo.
Numbers7:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers7:12 Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu wo mu muryango wa Yuda ni we wazanye ituro rye ku munsi wa mbere.
Numbers7:13 Iryo turo ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130
Numbers7:14 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu

Numbers7:16 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha.
Numbers7:17 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone

Numbers7:35 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone

Numbers7:37 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibi bintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130

Numbers8:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers8:2 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Aroni: Nucana amatara yo ku kinyarumuri uko ari arindwi
Numbers8:3 Aroni abigenza atyo: acana amatara imbere y’ikinyarumuri nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa.
Numbers8:4 Dore uko icyo kinyarumuri cyari gikoze: cyari gicuze muri zahabu kuva hasi kugeza ku mitako yo hejuru. Icyo kinyarumuri cyari cyarakozwe bakurikije urugero Uhoraho yari yareretse Musa.
Numbers8:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers8:6 «Mu bana ba Israheli ushyire Abalevi ukwabo maze ubasukure.
Numbers8:7 Uzabagenzereza utya kugira ngo ubasukure: Uzabasukeho amazi yo kubahanaguraho icyaha
Numbers8:8 Bazafata ikimasa hamwe n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivanze n’amavuta

Numbers8:11 Hanyuma Aroni azegurira Uhoraho Abalevi ho umugabane ahawe n’Abayisraheli bose

Numbers8:13 Uzashyire Abalevi imbere ya Aroni n’abahungu be
Numbers8:14 Uzarobanure Abalevi mu Bayisraheli bose babe abanjye.
Numbers8:15 Nyuma y’ibyo
Numbers8:16 Kuko mbahaweho ituro
Numbers8:17 kuko icyavutse uburiza cyose muri Israheli ari icyanjye
Numbers8:18 Cyakora ubu niyeguriye Abalevi mu kigwi cy’abavutse uburiza bose bo muri Israheli.
Numbers8:19 Abo Balevi mbashinze Aroni n’abahungu be kugira ngo bajye bahagararira Abayisraheli bose mu mirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro

Numbers33:50 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu bibaya bya Mowabu ku nkombe ya Yorudani ahateganye na Yeriko
Numbers33:51 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Nimumara kwambuka Yorudani mukajya muri Kanahani
Numbers33:52 muzirukane imbere yanyu abaturage bose bo muri icyo gihugu. Ari ibigirwamana babaje mu mabuye
Numbers33:53 Icyo gihugu muzakigabize mugiture
Numbers33:54 Muzakigabanya imiryango yanyu mukoresheje ubufindo. Umuryango urimo abantu benshi uzahabwa umugabane munini
Numbers33:55 Ariko nimutirukana abaturage bo muri icyo gihugu
Numbers33:56 ndetse n’ibyo nari natekereje gukorera abo ngabo ni mwebwe nzabigirira.»
Numbers34:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers34:2 «Dore ibyo uzategeka Abayisraheli: Mugiye kwinjira muri Kanahani
Numbers34:3 Mu majyepfo
Numbers34:4 rukigobya mu majyepfo y’umuzamuko w’Akarabimu
Numbers34:5 maze rukiheta rugana mu mugezi wa Misiri
Numbers34:6 Iburengerazuba ho
Numbers34:7 Mu majyaruguru
Numbers34:8 Nimuhava
Numbers34:9 mugane i Zifironi
Numbers34:10 Iburasirazuba
Numbers34:11 mumanuke kuri Rivila iburasirazuba bwa Ayini
Numbers34:12 mwongere mugere kuri Yorudani
Numbers34:13 Musa aha Abayisraheli amabwiriza
Numbers34:14 Koko rero
Numbers34:15 Iyo miryango ibiri n’icyo gice cy’umuryango bahawe umugabane wabo hakurya ya Yorudani iburasirazuba
Numbers34:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers34:17 «Dore amazina y’abazabagabanya igihugu: ni umuherezabitambo Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni.
Numbers34:18 Muri buri muryango kandi muzatoremo umuntu uzagabanya igihugu.
Numbers34:19 Dore rero amazina y’abo bantu: mu muryango wa Yuda ni Kalebu mwene Yefune.
Numbers34:20 Mu muryango wa bene Simewoni
Numbers34:21 Mu muryango wa Benyamini
Numbers34:22 Mu muryango wa bene Dani
Numbers34:23 Kwa bene Yozefu
Numbers34:24 mu muryango wa bene Efurayimu
Numbers34:25 Mu muryango wa bene Zabuloni
Numbers34:26 Mu muryango wa bene Isakari
Numbers34:27 Mu muryango wa bene Asheri
Numbers34:28 Mu muryango wa bene Nefutali
Numbers34:29 Abo ni bo bagabo Uhoraho yategetse gukwiza Abayisraheli imigabane mu gihugu cya Kanahani.
Numbers35:1 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu bibaya bya Mowabu hafi ya Yorudani ahateganye na Yeriko
Numbers35:2 «Tegeka Abayisraheli ko ku mugabane wabo
Numbers35:3 Iyo migi muzabaha bazayituramo
Numbers35:4 Imirima ikikije iyo migi muzaha Abalevi
Numbers35:5 Muzaturuka inyuma y’umugi
Numbers35:6 Mu migi izahabwa Abalevi
Numbers35:7 ni ukuvuga ko imigi izegurirwa Abalevi yose hamwe izaba mirongo ine n’umunani. Buri mugi kandi
Numbers35:8 Muri iryo tanga ry’imigi y’Abayisraheli
Numbers35:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa
Numbers35:10 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli. Uti ’Nimumara kwambuka Yorudani mujya mu gihugu cya Kanahani
Numbers35:11 muzatoranye imigi izababera iy’ubuhungiro. Umuntu uzaba yishe undi atabigize nkana
Numbers35:12 Iyo migi izababera ubuhungiro kugira ngo murokoke. Umwicanyi ntazicwe mbere yuko acirirwa urubanza imbere y’ikoraniro.
Numbers35:13 Muri iyo migi itandatu y’ubuhungiro
Numbers35:14 itatu muzayitoranye hakurya ya Yorudani
Numbers35:15 Iyo migi itandatu izaba iy’ubuhungiro bw’Abayisraheli
Numbers35:16 Umuntu uzicisha icyitwa icyuma cyose
Numbers35:17 Uzica undi ari uko yamuteye ibuye
Numbers35:18 N’uzica undi ari uko yamuteye umujugujugu; na we azagomba kwicwa.
Numbers35:19 Ugomba guhora
Numbers35:20 Umuntu uzahutaza undi abigiranye urwango
Numbers35:21 cyangwa akamukubita abigiranye urwango
Numbers35:22 Ariko hari ubwo yashobora kugira ibyago agahutaza undi nta rwango
Numbers35:23 cyangwa akamuhamya ibuye rikamwica atamubonye. Niba yabigize nta rugomo
Numbers35:24 ikoraniro rizaca urubanza rikurikije aya mategeko
Numbers35:25 Uwo azaba yishe
Numbers35:26 Ariko uwo mwicanyi nasohoka mu mugi w’ubuhungiro
Numbers35:27 maze ugomba guhora akamusanga hanze yawo akamwica
Numbers35:28 Uwo mwicanyi rero azaguma mu mugi w’ubuhungiro bwe kugeza ku rupfu rw’umuherezabitambo mukuru. Niyumva ngo yapfuye
Numbers35:29 Aho muzatura hose
Numbers35:30 Mu manza z’ubwicanyi zose
Numbers35:31 Ntimuzemere ikiguzi cyo gucungura ubuzima bw’umwicanyi ukwiye urupfu; ahubwo muzamwice.
Numbers35:32 Ntimuzemere ikiguzi kugira ngo mumureke acikire mu mugi w’ubuhungiro
Numbers35:33 Ntimuzanduze igihugu muzaba murimo; koko rero
Numbers35:34 Ntuzanduze igihugu mutuyemo. Ndi Uhoraho
Numbers36:1 Nuko abatware b’inzu ya bene Gilihadi
Numbers36:2 «Uhoraho yategetse databuja kugabanya Abayisraheli igihugu akoresheje ubufindo. Umunani w’umuvandimwe wacu Selofehadi
Numbers36:3 Nibaramuka rero barongowe n’umugabo wo mu wundi muryango w’Abayisraheli
Numbers36:4 Umwaka wa yubile nugera muri Israheli
Numbers36:5 Ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho
Numbers36:6 Dore rero itegeko ry’Uhoraho ku kibazo cyerekeye abakobwa ba Selofehadi. Bazashake umugabo bikundiye; apfa gusa kuba ari uwo mu muryango ufitanye isano na se ubabyara.
Numbers36:7 Bityo buri Muyisraheli azagumana umunani wo mu nzu yo kwa se
Numbers36:8 Umukobwa wese uzaragwa umunani w’umwe mu miryango y’Abayisraheli
Numbers36:9 Nta munani uzashobora kuva mu muryango ngo ujye mu wundi
Numbers36:10 Abakobwa ba Selofehadi rero bakurikiza ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa.
Numbers36:11 Nuko Mahila
Numbers36:12 Ni ukuvuga ko bashyingiwe rero ku bagabo bakomoka mu mazu ya bene Manase
Numbers36:13 Ayo ni yo mategeko n’amabwiriza Uhoraho yahaye Abayisraheli
Deuteronomy1:1 Dore amagambo Musa yabwiriye Israheli yose hakurya ya Yorudani
Deuteronomy1:2 Kuva kuri Horebu kugera i Kadeshi-Barineya unyuze ku musozi wa Seyiri
Deuteronomy1:3 Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k’umwaka wa mirongo ine kuva bimutse mu Misiri

Deuteronomy1:5 Nuko

Deuteronomy1:7 none nimuhaguruke

Deuteronomy1:10 Uhoraho Imana yanyu yarabagwije

Deuteronomy1:22 Icyo gihe mwese mwaranyegereye

Deuteronomy1:24 Bashyira nzira
Deuteronomy1:25 Basoroma ku mbuto z’icyo gihugu
Deuteronomy1:26 Nyamara mwe mwanga kukijyamo
Deuteronomy1:27 mwitotombera mu mahema yanyu muvuga
Deuteronomy1:28 Muti ese turazamuka tujya he? Bene wacu baduciye intege batubwira yuko abantu baho badusumbya kure igihagararo n’imbaraga
Deuteronomy1:29 Narababwiye nti «Mwihinda umushyitsi ngo mubatinye!
Deuteronomy1:30 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ubagenda imbere azabarwanirira ubwe
Deuteronomy1:31 kandi nk’uko yabigenjeje no mu butayu. Ese nta bwo wiboneye uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yaguhetse nk’uko umuntu aheka umwana we
Deuteronomy1:32 Ibyo mwabirenzeho ntimwemera Uhoraho Imana yanyu

Deuteronomy1:34 Uhoraho yumvise amagambo mwavugaga
Deuteronomy1:35 «Ni ukuri
Deuteronomy1:36 keretse Kalebu mwene Yefune: uwo we azakibona
Deuteronomy1:37 Nanjye mwatumye Uhoraho andakarira; maze aravuga ati «Nawe ntuzinjiramo!
Deuteronomy1:38 Yozuwe mwene Nuni umufasha wawe
Deuteronomy1:39 Byongeye
Deuteronomy1:40 Naho mwebwe nimuhindukire musubire mu butayu

Deuteronomy4:1 None rero
Deuteronomy4:2 Ntimuzagire icyo mwongera ku magambo y’amategeko mbahaye

Deuteronomy4:4 nyamara mwebwe abayoboke b’Uhoraho Imana yanyu muracyariho mwese na n’ubu.
Deuteronomy4:5 Dore mbigishije amategeko n’imigenzo
Deuteronomy4:6 Muzayakomereho
Deuteronomy4:7 Koko se

Deuteronomy4:9 Icyakora uririnde
Deuteronomy4:10 Wari uhagaze ubwawe imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe kuri Horebu
Deuteronomy4:11 Uwo munsi mwigiye hafi

Deuteronomy4:13 Ni bwo abatangarije Isezerano rye
Deuteronomy4:14 Maze nanjye Uhoraho antegeka kubigisha amategeko n’imigenzo bye
Deuteronomy4:15 Mwimenye

Deuteronomy4:18 ryaba iry’igisimba gikururuka hasi
Deuteronomy4:19 Uramenye ntuzararame ureba ku ijuru
Deuteronomy4:20 ariko mwebwe Uhoraho yarabafashe
Deuteronomy4:21 Hanyuma Uhoraho yarandakariye kubera mwebwe
Deuteronomy4:22 None dore ngiye gupfira muri iki gihugu
Deuteronomy4:23 Muramenye rero ntimuzibagirwe Isezerano Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagiranye namwe
Deuteronomy4:24 Koko rero
Deuteronomy4:25 Numara kugira abana n’abuzukuru
Deuteronomy4:26 uyu munsi ntanze ijuru n’isi ho abagabo: muzahita murimbuka
Deuteronomy4:27 Uhoraho azabatatanyiriza mu bindi bihugu
Deuteronomy4:28 Nimugerayo
Deuteronomy4:29 Ubwo rero uzashakashakire iyo ngiyo Uhoraho Imana yawe; uzamubona kandi numushakashakisha umutima wawe wose
Deuteronomy4:30 Mu minsi izaza rero
Deuteronomy4:31 Kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe ari Imana igira impuhwe: ntazagutererana
Deuteronomy4:32 Ngaho baza ibihe byakubanjirije
Deuteronomy4:33 Hari undi muryango w’abantu wigeze wumva nkawe ijwi ry’Imana rivugira mu muriro rwagati
Deuteronomy4:34 Cyangwa se hari indi mana yigeze igerageza kwikurira ihanga hagati y’irindi ikoresheje ibyago
Deuteronomy4:35 Woweho warabyeretswe
Deuteronomy4:36 Yaguhaye kumva ijwi rye riturutse mu ijuru kugira ngo akwigishe; ku isi ahakwerekera umuriro we w’inkongi
Deuteronomy4:37 Kubera ko yakunze abasokuruza bawe
Deuteronomy4:38 kugira ngo yirukane imbere yawe amahanga akuruta ubwinshi kandi akurusha amaboko
Deuteronomy4:39 Uyu munsi rero ubimenye kandi ujye ubizirikana mu mutima wawe: Uhoraho ni we Mana mu ijuru no ku isi
Deuteronomy4:40 Urajye ukurikiza amategeko n’amabwiriza ye nkugejejeho uyu munsi kugira ngo uzabone ubugira ihirwe
Deuteronomy4:41 Nuko rero Musa arobanura imigi itatu hakurya ya Yorudani
Deuteronomy4:42 kugira ngo ibe ubuhungiro bw’umuntu wese wishe mugenzi we atabishaka
Deuteronomy4:43 Iyo migi ni iyi: umwe ni Beseri uri mu butayu mu gihugu cy’Imirambi
Deuteronomy4:44 Ngayo amategeko Musa yashyikirije Abayisraheli.
Deuteronomy4:45 Dore amateka
Deuteronomy4:46 igihe bari bageze hakurya ya Yorudani mu kibaya giteganye na Beti-Pewori
Deuteronomy4:47 bigarurira igihugu cye hamwe n’icya Ogi umwami wa Bashani. Abo bami bombi b’Abahemori bari batuye hakurya ya Yorudani
Deuteronomy4:48 Nuko Abayisraheli bigarurira ibihugu byabo
Deuteronomy4:49 hamwe n’Araba yose hakurya ya Yorudani mu ruhande rw’iburasirazuba
Deuteronomy5:1 Musa ahamagaza Israheli yose
Deuteronomy5:2 Uhoraho Imana yacu yagiranye natwe Isezerano kuri Horebu.
Deuteronomy5:3 Si abasokuruza bacu bagiranye n’Uhoraho iryo Sezerano
Deuteronomy5:4 Uhoraho yivuganiye namwe ubwanyu kuri uwo musozi
Deuteronomy5:5 naho jye icyo gihe nkaba nari mpagaze hagati yanyu n’Uhoraho
Deuteronomy5:6 «Ni jyewe Uhoraho Imana yawe
Deuteronomy5:7 Nta mana zindi uzagira kereka jyewe.
Deuteronomy5:8 Ntuzikorere ishusho ry’iribazanyo cyangwa se ikindi kibonetse cyose
Deuteronomy5:9 Ntuzapfukame imbere y’ibyo bigirwamana
Deuteronomy5:10 Nyamara abankunda bagakurikiza amategeko yanjye
Deuteronomy5:11 Ntuzavuge izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe mu bintu by’amanjwe
Deuteronomy5:12 Urajye wubahiriza umunsi w’isabato
Deuteronomy5:13 Uzakore imirimo yawe yose mu minsi itandatu
Deuteronomy5:14 naho uwa karindwi ni isabato y’Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ntuzagire umurimo n’umwe ukora: ari wowe
Deuteronomy5:15 Ujye wibuka ko wari umucakara mu gihugu cya Misiri
Deuteronomy5:16 Wubahe so na nyoko nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yabigutegetse
Deuteronomy5:17 Ntuzice umuntu.
Deuteronomy5:18 Ntuzasambane.

Joshua3:2 Nyuma y’iminsi itatu
Joshua3:3 maze baha rubanda iri tegeko
Joshua3:4 bityo muzamenye inzira mugomba kunyura

Joshua3:11 dore Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Umugenga w’isi yose bugiye kubabanziriza muri Yorudani.
Joshua3:12 None ubu rero
Joshua3:13 Ubwo abaherezabitambo bahetse Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho
Joshua3:14 Nuko imbaga isohoka mu mahema yayo kugira ngo yambuke Yorudani
Joshua3:15 Abahetse Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano bagikandagira mu mazi yo ku nkengero
Joshua3:16 ako kanya amazi yamanukaga ava mu masoko arahagarara
Joshua3:17 Nuko abaherezabitambo bahekaga Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho
Joshua4:1 Ubwo imbaga yose imaze kwambuka Yorudani
Joshua4:2 «Fata abantu cumi na babiri muri rubanda
Joshua4:3 maze ubategeke uti ’Mukure hano muri Yorudani nyirizina
Joshua4:4 Nuko Yozuwe ahamagara abantu cumi na babiri yari yatoranyije mu Bayisraheli
Joshua4:5 maze Yozuwe arababwira ati «Nimunyure imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho
Joshua4:6 kugira ngo ibyo bizababere ikimenyetso muzahorana. Ejo
Joshua4:7 muzabasubize muti ’Ni uko amazi ya Yorudani yacitsemo kabiri imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho
Joshua4:8 Nuko Abayisraheli bagenza uko Yozuwe yabategetse: batora amabuye cumi n’abiri yo muri Yorudani rwagati
Joshua4:9 Yozuwe ashingisha amabuye cumi n’abiri muri Yorudani rwagati
Joshua4:10 Abaherezabitambo bahetse Ubushyinguro baguma muri Yorudani rwagati
Joshua4:11 Maze rero rubanda rwose rumaze kwambuka
Joshua4:12 Bene Rubeni
Joshua4:13 Abantu bageze ku bihumbi mirongo ine
Joshua4:14 Uwo munsi Uhoraho yubahiriza Yozuwe mu maso y’Abayisraheli bose
Joshua4:15 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe
Joshua4:16 «Tegeka abaherezabitambo bahetse Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano
Joshua4:17 Maze Yozuwe ategeka abaherezabitambo
Joshua4:18 Nuko abaherezabitambo bahetse Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho barazamuka bava muri Yorudani
Joshua4:19 Imbaga iva kuri Yorudani ku wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa mbere
Joshua4:20 Naho ya mabuye cumi n’abiri bakuye muri Yorudani
Joshua4:21 Hanyuma abwira Abayisraheli ati «Ejo abahungu banyu nibabaza ba se bati ’Aya mabuye abibutsa iki?’
Joshua4:22 muzabimenyeshe abahungu banyu muvuga muti ’Israheli yambukiye Yorudani hano humutse.

Joshua8:2 Uko wagenjeje Yeriko n’umwami wayo
Joshua8:3 Yozuwe arabaduka
Joshua8:4 Yari yababwiye ati «Mutege amatwi! Muzaba mwihishe mu bico inyuma y’uwo mugi; ntimuzajye kure y’umugi kandi muzabe mwiteguye mwese.
Joshua8:5 Jye n’imbaga tuzaba turi kumwe
Joshua8:6 maze bazadukurikire kugeza ubwo tubageza kure y’umugi
Joshua8:7 Noneho mwe
Joshua8:8 Nimumara gufata umugi

Joshua8:10 Bukeye Yozuwe abyuka mu gitondo cya kare
Joshua8:11 Ingabo zose zari zakereye kurwana
Joshua8:12 Yozuwe ajyana n’abantu bageze ku bihumbi bitanu
Joshua8:13 Rubanda na bo baca ingando mu majyaruguru y’umugi
Joshua8:14 Umwami wa Hayi akibibona
Joshua8:15 Yozuwe n’Abayisraheli bose baritsindisha

Joshua8:17 Muri Hayi na Beteli
Joshua8:18 Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe ati «Erekeza icumu ufite mu ntoki kuri Hayi
Joshua8:19 Akirambura ikiganza
Joshua8:20 Ab’i Hayi basubije amaso inyuma
Joshua8:21 Yozuwe na Israheli yose
Joshua8:22 Abayisraheli bari mu mugi bawuvamo ngo bahure na bene wabo; batangatanga ab’i Hayi imbere n’inyuma
Joshua8:23 Umwami wa Hayi we yafashwe mpiri
Joshua8:24 Nuko Abayisraheli bamaze kurimbagura ab’i Hayi
Joshua8:25 Abapfuye uwo munsi

Joshua8:34 Nyuma y’ibyo

Joshua9:2 bashyira hamwe ngo barwanye Yozuwe na Israheli.
Joshua9:3 Abaturage b’i Gibewoni bumvise ibyo Yozuwe yakoreye Yeriko na Hayi
Joshua9:4 na bo bakoresha uburyarya bagerageza kwiyoberanya. Nuko indogobe zabo bazihekesha ibifuka bishaje
Joshua9:5 bambara inkweto zishaje na zo ziteye ibiremo

Joshua9:9 Na bo bati «Abagaragu bawe baturutse mu gihugu cya kure cyane ku mpamvu y’Uhoraho
Joshua9:10 n’ibyo yakoreye abami bombi b’Abahemori bari batuye hakurya ya Yorudani
Joshua9:11 Abakuru bacu n’abaturage b’igihugu cyacu bose baradutumye bati ’Mutware impamba
Joshua9:12 Dore umugati wacu wari ushyushye ubwo twakoraga impamba tuva mu ngo zacu
Joshua9:13 Izi mpago z’impu zirimo divayi twayishyizemo ari nshya
Joshua9:14 Abayisraheli basangira na bo ku mpamba zabo
Joshua9:15 Nuko Yozuwe agirana na bo isezerano
Joshua9:16 Hashize iminsi itatu bagiranye isezerano
Joshua9:17 Abayisraheli baragenda
Joshua9:18 Abayisraheli ntibabica
Joshua9:19 Abakuru b’umuryango babwira rubanda rwose bati «Twabarahiriye mu izina ry’Uhoraho
Joshua9:20 Dore uko tuzabagenza: tuzareka babeho kugira ngo tutikururira uburakari bw’Uhoraho
Joshua9:21 Abakuru b’umuryango barongera bati «Nibabeho! Ariko bajye basa inkwi kandi bajye bavomera amazi ikoraniro ryose.» Abakuru b’umuryango basubiza batyo ikoraniro.
Joshua9:22 Yozuwe ahamagara Abagibewoni
Joshua9:23 Kuva ubu mubaye ibivume
Joshua9:24 Basubiza Yozuwe
Joshua9:25 None ubu turi mu maboko yawe; tugire uko ubona bikwiye kandi bigutunganiye.»

Joshua13:1 Yozuwe yari ashaje kandi ageze mu zabukuru. Nuko Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Urashaje kandi ugeze mu zabukuru; ikindi kandi
Joshua13:2 Dore igihugu gisigaye uko kingana: Hari intara zose z’Abafilisiti n’iz’Abageshuri zose
Joshua13:3 kuva kuri Shihori ahateganye na Misiri kugeza mu karere ka Ekironi
Joshua13:4 Hasigaye n’igihugu cyose cy’Abakanahani
Joshua13:5 ukongeraho n’igihugu cy’Abagibili na Libani yose mu burasirazuba
Joshua13:6 Hasigaye n’abaturage bose bo mu misozi
Joshua13:7 None rero
Joshua13:8 Ikindi cya kabiri cya Manase hamwe na bene Rubeni na bene Gadi
Joshua13:9 kuva Aroweri iri haruguru y’amasumo ya Arunoni no kuva ku mugi uri hepfo
Joshua13:10 imigi yose ya Sihoni
Joshua13:11 ukongeraho Gilihadi n’igihugu cy’Abageshuri n’Abamahaka
Joshua13:12 no muri Bashani
Joshua13:13 Ariko Abayisraheli ntibanyaze Abageshuri n’Abamahaka; bituma Abageshuri n’Abamahaka bakomeza gutura muri Israheli kugeza na n’ubu.
Joshua13:14 Umuryango wa Levi wonyine ni wo utahawe umunani: Uhoraho
Joshua13:15 Musa yari yahaye umugabane umuryango wa bene Rubeni
Joshua13:16 Bahawe igihugu giherereye Aroweri haruguru y’amasumo ya Arunoni
Joshua13:17 bahawe Heshiboni n’imigi yayo yose iri ku murambi: Diboni
Joshua13:18 Yahasi
Joshua13:19 Kiryatayimu
Joshua13:20 Beti‐Pewori
Joshua13:21 bahawe n’imigi yose yo ku murambi
Joshua13:22 Mu bo Abayisraheli bishe hari na Balamu mwene Bewori w’umupfumu
Joshua13:23 Urubibi rwa bene Rubeni rwari Yorudani n’ibiyikikije. Uwo ni wo munani bene Rubeni bahawe
Joshua13:24 Musa kandi yari yahaye umugabane umuryango wa bene Gadi
Joshua13:25 Intara bahawe ni Yazeri
Joshua13:26 hanyuma bahawe kuva i Heshiboni kugera i Ramati‐Misipa na Betonimi
Joshua13:27 Mu kibaya bahawe na Betiharamu
Joshua13:28 Uwo ni wo munani Bene Gadi bahawe bakurikije amazu yabo
Joshua13:29 Icya kabiri cy’umuryango wa bene Manase
Joshua13:30 Intara bahawe ni uguhera i Mahanayimu
Joshua13:31 Icya kabiri cy’intara ya Gilihadi
Joshua13:32 Uwo ni wo munani Musa yatanze mu bibaya bya Mowabu hakurya ya Yorudani
Joshua13:33 Ariko Musa nta munani yahaye bene Levi; Uhoraho
Joshua14:1 Dore ibyo Abayisraheli barazwe mu gihugu cya Kanahani
Joshua14:2 Bahabwaga umunani wabo hakoreshejwe ubufindo
Joshua14:3 Koko rero indi miryango ibiri na kimwe cya kabiri cy’undi muryango
Joshua14:4 Bene Yozefu bari bagabanijwemo imiryango ibiri

Joshua14:11 Ingufu nsigaranye

Joshua14:15 Izina rya mbere rya Heburoni ryari KiriyatiAruba: Aruba uwo yari yarabaye umugabo w’ikirangirire mu Banaki. Ahasigaye igihugu kiratuza
Joshua15:1 Dore umugabane w’umuryango wa bene Yuda
Joshua15:2 Urubibi rwabo mu majyepfo rwavaga ku mpera y’Inyanja y’Umunyu
Joshua15:3 rugakomeza rugana mu majyepfo y’umuzamuko w’ Akarabimu rukanyura i Sini
Joshua15:4 rukanyura i Asimoni rugakomeza ku kagezi ka Misiri
Joshua15:5 Mu burasirazuba
Joshua15:6 rukazamuka rugana i Betihogila
Joshua15:7 Hanyuma rwakomezaga kuzamuka rugana i Debiri
Joshua15:8 Urubibi rwazamukaga ku mukokwe wa Beni‐Hinomu mu ibanga ryo mu majyepfo y’Abayebuzi — ni ukuvuga Yeruzalemu —
Joshua15:9 Urubibi rugahindukirira mu mpinga y’umusozi kugera mu majyaruguru

Judges1:8 Bene Yuda batera Yeruzalemu maze barayigarurira
Judges1:9 Nyuma y’ibyo

Judges1:11 Yuda ava aho ajya gutera abaturage b’i Debiri — icyo gihe yitwaga Kiriyati‐Seferi —.

Judges1:20 Nk’uko byari byarategetswe na Musa
Judges1:21 Naho Abayebuzi bari batuye i Yeruzalemu
Judges1:22 Abo mu nzu ya Yozefu na bo barazamuka
Judges1:23 Inzu ya Yozefu ijya gutata umugi wa Beteli
Judges1:24 Nuko intasi zibona umugabo usohotse mu mugi
Judges1:25 Uwo mugabo arahabereka
Judges1:26 Uwo mugabo ajya mu gihugu cy’Abaheti
Judges1:27 Manase ntiyashoboye gutsinda abaturage b’i Betishani
Judges1:28 Nyamara aho Israheli ikomereye
Judges1:29 Efurayimu ntiyashoboye kwirukana Abakanahani bari batuye i Gezeri
Judges1:30 Zabuloni ntiyashoboye kwirukana abaturage b’i Kitironi kimwe n’ab’i Nahaloli; Abakanahani baturana na Bene Zabuloni
Judges1:31 Asheri ntiyashoboye kwirukana abaturage b’i Ako kimwe n’ab’i Sidoni
Judges1:32 Bene Asheri baturanye n’Abakanahani bari batuye igihugu
Judges1:33 Nefutali ntiyashoboye kwirukana abaturage b’i Betishemeshi kimwe n’ab’i Betanati
Judges1:34 Abahemori baheza Bene Dani mu karere k’imisozi miremire

Judges2:2 none rero
Judges2:3 None rero ndababwiye nti ’Sinzabirukana imbere yanyu; maze bazababere umutego muzagwamo muramya ibigirwamana byabo.’»
Judges2:4 Nuko Umumalayika w’Uhoraho amaze kubwira Abayisraheli bose ayo magambo

Judges2:12 Bitandukanya n’Uhoraho
Judges2:13 Bitandukanyije n’Uhoraho

Judges2:17 Ariko n’abo bacamanza ntibabumva
Judges2:18 Igihe cyose Uhoraho yabohererezaga umucamanza
Judges2:19 Ariko iyo umucamanza yamaraga gupfa

Judges2:21 nanjye sinzongera kwirukana imbere yabo ihanga na rimwe mu yo Yozuwe yahasize igihe apfuye.»

Judges2:23 Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho areka ayo mahanga

Judges12:1 Abefurayimu barakorana
Judges12:2 Yefute arabasubiza ati «Jye n’abantu banjye twari dushyamiranye bikomeye n’Abahamoni. Igihe mbatabaje
Judges12:3 Mbonye ko mutankijije
Judges12:4 Hanyuma Yefute akoranya ingabo zose za Gilihadi arwanya Efurayimu; abantu b’i Gilihadi bica Abefurayimu
Judges12:5 Hanyuma Abagilihadi bigarurira ibyambu bya Yorudani bigana i Efurayimu. Nuko igihe umwe mu bacitse ku icumu ba Efurayimu avuze ati «Nimureke nambuke»
Judges12:6 baramubwiraga bati «Ngaho vuga ijambo Shiboleti.» Undi akavuga ati «Siboleti»
Judges12:7 Yefute aba umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka itandatu
Judges12:8 Nyuma ya Yefute haza Ibusani w’i Betelehemu
Judges12:9 Yari afite abahungu mirongo itatu n’abakobwa mirongo itatu. Abo bakobwa abashyingira mu yindi miryango
Judges12:10 Ibusani arapfa
Judges12:11 Nyuma ya Ibusani
Judges12:12 Eloni wo mu muryango wa Zabuloni arapfa
Judges12:13 Nyuma ya Eloni
Judges12:14 Yari afite abahungu mirongo ine n’abakobwa mirongo itatu
Judges12:15 Nuko Abudoni mwene Hileli w’i Pireyatoni arapfa
Judges13:1 Abayisraheli bongera gukora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho
Judges13:2 Mu karere ka Soreya hakaba umugabo wo mu muryango wa Dani
Judges13:3 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho abonekera uwo mugore maze aramubwira ati «Nzi neza ko uri ingumba ukaba utarigeze akana
Judges13:4 Guhera ubu
Judges13:5 kuko ugiye gusama inda maze ukabyara umuhungu. Urwembe ntiruzamugere ku mutwe
Judges13:6 Umugore arataha
Judges13:7 Yambwiye ati ’Dore ugiye gusama
Judges13:8 Nuko Manowa yambaza Uhoraho
Judges13:9 Imana yumva ijwi rya Manowa
Judges13:10 Ako kanya umugore ariruka
Judges13:11 Manowa arahaguruka akurikira umugore we
Judges13:12 Manowa aramubaza ati «Ubwo ijambo ryawe rizaba ryujujwe
Judges13:13 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho asubiza Manowa agira ati «Ibyo nabujije uyu mugore byose
Judges13:14 nta kinyobwa icyo ari cyo cyose giturutse ku mbuto y’umuzabibu agomba kunywa: ntazanywa divayi cyangwa n’ikindi kinyobwa gisindisha; ntazarya ikiribwa icyo ari cyo cyose gihumanye
Judges13:15 Manowa abwira Umumalayika w’Uhoraho
Judges13:16 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho asubiza Manowa
Judges13:17 Manowa abaza Umumalayika w’Uhoraho
Judges13:18 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Ni mpamvu ki umbaza izina ryanjye? Ni ibanga.»
Judges13:19 Manowa afata umwana w’ihene n’andi maturo
Judges13:20 Nuko
Judges13:21 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho ntiyongera ukundi kubonekera Manowa n’umugore we
Judges13:22 Manowa abwira umugore we
Judges13:23 Ariko umugore we aramusubiza ati «Iyaba Imana yashakaga kutwica
Judges13:24 Nuko uwo mugore abyara umuhungu
Judges13:25 Samusoni yari i Mahane‐Dani hagati ya Soreya na Eshitayoli
Judges14:1 Umunsi umwe
Judges14:2 Nuko atashye
Judges14:3 Ababyeyi be baramusubiza bati «Wabuze umugore mu bakobwa ba bene wanyu no mu muryango wacu
Judges14:4 Ubwo ababyeyi be ntibari bazi ko ibyo byaturutse kuri Uhoraho
Judges14:5 Samusoni aramanuka ajya i Timuna. Ageze ku mizabibu y’i Timuna
Judges14:6 Umwuka w’Uhoraho umwinjiramo; ako kanya Samusoni utari ufite intwaro mu ntoki
Judges14:7 Hanyuma amanuka ajya i Timuna
Judges14:8 Nyuma y’iminsi mike
Judges14:9 Ahakuramo ubuki mu kiganza
Judges14:10 Hanyuma se aramanuka ajya iw’umukazana we
Judges14:11 Abafilisiti bakimara kumubona
Judges14:12 Samusoni arababwira ati «Ngiye kubaha igisakuzo. Nimuramuka mucyishe muri iyi minsi irindwi y’ubukwe
Judges14:13 Ariko nimuramuka mutacyishe
Judges14:14 Samusoni araterura ati «Mu kiryana havuyemo ikiribwa
Judges14:15 Nuko ku munsi wa kane babwira muka Samusoni
Judges14:16 Muka Samusoni ajya kumuganyira
Judges14:17 Umugore we akomeza kumuganyira mu minsi irindwi yose ibirori by’ubukwe byamaze. Ku munsi wa karindwi
Judges14:18 Nuko ku munsi wa karindwi
Judges14:19 Nuko umwuka w’Uhoraho winjira muri Samusoni
Judges14:20 Naho umugore we
Judges15:1 Hashize iminsi mike
Judges15:2 ahubwo abwira Samusoni

Judges15:4 Samusoni aragenda
Judges15:5 Hanyuma akongeza ya mafumba
Judges15:6 Abafilisiti barabaza bati «Ni nde wakoze ibi?» Barabasubiza bati «Ni Samusoni
Judges15:7 Samusoni arababwira ati «Ubwo mubigenje mutyo
Judges15:8 Nuko arabatera
Judges15:9 Abafilisiti barazamuka baca ingando muri Yuda
Judges15:10 Bene Yuda barababaza bati «Ni mpamvu ki muzamutse mukaza kudutera?» Abafilisiti barabasubiza bati «Twazamuwe no kuboha Samusoni
Judges15:11 Nuko Bene Yuda ibihumbi bitatu baramanuka bajya ku buvumo bwari Etamu
Judges15:12 Baramubwira bati «Tuzanywe no kukuboha

Judges15:14 Ngo bagere bugufi ya Lehi

Judges15:17 Amaze kuvuga ibyo
Judges15:18 Kubera ko Samusoni yari afite inyota
Judges15:19 Nuko Imana ifukura iriba i Lehi
Judges15:20 Samusoni amara imyaka makumyabiri ari umucamanza muri Israheli

Judges16:2 Babimenyesha abaturage b’i Gaza
Judges16:3 Ariko Samusoni ntiyakomeje kuryama
Judges16:4 Nuko ibyo birangiye

Judges16:6 Dalila abwira Samusoni

Judges16:9 Uwo mugore yari yahishe abantu mu cyumba cye
Judges16:10 Dalila ni ko kubwira Samusoni
Judges16:11 Samusoni aramusubiza ati «Bambohesheje imigozi mishya itigeze gukoreshwa
Judges16:12 Dalila afata imigozi mishya aramuboha
Judges16:13 Dalila abwira Samusoni
Judges16:14 Uwo mugore aramubikira
Judges16:15 Dalila aramubwira ati «Ushobora kuvuga ute ngo ’Ndagukunda’
Judges16:16 Buri munsi Dalila agakomeza kumuhata
Judges16:17 Nuko amuhishurira amabanga ye yose
Judges16:18 Dalila abonye ko amuhishuriye amabanga ye yose
Judges16:19 Nuko Dalila abikirira Samusoni ku bibero bye
Judges16:20 Dalila aramubwira ati «Urapfuye Samusoni we
Judges16:21 Abafilisiti baramufata bamunogoramo amaso; baramumanukana n’i Gaza
Judges16:22 Ariko bamaze kumwogosha
Judges16:23 Nuko abatware b’Abafilisiti barakorana kugira ngo bature ibitambo Dagoni
Judges16:24 Rubanda ngo barabukwe Samusoni
Judges16:25 Nuko kubera ko bari banezerewe
Judges16:26 Samusoni abwira umuhungu wari umurandase
Judges16:27 Ubwo iyo ngoro yari yuzuye abagabo n’abagore; hakaba kandi n’abatware b’Abafilisiti
Judges16:28 Samusoni yambaza Uhoraho
Judges16:29 Nuko Samusoni ahera ko afata inkingi ebyiri zo hagati zari zishyigikiye ingoro
Judges16:30 Samusoni atera hejuru
Judges16:31 Abavandimwe be n’abo mu nzu ya se barazamuka baramutwara; bamushyingura hagati ya Soreya na Eshitayoli

Judges17:2 Umunsi umwe abwira nyina

Judges17:4 Nyina aherako afatamo amasikeli magana abiri ya feza ayaha umucuzi. Umucuzi na we akora ikigirwamana n’ishusho ry’icyuma gishongeshejwe

Judges17:6 Muri iyo minsi

Judges17:11 Uwo Mulevi yemera kuguma iwe
Judges17:12 Mika ashyiraho uwo musore w’Umulevi
Judges17:13 Mika aribwira ati «Noneho ndahamya ko Uhoraho azankorera ibyiza

Judges18:2 Abadani bafata abantu batanu b’intwari mu muryango wabo
Judges18:3 Nuko igihe bari bugufi y’urugo rwa Mika
Judges18:4 Arabasubiza ati «Mika yankoreye ibintu byinshi: yananshyizeho ngo mubere umuherezabitambo.»
Judges18:5 Baramubwira bati «Nuko rero
Judges18:6 Umuherezabitambo arabasubiza ati «Nimugende amahoro! Urugendo murimo rushyigikiwe n’Uhoraho!»
Judges18:7 Ba bantu batanu baragenda
Judges18:8 Ba bantu batanu baragaruka
Judges18:9 Barabasubiza bati «Duhaguruke! Tuzamuke tubatere
Judges18:10 Nimukinjiramo
Judges18:11 Nuko Abadani bagera ku bantu magana atandatu biteguye intambara
Judges18:12 Barazamuka baca ingando i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu
Judges18:13 Bavuye aho ngaho
Judges18:14 Ba bantu batanu bari baragiye gutata igihugu cya Layishi bafata ijambo
Judges18:15 Nuko ba bantu batanu baca ku ruhande
Judges18:16 naho ba bantu magana atandatu bo mu muryango wa Dani bari bahagaze ku marembo
Judges18:17 Nuko ba bantu batanu bari baragiye gutata igihugu bazamuka mu nzu yo hejuru
Judges18:18 Abari binjiye mu rugo kwa Mika bari basahuye rya shusho ry’ikigirwamana
Judges18:19 Baramusubiza bati «Ceceka
Judges18:20 Umuherezabitambo arabyishimira
Judges18:21 Abadani barahindukira
Judges18:22 Bamaze kugera kure yo kwa Mika
Judges18:23 Uko basakuzaga inyuma y’Abadani
Judges18:24 Akabasubiza ati «Mwanyaze umuherezabitambo n’imana nari narikoreshereje
Judges18:25 Abadani baramubwira bati «Ntitwongere kukumva! Cyangwa se abanyamujinya muri twe baguhitane
Judges18:26 Abadani bikomereza inzira yabo
Judges18:27 Abadani rero bamaze kunyaga ibyo kwa Mika n’umuherezabitambo we
Judges18:28 Ntihaboneka umuntu ushobora kuwurengera
Judges18:29 Uwo mugi bawitirira Dani
Judges18:30 Nuko Abadani bashinga rya shusho ry’ikigirwamana; Yehonatani mwene Gerishomu
Judges18:31 Nuko bahashinga iryo shusho ry’ikigirwamana Mika yari yarakoresheje
Judges19:1 Nuko muri iyo minsi — nta mwami wariho muri Israheli —
Judges19:2 Uwo mugore aramuhemukira
Judges19:3 Umugabo we ajya kumureba
Judges19:4 Sebukwe amubuza gutaha
Judges19:5 Nuko ku munsi wa kane babyuka mu gitondo cya kare
Judges19:6 Bombi baricara barasangira. Hanyuma se w’uwo mugore abwira umukwe we
Judges19:7 Uwo mugabo yari yiteguye gutaha
Judges19:8 Ku munsi wa gatanu abyuka mu gitondo cya kare kugira ngo atahe
Judges19:9 Nuko umugabo yitegura gutaha
Judges19:10 Ariko uwo mugabo yanga kurara. Arahaguruka aragenda
Judges19:11 Igihe bageze bugufi ya Yebuzi
Judges19:12 Shebuja aramusubiza ati «Nta bwo twarara kuri uriya mugi w’abanyamahanga
Judges19:13 Tugane kamwe muri turiya turere
Judges19:14 Barakomeza baragenda
Judges19:15 Berekeza rero muri urwo ruhande
Judges19:16 Nuko nimugoroba
Judges19:17 Ngo yubure amaso
Judges19:18 Undi aramusubiza ati «Duturutse i Betelehemu
Judges19:19 Nyamara dufite ubwatsi n’ibiryo by’indogobe zacu; nkagira n’imigati na divayi byanjye n’umuja wawe
Judges19:20 Umusaza arasubiza ati «Murakaza neza! Ibyo ukeneye byose abe ari jye bibazwa
Judges19:21 Abajyana iwe maze aha indogobe ibyo zirya. Abagenzi barakaraba
Judges19:22 Mu gihe bari bagifungura
Judges19:23 Nyir’urugo arasohoka maze arababwira ati «Oya! Ndabinginze
Judges19:24 Dore umukobwa wanjye w’isugi
Judges19:25 Abo bantu banga kumwumva. Nuko uwo Mulevi afata umugore we
Judges19:26 Ahagana mu gitondo
Judges19:27 Mu gitondo cya kare
Judges19:28 Aramubwira ati «Haguruka tugende!» Ariko umugore ntiyagira icyo asubiza. Nuko wa Mulevi amuhekesha indogobe maze aragenda ajya iwe.
Judges19:29 Agezeyo
Judges19:30 Nuko ubonye ibyo wese akavuga ati «Nta na rimwe ibintu nk’ibi byigeze biba cyangwa se biboneka
Judges20:1 Abayisraheli basohokera icyarimwe
Judges20:2 Abatware b’imbaga n’abakuru b’imiryango yose ya Israheli bahagarara imbere y’ikoraniro ry’Imana
Judges20:3 Ababenyamini bamenya ko Abayisraheli bazamutse i Misipa. Nuko Abayisraheli baravuga bati «Tubwire ukuntu icyo gicumuro cyaje.»
Judges20:4 Uwo Mulevi
Judges20:5 Abanyagibeya bantera nijoro basakiza inzu nari ndimo bashaka kunyica. Ni bwo bafashe umugore wanjye bamugirira nabi kugeza ko apfuye.
Judges20:6 Mfata umugore wanjye mutemamo ibice
Judges20:7 None rero
Judges20:8 Nuko Abayisraheli bose bahagurukira icyarimwe
Judges20:9 None rero
Judges20:10 maze dufate abantu icumi ku ijana mu miryango yose ya Israheli
Judges20:11 Nuko Abayisraheli bose bakoranira hamwe
Judges20:12 Imiryango ya Israheli yohereza abantu ku muryango wose wa Benyamini kubabwira bati «Icyo gicumuro cyabonetse muri mwe ni bwoko ki?
Judges20:13 Noneho rero
Judges20:14 Nuko Ababenyamini bava mu migi yabo
Judges20:15 Uwo munsi
Judges20:16 Muri iyo mbaga yose
Judges20:17 Abayisraheli na bo barabarurwa: bari abantu ibihumbi magana ane bazi kurwanisha inkota kandi bamenyereye intambara
Judges20:18 Baragenda
Judges20:19 Abayisraheli babyuka mu gitondo cya kare maze baca ingando hafi ya Gibeya.
Judges20:20 Bukeye Abayisraheli barasohoka bajya ku rugamba kugira ngo barwanye Ababenyamini
Judges20:21 Ababenyamini na bo basohoka i Gibeya
Judges20:22 Imbaga y’Abayisraheli irongera irisuganya
Judges20:23 Abayisraheli ni ko kuzamuka
Judges20:24 Ku munsi wa kabiri
Judges20:25 Kuri uwo munsi wa kabiri
Judges20:26 Imbaga yose y’abana b’Abayisraheli barazamuka bajya i Beteli
Judges20:27 Abayisraheli babaza Uhoraho — kandi koko muri iyo minsi
Judges20:28 Pinehasi mwene Eleyazari
Judges20:29 Abayisraheli bahisha abantu impande zose za Gibeya.
Judges20:30 Ku munsi wa gatatu
Judges20:31 Ababenyamini barasohoka bajya kurwana n’iyo mbaga
Judges20:32 Nuko Ababenyamini barabwirana bati «Dore turabatsinze nk’uko byagenze ubushize!» Ariko Abayisraheli baribwiraga bati «Tugiye guhunga maze tubashuke bagere mu muhanda kure y’umugi.»
Judges20:33 Hanyuma Abayisraheli bava aho bari bari hose
Judges20:34 Abantu ibihumbi cumi b’intwari batoranyijwe muri Israheli yose bagera ahateganye na Gibeya; urugamba rurakomera
Judges20:35 Uhoraho atsinda Ababenyamini mu maso ya Israheli
Judges20:36 Ubwo Ababenyamini babona ko batsinzwe. Abayisraheli barekeye urubuga Ababenyamini
Judges20:37 Abo bari bihishe bihutira kujya mu mugi wa Gibeya
Judges20:38 Ariko Abayisraheli bakaba bari bumvikanye n’abantu babo bari mu bwihisho ko umwotsi nutumbagira hejuru y’umugi
Judges20:39 Nuko bawubonye
Judges20:40 Ariko cya kimenyetso cy’umwotsi cyari cyatangiye kuzamuka mu mugi
Judges20:41 Abayisraheli rero bari babakurikiranye
Judges20:42 Ababenyamini bahunga Abayisraheli berekeza mu butayu
Judges20:43 Abayisraheli basatira Ababenyamini
Judges20:44 Nuko hapfa abantu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu Babenyamini
Judges20:45 Abandi Babenyamini bahungiye mu butayu
Judges20:46 Ababenyamini bapfuye uwo munsi bagera ku bihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu
Judges20:47 Abandi magana atandatu barahindukira bahungira mu butayu
Judges20:48 Abayisraheli baragaruka birara mu Babenyamini bari basigaye
Judges21:1 Abayisraheli ubwo bari bakoraniye i Misipa bararahiye
Judges21:2 Imbaga yose iza i Beteli
Judges21:3 Baravuga bati «Uhoraho
Judges21:4 Bukeye
Judges21:5 Abayisraheli baravuga bati «Mu miryango yose ya Israheli ni uwuhe utazamutse ngo ujye mu ikoraniro imbere y’Uhoraho?» Koko kandi
Judges21:6 Abayisraheli bagirira impuhwe abavandimwe babo b’Ababenyamini
Judges21:7 Tuzakora iki ngo tubonere abagore ababo basigaye
Judges21:8 Nuko baravuga bati «Hari umuntu mu miryango ya Israheli waba atarazamutse ngo asange Uhoraho i Misipa?» Basanga nta muntu n’umwe w’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi wigeze aza aho bari bakoraniye mu ngando.
Judges21:9 Barangije kubarura imbaga yose
Judges21:10 Ikoraniro ryohereza abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri batoranyijwe mu ngabo
Judges21:11 Dore icyo mugomba gukora: muzice umugabo wese
Judges21:12 Mu baturage b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi haboneka abakobwa b’amasugi magana ane batigeze baryamana n’umugabo
Judges21:13 Nuko ikoraniro ryose ryohereza intumwa ku Babenyamini bari ku rutare rw’i Rimoni
Judges21:14 Ababenyamini baherako barahindukira
Judges21:15 Imbaga yose igirira impuhwe Ababenyamini
Judges21:16 Nuko abakuru b’ikoraniro baravuga bati «Twakora iki kugira ngo n’abasigaye babone abagore
Judges21:17 Mbese Benyamini izagira ite abasigaye
Judges21:18 Natwe ubwacu kandi
Judges21:19 Ariko baza kwibuka bati «Turenda kujya mu munsi mukuru w’Uhoraho ubera buri mwaka i Silo
Judges21:20 Hanyuma bategeka Ababenyamini
Judges21:21 Mwitegereze kugeza ubwo abakobwa b’i Silo basohoka baje kubyina mu makoraniro y’abaririmbyi
Judges21:22 Ba se cyangwa abavandimwe babo nibaramuka baduteyeho amahane
Judges21:23 Nuko Ababenyamini babigenza batyo. Muri abo bakobwa babyinaga bari bafashe
Judges21:24 Icyo gihe Abayisraheli bose baratatana
Judges21:25 Muri iyo minsi kandi
Ruth1:1 Kera
Ruth1:2 Uwo mugabo yitwaga Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki
Ruth1:4 Abo basore bashaka abagore b’Abamowabukazi: umwe yitwaga Oripa
Ruth1:5 Nyuma
Ruth1:6 Nawomi arahaguruka n’abakazana be bombi
Ruth1:7 Nuko rero ava aho yari atuye
Ruth1:8 Bakigenda Nawomi abwira abakazana be
Ruth1:9 Uhoraho azabahe kugira ituze mu rugo rwanyu hamwe n’uwo muzashakana.» Nuko abasezeraho. Bo baraturika bararira.
Ruth1:10 Bati «Oya rwose
Ruth1:11 Ariko Nawomi arababwira ati «Nimusubire iwanyu
Ruth1:12 Ngaho nimwigendere musubire iwanyu
Ruth1:13 ese mwazategereza kugera igihe bazakurira? Murumva se ibyo ari byo byababuza kujya kwishakira abagabo? Oya
Ruth1:14 Abakazana barushaho kurira. Hanyuma Oripa asezera kuri nyirabukwe
Ruth1:15 Nawomi aramubwira ati «Dore mukeba wawe asubiye iwabo
Ruth1:16 Nuko Ruta aramusubiza ati «Wikomeza kumpatira kugusiga ngo nisubirire iwacu
Ruth1:17 aho uzagwa ni ho nzagwa bahampambe! Nihagira ikindi kidutandukanya usibye urupfu
Ruth1:18 Nuko Nawomi abonye ko Ruta yiyemeje rwose ibyo kujyana na we
Ruth1:19 Nuko barajyana bagera i Betelehemu. Batungutse i Betelehemu
Ruth1:20 Ariko we arababwira ati «Mwinyita Nawomi (Umutoni)
Ruth1:21 Navuye ino mfite byinshi
Ruth1:22 Nguko uko Nawomi yagarutse
Ruth2:1 Ubwo rero Nawomi akaba yari afite mwene wabo w’umugabo we
Ruth2:2 Ruta w’Umumowabukazi abwira Nawomi
Ruth2:3 Nuko aragenda ajya guhumba mu murima inyuma y’abasaruzi. Iby’ amahirwe
Ruth2:4 Hashize umwanya Bowozi aba arahageze avuye i Betelehemu. Aramutsa abasaruzi be
Ruth2:5 Bowozi abaza umutware w’abasaruzi
Ruth2:6 Umutware w’abasaruzi aramusubiza ati «Uriya mugore ni Umumowabukazi
Ruth2:7 Yanyinginze ati ’Nagira ngo nihumbire ingano
Ruth2:8 Nuko Bowozi abwira Ruta
Ruth2:9 umurima basarura ntuwukureho amaso
Ruth2:10 Nuko Ruta amupfukama imbere
Ruth2:11 Bowozi aramusubiza ati «Bambwiye ibyawe
Ruth2:12 Rwose Uhoraho azaguhe ingororano y’ibyo wakoze byose. Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli azakwihere igihembo cyuzuye
Ruth2:13 Nuko Ruta aramubwira ati «Rero uranyiteho
Ruth2:14 Igihe cyo gufungura kigeze
Ruth2:15 Igihe ahagurutse asubiye guhumba
Ruth2:16 Ndetse mujye mukora no ku miba mute amahundo hasi
Ruth2:17 Ruta arakomeza ahumba muri uwo murima
Ruth2:18 Arikorera arataha
Ruth2:19 Nyirabukwe aramubaza ati «Wahumbye mu murima wa nde
Ruth2:20 Nawomi abwira umukazana we
Ruth2:21 Ruta Umumowabukazi ati «Ahubwo yanambwiye ngo nzakomeze mpumbe inyuma y’abakozi be
Ruth2:22 Nawomi abwira umukazana we
Ruth2:23 Bityo Ruta akomeza guhumba mu kwa Bowozi
Ruth3:1 Nawomi abwira umukazana we
Ruth3:2 None se uriya Bowozi
Ruth3:3 Umva rero
Ruth3:4 Najya kuryama
Ruth3:5 Ruta aramusubiza ati «Ibyo umbwiye byose ndabikora.»
Ruth3:6 Nuko aramanuka ajya aho bagosorera
Ruth3:7 Bowozi ararya
Ruth3:8 Nuko mu gicuku
Ruth3:9 Ati «Yewe
Ruth3:10 Bowozi ati «Urakagira umugisha w’Uhoraho
Ruth3:11 None rero
Ruth3:12 Cyakora n’ubwo ndi mu bagomba kugaruza iby’umuryango
Ruth3:13 Iryamire; ejo nagutwara
Ruth3:14 Nuko umugore arara aho ku birenge bye
Ruth3:15 Aramubwira ati «Zana uwo mwitero wawe
Ruth3:16 Agitunguka
Ruth3:17 Ati «Yampaye n’uyu mutwaro w’ingano
Ruth3:18 Nawomi aramubwira ati «Igumire aha
Ruth4:1 Bowozi ajya mu marembo y’umugi
Ruth4:2 Nuko Bowozi atora abagabo cumi mu bakuru b’umugi. Arababwira ati «Nimube mwicaye aha.» Baricara.
Ruth4:3 Maze Bowozi abwira nyir’ukugaruza iby’umuryango
Ruth4:4 Nasanze rero ngomba kubikumenyesha
Ruth4:5 Bowozi ati «Umenye rero ko umunsi wagaruje iyi sambu
Ruth4:6 Nuko wawundi wagombaga kugaruza iby’umuryango ati «Ubwo ari uko bimeze
Ruth4:7 Kera rero uko byagendaga muri Israheli: iyo abagabo babiri babaga bamaze kumvikana
Ruth4:8 Ubwo rero wawundi wagombaga kugaruza iby’umuryango abwira Bowozi
Ruth4:9 Bowozi abwira abakuru b’imiryango n’imbaga yose yari aho
Ruth4:10 Ubu kandi mpise ncyura na Ruta w’Umumowabukazi muka Mahiloni
Ruth4:11 Nuko rubanda rwose rwari aho mu nama
Ruth4:12 Abana Imana izaguha kubyarana n’uwo mugore bazatume urugo rwawe rukomera nk’urwa Pereshi mwene Yuda na Tamara.»
Ruth4:13 Bowozi acyura Ruta maze amugira umugore we. Uhoraho amuha gusama abyara umuhungu.
Ruth4:14 Abagore babwira Nawomi
Ruth4:15 Azatuma usubirana amagara wahoranye
Ruth4:16 Nawomi aterura umwana
Ruth4:17 Abagore b’abaturanyi baza kumwita izina
Ruth4:18 Dore abakomoka kuri Pereshi
Ruth4:19 Hesironi abyara Ramu; Ramu abyara Aminadabu;
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu abyara Nahasoni; Nahasoni abyara Salimu;
Ruth4:21 Salimu abyara Bowozi; Bowozi abyara Obedi;
Ruth4:22 Obedi abyara Yese; maze Yese abyara Dawudi.
1Samuel1:1 I Ramatayimu‐Sofimu
1Samuel1:2 Yari afite abagore babiri: umwe akitwa Ana
1Samuel1:3 Buri mwaka
1Samuel1:4 Nuko umunsi Elikana yakundaga guturaho igitambo uragera. Yari afite akamenyero ko guha umugore we Penina n’abahungu be n’abakobwa be bose imigabane ivuye kuri icyo gitambo.
1Samuel1:5 Ariko Ana akamuha umugabane w’akarusho kuko ari we yakundaga
1Samuel1:6 Ikindi kandi
1Samuel1:7 Ni ko byagendaga buri mwaka: igihe cyose bazamukaga bagana Ingoro y’Uhoraho
1Samuel1:8 Umugabo we Elikana aramubaza ati «Ana we
1Samuel1:9 Bamaze kurira no kunywera aho i Silo
1Samuel1:10 Ana ashenguwe n’ishavu
1Samuel1:11 Nuko agira iri sezerano
1Samuel1:12 Amara umwanya muremure imbere y’Uhoraho asenga. Ubwo Heli yitegerezaga umunwa we.
1Samuel1:13 Ana yavugiraga mu mutima we: iminwa ye yonyine ni yo yanyeganyegaga; ijwi rye ntiryumvikanaga. Heli agira ngo uwo mugore yasinze
1Samuel1:14 maze aramubwira ati «Urasinda na ryari? Jya kuryamisha divayi yawe!»
1Samuel1:15 Ana aramusubiza ati «Shobuja
1Samuel1:16 Wikwibwira ko umuja wawe ari umupfu; ahubwo ni ishavu n’agahinda byandenze bituma nivugisha kugeza magingo aya.»
1Samuel1:17 Heli aramusubiza ati «Genda amahoro kandi Imana ya Israheli iguhe icyo wayisabye!»
1Samuel1:18 Ana aramusubiza ati «Umuja wawe arakuronkereho umugisha!» Umugore aragenda
1Samuel1:19 Babyuka mu gitondo cya kare bunamira Uhoraho; nuko bataha iwabo i Rama. Elikana aryamana n’umugore we Ana
1Samuel1:20 Nuko rero igihe kigeze
1Samuel1:21 Muri uwo mwaka
1Samuel1:22 Ariko Ana ntiyazamukana na bo
1Samuel1:23 Umugabo we Elikana aramubwira ati «Kora ikigutunganiye. Sigara aha kugeza ubwo uzamucutsa. Gusa
1Samuel1:24 Amaze kumucutsa
1Samuel1:25 Batamba cya kimasa
1Samuel1:26 Ana ati «Umbabarire
1Samuel1:27 Uyu mwana ni we nasabaga
1Samuel1:28 Nanjye ndamumuhaye: yeguriwe Uhoraho mu buzima bwe bwose.» Nuko bunamira Uhoraho aho ngaho.

1Samuel12:3 Ngaha ndi hano! Nimunshinje imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’uwo yasize: ni nde naba naranyaze ikimasa cye cyangwa indogobe ye? Ni nde nariganyije cyangwa nakandamije? Ni nde naba narahatiye kumpa ibiguzi ngo mbonereho kwirengagiza ibibi yakoze? Nihagira uboneka
1Samuel12:4 Baramusubiza bati «Nta cyo waturiganyijeho
1Samuel12:5 Arababwira ati «Uhoraho n’uwo yiyimikiye
1Samuel12:6 Nuko Samweli abwira rubanda
1Samuel12:7 None rero
1Samuel12:8 Ubwo Yakobo yageraga mu Misiri
1Samuel12:9 Ariko baje kwibagirwa Uhoraho Imana yabo
1Samuel12:10 Bukeye
1Samuel12:11 Nuko Uhoraho aboherereza Yerubehali
1Samuel12:12 Ariko aho muboneye Nahashi
1Samuel12:13 None rero
1Samuel12:14 Nimutinya Uhoraho
1Samuel12:15 Ariko nimutumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho
1Samuel12:16 Ikindi kandi

1Samuel12:18 Samweli asaba Uhoraho
1Samuel12:19 Rubanda babwira Samweli
1Samuel12:20 Samweli arababwira ati «Mwitinya! Koko ibyo bibi byose ni mwe mwabikoze

1Samuel12:22 Koko rero
1Samuel12:23 Naho ku binyerekeyeko

1Samuel13:1 Sawuli yari afite imyaka.........
1Samuel13:2 Bukeye yitoranyiriza abantu ibihumbi bitatu muri Israheli: ibihumbi bibiri bari kumwe na we i Mikimasi no ku musozi wa Beteli
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani atsinda umwe mu batware bategekera Abafilisiti wari utuye i Gibeya
1Samuel13:4 Israheli yose yumva ko Sawuli yatsinze umutware w’Abafilisiti
1Samuel13:5 Abafilisiti na bo barakorana ngo barwanye Israheli. Bari bafite amagare ibihumbi mirongo itatu
1Samuel13:6 Abayisraheli babonye ko bari mu kaga
1Samuel13:7 Ndetse bamwe bambuka Yorudani
1Samuel13:8 Sawuli ahamara iminsi irindwi ategereje Samweli
1Samuel13:9 Ni bwo Sawuli avuze ati «Nimunzanire igitambo gitwikwa
1Samuel13:10 Akimara gutura igitambo gitwikwa
1Samuel13:11 Samweli aramubaza ati «Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki?» Sawuli aramusubiza ati «Nabonye abantu bose banshizeho batatanye
1Samuel13:12 ndibwira nti ’Ubu ngubu Abafilisiti bagiye kumfatira i Giligali
1Samuel13:13 Samweli abwira Sawuli
1Samuel13:14 Ariko noneho
1Samuel13:15 Samweli ashyiranzira ava i Giligali. Sawuli ajyana n’abari basigaranye na we
1Samuel13:16 Sawuli n’umuhungu we Yonatani n’abari kumwe na bo
1Samuel13:17 Bukeye
1Samuel13:18 irya kabiri rijya i Betihoroni
1Samuel13:19 Icyo gihe nta mucuzi wari ukirangwa mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli

1Samuel13:23 Nuko ingabo z’Abafilisiti zirasohoka
1Samuel14:1 Umunsi umwe
1Samuel14:2 Sawuli yari yicaye hafi y’urugabano rw’i Geba

1Samuel14:4 Hagati aho
1Samuel14:5 Rimwe muri ayo menyo y’icyo gitare ryari rihagaze ryerekeje mu majyaruguru

1Samuel14:19 Uko Sawuli avugana n’umuherezabitambo

1Samuel14:22 Ndetse n’Abayisraheli bose bari bihishe mu misozi y’i Efurayimu
1Samuel14:23 Uwo munsi Uhoraho aha Israheli gutsinda

1Samuel14:26 Ngo binjire muri rya shyamba
1Samuel14:27 Ariko Yonatani we

1Samuel14:30 Mbese uyu munsi

1Samuel22:2 Nuko iruhande rwe hateranira abanyabyago
1Samuel22:3 Dawudi yongera kuva aho ngaho ajya i Misipa y’i Mowabu
1Samuel22:4 Nuko se na nyina abazanira umwami w’i Mowabu babana na we
1Samuel22:5 Umuhanuzi Gadi aza kubwira Dawudi

1Samuel22:7 Sawuli abwira abagaragu be bamushagaye

1Samuel25:1 Samweli aza gupfa. Abayisraheli bose baraterana; bamaze kumuririra
1Samuel25:2 Hakaba umugabo w’i Mawoni wari umukungu cyane
1Samuel25:3 Uwo mugabo yitwaga Nabali n’umugore we akitwa Abigayila. Uwo mugore yari mwiza kandi akaba umunyabwenge

1Samuel25:6 Muzamubwire muti ’Umwaka muhire! Amahoro kuri mwe

1Samuel25:18 Nuko Abigayila agira bwangu

1Samuel25:22 Imana izabihore Dawudi — ariko cyane cyane izabihore abanzi be — niba

1Samuel25:25 Ndagusabye
1Samuel25:26 Nyamara

2Samuel2:6 None rero
2Samuel2:7 Ikindi kandi
2Samuel2:8 Abuneri mwene Neri

2Samuel2:14 Abuneri abwira Yowabu

2Samuel2:17 Uwo munsi intambara irakara cyane
2Samuel2:18 Aho kandi hakaba abahungu batatu ba Seruya
2Samuel2:19 Nuko Asaheli akurikirana Abuneri

2Samuel2:22 Abuneri yongera kubwira Asaheli
2Samuel2:23 Ariko Asaheli yanga kwigirayo

2Samuel2:25 Ababenyamini barakorana bakikije Abuneri
2Samuel2:26 Abuneri ahamagara Yowabu aramubaza ati «Mbese inkota izakomeza ubudatuza kubaga abantu? Ntuzi se ko amaherezo ibyo bizarangira mu mubabaro? Uzabwira ryari abantu bawe kureka gukurikirana abavandimwe babo?»
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye Imana ko iyo utajya kuba ubivuze
2Samuel2:28 Nuko Yowabu avuza ihembe; abantu bose barahagarara
2Samuel2:29 Abuneri n’ingabo ze bagenda ijoro ryose
2Samuel2:30 Ubwo Yowabu areka gukurikira Abuneri
2Samuel2:31 Abagaragu ba Dawudi bo bari bishe abantu magana atatu na mirongo itandatu mu Babenyamini no mu ngabo za Abuneri.
2Samuel2:32 Nuko baterura Asaheli
2Samuel3:1 Ubwo inzu ya Sawuli n’iya Dawudi zirwana intambara y’urudaca. Dawudi akarushaho gukomera
2Samuel3:2 I Heburoni
2Samuel3:3 uw’ubuheta akaba Kileyabi
2Samuel3:4 uwa kane ni Adoniya
2Samuel3:5 uwa gatandatu ni Yitereyamu

2Samuel3:21 Abuneri abwira Dawudi

2Samuel3:23 Igihe Yowabu n’ingabo ze bageze aho
2Samuel3:24 Yowabu asanga umwami maze aramubaza ati «Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki? Dore Abuneri yaje iwawe! Ni kuki wamurekuye akagenda?
2Samuel3:25 Uramuzi Abuneri mwene Neri: yazanywe no kukwinja
2Samuel3:26 Yowabu ngo asohoke kwa Dawudi
2Samuel3:27 Abuneri akigera i Heburoni

2Samuel3:37 Uwo munsi

2Samuel15:36 Kandi na bo bafiteyo abahungu babo

1Kings1:26 Icyakora jye umugaragu wawe ntibantumiye
1Kings1:27 Ibyo se koko byaba byakozwe bitegetswe n’umwami

1Kings1:29 Umwami arahira

1Kings1:32 Umwami Dawudi aravuga ati «Nimumpamagarire umuherezabitambo Sadoki

1Kings1:34 Aho ni ho umuherezabitambo Sadoki n’umuhanuzi Natani bari bumusigire amavuta amwimikira kuba umwami wa Israheli
1Kings1:35 Muzamuke mumushagaye
1Kings1:36 Benayahu mwene Yehoyada asubiza umwami
1Kings1:37 Uko Uhoraho yabanaga n’umwami
1Kings1:38 Umuherezabitambo Sadoki
1Kings1:39 Umuherezabitambo Sadoki afata ihembe ry’amavuta ryari mu ihema
1Kings1:40 Imbaga y’abantu izamuka imushagaye; ubwo bavuzaga imyironge
1Kings1:41 Adoniya n’abatumirwa be bose bakimara kurya bumva amashyi y’ibyishimo. Ndetse na Yowabu yumva ijwi ry’impanda
1Kings1:42 Akibivuga haza Yonatani mwene Abiyatari w’umuherezabitambo. Adoniya aramubwira ati «Ngwino
1Kings1:43 Yonatani asubiza Adoniya ko nta yo! Arakomeza
1Kings1:44 Umwami yamwoherereje umuherezabitambo Sadoki n’umuhanuzi Natani
1Kings1:45 Umuherezabitambo Sadoki n’umuhanuzi Natani ni bo bamusigiye amavuta i Gihoni bamwimika
1Kings1:46 None ubu Salomoni yicaye ku ntebe y’umwami;
1Kings1:47 byongeye kandi abagaragu b’umwami baje gushimira umwami Dawudi
1Kings1:48 aravuga ati ’Uhoraho

1Kings1:50 Adoniya we

1Kings1:53 Umwami Salomoni yohereza abantu bo kumukura ku rutambiro. Araza aramya umwami Salomoni
1Kings2:1 Dawudi amaze kumva ko agiye gupfa
1Kings2:2 «Ngiye kunyura inzira umuntu wese agomba kunyura

1Kings2:5 Byongeye kandi
1Kings2:6 Nuko rero

1Kings3:2 Icyakora abantu bakomeza guturira ibitambo mu masengero y’ahirengeye
1Kings3:3 Salomoni akunda Uhoraho ku buryo yagendaga yubahiriza amategeko ya se Dawudi
1Kings3:4 Umwami ajya i Gibewoni kuhaturira igitambo
1Kings3:5 Ari aho i Gibewoni

1Kings3:7 None rero
1Kings3:8 Umugaragu wawe ari hagati mu muryango witoranyirije
1Kings3:9 Ha rero umugaragu wawe umutima ushishoza kugira ngo ategeke umuryango wawe
1Kings3:10 Icyo Salomoni asabye gishimisha Uhoraho.
1Kings3:11 Imana iramubwira iti «Kubera ko usabye ibyo
1Kings3:12 ngiye kugukorera ibihuje n’amagambo yawe: nguhaye umutima w’ubwitonzi n’ubuhanga ku buryo uzasumba uwakubanjirije wese
1Kings3:13 Ndetse n’ibyo utasabye ndabiguhaye: ari ubukungu
1Kings3:14 Nugendera mu nzira zanjye
1Kings3:15 Salomoni arakanguka
1Kings3:16 Nuko abagore babiri b’amahabara basanga umwami
1Kings3:17 Umwe aravuga ati «Ndakwinginze shobuja; jyewe n’uyu mugore dutuye mu nzu imwe
1Kings3:18 Namaze iminsi itatu mbyaye
1Kings3:19 Umwana w’uyu mugore yapfuye nijoro
1Kings3:20 Abyuka mu gicuku igihe umuja wawe yari asinziriye
1Kings3:21 Nakangutse mu gitondo ngo nonse umwana wanjye
1Kings3:22 Undi mugore aravuga ati «Oya da! Umwana wanjye ni we uriho
1Kings3:23 Umwami abwira abari aho ati «Uyu mugore aravuga ati ’Umwana wanjye ni ukiri muzima naho uwawe yapfuye’

1Kings3:26 Umugore

1Kings4:1 Umwami Salomoni yari umwami wa Israheli yose.
1Kings4:2 Abatware bamufashaga mu kazi ni aba: umuherezabitambo Azariyahu mwene Sadoki;
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya mwene Shisha b’abanditsi; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi umunyamabanga we;
1Kings4:4 Benayahu mwene Yehoyada wari umutware w’ingabo; abaherezabitambo Sadoki na Abiyatari;
1Kings4:5 umukuru w’abatware Azariyahu mwene Natani; Zabudi mwene Natani wari icyegera cy’umwami;
1Kings4:6 Ahishari wari umutware w’ingoro
1Kings4:7 Salomoni yari afite n’abatware cumi na babiri bakwijwe muri Israheli yose kugira ngo bajye bazanira umwami n’urugo rwe amakoro; buri wese yafataga ukwezi kumwe mu mwaka ko kuzana ayo makoro.
1Kings4:8 Amazina yabo ni aya: Mwene Huru
1Kings4:9 mwene Dekeri
1Kings4:10 mwene Hesedi
1Kings4:11 mwene Abinadabu
1Kings4:12 Bahana mwene Ahiludi
1Kings4:13 mwene Geberi
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mwene Ido
1Kings4:15 Ahimasi
1Kings4:16 Bahana mwene Hushayi
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafati mwene Paruwahi
1Kings4:18 Shimeyi mwene Ela
1Kings4:19 Geberi mwene Uri
1Kings4:20 Abayuda n’Abayisraheli bari benshi cyane bangana n’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja. Bari bafite ibyo barya n’ibyo banywa
1Kings5:1 Salomoni yategekaga abami bose
1Kings5:2 Ifunguro rya buri munsi rya Salomoni n’abantu be ryari rigizwe n’ibigega mirongo itatu by’ifu y’ibiheri na mirongo itandatu by’ifu inoze
1Kings5:3 impfizi makumyabiri zo mu rwuri
1Kings5:4 Salomoni yategekaga ibihugu byose byo mu burengerazuba bwa Efurati kuva kuri Tifasa kugeza Gaza
1Kings5:5 Yuda na Israheli byiberaga mu mutekano mu gihe cyose Salomoni yari ku ngoma
1Kings5:6 Salomoni yari afite ibiraro ibihumbi mirongo ine bibikwamo amagare ye
1Kings5:7 Buri mutware mu bavuzwe haruguru yari afite ukwezi kwo guha amakoro umwami Salomoni n’abo basangiraga ku meza; ntagire icyo abura.
1Kings5:8 Naho ku byerekeye ingano n’ubwatsi bw’amafarasi n’izindi nyamaswa zikurura amagare
1Kings5:9 Imana iha Salomoni ubwenge n’ubuhanga
1Kings5:10 Ubwenge bwa Salomoni bwarutaga ubw’abana bose b’iburasirazuba n’ubw’Abanyamisiri bose.
1Kings5:11 Yarushaga ubwenge uwitwa umuntu wese
1Kings5:12 Yaciye imigani ibihumbi bitatu
1Kings5:13 Asobanura amoko y’ibiti
1Kings5:14 Abantu bakajya baza kumva ubwenge bwa Salomoni
1Kings5:15 Hiramu
1Kings5:16 Salomoni asubiza Hiramu agira ati
1Kings5:17 «Uzi ko data Dawudi atashoboye kubaka Ingoro ikwiye izina ry’Uhoraho
1Kings5:18 Ariko ubu ngubu ubwo Uhoraho
1Kings5:19 ndashaka kubaka Ingoro igenewe izina ry’Uhoraho
1Kings5:20 None rero
1Kings5:21 Hiramu akimara kumva ubutumwa bwa Salomoni arishima cyane
1Kings5:22 Hiramu atuma kuri Salomoni
1Kings5:23 Abagaragu banjye bazabivana muri Libani babigeze ku nyanja; nibigerayo nzabihambira mbyambutse mbigeze aho uzaba wanyeretse
1Kings5:24 Nuko Hiramu yoherereza Salomoni ibiti by’amasederi n’iby’imizonobari nk’uko yabyifuzaga.
1Kings5:25 Salomoni aha Hiramu ibigega ibihumbi makumyabiri by’ingano zo kugaburira urugo rwe
1Kings5:26 Uhoraho yari yarahaye Salomoni ubwenge nk’uko yari yarabimubwiye; umubano wa Hiramu na Salomoni urakomera
1Kings5:27 Umwami Salomoni atoranya muri Israheli yose abakozi b’imirimo y’uburetwa; bageraga ku bantu ibihumbi mirongo itatu.
1Kings5:28 Nuko abohereza muri Libani
1Kings5:29 Salomoni agira n’abikorezi ibihumbi mirongo irindwi n’abacukura amabuye mu misozi ibihumbi mirongo inani
1Kings5:30 hatabariwemo abategetsi bashyizweho n’abatware ba Salomoni ngo bayobore imirimo: abo bari ibihumbi bitatu na magana atatu bategekaga imbaga yakoraga imirimo.
1Kings5:31 Umwami ategeka gucukura amabuye manini
1Kings5:32 Nuko rero abafundi ba Salomoni n’aba Hiramu
1Kings6:1 Hashize imyaka magana ane na mirongo inani Abayisraheli bavuye mu gihugu cya Misiri
1Kings6:2 Ingoro Umwami Salomoni yubakiye Uhoraho yari ifite imikono mirongo itandatu y’uburebure
1Kings6:3 Urwinjiriro rw’imbere y’icyumba gitagatifu cy’Ingoro rwari rufite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri bureshya n’ubugari bw’Ingoro
1Kings6:4 Yubaka Ingoro ifite amadirishya y’ibizingiti by’ibyuma bisobekeranyije.
1Kings6:5 Yomeka andi mazu matoya ku rukuta rw’icyumba gitagatifu
1Kings6:6 Ibyumba byo hasi byari bifite ubugari bw’imikono itanu
1Kings6:7 Iyo Ngoro yubakishijwe amabuye yatunganyirijwe mu kirombe
1Kings6:8 Aho binjiriraga bagana mu byumba byo hasi
1Kings6:9 Salomoni amaze kubaka no kuzuza iyo Ngoro
1Kings6:10 Muri ya mazu mato yari yometse ku Ngoro
1Kings6:11 Uhoraho abwira Salomoni iri jambo ati
1Kings6:12 «Dore unyubakiye iyi Ngoro! Ubu rero nukurikiza amateka yanjye
1Kings6:13 kandi mbe hagati mu Bayisraheli
1Kings6:14 Salomoni yubaka Ingoro arayuzuza.
1Kings6:15 Hanyuma yomeka imbere muri iyo Ngoro imbaho z’amasederi guhera hasi ku butaka kugera ku biti by’igisenge; imbere hose aharandisha imbaho
1Kings6:16 Arongera yubaka urukuta mu mbere rw’imikono makumyabiri
1Kings6:17 Inzu yitwa icyumba gitagatifu kibanziriza icyumba gitagatifu rwose
1Kings6:18 Imbaho z’amasederi zari mu Ngoro zariho ibishushanyo by’imihe yaboshywe n’indabyo zitangiye kwera. Hose hari imbaho z’amasederi
1Kings6:19 Imbere mu cyumba gikuru cy’Ingoro
1Kings6:20 Icyumba gitagatifu rwose cyari gifite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri
1Kings6:21 Salomoni asiga zahabu inogereye imbere mu Ngoro
1Kings6:22 Yasize zahabu Ingoro yose uko ingana
1Kings6:23 Ashyira mu cyumba gitagatifu rwose abakerubimu babiri babajwe mu biti by’imizeti
1Kings6:24 Ibaba rimwe ry’umukerubimu wa mbere ryari rifite imikono itanu y’ubugari
1Kings6:25 Umukerubimu wa kabiri na we yari afite imikono cumi y’ubugari; abo bakerubimu bombi bari bafite ibipimo bimwe n’ishusho imwe.
1Kings6:26 Uburebure bw’umukerubimu wa mbere bwari imikono cumi
1Kings6:27 Salomoni ashyira abakerubimu hagati mu cyumba gitagatifu rwose. Abo bakerubimu bari bafite amababa arambuye: ibaba rimwe ry’umukerubimu wa mbere rikora ku rukuta
1Kings6:28 Nuko asiga zahabu abo bakerubimu.
1Kings6:29 Imbere n’inyuma h’iyo Ngoro
1Kings6:30 Asiga kandi zahabu Ingoro yose hasi
1Kings6:31 Ku muryango w’icyumba gitagatifu rwose
1Kings6:32 Izo nzugi ebyiri zibajwe mu biti by’imizeti azishushanyaho abakerubimu
1Kings6:33 Akora nk’ibyo no ku muryango w’icyumba gitagatifu: yahakingishije inkingi zo mu biti by’imizeti zingana n’igice kimwe cya kane cy’urukuta
1Kings6:34 n’urugi rugizwe n’ibipande bibiri bibajwe mu biti by’imizonobari; igipande kimwe kigizwe n’ibice bibiri
1Kings6:35 Ashushanya kuri izo nzugi abakerubimu
1Kings6:36 Hanyuma igikari cy’imbere acyubakisha amabuye abajwe
1Kings6:37 Urufatiro rw’Ingoro y’Uhoraho rwatangiye kubakwa mu kwezi kwa Ziwi
1Kings6:38 Hanyuma Ingoro yose uko ingana
1Kings7:1 Umwami Salomoni yiyubakira n’iye ngoro; yayubatse mu myaka cumi n’itatu arayuzuza.
1Kings7:2 Yubaka inzu bise «Iy’ishyamba rya Libani »
1Kings7:3 Hejuru aharandisha ibiti by’amasederi byari bifashwe n’imitambiko ishyigikiwe n’inkingi: hari imitambiko mirongo ine n’itanu
1Kings7:4 Hari imirongo itatu y’amadirishya
1Kings7:5 Ahagombaga kujya ayo madirishya hose hubatswe impande enye ziringaniye
1Kings7:6 Yubakisha n’icyumba cyitwa «Icy’inkingi»; cyari gifite uburebure bw’imikono mirongo itanu
1Kings7:7 Yubaka «Icyumba cy’intebe y’ubwami» aho umwami yaciraga imanza
1Kings7:8 Inzu umwami yabagamo yari yubatswe mu kindi gikari kitari icy’inzu y’intebe y’ubwami
1Kings7:9 Ayo mazu yose yari yubakishijwe amabuye abajwe nk’uko bayapimye
1Kings7:10 Urufatiro rw’amazu rwari rugizwe n’amabuye abajwe
1Kings7:11 Hejuru y’urwo rufatiro
1Kings7:12 Urugo runini rwari ruzengurutswe n’imirongo itatu y’amabuye abajwe
1Kings7:13 Umwami Salomoni atumiza uwitwa Hiramu w’i Tiri ngo amuhe akazi.
1Kings7:14 Yakomokaga ku mupfakazi wo mu muryango wa Nefutali
1Kings7:15 Hiramu acura inkingi ebyiri z’imiringa
1Kings7:16 Ashongesha umuringa awucuramo imitwe ibiri yo gushyira hejuru y’izo nkingi. Ubuhagarike bw’umutwe wa mbere bwari imikono itanu
1Kings7:17 Ya mitwe yo hejuru y’inkingi ayicurira utugozi tw’imiringa dusobekeranye nk’inshundura
1Kings7:18 Kuri za nshundura zari zitwikiriye imitwe yo hejuru y’inkingi ashyiraho imirongo ibiri y’imbuto zitukura. Abigenza atyo no ku wundi mutwe.
1Kings7:19 Naho imitwe y’inkingi z’urwinjiriro
1Kings7:20 Kuri iyo mitwe ibiri hirya y’inshundura bamanikaho imirongo ibiri y’imbuto zitukura
1Kings7:21 Ashinga izo nkingi imbere y’urwinjiriro rw’Ingoro; iy’iburyo ayita «Yakini»
1Kings7:22 Umutwe w’inkingi wari umeze nk’ururabyo rwa lisi. Ubwo akazi ko gucura inkingi kaba kararangiye
1Kings7:23 Hiramu abumba ikizenga cy’amazi mu miringa iyagijwe. Ubugari bwacyo kuva ku rugara rumwe kugeza ku rundi bwari ubw’imikono cumi
1Kings7:24 Mu nsi y’urugara rw’icyo kizenga hari hakikijwe n’indabo zitangiye kwera; izo ndabyo zari zizengurutse ikizenga cyose. Iyo mitako yari yakorewe rimwe n’ikizenga cy’amazi
1Kings7:25 Icyo kizenga cyari giteretse ku mashusho y’ibimasa cumi na bibiri: bitatu byarebaga mu majyaruguru
1Kings7:26 Umubyimba w’icyo kizenga wanganaga n’intambwe imwe y’intoki
1Kings7:27 Hanyuma Hiramu abumba ibitereko cumi mu miringa
1Kings7:28 Dore uko ibyo bitereko byari bimeze: byari bifite ibisate bisobetse;
1Kings7:29 kuri ibyo bisate byo hagati y’inkingi hari ibishushanyo by’intare
1Kings7:30 Buri gitereko cyari gifite inziga enye z’imiringa kandi hari imitambiko ku birenge byacyo uko ari bine. Iyo mitambiko yari mu nsi y’igitereko kandi iriho ibisa n’imitako itendera.
1Kings7:31 Urugara rwa buri gitereko rwari rumeze nk’uruziga
1Kings7:32 Inziga uko ari enye zari mu nsi y’ibisate by’ibitereko kandi ibyuma izo nziga zibirinduriraho byari byicaye mu gitereko. Umurambararo wabyo wari uw’umukono umwe n’igice.
1Kings7:33 Izo nziga zari zimeze nk’iz’amagare y’intambara: ibyuma byazo zibirinduriraho
1Kings7:34 Imitambiko ine yafataga buri guni y’igitereko yari yaracuranywe n’icyo gitereko.
1Kings7:35 Hejuru ya buri gitereko hari ikindi kiburungushuye
1Kings7:36 Kuri ibyo bisate bisobetse mu nkingi no mu migongo yabyo hari ibishushanyo by’abakerubimu
1Kings7:37 Uko ni ko yabumbye ibitereko cumi: byose byari bibumbye kimwe
1Kings7:38 Acura imivure cumi mu miringa. Umwe washoboraga gusukwamo intango mirongo ine
1Kings7:39 Mu ruhande rw’iburyo rw’Ingoro ashyiraho ibitereko bitanu
1Kings7:40 Abumba amabesani
1Kings7:41 Iyo mirimo ni iyi: inkingi ebyiri n’imitwe yazo ibiri yiburungushuye yari hejuru y’izo nkingi; ibisa n’inshundura ebyiri zo gutwikira ahiburungushuye ho ku mitwe yari hejuru y’inkingi;
1Kings7:42 imbuto zitukura magana ane zo gushyira ku bisa n’inshundura ebyiri zitwikira imitwe ibiri yiburungushuye yari ku nkingi;
1Kings7:43 ibitereko cumi n’imivure yari hejuru yabyo;
1Kings7:44 ikizenga cy’amazi kimwe gusa cyari gifite mu nsi yacyo amashusho y’ibimasa cumi na bibiri;

1Kings10:5 n’ibiribwa byo ku meza ye
1Kings10:6 Nuko abwira umwami ati «Ibyo numvise mu gihugu cyanjye bakuvugaho
1Kings10:7 Sinemeraga ibyavugwaga kugeza ubwo niyizira nkibonera n’amaso yanjye; none nsanze nta n’igice cyabyo bambwiye! Urengeje kure mu buhanga no mu mico ubwamamare nari narumvise.
1Kings10:8 Hahirwa abantu bawe
1Kings10:9 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho

1Kings10:16 Umwami Salomoni acurisha ingabo nini magana abiri muri zahabu

1Kings10:19 Iyo ntebe yari ifite amadarajya atandatu
1Kings10:20 hakaba n’andi mashusho y’intare cumi n’abiri yari kuri buri ruhande ku madarajya atandatu. Nta wundi mwami wigeze abajisha intebe ihwanye n’iyo!
1Kings10:21 Ibikombe byose umwami Salomoni yanyweragamo byari bisizwe zahabu

1Kings14:5 Nyamara Uhoraho yari yabwiye Ahiya

1Kings14:7 Genda ubwire Yerobowamu
1Kings14:8 nanyaze ubwami inzu ya Dawudi ndabuguha; ariko ntiwambereye nk’umugaragu wanjye Dawudi witonderaga amategeko yanjye
1Kings14:9 Wakoze ibyaha kurusha abakubanjirije bose: uragenda wihimbira izindi mana z’amashusho abajwe ku buryo wansuzuguye; naho jyewe unjugunya hirya uranzinukwa.
1Kings14:10 Ni yo mpamvu inteye guteza inzu ya Yerobowamu ibyago
1Kings14:11 Umuntu wese wo mu muryango wa Yerobowamu uzapfira mu mugi azaribwa n’imbwa; naho uzagwa ku gasozi azaribwa n’ibisiga byo mu kirere

1Kings14:16 Azahana Israheli abahoye ibyaha Yerobowamu yakoze n’ibyo yakoresheje Israheli.»

2Kings25:30 Umwami yemera kumuha ibimutunga buri munsi

1Chronicles12:1 Ngaba abasanze Dawudi i Sikilagi igihe yari agikomeje kuba kure ya Sawuli mwene Kishi. Bari intwari zarwanaga aho rukomeye.
1Chronicles12:2 Bari bitwaje imiheto
1Chronicles12:3 Mu bavandimwe ba Sawuli w’Umubenyamini hari: Ahiyezeri wari umutware wabo; Yowashi mwene Shema w’i Gibeya; Yeziyeli na Peleti bene Azumaweti; Beraka na Yehu b’i Anatoti;

1Chronicles12:5 Yirimeya
1Chronicles12:6 Eluzayi

1Chronicles12:10 Ezeri yari umutware wabo
1Chronicles12:11 Mishumana uwa kane
1Chronicles12:12 Atayi uwa gatandatu
1Chronicles12:13 Yohanani uwa munani

1Chronicles15:3 Dawudi akoranyiriza Abayisraheli bose i Yeruzalemu kugira ngo bazamure Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho babujyane ahantu yabuteganyirije.

1Chronicles15:10 muri bene Uziyeli hari Aminadabu w’umutware n’abavandimwe be ijana na cumi na babiri.

1Chronicles22:2 Dawudi ategeka ko bakoranya abanyamahanga bari mu gihugu cya Israheli
1Chronicles22:3 Dawudi ategura ibyuma byinshi byo gucuramo imisumari yo gutera mu bizingiti by’inzugi

1Chronicles22:5 Dawudi yaribwiraga ati «Umuhungu wanjye Salomoni aracyari muto
1Chronicles22:6 Dawudi ahamagara Salomoni umuhungu we
1Chronicles22:7 Dawudi abwira Salomoni
1Chronicles22:8 Ariko Uhoraho yarambwiye ati ’Wamennye amaraso menshi kandi warwanye intambara zikomeye. Ntuzubakira izina ryanjye Ingoro
1Chronicles22:9 Dore wabyaye umwana
1Chronicles22:10 Ni we uzubakira izina ryanjye Ingoro. Azambera umwana nanjye mubere umubyeyi

1Chronicles22:18 «Mbese Uhoraho Imana yanyu ntari kumwe namwe? Ese ntiyabahaye amahoro impande zose? Koko rero
1Chronicles22:19 Ubu ngubu nimushakashake Uhoraho Imana yanyu n’umutima wanyu wose n’amagara yanyu yose! Nimuhaguruke! Mwubake Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu! Muzayinjizemo Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho hamwe n’ibikoresho byose byeguriwe izina ry’Uhoraho.»
1Chronicles23:1 Dawudi yari ashaje kandi ageze mu zabukuru igihe yimikaga umuhungu we Salomoni ngo abe umwami w’Abayisraheli.
1Chronicles23:2 Hanyuma akoranya abatware bose b’Abayisraheli
1Chronicles23:3 Maze abalevi bagejeje ku myaka mirongo itatu y’amavuko n’abayirengeje barabarwa. Umubare wabo
1Chronicles23:4 Muri bo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine bashingwa kuyobora imirimo y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho
1Chronicles23:5 abandi ibihumbi bine bari abanyanzugi
1Chronicles23:6 Dawudi abashyira mu mitwe itatu akurikije bene Levi
1Chronicles23:7 Abagerishoni ni Ledani na Shimeyi.
1Chronicles23:8 Bene Ledani ni batatu: Yehiyeli w’umutware na Zetamu na Yoweli.
1Chronicles23:9 Bene Shimeyi ni batatu: Shelomiti
1Chronicles23:10 Bene Shimeyi ni Yahati
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati yari imfura
1Chronicles23:12 Bene Kehati ni bane: Amurani
1Chronicles23:13 Bene Amurani ni Aroni na Musa. Aroni ashyirwa ukwe kugira ngo we n’abahungu be bazahore bahereza Uhoraho amaturo matagatifu
1Chronicles23:14 Musa yabaye umuntu w’Imana; abana be babariwe mu muryango wa Levi.
1Chronicles23:15 Bene Musa ni Gerishomu na Eliyezeri.
1Chronicles23:16 Mwene Gerishomu ni Shebuweli w’imfura.
1Chronicles23:17 Mwene Eliyezeri ni Rehabiya w’umutware; nta bandi bahungu Eliyezeri yabyaye
1Chronicles23:18 Mwene Yisehari ni Shelomiti w’imfura.
1Chronicles23:19 Bene Heburoni ni Yeriyahu w’imfura
1Chronicles23:20 Bene Uziyeli ni Mikaya w’imfura
1Chronicles23:21 Bene Merari ni Mahuli na Mushi. Bene Mahuli ni Eleyazari na Kishi.
1Chronicles23:22 Eleyazari yapfuye nta muhungu agira ariko afite abakobwa; bashyingirwa bene Kishi abavandimwe babo.
1Chronicles23:23 Bene Mushi ni batatu: Mahuli
1Chronicles23:24 Abo ni bo bene Levi hakurikijwe amazu yabo. Bari abatware b’amazu yabo
1Chronicles23:25 Koko rero Dawudi yari yaravuze ati «Uhoraho
1Chronicles23:26 Kuva ubu abalevi ntibazongera guheka Ihema rye n’ibikoresho byaryo byose.»
1Chronicles23:27 Iryo tegeko rya Dawudi ryo kubarura bene Levi bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’abayirengeje ryabaye kimwe mu byo yategetse bwa nyuma.
1Chronicles23:28 Bagombaga kumvira bene Aroni mu mirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho
1Chronicles23:29 Bari bashinzwe kwita ku migati y’umumuriko
1Chronicles23:30 Uretse n’ibyo
1Chronicles23:31 ndetse no mu gihe cyo gutura Uhoraho ibitambo bitwikwa
1Chronicles23:32 Bityo bagombaga kwita ku Ihema ry’ibonaniro
1Chronicles24:1 Ngiyi imitwe ya bene Aroni: Bene Aroni ni Nadabu na Abihu

1Chronicles24:3 Dawudi na Sadoki wo muri bene Eleyazari

1Chronicles24:6 Shemaya mwene Netaneli

1Chronicles24:19 Uko ni ko imitwe y’abalevi yagabanyijwe kugira ngo binjire mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho hakurikijwe itegeko ryatanzwe na sekuru wabo Aroni

1Chronicles26:1 Dore imitwe y’abanyanzugi: Muri bene Kore ni Meshelemiyahu mwene Kore wa Ebiyasafu.
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemiyahu yabyaye abahungu
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu uwa gatanu
1Chronicles26:4 Obededomu yabyaye abahungu
1Chronicles26:5 Amiyeli uwa gatandatu
1Chronicles26:6 Umuhungu we Shemaya yabyaye abahungu babaye abatware b’inzu yabo kuko bari abagabo b’intwari.
1Chronicles26:7 Bene Shemaya ni Otini
1Chronicles26:8 Abo bose bari bene Obededomu; hamwe n’abahungu babo n’abavandimwe babo bari abagabo b’intwari kubera umwete bagaragazaga ku murimo wabo. Bene Obededomu bose ni mirongo itandatu na babiri.
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiyahu yari afite abahungu n’abavandimwe; bari abagabo b’intwari cumi n’umunani.
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa wo muri bene Merari yari afite abahungu: ni Shimuri — ntiyari imfura
1Chronicles26:11 Hilikiyahu ni uwa kabiri
1Chronicles26:12 Abagize iyo mitwe y’abanyanzugi hamwe n’abatware babo
1Chronicles26:13 Kuva ku muto kugera ku mukuru bakoresheje ubufindo bakurikije amazu yabo kugira ngo bamenye abazarinda buri rugi.
1Chronicles26:14 Iburasirazuba
1Chronicles26:15 Obededomu ahabwa urw’amajyepfo
1Chronicles26:16 Shupimu na Hosa bahabwa kurinda iburengerazuba hamwe n’urugi rwa Shaleketi ku muhanda uzamuka. Dore uko baharindaga:
1Chronicles26:17 iburasirazuba habaga abalevi batandatu ku munsi
1Chronicles26:18 Ahitwa i Parubari iburengerazuba hari abalevi bane ku muhanda
