1Chronicles27:1 Dore intondeke y’Abayisraheli bakoreraga umwami mu kintu icyo ari cyo cyose cyerekeye imitwe y’ingabo; bari abatware b’amazu bategekaga ingabo igihumbi cyangwa ijana
1Chronicles27:2 Umutware w’umutwe w’ingabo wa mbere wo mu kwezi kwa mbere yari Yashobeyamu mwene Zabudiyeli
1Chronicles27:3 Yari uwo muri bene Pereshi kandi agategeka abagaba bose b’ingabo zo mu kwezi kwa mbere.
1Chronicles27:4 Umutware w’ingabo w’umutwe wa kabiri wo mu kwezi kwa kabiri ni Dodayi w’i Aho; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:5 Umutware w’umutwe wa gatatu w’ingabo zo mu kwezi kwa gatatu yari Benayahu
1Chronicles27:6 Uwo Benayahu yari umugabo w’intwari wo muri Ba Mirongo itatu b’imena
1Chronicles27:7 Umutware wa kane wo mu kwezi kwa kane yari Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu
1Chronicles27:8 Umutware wa gatanu wo mu kwezi kwa gatanu yari Shamuhuti w’i Yizurahi; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:9 Umutware wa gatandatu wo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu yari Ira mwene Ikeshi w’i Tekowa; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:10 Umutware wa karindwi wo mu kwezi kwa karindwi yari Heleshi w’i Peloni
1Chronicles27:11 Umutware wa munani wo mu kwezi kwa munani yari Sibekayi w’i Husha
1Chronicles27:12 Umutware wa cyenda
1Chronicles27:13 Umutware wa cumi wo mu kwezi kwa cumi yari Mahurayi w’i Netofa
1Chronicles27:14 Umutware wa cumi n’umwe wo mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe yari Benaya w’i Pereyatoni
1Chronicles27:15 Umutware wa cumi na kabiri wo mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri yari Helidayi w’i Netofa
1Chronicles27:16 Mu miryango y’Abayisraheli
1Chronicles27:17 uw’Abalevi ni Hashabiya mwene Kemuweli; uw’abo kwa Aroni ni Sadoki;
1Chronicles27:18 uw’abo kwa Yuda ni Elihu wo mu bavandimwe ba Dawudi; uw’abo kwa Isakari ni Omari mwene Mikayeli;
1Chronicles27:19 uw’abo kwa Zabuloni ni Yishimayahu mwene Obadiyahu; uw’abo kwa Nefutali ni Yerimoti mwene Aziriyeli;
1Chronicles27:20 uw’abo kwa Efurayimu ni Hosheya mwene Azariyahu; uw’ab’igice kimwe cy’umuryango wa Manase ni Yoweli mwene Pedayahu;
1Chronicles27:21 uw’ab’ikindi gice cy’umuryango wa Manase bo muri Gilihadi ni Ido mwene Zekariyahu; uw’abo kwa Benyamini ni Yasiyeli mwene Abuneri;
1Chronicles27:22 uw’abo kwa Dani ni Azareli mwene Yerohamu. Abo ni bo bari abatware b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli.
1Chronicles27:23 Dawudi ntiyabaruye abatararenza imyaka makumyabiri y’ubuvuke
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu mwene Seruya yari yatangiye kubabarura ariko ntiyarangiza
1Chronicles27:25 Azimaweti mwene Adiyeli yari ashinzwe umutungo w’umwami. Yehonatani mwene Uziyahu ni we wacungaga ibibitswe mu mirima
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwene Kelubi yari ashinzwe abahinzi bo mu mirima.
1Chronicles27:27 Shimeyi w’i Rama yari ashinzwe imizabibu. Zabudi w’i Shefamu yategekaga abengaga divayi mu mizabibu bakanayishyingura.
1Chronicles27:28 Behalihanani w’i Gederi yari ashinzwe ibiti by’imizeti n’iby’imitini byari mu kibaya. Yowashi yari ashinzwe ububiko bw’amavuta.
1Chronicles27:29 Shiturayi w’i Saroni yari ashinzwe amatungo maremare yarishaga mu mibande.
1Chronicles27:30 Obili wo muri bene Ismaheli yari ashinzwe ingamiya. Yedeyahu w’i Meranoti yari ashinzwe indogobe z’ingore.
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi muri bene Haguri yari ashinzwe amatungo magufi. Abo bose bacungaga ibintu by’umwami Dawudi.
1Chronicles27:32 Yehonatani
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli yari umujyanama w’umwami
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofeli yazunguwe na Yehoyada
1Chronicles28:1 Umwami Dawudi akoranyiriza i Yeruzalemu abatware b’Abayisraheli bose
1Chronicles28:2 Umwami Dawudi arahaguruka maze arababwira ati «Nimunyumve
1Chronicles28:3 Ariko Imana yarambwiye iti ’Ntuzubaka Ingoro ikwiye izina ryanjye kuko uri umurwanyi kandi ukaba waravushije amaraso.’
1Chronicles28:4 Uhoraho
1Chronicles28:5 Mu bahungu banjye bose
1Chronicles28:6 Hanyuma arambwira ati ’Umuhungu wawe Salomoni ni we uzubaka Ingoro yanjye n’ingo zanjye
1Chronicles28:7 Nzakomeza ubwami bwe ubuziraherezo ariko niba na we akomeje gukurikiza amategeko yanjye n’amateka yanjye nk’uko ubu abigenza.’
1Chronicles28:8 None rero
1Chronicles28:9 Nawe

1Chronicles28:12 Anamwereka igishushanyo cy’ibikari by’Ingoro y’Imana
1Chronicles28:13 Amusobanurira kandi ibyerekeye imitwe y’abaherezabitambo n’iy’abalevi
1Chronicles28:14 Amubwira n’uburemere bwa zahabu na feza bizagenerwa buri gikoresho cyo mu Ngoro.
1Chronicles28:15 Amusobanurira uburemere bwa zahabu n’ubwa feza bizagenerwa ibitereko n’amatara bya zahabu n’ibya feza
1Chronicles28:16 n’uburemere bwa zahabu na feza bizagenerwa ameza y’umumuriko
1Chronicles28:17 n’uburemere bwa zahabu na feza bizagenerwa amakanya
1Chronicles28:18 n’uburemere bwa zahabu iyunguruye izagenerwa urutambiro rw’imibavu. Hanyuma amuha n’igishushanyo cy’Igare

2Chronicles3:1 Salomoni atangira kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho aho yari yarayiteguriye i Yeruzalemu ku musozi wa Moriya
2Chronicles3:2 Yatangiye kuyubaka mu kwezi kwa kabiri ko mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ye.
2Chronicles3:3 Dore ibipimo by’iyo Ngoro y’Imana
2Chronicles3:4 Urwinjiriro rw’imbere rwari rufite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri bureshya n’ubugari bw’Ingoro
2Chronicles3:5 Icyumba kinini acyomekaho imbaho z’imizonobari zisizeho zahabu iyunguruye
2Chronicles3:6 Icyo cyumba agitakisha amabuye y’agaciro
2Chronicles3:7 Icyumba cyose Salomoni agisiga zahabu: ayisiga ku maburiti
2Chronicles3:8 Hanyuma yubaka icyumba gitagatifu rwose: uburebure bwacyo bwareshyaga n’ubugari bw’Ingoro
2Chronicles3:9 Imisumari yakoreshejwe yapimaga amasikeli ya zahabu ijana na mirongo itanu. Asiga zahabu n’amazu yo hejuru.
2Chronicles3:10 Imbere mu cyumba gitagatifu rwose ashyiramo abakerubimu babiri babajwe mu giti
2Chronicles3:11 Amababa y’abakerubimu yose hamwe yari afite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri; ibaba rimwe ry’uwa mbere ryari rifite uburebure bw’imikono itanu
2Chronicles3:12 Ibaba rimwe ry’uwo mukerubimu wa kabiri ryari rifite imikono itanu kandi rikora ku rundi rukuta rw’Ingoro
2Chronicles3:13 Amababa y’abo bakerubimu yari aramburiye ku mikono makumyabiri
2Chronicles3:14 Umwenda ukingiriza icyumba gitagatifu rwose
2Chronicles3:15 Salomoni ashinga inkingi ebyiri imbere y’Ingoro: ubuhagarike bwazo bwari ubw’imikono mirongo itatu n’itanu
2Chronicles3:16 Akora n’imitako y’udukufi maze ayishyira hejuru y’inkingi. Acura imbuto zitukura ijana
2Chronicles3:17 Ashinga izo nkingi imbere y’Ingoro
2Chronicles4:1 Salomoni yubakisha urutambiro rw’umuringa rufite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri
2Chronicles4:2 Abumba ikizenga cy’amazi mu miringa iyagijwe; ubugari bwacyo kuva ku rugara rumwe kugeza ku rundi bwari ubw’imikono cumi
2Chronicles4:3 Mu nsi y’urugara rw’icyo kizenga hari hazengurutswe n’ibishushanyo by’impfizi bikurikiranye ku mikono mirongo itatu; byari bikikije rwose ikizenga. Ibyo bishushanyo byari ku mirongo ibiri igerekeranye kandi byari byakoranywe n’icyo kizenga.
2Chronicles4:4 Cyari giteretse ku mashusho y’ibimasa cumi n’abiri: bitatu byarebaga mu majyaruguru
2Chronicles4:5 Umubyimba wacyo wanganaga n’intambwe imwe y’intoki
2Chronicles4:6 Salomoni acurisha imivure cumi; itanu ayishyira ibumoso
2Chronicles4:7 Abumba muri zahabu ibitereko cumi by’amatara nk’uko yari yabitegetswe
2Chronicles4:8 Abaza ameza cumi ayashyira mu cyumba gitagatifu
2Chronicles4:9 Yubaka urugo rw’abaherezabitambo
2Chronicles4:10 Naho ikizenga cy’amazi agitereka mu ruhande rw’iburyo
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu acura amabesani
2Chronicles4:12 ari yo iyi: inkingi ebyiri
2Chronicles4:13 imbuto zitukura magana ane zo ku bisa n’inshundura
2Chronicles4:14 ibitereko cumi
2Chronicles4:15 ikizenga cy’amazi — cyari kimwe gusa — giteretse ku bimasa cumi na bibiri
2Chronicles4:16 amabesani
2Chronicles4:17 Umwami yabikoreshereje mu karere ka Yorudani hagati ya Sukoti na Sereda.

2Chronicles7:4 Umwami na rubanda rwose bafatanya gutura ibitambo Uhoraho.
2Chronicles7:5 Umwami Salomoni atura ibitambo by’ibimasa ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri
2Chronicles7:6 Abaherezabitambo bari bahagaze mu mwanya wabo

2Chronicles7:8 Muri icyo gihe Salomoni akora ibirori bimara iminsi irindwi
2Chronicles7:9 Ku munsi wa munani bose barakorana kugira ngo basoze ibirori
2Chronicles7:10 Nuko ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’itatu w’ukwezi kwa karindwi Salomoni asezerera abantu basubira mu mahema yabo
2Chronicles7:11 Salomoni yari amaze kuzuza Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’iy’umwami

2Chronicles7:13 Ninkinga ijuru imvura ntigwe
2Chronicles7:14 maze abantu banjye bitiriwe izina ryanjye bakicisha bugufi
2Chronicles7:15 Ubu ngubu amaso yanjye arareba kandi amatwi yanjye arumva amasengesho avugirwa aha hantu.
2Chronicles7:16 Kandi kuva ubu ntoranyije iyi Ngoro ndayitagatifuje kugira ngo izina ryanjye rizayibemo ubuziraherezo; nzayihozaho amaso kandi nyihozeho umutima wanjye iteka ryose.

2Chronicles9:5 Nuko abwira umwami

2Chronicles9:7 Hahirwa abagore bawe
2Chronicles9:8 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana yawe
2Chronicles9:9 Nuko atura umwami zahabu ingana n’amatalenta ijana na makumyabiri
2Chronicles9:10 Byongeye kandi
2Chronicles9:11 Ibyo biti umwami abikuramo imbaho zigenewe Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro ye bwite
2Chronicles9:12 Umwami Salomoni aha umwamikazi w’i Saba ibyo yashatse kumusaba byose
2Chronicles9:13 Uburemere bwa zahabu yajyaga kwa Salomoni mu mwaka umwe gusa bwari ubw’amatalenta magana atandatu na mirongo itandatu n’atandatu
2Chronicles9:14 hatabariwemo amakoro y’abagenzi n’imisoro y’abacuruzi. Abami bose ba Arabiya n’abatware b’igihugu baturaga umwami zahabu na feza.
2Chronicles9:15 Umwami Salomoni acurisha ingabo nini magana abiri muri zahabu yacuzwe
2Chronicles9:16 acurisha n’ingabo nto magana atatu muri zahabu. Umwami azishyira mu nzu y’ishyamba rya Libani.
2Chronicles9:17 Umwami abajisha intebe nini y’ubwami mu mahembe y’inzovu
2Chronicles9:18 Iyo ntebe yari ifite amadarajya atandatu n’ubwegamiro buhese bwa zahabu
2Chronicles9:19 hakaba n’andi mashusho y’intare cumi n’abiri kuri buri ruhande rw’amadarajya atandatu. Nta wundi mwami wigeze abajisha intebe nk’iyo!
2Chronicles9:20 Ibikombe byose umwami Salomoni yanyweragamo byari bisizwe zahabu
2Chronicles9:21 Koko umwami yari afite amato yajyanaga abagaragu ba Huramu i Tarishishi kandi buri myaka itatu amato y’i Tarishishi yahagarukaga yuzuye zahabu
2Chronicles9:22 Umwami Salomoni arusha abami bose b’isi ubukungu n’ubuhanga.
2Chronicles9:23 Abami bose b’isi bifuzaga kubona Salomoni

2Chronicles15:19 Ntihongeye kuba intambara kugera mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’itanu w’ingoma ya Asa.
2Chronicles16:1 Mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’itandatu w’ingoma ya Asa
2Chronicles16:2 Asa afata feza na zahabu mu mutungo w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho no mu wo mu ngoro y’umwami
2Chronicles16:3 «Reka tugirane isezerano
2Chronicles16:4 Beni‐Hadadi yumvira umwami Asa
2Chronicles16:5 Bayesha amaze kumva iyo nkuru
2Chronicles16:6 Nuko umwami Asa ajyana n’Abayuda bose i Rama
2Chronicles16:7 Muri icyo gihe Hanani w’umushishozi asanga Asa umwami wa Yuda
2Chronicles16:8 Nta bwo se Abakushi n’Abalibiya bari ingabo zitabarika
2Chronicles16:9 kuko Uhoraho ahanga amaso ku isi yose kugira ngo arengere abafite umutima umutunganiye. Ubu noneho wagenjeje nk’umupfu; ni yo mpamvu guhera ubu uzahora mu ntambara.»
2Chronicles16:10 Asa arakarira umushishozi aramufunga
2Chronicles16:11 Ibigwi bya Asa
2Chronicles16:12 Asa afatwa n’indwara mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’icyenda w’ingoma ye; yarwaye indwara ikomeye y’amaguru. Ndetse mu burwayi bwe ntiyita ku Uhoraho
2Chronicles16:13 Asa aratanga asanga ba sekuruza be
2Chronicles16:14 Bashyingura umurambo we mu mva yicukuriye mu Murwa wa Dawudi. Bamurambika ku buriri bwuzuye imibavu n’indi miti ihebuje ihumura neza
2Chronicles17:1 Yozafati mwene Asa azungura se ku ngoma. Agwiza amaboko
2Chronicles17:2 Mu migi yose ikomeye y’Abayuda ahashyira ingabo kandi ashyira n’abategetsi mu gihugu cyose cya Yuda no mu migi ya Efurayimu yari yarigaruriwe na se Asa.
2Chronicles17:3 Uhoraho abana na Yozafati kuko yakurikizaga inzira se yabanje kugenderamo
2Chronicles17:4 Ahubwo yita ku Uhoraho Imana ya se
2Chronicles17:5 Uhoraho amukomereza ubwami kandi Abayuda bose batura Yozafati amaturo
2Chronicles17:6 Umutima we warushagaho kugendera mu nzira z’Uhoraho ku buryo yashenye muri Yuda amasengero y’ ahirengeye n’inkingi zeguriwe Ashera.
2Chronicles17:7 Mu mwaka wa gatatu w’ingoma ye yohereza ibyegera bye
2Chronicles17:8 Bajyanye n’abalevi Shemayahu
2Chronicles17:9 Bigisha muri Yuda bifashishije igitabo cy’Amategeko y’Uhoraho. Bazenguruka imigi yose y’Abayuda bigisha abantu.
2Chronicles17:10 Abami bose b’ibihugu bikikije igihugu cya Yuda baterwa ubwoba n’Uhoraho
2Chronicles17:11 Abafilisiti bahaga Yozafati amaturo

2Chronicles17:13 maze ayihunikamo imyaka myinshi
2Chronicles17:14 Dore uko babaruwe hakurikijwe amazu yabo: Mu Bayuda abatware b’ibihumbi ni: Aduna wayoboraga abagabo b’intwari ibihumbi magana atatu
2Chronicles17:15 Yehohanani wayoboraga ingabo ibihumbi magana abiri na mirongo inani

2Chronicles17:17 Mu Babenyamini hari Eliyada
2Chronicles17:18 hakaba na Yehozabadi wayoboraga abagabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongo inani bakereye intambara.
2Chronicles17:19 Abo ni bo bakoreraga umwami

2Chronicles26:13 Ni bo bategekaga ingabo ibihumbi magana atatu na birindwi na magana atanu z’intwari zashyigikiraga umwami ku rugamba.

2Chronicles26:21 Umwami Hoziya akomeza kubemba kugeza ubwo atanze. Muri icyo gihe cyose yari arwaye ibibembe bamuhaye akato atura mu nzu ye ya wenyine

2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu yimitswe amaze imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu avutse
2Chronicles27:2 Yakoze ibitunganiye Uhoraho nk’uko se Hoziya yabigenje. Icyakora ntiyigeze yinjira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Chronicles27:3 Ni we wubatse Irembo Rikuru ry’Ingoro y’Uhoraho
2Chronicles27:4 Yubatse imigi mu misozi ya Yuda
2Chronicles27:5 Ni we warwanyije umwami w’Abahamoni aramutsinda; uwo mwaka Abahamoni bamutura amatalenta ijana ya feza
2Chronicles27:6 Yotamu arakomera cyane
2Chronicles27:7 Ibindi bigwi bya Yotamu
2Chronicles27:8 Yimitswe amaze imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu avutse kandi amara imyaka cumi n’itandatu ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu.
2Chronicles27:9 Yotamu aratanga asanga abasekuruza be; umurambo we ushyingurwa mu Murwa wa Dawudi. Umuhungu we Akhazi amuzungura ku ngoma.

Nehemiah1:1 Amagambo ya Nehemiya mwene Hakaliya. Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri w’ingoma ya Aritashuweru
Nehemiah1:2 Nuko haza Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Baransubiza bati «Abarokotse bakaba barahatahukiye
Nehemiah1:4 Ngo numve ayo magambo nicara hasi
Nehemiah1:5 Ndavuga nti «Ndakwinginze
Nehemiah1:6 Tega ugutwi kwawe rero
Nehemiah1:7 Twaraguhemukiye bikabije kandi ntitwakurikiza amategeko
Nehemiah1:8 Ndakwinginze ngo wibuke rya jambo wavugishije Musa umugaragu wawe
Nehemiah1:9 ariko nimungarukira mugakomeza amategeko yanjye kandi mukayakurikiza
Nehemiah1:10 None se
Nehemiah1:11 Ndakwinginze rero
Nehemiah2:1 Bigeze mu kwezi kwa Nisani k’umwaka wa makumyabiri w’ingoma y’umwami Aritashuweru
Nehemiah2:2 Umwami ni ko kumbaza ati «Ni kuki ureba nk’ubabaye? Aho nturwaye? Waba se hari ikindi ufite kikubabaje ku mutima?» Mbyumvise ntahwa n’ubwoba bwinshi.
Nehemiah2:3 Nuko mbwira umwami
Nehemiah2:4 Umwami arambaza ati «Icyo ushaka se ni iki?» Ako kanya nambaza Imana Nyir’ijuru
Nehemiah2:5 maze nsubiza umwami
Nehemiah2:6 Ubwo umwami yari yicaranye n’umwamikazi
Nehemiah2:7 Ndongera mbwira umwami
Nehemiah2:8 Nibanyandikire kandi n’urundi rwandiko rwo gushyira Asafu umurinzi w’ishyamba ry’umwami
Nehemiah2:9 Ndagenda nsanga abategetsi b’iburengerazuba bwa Efurati
Nehemiah2:10 Sanabalati w’Umuhoroni
Nehemiah2:11 Ngeze i Yeruzalemu
Nehemiah2:12 Hanyuma nkabyuka nijoro
Nehemiah2:13 Nuko muri iryo joro
Nehemiah2:14 Ndakomeza ngera ku Irembo ry’Iriba n’ahagana ku kidendezi cy’umwami
Nehemiah2:15 Nuko muri uwo mwijima
Nehemiah2:16 Ariko abatware ntibari bamenye aho nagiye
Nehemiah2:17 Noneho ndababwira nti «Murabona aya makuba turimo: Yeruzalemu yarasenyutse
Nehemiah2:18 Nuko mbahishurira ubuntu Imana yanjye yari yangiriye ikanshyigikira
Nehemiah2:19 Sanabalati w’Umuhoroni
Nehemiah2:20 Ndabasubiza nti «Imana Nyir’ijuru ubwayo izaduha kubigeraho; twebwe abagaragu bayo
Nehemiah3:1 Eliyashibu
Nehemiah3:2 Iruhande rwabo abantu b’i Yeriko na bo baratangira barubaka
Nehemiah3:3 Abahungu ba Hasena bubaka irembo ry’Amafi
Nehemiah3:4 Iruhande rwabo hubatswe na Meremoti mwene Uriya
Nehemiah3:5 akurirwa n’abantu b’i Tekowa na bo barubaka
Nehemiah3:6 Irembo rya Yeshana ryubatswe na Yoyada mwene Paseya
Nehemiah3:7 Iruhande rwabo hubatswe na Melatiya w’i Gibewoni
Nehemiah3:8 Uziyeli mwene Harihaya
Nehemiah3:9 Iruhande rwabo hubatswe na Refaya mwene Hiri
Nehemiah3:10 Iruhande rwe hubaka Yedaya mwene Harumafu
Nehemiah3:11 Igice cyakurikiyeho cyubakwa na Malikiya mwene Harimu
Nehemiah3:12 Uwakurikiyeho ni Shalumi mwene Haloheshi
Nehemiah3:13 Irembo ryo ku Kibaya ryubakwa na Hanuni n’abaturage b’i Zanowahi; ni bo baryubatse kandi bariteraho inzugi
Nehemiah3:14 Naho Irembo ry’Imyanda
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumi mwene Kolihoze
Nehemiah3:16 Yakurikiwe na Nehemiya mwene Azibuki
Nehemiah3:17 Abalevi bakurikiraho barubaka
Nehemiah3:18 Nyuma yabo hubakwa n’abavandimwe babo

Nehemiah13:31 Hanyuma nshyiraho n’andi mabwiriza
Job1:1 Habayeho umugabo mu gihugu cya Usi
Job1:2 Yari yarabyaye abahungu barindwi n’abakobwa batatu.
Job1:3 Yari atunze umukumbi w’intama ibihumbi birindwi
Job1:4 Abahungu be bajyaga ibihe mu guteranira mu rugo rw’umwe muri bo
Job1:5 Iyo bamaraga guhetura ingo zabo zose
Job1:6 Umunsi umwe
Job1:7 Uhoraho abaza Sekibi ati «Uturutse he?» Sekibi aramusubiza ati «Mvuye kuzerera isi no kuyitambagira.»
Job1:8 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi ati «Ese witegereje umugaragu wanjye Yobu? Nta wundi usa na we ku isi; ni umuntu w’inyangamugayo n’umunyamurava
Job1:9 Sekibi asubiza Uhoraho
Job1:10 None se ntiwamuhaye uruzitiro rumurinda
Job1:11 Ariko
Job1:12 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi
Job1:13 Umunsi umwe rero
Job1:14 nuko intumwa iza kubwira Yobu iti «Ibimasa byarimo bihinga
Job1:15 nuko Abanyesaba barahuruduka barabinyaga
Job1:16 Umwanya akibivuga
Job1:17 Umwanya akivuga ibyo
Job1:18 Igihe akivuga
Job1:19 nuko inkubi y’umuyaga ituruka hakurya y’ubutayu
Job1:20 Yobu arahaguruka
Job1:21 aramya agira ati «Navuye mu nda ya mama nambaye ubusa
Job1:22 Muri ayo makuba yose
Job2:1 Nuko undi munsi
Job2:2 Uhoraho abaza Sekibi
Job2:3 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi
Job2:4 Sekibi asubiza Uhoraho
Job2:5 Nyamara ariko urambuye ukuboko kwawe
Job2:6 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi
Job2:7 Sekibi asiga aho Uhoraho
Job2:8 Yobu afata urujyo rwo kwishima
Job2:9 Umugore we aramubwira ati «Ubwo se kandi uzongera gutsimbarara ku bupfura bwawe? Vuma Imana
Job2:10 Ariko aramusubiza ati «Uravuga nk’umugore w’igicucu. Ko twakira nk’umugisha ihirwe Imana iduhaye
Job2:11 Incuti eshatu za Yobu zamenye ayo makuba yamugwiririye
Job2:12 Bubuye amaso bakiri kure
Job2:13 Nuko baguma aho
Job3:1 Nyuma y’ibyo
Job3:2 Nuko afata ijambo
Job3:3 «Umunsi navutseho ntukabeho
Job3:4 Uwo munsi uragahinduka umwijima w’igicuku; Imana Nyir’ijuru ntizongere kuwitaho
Job3:5 Uragahindanywa n’umwijima w’igicuku
Job3:6 Iryo joro riragatahwa n’umwijima
Job3:7 Ni koko iryo joro rizahore ari ingumba
Job3:8 Koko abateramwaku barakarivuma
Job3:9 Inyenyeri zo mu rukerera rwaryo zirakazima
Job3:10 Kuko ritamfungiraniye mu nda ibyara
Job3:11 Ni kuki ntavutse ndi igihwereye
Job3:12 Ibibero bya mama byankikiriye iki? Amabere ye yanyonkereje iki?
Job3:13 Ubu none mba nibereye ikuzimu
Job3:14 ndi kumwe n’abami n’ibikomangoma
Job3:15 cyangwa hamwe n’abatware bari batunze zahabu
Job3:16 Ubonye ahubwo iyaba mama yarakuyemo inda
Job3:17 Ikuzimu
Job3:18 N’abahoze ari imbohe bagira ituze
Job3:19 Aho hantu
Job3:20 Ni iki gituma Imana ireka imbabare zikavuka
Job3:21 bamwe bifuza urupfu bakarubura
Job3:22 Nuko bakishimira kubona aho bazahambwa
Job3:23 Umuntu utazi iyo agana kandi akaba yibasiwe n’Imana
Job3:24 Koko rero
Job3:25 Icyanteraga ubwoba ni cyo kingwirira
Job3:26 Nta gahenge
Job4:1 Elifazi w’i Temani afata ijambo
Job4:2 «Ese uwagira icyo akubwira
Job4:3 Dore
Job4:4 Inama zawe zakomeje abendaga kwiheba
Job4:5 none
Job4:6 Kuba wariringiye Imana se ntibikwiye kugukomeza
Job4:7 Ibuka neza: hari umuziranenge wigeze arimbuka? Ni hehe wumvise abanyamurava batsiratsizwa?
Job4:8 Jye nzi ko abahinga ikibi
Job4:9 umwuka w’Imana urabarimbura
Job4:10 Ari imitontomo y’intare
Job4:11 Intare yicwa no kubura umuhigo
Job4:12 Nanjye
Job4:13 Nijoro
Job4:14 nuko ubwoba burantaha
Job4:15 Numvise nishishe
Job4:16 mbona umeze nk’umuntu ampagaze imbere
Job4:17 ’Umuntu waremewe gupfa yatunganira ate Imana? Yabura inenge ate mu maso y’Iyamuhanze?
Job4:18 Niba se itizera abagaragu bayo
Job4:19 hacura iki ku batuye amazu y’ibyondo
Job4:20 abariho mu gitondo bahinduka ivu butaranagoroba
Job4:21 Bavanwaho
Job5:1 Cyo hamagara! Hari uri bukwitabe se? Uriyambaza se iyihe mu ntungane?
Job5:2 Ni koko umusazi yicwa n’agahinda
Job5:3 Jyewe nabonye umusazi afata ikibanza
Job5:4 ’Abahungu be barakabura umukiro
Job5:5 Umusaruro wabo uribwe n’umushonji
Job5:6 Koko rero
Job5:7 ahubwo umuruho uva ku bantu
Job5:8 Iyaba ari jyewe
Job5:9 Ni we wakoze ibintu byinshi by’agatangaza
Job5:10 Akwiza imvura ku isi yose
Job5:11 ni we ukuza ab’intamenyekana
Job5:12 Aburizamo imigambi y’abigize inyaryenge
Job5:13 Ingirwabahanga azicisha imitego yazo
Job5:14 bityo bakarindagira mu mwijima
Job5:15 Uhoraho arinda imfubyi inkota
Job5:16 Ni uko umunyantege nke agira icyizere
Job5:17 Hahirwa uwo Uhoraho akosora! kandi ntasuzugure inyigisho ya Nyir’ububasha.
Job5:18 Koko rero ni we ukomeretsa
Job5:19 Mu makuba menshi
Job5:20 Mu nzara
Job5:21 Uzaca ukubiri n’akanwa kabi ka rubanda

Job5:26 Uzajya gupfa ushyize kera

Job6:2 «Iyaba bashoboraga kumva agahinda kanjye
Job6:3 basanze arusha uburemere umusenyi wo ku nyanja

Job6:7 Ibiryo nk’ibyo nanze kubyasamira
Job6:8 Icyampa ngo icyo nsabye ngihabwe
Job6:9 Icyampa ngo Imana ibe ari yo injanjagura
Job6:10 Bityo n’ubwo ndi mu kaga karenze urugero
Job6:11 Ubu se nsigaranye imbaraga ki ngo mbe nakwiyumanganya; ko ibyanjye birangiye
Job6:12 None se nacuzwe mu mabuye
Job6:13 Hari ikindi kindi se nakwishingikirizaho
Job6:14 Utagiriye impuhwe mugenzi we
Job6:15 Abavandimwe banjye barantereranye
Job6:16 Mu itumba
Job6:17 ariko icyi cyaza igahita ikama

Job6:20 Amaherezo

Job6:24 Ngaho nimumpanure
Job6:25 Amagambo y’ukuri umuntu yayihanganira; ariko se mwe ibyo munjora
Job6:26 Muranshinja se muhereye ku byo navuze
Job6:27 Ndumva mwebwe mwarya n’imfubyi
Job6:28 Ngaho rwose nimundebe
Job6:29 Ahasigaye mungarukire
Job6:30 Ese hari ikinyoma musanze ku rurimi rwanjye? Umunwa wanjye se
Job7:1 Hano ku isi
Job7:2 Jyewe rero
Job7:3 incuro yanjye yabaye amezi yo kumanjirwa

Job7:6 Iminsi y’ukubaho kwanjye iriruka amasigamana
Job7:7 Ibuka ko ubugingo bwanjye ari nk’umuyaga
Job7:8 Amaso y’abantu amperutse ubu
Job7:9 Uko ibihu biyoyoka bikagenda
Job7:10 ntagaruka mu nzu ye
Job7:11 Ni yo mpamvu ntashobora guceceka
Job7:12 Naba se ndi inyanja
Job7:13 Iyo nibwiye nti «Nindyama
Job7:14 wowe unyoherereza inzozi zikantera ubwoba
Job7:15 Yewe icyampa ngo baze bampotore! Kuri jyewe gupfa nkavaho byandutira iyi mibabaro yose.
Job7:16 Nduma mpagaze
Job7:17 Umuntu ni iki kugira ngo umwiteho bigeze aho
Job7:18 ngo umusuzume buri gitondo

Job8:7 uko uzaba umeze
Job8:8 Jya usobanuza abakuruta
Job8:9 Twebwe turi abana b’ejo
Job8:10 Naho bo
Job8:11 Urufunzo se rushobora kumera ahatari igishanga? Urukangaga rwamera ahatareka amazi?
Job8:12 Iyo bikiri ingemwe kandi nta we ubitemye
Job8:13 Ayo ni yo maherezo y’uwibagirwa Imana
Job8:14 Aba ameze nk’uwishingikirije ku kadodo
Job8:15 Iyo yegamiye inzu ye

Job8:20 Oya

Job9:2 «Nzi neza ko ari uko bigenda
Job9:3 Iyo ashatse kujya impaka na yo
Job9:4 Mu banyabuhanga buhanitse no mu banyembaraga b’indahangarwa
Job9:5 Ni yo yimura imisozi mu ibanga
Job9:6 Ni yo iteza isi umutingito
Job9:7 Ni yo itegeka izuba
Job9:8 Ni yo yonyine yahanze ikirere cy’ijuru
Job9:9 Ni yo yahanze inyenyeri
Job9:10 Ni yo yaremye ibintu bikomeye
Job9:11 Iyo ihise iruhande rwanjye
Job9:12 Iramutse inyaze ikintu
Job9:13 Imana iyo yarakaye ntiyururwa
Job9:14 Jyewe se nashobora nte kwihandagaza ngo ndaburana
Job9:15 Jyewe
Job9:16 N’iyo nayihamagara ikaza
Job9:17 Koko
Job9:18 ntarushya andeka ngo mpumeke
Job9:19 Twapima imbaraga se? We arazinsumbya kure! Namurega mu rukiko se? Ni nde wamuhatira kwitaba?

Job9:21 Kuba umunyamurava byo
Job9:22 Kuri jyewe byose ni kimwe

Job9:24 Iyo igihugu gitegekwa n’umunyarugomo
Job9:25 Nyamara

Job9:27 Iyo ngize nti ’Reka niyibagize amaganya yanjye
Job9:28 ubwo icyoba kirantaha
Job9:29 Nzi ko nimburana
Job9:30 N’iyo nakwiyuhagiza amazi yo ku iteke
Job9:31 wakongera ukanzika mu musitwe
Job9:32 Koko

Job10:5 Ese ubuzima bwawe bwaba ari nk’ubw’abagenewe gupfa

Job19:1 Yobu afata ijambo
Job19:2 «Muzahereza he kunshengura umutima

Job19:5 Mu by’ukuri

Job19:7 Ndataka ko ndengana

Job19:12 ingabo ze zantereye icyarimwe

Job19:14 Abaturanyi n’abo twari tuziranye

Job19:19 inkoramutima zanjye zose ziranyitaza

Job19:21 Mwebwe ab’incuti zanjye

Job20:1 Sofari w’i Nahama afata ijambo

Job20:5 umunezero w’abagome utamara kabiri
Job20:6 N’iyo yaba areshya n’aho bwakereye
Job20:7 ntazabura kuzimira burundu nka baringa; abamubonaga bagire bati ’Arigitiye he?’

Job20:10 Abana be bazatanga indishyi z’abakene

Job20:12 Akanwa ke kari karyohewe n’icyaha
Job20:13 akagitsimbararaho ntakireke

Job24:24 Bagubwa neza akanya gato

Job34:2 «Mwebwe banyabuhanga

Job34:5 Ni koko
Job34:6 Umurava wanjye ntumbuza kubabara
Job34:7 Ni nde wamera nka Yobu
Job34:8 agacudika n’inkozi z’ibibi
Job34:9 Yarivugiye ngo ’Gukora ugushaka kw’Imana
Job34:10 None rero
Job34:11 Buri wese amwitura ibyo yakoze
Job34:12 Oya rwose
Job34:13 Haba hari undi wamushinze kumenya isi
Job34:14 Ese aramutse yishubije umwuka we
Job34:15 ibinyamubiri byose ntibyapfira rimwe
Job34:16 Niba ufite ubwenge
Job34:17 Ese uzirana n’ukuri yashobora gutegeka? Watinyuka se gushinja Nyir’ubutungane Ushobora byose?
Job34:18 Ni we ubwira umwami
Job34:19 Nta bwo arengera abatware
Job34:20 Bakinduka mu kanya gato
Job34:21 Koko rero
Job34:22 nta mwijima cyangwa ijoro inkozi z’ibibi zamwihishamo.
Job34:23 Imana ntiha umugambi umuntu
Job34:24 Ikindura abakomeye nta we ibajije
Job34:25 Izi neza ibikorwa byabo

Job34:28 bigatuma imiborogo y’abakene iyigeraho

Job34:30 kugira ngo hatagira umugome utegeka
Job34:31 Ariko

Job34:34 Nyamara

Job35:1 Elihu afata ijambo
Job35:2 «Ubwo uribwira ngo ufite ukuri
Job35:3 uvuga uti ’Kuba indacumura bimariye iki? Hari akamaro bimfitiye?’
Job35:4 Ubu rero
Job35:5 Itegereze ijuru
Job35:6 Ibyaha ukora wibwira se ko bishyikira Imana? Iyo wungikanya ibicumuro
Job35:7 Iyo ubaye intungane se ho
Job35:8 Abo ubugome bwawe bukoraho ni abantu nkawe
Job35:9 Iyo umuntu akandamijwe arataka
Job35:10 ariko nta we ugira ati ’Imana yaturemye iri he? Yo itera abantu kuyiramya nijoro
Job35:11 yo iduha ubwenge buruta ubw’inyamaswa zo ku isi
Job35:12 Bigatuma rero abantu batakamba
Job35:13 Nawe rero ugatera hejuru ngo Imana ntiyumva
Job35:14 Ubwo se yakumva ite
Job35:15 ukemeza ko uburakari bwayo budahana
Job35:16 Ngayo amagambo y’amahomvu Yobu avuga; ni ubwenge buke bumutera gusukagura amagambo.»

Job38:1 Uhoraho asubiriza Yobu mu nkubi y’umuyaga
Job38:2 «Uwo ni nde ubangamiye umugambi wanjye
Job38:3 Kenyera kigabo rero ukomeze
Job38:4 Igihe naremaga isi wari he? Ngaho bivuge
Job38:5 Imbibi zayo zashyizweho na nde
Job38:6 Imfatiro zayo zishingiye kuki? Ni nde wayitereye ibuye yicayeho
Job38:7 igihe inyenyeri z’umuseke zahimbarwaga
Job38:8 Ni nde wafatishije inyanja inkombe ebyiri igihe yapfupfunukaga mu nda y’isi;

Job38:25 Ni nde waciye umuyoboro w’amazi y’imvura

Job38:27 amatongo n’ibisambu byaraye bigasoma

Job38:30 igihe amazi yakomeye nk’ibuye

Job38:32 Ni wowe se umurikisha inyenyeri zo mu gitondo
Job38:33 Ese uzi amategeko agenga ikirere

Job38:37 Ubara ibicu atibeshya ni nde

Psalms36:4 Amagambo yose avuga yuje ubugome n’ubuhendanyi

Psalms101:2 Ngiye kwibanda ku nzira y’ubutungane; mbese uzansanganira ryari? Nzaharanira ubutungane bw’umutima wanjye
Psalms101:3 Sinzigera nshimishwa n’ibidakwiye
Psalms101:4 Uw’umutima uryarya arangendere kure; nta ho mpuriye n’ubukozi bw’ibibi.
Psalms101:5 Ubeshyera mugenzi we rwihishwa
Psalms101:6 Mu gihugu
Psalms101:7 Umuntu wazobereye mu kubeshya
Psalms101:8 Buri gitondo nzatsemba abagiranabi bose bo mu gihugu
Psalms102:1 Isengesho ry’umunyabyago igihe adandabiranye
Psalms102:2 Uhoraho
Psalms102:3 Ntukampishe uruhanga rwawe umunsi nasumbirijwe; jya untega amatwi igihe ngutabaje
Psalms102:4 Koko iminsi yanjye irayoyoka nk’umwotsi
Psalms102:5 Umutima wanjye urarabirana nk’ubwatsi batemye
Psalms102:6 Aho ndi hose mpora nganya
Psalms102:7 Ndasa na sakabaka yo mu butayu
Psalms102:8 ndara ntagohetse nk’inyoni yigungiye hejuru y’inzu.
Psalms102:9 Umunsi wose abanzi banjye barantuka
Psalms102:10 Ivu nsigaye ndirya nk’umugati
Psalms102:11 ku mpamvu y’uburakari n’ubukana bwawe
Psalms102:12 Iminsi yanjye irarembera nk’igicucu

Psalms102:16 Amahanga yose azatinya izina ry’Uhoraho

Psalms102:18 ubwo agahugukira isengesho ry’abanyazwe ibyabo
Psalms102:19 Ibyo ngibyo nibyandikirwe igisekuruza kizaza

Psalms102:21 kugira ngo yumve amaganya y’imfungwa
Psalms102:22 Nuko bazamamaze muri Siyoni izina ry’Uhoraho

Isaiah3:8 Yeruzalemu iradandabiranye
Isaiah3:9 Imisusire yabo ni yo ibashinja
Isaiah3:10 Nimuvuge muti «Intungane irahirwa
Isaiah3:11 umugome agushije ishyano
Isaiah3:12 Muryango wanjye
Isaiah3:13 Uhoraho arahagurutse ngo ace urubanza
Isaiah3:14 Uhoraho agiye gucira imanza abakuru n’abatware b’umuryango we: «Ni mwebwe mwayogoje umuzabibu murawutsemba
Isaiah3:15 Ni iki gituma mushikamira umuryango wanjye
Isaiah3:16 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kubera ko abakobwa b’i Siyoni bishyize ejuru
Isaiah3:17 Nyagasani azateza ibihushi imitwe y’abakobwa b’i Siyoni
Isaiah3:18 Uwo munsi

Jeremiah1:1 Ngaya amagambo ya Yeremiya
Jeremiah1:2 ari na ho Uhoraho yamubwiriye ijambo rye; ubwo hari mu mwaka wa cumi n’itatu w’ingoma ya Yoziya
Jeremiah1:3 Uhoraho yongeye kumubwira ijambo rye mu gihe cya Yoyakimu
Jeremiah1:4 Uhoraho yambwiye iri jambo
Jeremiah1:5 «Ntarakuremera mu nda ya nyoko
Jeremiah1:6 Ubwo nanjye ndatakamba nti «Rwose Nyagasani Mana
Jeremiah1:7 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Wivuga ngo ndacyari muto
Jeremiah1:8 Ntugire umuntu utinya
Jeremiah1:9 Uhoraho anyegereza ikiganza
Jeremiah1:10 Umenye ko uyu munsi nguhaye ububasha ku mahanga no ku bihugu byose
Jeremiah1:11 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo agira ati «Yeremiya
Jeremiah1:12 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Urebye neza! Nanjye rero ndi umurinzi
Jeremiah1:13 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira iri jambo agira ati «Urabona iki?» Ndasubiza nti «Icyo mbona
Jeremiah1:14 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Koko mu majyaruguru ni ho haturuka ibyago bikayogoza abaturage bose bo mu gihugu.
Jeremiah1:15 Ngiye guhamagaza imiryango yose yo mu bihugu by’amajyaruguru — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bazaza
Jeremiah1:16 Mbamenyesheje ibyemezo nabafatiye kubera ubugome bwabo: dore barantaye
Jeremiah1:17 Naho wowe kenyera ukomeze
Jeremiah1:18 Jyewe
Jeremiah1:19 Bazakurwanya ariko ntibazagushobora — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — humura turi kumwe ndagutabara.»
Jeremiah2:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo agira ati
Jeremiah2:2 «Genda! Urangurure mu matwi ya Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah2:3 Israheli yari umwihariko w’Uhoraho n’umuganura umugenewe; uwawuryagaho wese yarawuryozwaga
Jeremiah2:4 Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Jeremiah2:5 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ba so bangaye iki cyabateye kunyitaza? Birutse inyuma y’ibidafite akamaro
Jeremiah2:6 Nta bwo bibajije bati «Uhoraho wadukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri ari he
Jeremiah2:7 Nabazanye mu gihugu cy’uburumbuke kugira ngo murye ku mbuto zacyo
Jeremiah2:8 Abaherezabitambo ntibagize bati «Uhoraho ari he?» Abazi amategeko yanjye baranyirengagije
Jeremiah2:9 Ni cyo gituma ngiye kubashinja
Jeremiah2:10 Nimujye ku birwa by’Abakitimu maze murebe
Jeremiah2:11 Mbese igihugu kigeze kwimura imana zacyo ngo kiyoboke izindi? Nyamara kandi nta n’ubwo twazita imana! Umuryango wanjye wo
Jeremiah2:12 Juru
Jeremiah2:13 Koko

Jeremiah2:16 Dore ndetse ab’i Nofu n’i Dafune baragukandagira ku gahanga!
Jeremiah2:17 Ibyo wabitewe n’iki
Jeremiah2:18 None se kuki ujya mu Misiri kunywa amazi ya Nili? Ni kuki ujya muri Ashuru kunywa amazi y’Uruzi rwabo?
Jeremiah2:19 Uragahanirwa ubugome bwawe
Jeremiah2:20 Kuva kera

Jeremiah2:25 Reka kwirukanka utyo
Jeremiah2:26 Mbese nk’uko igisambo kimwara iyo gifashwe
Jeremiah2:27 Barahura n’igiti bakakibwira ngo «Uri data!» babona ibuye bati «Ni wowe wambyaye!» Banteye umugongo aho kunyerekeza amaso
Jeremiah2:28 Ni ko se

Jeremiah7:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya:
Jeremiah7:2 «Hagarara mu muryango w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho
Jeremiah7:3 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo
Jeremiah7:4 Nimusigeho kwibeshyeshya amagambo atagira aho ashingiye
Jeremiah7:5 Ahubwo nimuhindure rwose imyifatire yanyu n’imigenzereze yanyu
Jeremiah7:6 Ntimugakandamize umusuhuke
Jeremiah7:7 Nimugenza mutyo
Jeremiah7:8 Nyamara ariko dore muriringira amagambo y’ibinyoma adafite akamaro.

Jeremiah31:1 Icyo gihe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nzaba Imana y’imiryango yose ya Israheli

Jeremiah31:13 Ubwo inkumi zizabyina zidagadure
Jeremiah31:14 Abaherezabitambo nzabahaza ku nyama z’urugimbu

Jeremiah31:16 Uhoraho avuze atya: Rekeraho wikomeza kuganya
Jeremiah31:17 Mu gihe kizaza cyuzuye amiringiro — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — abana bawe bazagaruka mu gihugu cyabo.

Jeremiah43:13 Mu Misiri hose azahamenagura amabuye manini bashinze bukingi akegurirwa izuba
Jeremiah44:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo ryerekeye Abayuda bose bari batuye mu gihugu cya Misiri
Jeremiah44:2 «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Muzi neza amakuba naterereje Yeruzalemu n’imigi yose ya Yuda; na n’ubu ni mu matongo nta muntu uhatuye.
Jeremiah44:3 Ibyo byatewe n’ibibi bakoze
Jeremiah44:4 Sinahwemye kuboherereza abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi kugira ngo bababwire bati ’Ntimugakore ibintu biteye ishozi kandi mbyanga.’
Jeremiah44:5 Nta bwo bumvise
Jeremiah44:6 Nuko umujinya wanjye n’uburakari bwanjye bigurumana nk’umuriro
Jeremiah44:7 Ubu rero
Jeremiah44:8 Ni koko
Jeremiah44:9 Ese mwibagiwe ibicumuro by’abasokuruza banyu
Jeremiah44:10 Kugeza uyu munsi
Jeremiah44:11 None rero
Jeremiah44:12 Nzigarurira abasigaye bo muri Yuda
Jeremiah44:13 Nzahana abagiye gutura mu gihugu cya Misiri nk’uko nahannye ab’i Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah44:14 Nta n’umwe uzarokoka
Jeremiah44:15 Abagabo bari bazi ko abagore babo batwikira imibavu izindi mana
Jeremiah44:16 «N’ubwo utubwira ibyo mu izina ry’Uhoraho
Jeremiah44:17 Tugiye gukora ibyo twiyemeje byose
Jeremiah44:18 Kuva ubwo turetse gutwikira amaturo Umwamikazi wo mu kirere no kumumurikira ibitambo biseswa
Jeremiah44:19 Abagore bungamo bati «Yego
Jeremiah44:20 Nuko Yeremiya abwira imbaga yose
Jeremiah44:21 «Imibavu mwatwikiye mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu
Jeremiah44:22 Uhoraho ntiyari agishoboye kwihanganira ibikorwa byanyu bibi n’amahano mwakoraga; ni yo mpamvu igihugu cyanyu cyahindutse itongo
Jeremiah44:23 Kubera ko mwatwikiye amaturo izindi mana
Jeremiah44:24 Nuko Yeremiya abwira imbaga yose n’abagore bose
Jeremiah44:25 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo
Jeremiah44:26 Nyamara ariko
Jeremiah44:27 Nzabahagurukira mbagirire nabi aho kubagirira neza. Abayuda bari mu gihugu cya Misiri bazazira inkota n’inzara
Jeremiah44:28 Abantu b’imbarwa bazaba barokotse inkota
Jeremiah44:29 Dore rero ikimenyetso — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kizabereka ko ngiye guhana aha hantu
Jeremiah44:30 Uhoraho avuze atya: Farawo Hofura

Jeremiah45:4 Uzamubwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Kuisi yose

Jeremiah48:34 Induru z’impuruza zivuye i Heshiboni zageze n’i Eleyale; urusaku rwazo rurumvikanira i Yahasi h’i Sowari
Jeremiah48:35 Muri Mowabu — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze— nzatsemba abajya ahantu hirengeye
Jeremiah48:36 Ni yo mpamvu umutima wanjye uririra Mowabu

Jeremiah48:38 Hejuru y’amazu y’i Mowabu no ku bibuga baraboroga. Mowabu ndayivunaguye
Jeremiah48:39 Bigenze bite! Ngiyo irarimbutse

Jeremiah49:1 Uhoraho abwiye atya Abahamoni: Ese Israheli nta bahungu ifite? Ese nta bagenerwamurage ifite? None se ni kuki Milikomu yegukanye igihugu cya Gadi

Jeremiah49:3 Heshiboni
Jeremiah49:4 Ni kuki wiratana ikibaya cyawe? Yego
Jeremiah49:5 None rero
Jeremiah49:6 Nyuma y’ibyo
Jeremiah49:7 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo abwiye atya Edomu: Ese i Temani nta bahanga bakihaba? Indyarya ni zo zahawe ijambo
Jeremiah49:8 Bantu b’i Dedani
Jeremiah49:9 Abasaruzi b’imizabibu nibaza iwawe
Jeremiah49:10 Ni jyewe ubwanjye ugiye gucuza Ezawu
Jeremiah49:11 «Ntubunze imitima y’uko imfubyi zawe zizamera

Jeremiah49:22 Bizamera nka kagoma igurutse

Jeremiah50:6 Umuryango wanjye wari warabaye nk’intama zazimiye; abashumba bazo bari baraziyobeje

Jeremiah51:3 Ntimuzagire uwo musiga
Jeremiah51:4 Inkomere ziragwirirana mu gihugu cya Kalideya
Jeremiah51:5 kuko igihugu cyabo cyasagutswe n’ibicumuro bagiriye Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli. Nyamara ariko
Jeremiah51:6 Nimuhunge Babiloni
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni yahoze ari nk’inkongoro ya zahabu mu biganza by’Uhoraho

Jeremiah51:30 Intwari z’i Babiloni zatinye kurwana

Jeremiah51:33 Uhoraho
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinetsari

Jeremiah51:37 Babiloni izahinduka ikirundo cy’amabuye
Jeremiah51:38 Igihe bo bazaba bakoranye
Jeremiah51:39 ibyishimo byabo nibimara kuba byose nzabategurira ibirori: mbasindishe bamere nk’abapfuye
Jeremiah51:40 Nzabayobora mu ibagiro nk’amasekurume y’intama
Jeremiah51:41 Bishoboka bite! Sheshaki yafashwe
Jeremiah51:42 Inyanja yuzuriye kuri Babiloni imivumba yayo isuma iyirengaho.
Jeremiah51:43 Imigi yayo yabaye amatongo
Jeremiah51:44 Nzahagurukira Beli y’i Babiloni
Jeremiah51:45 Mwebwe abo mu muryango wanjye
Jeremiah51:46 Nzabarinda gucika intege no guterwa ubwoba n’impuha zizakwira mu gihugu; mu mwaka umwe bavuga ibi

Jeremiah51:48 Ubwo rero
Jeremiah51:49 Ku isi yose hapfuye abantu batabarika
Jeremiah51:50 Mwebwe abarokotse inkota nimufate inzira
Jeremiah51:51 Nta bwo twishimiye gutukwa

Jeremiah51:53 N’iyo Babiloni yakwiyubakira inkike zikomeye
Jeremiah51:54 I Babiloni haturutse induru y’impuruza

Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya akaba yari yarakomatanyirije mu gitabo kimwe amakuba yose yari kuzagwirira Babiloni; mbese harimo amagambo yose yavuzwe haruguru yerekeye Babiloni.
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremiya ni ko kubwira Seraya
Jeremiah51:62 maze uzavuge uti ’Uhoraho
Jeremiah51:63 Nurangiza gusoma iki gitabo

Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiya yagiye ku ngoma afite imyaka makumyabiri n’umwe
Jeremiah52:2 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho
Jeremiah52:3 Ibyabereye i Yeruzalemu no muri Yuda byasembuye uburakari bw’Uhoraho
Jeremiah52:4 Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa cumi
Jeremiah52:5 Uwo mugi wakomeje kugotwa kugeza mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe w’ingoma y’umwami Sedekiya.
Jeremiah52:6 Ku munsi wa cyenda w’ukwezi kwa kane
Jeremiah52:7 nuko urukuta rw’umugi barucamo icyuho. Ingabo zose zahise ziva mu mugi nijoro zirahunga
Jeremiah52:8 Nyamara ingabo z’Abakalideya zikurikirana umwami
Jeremiah52:9 Abakalideya bamaze gufata umwami
Jeremiah52:10 Umwami w’i Babiloni yica abahungu ba Sedekiya
Jeremiah52:11 Nyuma
Jeremiah52:12 Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa gatanu mu mwaka wa cumi n’icyenda w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari
Jeremiah52:13 Nuko atwika Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’umwami
Jeremiah52:14 Naho inkike za Yeruzalemu zari ziyikikije impande zose
Jeremiah52:15 Abantu bari basigaye mu mugi
Jeremiah52:16 ariko yasize mu gihugu bamwe bo muri rubanda rugufi kugira ngo babe abanyamizabibu n’abahinzi b’imirima.
Jeremiah52:17 Naho inkingi z’umuringa zo mu Ngoro
Jeremiah52:18 Batwaye kandi ibyungo
Jeremiah52:19 Umutware w’abarinda umwami w’i Babiloni afata kandi amabesani
Jeremiah52:20 Izo nkingi ebyiri
Jeremiah52:21 Inkingi ya mbere yari nk’igitembo
Jeremiah52:22 Yari ifite umutwe w’umuringa
Jeremiah52:23 Hariho imitako y’imbuto zitukura mirongo cyenda n’itandatu ku mpande
Jeremiah52:24 Umutware w’abarinzi b’umwami w’i Babiloni afata Seraya umuherezabitambo mukuru
Jeremiah52:25 Yagiye no mu mugi afata umunyacyubahiro wari umutware w’ingabo
Jeremiah52:26 Abo bose Nebuzaradani umutware w’abarinda umwami arabafunga
Jeremiah52:27 Umwami w’i Babiloni abicishiriza aho i Ribula mu gihugu cya Hamati. Nguko uko Yuda yajyanywe bunyago kure y’igihugu cye.
Jeremiah52:28 Dore umubare w’abantu Nebukadinetsari yajyanye bunyago. Mu mwaka wa karindwi hagiye Abayuda 3023.
Jeremiah52:29 Naho mu mwaka wa cumi n’umunani w’ingoma ye
Jeremiah52:30 Hanyuma mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’itatu w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari
Jeremiah52:31 Ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa cumi n’abiri
Jeremiah52:32 Nuko amuganiriza gicuti kandi amuha intebe y’icyubahiro isumba iz’abandi bami bari hamwe i Babiloni.
Jeremiah52:33 Yoyakini yiyambura imyambaro ye ya kinyururu
Jeremiah52:34 ibimutunga bya buri munsi

Ezekiel1:1 Ku munsi wa gatanu w’ukwezi kwa kane
Ezekiel1:2 Kuri uwo munsi wa gatanu nyine — hari mu mwaka wa gatanu umwami Yoyakini ajyanywe bunyago —
Ezekiel1:3 ubwo ijambo ry’Uhoraho ringeraho
Ezekiel1:4 Nuko ngo ndebe
Ezekiel1:5 Muri icyo cyezezi
Ezekiel1:6 Buri kinyabuzima cyari gifite umutwe w’impande enye n’amababa ane.
Ezekiel1:7 Amaguru yabyo yari agororotse n’ibirenge bimeze nk’ibinono by’ibimasa
Ezekiel1:8 Mu nsi y’amababa yabyo habonekaga ibiganza nk’iby’umuntu byarebaga mu byerekezo bine
Ezekiel1:9 Ayo mababa yabyo yari afatanye rimwe n’irindi
Ezekiel1:10 Mu ruhanga rwabyo hasaga n’ah’umuntu
Ezekiel1:11 Amababa yabyo yari arambuye yerekeye hejuru
Ezekiel1:12 buri kinyabuzima kikagenda kiromboreje imbere yacyo bigana aho umwuka ubyerekeje
Ezekiel1:13 Ibyo binyabuzima nabibonaga bimeze nk’amafumba agurumana
Ezekiel1:14 ibinyabuzima bikagenda binyuranamo kandi bisa n’umurabyo.
Ezekiel1:15 Nuko ngo ndebe
Ezekiel1:16 Izo nziga zari zikoze mu ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye. Zari zikoze kimwe kandi zisa
Ezekiel1:17 Zazengurukaga zigana mu byerekezo bine nta guhindukira.
Ezekiel1:18 Umuzenguruko wa buri ruziga ukaba mugari ku buryo buteye ubwoba
Ezekiel1:19 Uko ibyo binyabuzima byagendaga
Ezekiel1:20 Aho umwuka wabyerekezaga ni ho byajyaga
Ezekiel1:21 Iyo ibyo binyabuzima byagendaga izo nziga na zo zaragendaga
Ezekiel1:22 Ku mutwe w’ibinyabuzima hari harambuyeho ikintu kimeze nk’igisenge
Ezekiel1:23 naho mu nsi y’icyo gisenge ni ho amababa yabyo yari aramburiye
Ezekiel1:24 Nuko numva ijwi ry’urusaku rw’amababa yabyo rwari rumeze nk’umworomo w’amazi magari
Ezekiel1:25 Humvikanaga rero urusaku rwinshi
Ezekiel1:26 Hejuru y’icyo gisenge cyari kirambuye hejuru y’imitwe yabyo
Ezekiel1:27 Hanyuma mbona wa wundi akikijwe hejuru y’urukenyerero n’ikintu gisa n’umuriro
Ezekiel1:28 urwo rumuri rugasa kandi n’umukororombya uboneka mu bicu ku minsi y’imvura

Ezekiel5:1 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel5:2 Igihe iminsi y’ifatwa ry’umugi izaba irangiye
Ezekiel5:3 Uzafateho umusatsi muke uwushyire mu mufuka w’igishura cyawe
Ezekiel5:4 hanyuma uzongere ufateho uwujugunye mu muriro
Ezekiel5:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Iyo ni Yeruzalemu nashyize hagati y’amahanga n’ibihugu biyikikije.
Ezekiel5:6 Yarigometse isuzugura amategeko n’amabwiriza yanjye kurusha amahanga n’ibihugu biyikikije; kuko bahigitse amabwiriza yanjye kandi ntibakurikize n’amategeko yanjye.»
Ezekiel5:7 Ni yo mpamvu Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati «Kubera ko agasuzuguro kanyu gatambukije ububi ak’amahanga abakikije
Ezekiel5:8 kubera iyo mpamvu nimwumve uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ’Nanjye ndakwibasiye
Ezekiel5:9 Nzakwibasira ku buryo ntigeze mbikora kandi ntazigera nongera kubikora
Ezekiel5:10 Ababyeyi bazarya abana babo n’abana barye ababyeyi babo ku mugaragaro mu maso yawe. Nzagucira urugukwiye
Ezekiel5:11 Ni cyo gituma mbirahiriye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kubera ko wahindanyije Ingoro yanjye n’ibyo biterashozi byose n’ayo mahano yose
Ezekiel5:12 Icya gatatu cy’abaturage bawe kizicwa n’ibyorezo maze barimburwe n’inzara ku mugaragaro mu maso yawe
Ezekiel5:13 Nzimara ntyo uburakari
Ezekiel5:14 Nzakugira itongo n’ikinnyego mu mahanga agukikije
Ezekiel5:15 maze igihe nzaba naguciriye urugukwiye mbigiranye uburakari
Ezekiel5:16 Nzabaterereza imyambi iteye ubwoba ibarimbure; koko nzayibaterereza kubatsemba
Ezekiel5:17 Nzabaterereza inzara n’ibikoko by’inkazi bibamareho urubyaro; ibyorezo n’amaraso bizakugariza kandi nzakugabize n’inkota: ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze.’»

Ezekiel10:1 Nuko ngo ndebe mbona ku gisenge cyari hejuru y’umutwe w’abakerubimu

Ezekiel10:16 Uko abakerubimu batambukaga

Ezekiel16:19 Ndetse n’umugati naguhaye
Ezekiel16:20 Byongeye kandi
Ezekiel16:21 Wishe abahungu banjye urabatanga ubatura ayo mashusho yawe;

Ezekiel16:23 Ariko noneho wiyimbire
Ezekiel16:24 Wiyubakiye amazu ahirengeye
Ezekiel16:25 Muri buri mayirabiri wahubatse inzu yo guhindanyirizamo uburanga bwawe wiha umuhisi n’umugenzi

Ezekiel16:27 None rero
Ezekiel16:28 Byongeye kandi kubera ko utigeze unyurwa

Ezekiel16:30 Mbega ukuntu uba ufite umutima utari hamwe
Ezekiel16:31 Igihe wiyubakiraga amazu muri buri mayirabiri
Ezekiel16:32 Umugore w’umusambanyi yigabiza ab’imuhana mu kigwi cy’umugabo we.
Ezekiel16:33 Ubundi indaya zose barazihonga; ariko wowe uhonga ubwawe abakunzi bawe bose

Ezekiel16:35 None rero wa ndaya we

Ezekiel16:37 ngiye kugukoranyirizaho abakunzi bawe bakunyuze

Ezekiel16:39 Nzabakugabiza barimbure ayo mazu yawe n’insengero wubakishije ahirengeye
Ezekiel16:40 Ibyo nibirangira
Ezekiel16:41 bazatwika amazu yawe
Ezekiel16:42 Nzakurangirizaho uburakari bwanjye
Ezekiel16:43 Kubera ko utibutse iminsi y’ubuto bwawe
Ezekiel16:44 Dore nawe ba gacamigani bose barakurenguriraho
Ezekiel16:45 Koko rero
Ezekiel16:46 Mukuru wawe w’uburiza ni Samariya
Ezekiel16:47 Nta bwo wiganye imyifatire yabo cyangwa se ngo ukore amahano nk’ayabo byonyine
Ezekiel16:48 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye
Ezekiel16:49 Igicumuro cya Sodoma murumuna wawe ni ubwirasi
Ezekiel16:50 bigize abibone kandi bakorera amahano imbere yanjye
Ezekiel16:51 Naho Samariya we ntiyigeze akora na kimwe cya kabiri cy’ibyaha byawe. Wagwije amahano kubarusha
Ezekiel16:52 Wowe rero
Ezekiel16:53 Ngiye kubakomorera: nzakomorera Sodoma n’abakobwa be kimwe na Samariya n’abakobwa be
Ezekiel16:54 kugira ngo ukorwe n’ikimwaro kandi uterwe isoni n’ibyo wakoze byose
Ezekiel16:55 Abavandimwe bawe
Ezekiel16:56 Sodoma
Ezekiel16:57 ibikorwa bibi byawe bitaragaragara? None dore abakobwa ba Edomu baguhinduye urw’amenyo kimwe n’abandi bo mu bihugu bigukikije; ndetse n’Abafilisitikazi baragushungera baguturutse impande zose.

Ezekiel18:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo
Ezekiel18:2 «Ni iki gituma mu gihugu cya Israheli muca uyu mugani uvuga ngo: ’Ababyeyi bariye imizabibu idahishije
Ezekiel18:3 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjyeuwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuzeuwo mugani ntimuzongera kuwuca ukundi muri Israheli
Ezekiel18:4 kuko ubugingo bwose ari ubwanjye; ari ubw’umubyeyi cyangwa se ubw’umwana
Ezekiel18:5 Niba umuntu ari intungane
Ezekiel18:6 ntarire ku misozi kandi ntiyubure amaso ngo arebe ibigirwamana by’umuryango wa Israheli
Ezekiel18:7 ntagire umuntu akandamiza
Ezekiel18:8 ntagurize yishakira inyungu
Ezekiel18:9 agakora akurikije amategeko yanjye n’amabwiriza yanjye nta buryarya — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — uwo muntu ni intungane koko kandi azabaho.
Ezekiel18:10 Ariko niba uwo muntu abyaye umwana w’umugome kandi umena amaraso
Ezekiel18:11 nyamara we nta na kimwe yigeze akora muri byo
Ezekiel18:12 agakandamiza umukene n’umunyabyago
Ezekiel18:13 akaguriza yishakira inyungu kandi agasaba urwunguko rurengeje urugero
Ezekiel18:14 Nyamara niba uwo mugome abyaye umwana
Ezekiel18:15 ntarire ku misozi
Ezekiel18:16 ntagire umuntu akandamiza
Ezekiel18:17 ntagire uwo arenganya
Ezekiel18:18 Ariko kubera ko se yabaye umugome
Ezekiel18:19 Byongeye kandi muravuga muti ’Umwana yabuzwa n’iki kuzira ibicumuro bya se!’ Nyamara rero
Ezekiel18:20 Uwacumuye ni we uzapfa. Umwana ntazazira ibicumuro bya se cyangwa ngo umubyeyi azire ibicumuro by’umwana we; intungane izahemberwa ubutungane bwayo
Ezekiel18:21 Umugiranabi naramuka yanze ibyaha byose yakoze
Ezekiel18:22 Ibicumuro bye ntibizibukwa ukundi; azabaho abikesheje ko yakurikije ubutabera.
Ezekiel18:23 Mbese nakwishimira nte urupfu rw’umunyabyaha
Ezekiel18:24 Ariko se niba uwari intungane aretse ubutungane bwe
Ezekiel18:25 Muravuga kandi muti ’Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye.’ Tega amatwi rero
Ezekiel18:26 Niba uwari intungane aramutse aretse ubutungane bwe agacumura maze agapfa
Ezekiel18:27 Ariko niba umunyabyaha yanze ibyaha yakoraga
Ezekiel18:28 Niba yanze ibicumuro bye byose
Ezekiel18:29 Nyamara umuryango wa Israheli uravuga uti ’Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye.’ Ni ko se
Ezekiel18:30 Ni cyo gitumye rero
Ezekiel18:31 Nimuzibukire ibyaha byose mwakoze

Ezekiel23:6 bakaba abasirikare bambaye imyambaro y’imihemba
Ezekiel23:7 Nuko arabiyegurira bose uko bari ingenzi mu Banyashuru

Ezekiel28:19 Amahanga yose yari akuzi yakutse umutima
Ezekiel28:20 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo
Ezekiel28:21 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel28:22 Uzayibwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Dore ngiye kukwibasira
Ezekiel28:23 Nzayiteza icyorezo
Ezekiel28:24 Umuryango wa Israheli ntuzongera kugira amahwa n’imifatangwe bihanda
Ezekiel28:25 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Igihe nzakoranya umuryango wa Israheli mbavanye mu mahanga batataniyemo
Ezekiel28:26 Bazahatura mu ituze
Ezekiel29:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi
Ezekiel29:2 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel29:3 Mubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Dore ngiye kukwibasira
Ezekiel29:4 Ngiye kuzirika imikwege ku nzasaya zawe
Ezekiel29:5 nkunage mu butayu n’amafi y’inzuzi zawe zose
Ezekiel29:6 nuko Abanyamisiri bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho: bo Israheli yishingikirijeho bakayibera nk’inkoni y’urubingo
Ezekiel29:7 bayifata ikabavunikira mu ntoki
Ezekiel29:8 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati «Dore nguterereje inkota kugira ngo ikumare ku bantu no ku matungo.
Ezekiel29:9 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura ubutayu n’amatongo
Ezekiel29:10 Kuva ubu rero ndakwibasiye wowe n’inzu zawe: igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura amatongo n’ubutayu
Ezekiel29:11 Nta kirenge cy’umuntu cyangwa urwara rw’inyamaswa bizongera kuhakandagira
Ezekiel29:12 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura ubutayu rwagati mu bindi bihugu byayogojwe; imigi yacyo nyihindure amatongo hagati y’indi migi yashenywe
Ezekiel29:13 Koko rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Nyuma y’imyaka mirongo ine
Ezekiel29:14 nzagarura Abanyamisiri bari bajyanywe bunyago
Ezekiel29:15 Misiri izaba igihugu cy’intege nke kurusha ibindi byose
Ezekiel29:16 Ntikizongera kwiringirwa n’umuryango wa Israheli
Ezekiel29:17 Nuko mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’irindwi
Ezekiel29:18 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel29:19 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga
Ezekiel29:20 Mugabiye igihugu cya Misiri ho ingororano y’umuruho azaba yagize — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko ari jye bazaba bakoreye.
Ezekiel29:21 Uwo munsi nzagoborera umuryango wa Israheli ububasha bukomeye

Ezekiel30:4 Inkota izayogoza Misiri
Ezekiel30:5 Kushi

Ezekiel30:7 Bazarimburwa kimwe n’ibihugu byarimbuwe
Ezekiel30:8 Nuko bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho
Ezekiel30:9 Uwo munsi
Ezekiel30:10 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga: Nzatsemba imbaga y’Abanyamisiri mbigirishije ukuboko kwa Nebukadinetsari
Ezekiel30:11 We n’abantu be b’ababisha kurusha andi mahanga
Ezekiel30:12 Nzakamya inzuzi za Misiri

Ezekiel30:14 Nzayogoza Patorosi

Ezekiel30:18 I Tafunesi umuseke ntuzakeba

Ezekiel31:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe
Ezekiel31:2 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel31:3 Dore rwose umeze nk’isederi yo muri Libani
Ezekiel31:4 Imvura yatumye ikura
Ezekiel31:5 Ni cyo cyatumye ikura
Ezekiel31:6 Inyoni zose zo mu kirere zarikaga mu mashami yayo
Ezekiel31:7 Iyo sederi yari yizihije kubera ubunini bwayo n’uburebure bw’amashami yayo; kuko yashoreraga imizi yayo mu mazi menshi.
Ezekiel31:8 Nta yindi ihwanye na yo mu masederi yo mu busitani bw’Imana
Ezekiel31:9 Nari narayitatse nyihundazaho amababi
Ezekiel31:10 None rero
Ezekiel31:11 Ni yo mpamvu nayizibukiriye
Ezekiel31:12 Nuko abanyamahanga
Ezekiel31:13 Inyoni zose zo mu kirere zatururiye ku bisigazwa byayo
Ezekiel31:14 Nuko rero

Ezekiel31:17 Nuko n’inkomoko yayo
Ezekiel31:18 Nakugereranya rero n’ikihe giti mu byo muri Edeni
Ezekiel32:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’ibiri
Ezekiel32:2 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel32:3 None rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aragira ati ‘Nzagutega umutego wanjye amahanga menshi yakoranye
Ezekiel32:4 Nzakuroha ku butaka
Ezekiel32:5 Nzanika inyama zawe ku misozi
Ezekiel32:6 Igihugu kizuhirwa amaraso akuvamo nk’imivu
Ezekiel32:7 Igihe uzaba umaze kuzima
Ezekiel32:8 Nzazimya ibinyarumuri byose byo mu kirere ku mpamvu yawe
Ezekiel32:9 Nzashavuza imitima y’abantu b’amoko menshi igihe nzakurimburira mu mahanga
Ezekiel32:10 Nzatera amahanga menshi gukuka umutima ku mpamvu yawe n’abami bayo bashye ubwoba
Ezekiel32:11 kuko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati ‘Inkota y’umwami w’i Babiloni izagukurikirana.
Ezekiel32:12 Abantu bawe batagira ingano nzabarimbuza inkota y’intwari ku rugamba
Ezekiel32:13 Nzatsemba amatungo yose ya Misiri ari ku nkombe z’amazi magari; bityo nta kirenge cy’umuntu cyangwa ikinono cy’amatungo kizongera kuyavurunga ukundi.
Ezekiel32:14 Nuko rero nzahe amazi yayo gutuza
Ezekiel32:15 Igihe igihugu cya Misiri nzaba nagihinduye ubutayu kizamburwa ibyo cyari gitunze
Ezekiel32:16 Ngiyo indirimbo y’amaganya izaririmbwa n’abakobwa bo mu mahanga; bakazayiririmba baganya kubera Misiri n’imbaga yayo yose. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»
Ezekiel32:17 Nuko mu mwaka wa cumi n’ibiri
Ezekiel32:18 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel32:19 Yemwe
Ezekiel32:20 rwagati mu bicishijwe inkota. Bakuye inkota mu rwubati
Ezekiel32:21 Iyo ngiyo ikuzimu abari intwari zikomeye

Ezekiel32:23 Imva ye bayicukuye mu rwobo rurerure

Ezekiel32:25 Dore n’umwami wa Elamu
Ezekiel32:26 Dore umwami wa Mesheki n’uwa Tubali n’imbaga zabo zose zikikije imva zabo. Abo bose ni abatagenywe bazize inkota
Ezekiel32:27 Ntibarambaraye hamwe n’intwari za kera
Ezekiel32:28 Naho wowe uzatsembwa
Ezekiel32:29 Dore na Edomu
Ezekiel32:30 Dore n’ibikomangoma byose byo mu majyaruguru

Ezekiel33:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo
Ezekiel33:2 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel33:3 iyo abonye inkota ije iteye igihugu avuza ihembe kugira ngo aburire rubanda.
Ezekiel33:4 Nihagira uwumva iryo hembe ariko ntaryiteho hanyuma inkota ikaza ikamwica
Ezekiel33:5 Yumvise ihembe rivuga ariko ntiyaryitaho; none amaraso ye azamubarwaho. Nyamara uwaryumvise akanaryitaho
Ezekiel33:6 Ariko niba ushinzwe kuburira rubanda yabonye inkota ije ntavuze ihembe
Ezekiel33:7 Nawe rero
Ezekiel33:8 Ndamutse mbwiye umugome nti ’Wa mugome we
Ezekiel33:9 Ariko nuramuka umuburiye
Ezekiel33:10 Nuko rero
Ezekiel33:11 Babwire ko mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuzenta bwo njya nishimira urupfu rw’umugome
Ezekiel33:12 Nuko rero
Ezekiel33:13 Ndamutse mbwiye intungane nti ‘Uzabaho’
Ezekiel33:14 Ariko nimbwira umugome nti ‘Uzapfa’
Ezekiel33:15 agasubiza icyo yahaweho ingwate
Ezekiel33:16 Nta cyaha mu byo yakoze kizibukwa
Ezekiel33:17 Abo mu muryango wawe baravuga bati ’Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye.’ Nyamara
Ezekiel33:18 Umuntu w’intungane ateshwa ubutungane bwe agakora ikibi
Ezekiel33:19 Umugome na we nazibukira ubugiranabi bwe
Ezekiel33:20 Naho mwebwe muravuga ngo ‘Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye!’ Muryango wa Israheli
Ezekiel33:21 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe
Ezekiel33:22 Ku mugoroba wabanzirizaga umunsi uwo muntu yajeho
Ezekiel33:23 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo
Ezekiel33:24 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel33:25 Babwire rero uti ‘Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Muraryana inyama n’amaraso yazo
Ezekiel33:26 Mwishingikiriza inkota zanyu
Ezekiel33:27 Bawire ibi ngibi: Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye
Ezekiel33:28 Igihugu nzagihindura ubutayu
Ezekiel33:29 Bityo bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho
Ezekiel33:30 None rero
Ezekiel33:31 Nuko bakagusanga ari imbaga
Ezekiel33:32 Batega amatwi amagambo yawe nk’aho wabaye umuririmbyi wagoroye ijwi ucuranga indirimbo z’urukundo; naho kuyakurikiza ibyo ntibabiranganwa.
Ezekiel33:33 Nyamara
Ezekiel34:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo
Ezekiel34:2 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel34:3 None mwebwe murinywera amata
Ezekiel34:4 Intama zinanutse ntimwazondoye
Ezekiel34:5 Zaratatanye kuko nta mushumba
Ezekiel34:6 Dore amatungo yanjye arangara ku misozi yose n’ahantu hose hirengeye; yakwiriye imishwaro mu gihugu cyose
Ezekiel34:7 None rero
Ezekiel34:8 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kubera ko amatungo yanjye yatejwe abashimusi
Ezekiel34:9 nimwumve noneho
Ezekiel34:10 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Dore ngiye kwibasira abo bashumba
Ezekiel34:11 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Dore jye ubwanjye ngiye gukenura amatungo yanjye kandi nyiteho.
Ezekiel34:12 Uko umushumba yita ku matungo ye igihe aba ari hagati y’intama zibyagiye
Ezekiel34:13 Koko
Ezekiel34:14 Nzaziragira mu rwuri rutoshye
Ezekiel34:15 Ni jye ubwanjye uziragirira intama zanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuzejye nzazibyagiza ziruhuke.
Ezekiel34:16 Nzashakashaka iyazimiye
Ezekiel34:17 Naho mwebwe rero
Ezekiel34:18 Bite se? Ntimwanyuzwe no kurisha mu rwuri rutoshye
Ezekiel34:19 Ubwo se murabona ko intama zanjye ari zo zigomba kurisha ubwatsi mwanyukanyutse
Ezekiel34:20 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero
Ezekiel34:21 Ubwo mwihaye kubyiga no gutera igitugu
Ezekiel34:22 ngiye kuza gukiza intama zanjye kugira ngo zitazongera gushimutwa bibaho; ngiye gukiranura inyagazi n’izindi ntama.’
Ezekiel34:23 Abo mu bushyo bwanjye nzababonera umushumba mbamushinge abaragire; umugaragu wanjye Dawudi ni we uzabaragira
Ezekiel34:24 Jyewe Uhoraho
Ezekiel34:25 Nzagirana na bo isezerano ry’amahoro
Ezekiel34:26 Nzabatuza impande z’umusozi wanjye
Ezekiel34:27 Ibiti mu murima bizera imbuto zabyo
Ezekiel34:28 Ntibazongera ukundi kuba umunyago w’amahanga
Ezekiel34:29 Nzabaha imirima izwiho kurumbuka
Ezekiel34:30 Nuko bazamenye ko ari jye Imana yabo nkabana na bo — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — banamenye ko n’ab’inzu ya Israheli bose ari umuryango wanjye.
Ezekiel34:31 Namwe rero

Ezekiel36:4 Imisozi n’imirenge yanyu

Ezekiel36:22 Ngaho rero
Ezekiel36:23 Nzakuza izina ryanjye ry’ikirangirire mwandavurije muri ayo mahanga — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — maze amahanga azamenye ko ndi Uhoraho
Ezekiel36:24 Nzabavana mu mahanga
Ezekiel36:25 Nzabuhagiza amazi asukuye maze mube abasukure; mbahanagureho ubwandure bwanyu bwose muce ukubiri n’ibigirwamana byanyu byose.
Ezekiel36:26 Nzabaha umutima mushya
Ezekiel36:27 Nzabuzuzamo umwuka wanjye
Ezekiel36:28 Muzatura igihugu nahaye abakurambere banyu
Ezekiel36:29 Nzabakiza ubwandu bwanyu bwose. Nzameza ingano kandi nzigwize
Ezekiel36:30 Nzagwiza imbuto z’ibiti n’umusaruro wo mu mirima

Ezekiel36:36 Ubwo uzaba yarokotse mu mahanga abakikije
Ezekiel36:37 Nyagasani Uhoraho arongeye aravuze ati «Dore n’ibindi nzakora: nzareka umuryango wanjye unshakashake kugira ngo ngire icyo nywumarira

Ezekiel37:1 Ububasha bw’Uhoraho bunzaho

Ezekiel37:5 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho ababwiye: Ngiye kubashyiramo umwuka maze mwongere mubeho.
Ezekiel37:6 Ngiye kubateraho imitsi
Ezekiel37:7 Ubwo ndahanura nk’uko nari nabitegetswe. Igihe ndiho mpanura
Ezekiel37:8 Ngo ndebe mbona imitsi iyafasheho
Ezekiel37:9 Nuko arambwira ati «Ngaho
Ezekiel37:10 Igihe ndiho mpanura nk’uko nabitegetswe

Ezekiel37:13 Muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho

Ezekiel37:20 Igihe uzaba ufashe mu kiganza cyawe utwo tubaho twombi wanditseho ayo mazina bose babyirebera
Ezekiel37:21 uzababwire uti ’Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ngiye gushaka Abayisraheli

Ezekiel38:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo
Ezekiel38:2 «Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel38:3 Uzamubwire uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Ndakwibasiye
Ezekiel38:4 Ngiye kuzirika imikwege ku nzasaya zawe
Ezekiel38:5 Dore n’ingabo z’Ubuperisi
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri n’ingabo zayo zose
Ezekiel38:7 Witegure neza
Ezekiel38:8 Nyuma y’iminsi myinshi uzabona amabwiriza. Nihashira imyaka uzatera igihugu cya Israheli. Ku misozi yaho yamaze igihe kirekire yarabaye amatongo
Ezekiel38:9 Ubwo rero uzazamukana n’ingabo zawe zose
Ezekiel38:10 Dore rero uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Uwo munsi mu mutima wawe hazavuka ibitekerezo byinshi
Ezekiel38:11 Uzibwira uti ’Ngiye kuzamuka
Ezekiel38:12 Nuko uzajye gusahura utware n’iminyago
Ezekiel38:13 Abantu b’i Sheba n’i Dani
Ezekiel38:14 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero
Ezekiel38:15 Icyo gihe uzimuka iwawe mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel38:16 Uzaza gutera Israheli
Ezekiel38:17 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Ni wowe wavuzwe mu bihe byo hambere
Ezekiel38:18 Kuri uwo munsi
Ezekiel38:19 n’umujinya utuma mfureka
Ezekiel38:20 Ubwo rero
Ezekiel38:21 Ubwo Gogi nzamuteza inkota ku misozi yanjye yose — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — maze bazasubiranemo baterane inkota.
Ezekiel38:22 Nzamuhanisha ibyorezo no kumena amaraso
Ezekiel38:23 Nzagaragaza ubuhangange bwanjye n’ubutungane bwanjye
Ezekiel39:1 None rero
Ezekiel39:2 Nzagutesha inzira yawe nkuzane nkwerekeza mu majyaruguru
Ezekiel39:3 Nzavunagurira umuheto wawe mu kiganza cyawe cy’ibumoso
Ezekiel39:4 Wowe ubwawe uzagwa ku misozi ya Israheli
Ezekiel39:5 kuko uzagwa ku gasi nk’uko jyewe
Ezekiel39:6 Nzohereza inkongi y’umuriro muri Magogi no ku batuye mu birwa bari mu ituze
Ezekiel39:7 Nzamenyekanya izina ryanjye ritagatifu muri Israheli
Ezekiel39:8 Dore kandi ibyo byose bigiye kuba
Ezekiel39:9 Nuko abatuye imigi ya Israheli bazajye gutwika intwaro zabo n’ingabo zabo
Ezekiel39:10 Ntibazasubira gutashya ukundi inkwi mu gasozi cyangwa se gutema ibiti mu mashyamba
Ezekiel39:11 Uwo munsi nzaha Gogi aho azahambwa muri Israheli
Ezekiel39:12 Abayisraheli bazahamara amezi arindwi babahamba

Amos3:1 Nimwumve ijambo Uhoraho ababwiye
Amos3:2 Ni mwebwe mwenyine namenye mu miryango yose yo ku isi; ni yo mpamvu nzabibaryoza mbaziza ibicumuro byanyu byose.
Amos3:3 Mwabonye abantu babiri bafatanya urugendo batabanje kubisezerana?
Amos3:4 Mbese hari ubwo intare itontoma mu ishyamba itabonye icyo ihiga? Icyana cy’intare se cyomonganya ijwi mu ndiri yacyo nta cyo cyafashe?
Amos3:5 Mbese inyoni igwa mu mutego nta cyo bayishukishije? Umutego se washibuka ari nta cyo ufashe?

Amos3:11 Ni yo mpamvu

Amos3:14 umunsi nzaziza Israheli ibicumuro byayo

Amos4:3 muzasohokera mu byuho
Amos4:4 Nimujye i Beteli maze mucumure! Mujye i Giligali mwungikanye ibicumuro! Muhere mu gitondo mutura ibitambo
Amos4:5 Nimutwikishe umusemburo ho igitambo cy’ishimwe
Amos4:6 Ni jye watumye mu migi yanyu yose nta cyo kurya kihaboneka
Amos4:7 Ni jye wari warabimye imvura hasigaye amezi atatu ngo musarure
Amos4:8 abantu bo mu migi ibiri cyangwa itatu bajyaga kunywa amazi mu mugi uyafite
Amos4:9 Nateje nkongwa n’inanda mu myaka yanyu; ubukungu bw’ubusitani bwanyu
Amos4:10 Nabateje icyorezo nka kimwe cyo mu Misiri
Amos4:11 Nabazambije nk’uko nazambije Sodoma na Gomora
Amos4:12 Ni yo mpamvu rero nzakugenzereza ntyo
Amos4:13 Nguwo Uwabumbabumbye imisozi
Amos5:1 Nimwumve iri jambo
Amos5:2 Ngaha araguye umwari wa Siyoni
Amos5:3 Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Umugi wajyaga ujyana abantu igihumbi ku rugamba uzasigarana ijana gusa; naho umugi wajyaga ujyana ijana
Amos5:4 Uhoraho abwiye inzu ya Israheli atya: Nimunshakashake
Amos5:5 ariko ntimunshakashakire i Beteli
Amos5:6 Nimushakashake Uhoraho
Amos5:7 Bariyimbire abahumanyije ubutabera
Amos5:8 Uwaremye urujeje rw’inyenyeri z’ibihangange n’izitwa Oriyoni
Amos5:9 Ni we utuma abanyamaboko bamburwa
Amos5:10 Banga uwibutsa ubutabera mu rukiko
Amos5:11 Ubwo rero muryamira umutindi mukamutwara umugabane we w’ingano
Amos5:12 Kuko nzi umubare utabarika w’ibicumuro byanyu
Amos5:13 Ni yo mpamvu umuntu uzi ubwenge yakwicecekera mu gihe nk’iki
Amos5:14 Nimushake ikiri icyiza
Amos5:15 Nimwange ikibi
Amos5:16 Uhoraho
Amos5:17 Mu mizabibu yose hazaba icyunamo igihe nzanyura muri mwe rwagati. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.
Amos5:18 Bariyimbire abarambirije ku munsi Uhoraho azaziraho! Bimaze iki? Umunsi w’Uhoraho uzaba umeze ute ku bwanyu? Uzaba ari umunsi w’umwijima
Amos5:19 Ni nk’umuntu uhunze intare
Amos5:20 Si byo se
Amos5:21 Nanga urunuka kandi nkagaya ingendo mukora muje kundamya
Amos5:22 igihe muntura ibitambo bitwikwa
Amos5:23 Igiza kure urusaku rw’indirimbo zawe
Amos5:24 Ahubwo uburenganzira nibudendeze nk’amazi
Amos5:25 Hari ubwo se mwigeze kuntura ibitambo n’amaturo mu butayu
Amos5:26 Ahubwo muzaheka Sakuti umwami wanyu
Amos5:27 Nzabajyana bunyago mbarenze Damasi! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze
Amos6:1 Bariyimbire abatengamaye bo muri Siyoni
Amos6:2 Nimugere i Kaline maze mwitegereze
Amos6:3 Mushaka guhigika umunsi w’amagorwa
Amos6:4 Ngabo baryamye ku mariri akoze mu mahembe y’inzovu
Amos6:5 baregura inanga bagapfa gucuranga
Amos6:6 bakanywera divayi mu bikombe
Amos6:7 Ni cyo gituma guhera ubu bagiye kujyanwa bunyago
Amos6:8 Nyagasani Uhoraho arabirahiye
Amos6:9 Haramutse hagize nk’abantu icumi bacika ku icumu mu nzu imwe
Amos6:10 Hazasigara abantu mbarwa bo guhamba bene wabo. Nihagira uwiyambaza usigaye mu nzu ati «Nta muntu musigaranye aho mu nzu?» undi amusubize ati «Nta we usigaye». Nta muntu uzasigara
Amos6:11 Ni koko
Amos6:12 Hari ubwo se amafarasi yiruka mu mabuye ashinyitse? Hari ubwo se bahingisha inyanja ibimasa
Amos6:13 Murishimira ko mwigaruriye umugi wa Lodebari
Amos6:14 Ngaha rero
Amos7:1 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: yoherezaga inzige igihe ubwatsi bwabaga butangiye kumera — ndashaka kuvuga ubwatsi butoha nyuma y’umuganura wagenewe umwami —
Amos7:2 mbonye izo nzige zimaze gutsemba ibyatsi byose byo mu gihugu
Amos7:3 Uhoraho yisubiraho
Amos7:4 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: Nyagasani Uhoraho yitabaje umuriro ngo ace urubanza
Amos7:5 Ni ko kuvuga nti «Uhoraho Mana yanjye
Amos7:6 Nya gasani Uhoraho yisubiraho
Amos7:7 Dore ibyo Nyagasani yanyeretse: yari ahagaze iruhande rw’urukuta
Amos7:8 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Amosi we
Amos7:9 Amasengero y’ahirengeye ya Izaki azahinduka amatongo
Amos7:10 Amasiya
Amos7:11 Kuko avuga ngo: Yerobowamu azazira inkota
Amos7:12 Amasiya ni ko kubwira Amosi ati «Ngaho genda
Amos7:13 Naho hano i Beteli ntuzongere kuhahanurira kuko ari ingoro y’umwami
Amos7:14 Amosi asubiza Amasiya
Amos7:15 Nyamara Uhoraho yankuye inyuma y’amatungo
Amos7:16 Ubu ngubu umva ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Amos7:17 Uhoraho rero avuze atya: ’Umugore wawe azigira ihabara mu mugi
Amos8:1 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: yanyeretse igitebo cyuzuye imbuto zeze impeshyi igiye kurangira.
Amos8:2 Nuko arambwira ati «Amosi
Amos8:3 Uwo munsi mu ngoro bazaririmba indirimbo z’amaganya
Amos8:4 Nimwumve ibi ngibi
Amos8:5 muvuga ngo «Mbese imboneka z’ukwezi zizarangira ryari
Amos8:6 abatindi tubagure amafeza
Amos8:7 Uhoraho abirahije ikuzo rya Yakobo
Amos8:8 Ibyo se ntibigiye gutuma isi ihinda umushyitsi
Amos8:9 Kuri uwo munsi — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze— nzategeka izuba kurenga ku manywa y’ihangu
Amos8:10 Ingendo zanyu zigamije kunsenga nzazihinduramo iminsi y’ibyago
Amos8:11 Ngiyi iminsi iraje — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze— ari yo nzateza ho inzara mu gihugu. Ntizaba inzara yo gusonzera umugati
Amos8:12 Abantu bazajarajara
Amos8:13 Uwo munsi
Amos8:14 abarahiza icyaha cya Samariya bavuga bati «Harakabaho Imana yawe

Amos9:2 Nibanarwanira kujya iku zimu

Amos9:7 Ku bwanjye

Amos9:14 Nzagarura umuryango wanjye Israheli
Amos9:15 nzabagarura iwabo bakomere
Obadiah1:1 Ibonekerwa rya Obadiya. Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya kuri Edomu: Twumvise ubutumwa buturutse kuri Uhoraho
Obadiah1:2 Dore ngiye kugucisha bugufi rwagati mu mahanga
Obadiah1:3 Ubwibone bwawe bwarakuyobeje
Obadiah1:4 N’aho waba watumbagiye mu kirere nka kagoma
Obadiah1:5 Mbese abajura n’abasahuzi ba nijoro baje iwawe
Obadiah1:6 Bene Ezawu mwe
Obadiah1:7 Abanywanyi bawe baragushutse
Obadiah1:8 Koko
Obadiah1:9 Temani nawe
Obadiah1:10 Urugomo n’ubwicanyi wagiriye umuvandimwe wawe Yakobo
Obadiah1:11 Umunsi wari wiheje uhagaze ahitaruye
Obadiah1:12 Ntukanezezwe no kubona umuvandimwe wawe
Obadiah1:13 Ntukinjire mu marembo y’umugi w’umuryango wanjye
Obadiah1:14 Ntugahagarare mu mayirabiri ngo ubone uko utsemba abawo bahunga! Ntugatange abawo bacitse ku icumu ku munsi w’akababaro!
Obadiah1:15 Ni koko
Obadiah1:16 Koko rero
Obadiah1:17 Nyamara abacitse ku icumu bazakoranira ku musozi wa Siyoni
Obadiah1:18 Nuko bene Yakobo bazahinduke nk’umuriro
Obadiah1:19 Ab’i Negevu bazigarurira umusozi wa Ezawu; abo mu karere k’imirambi bigarurire igihugu cy’Abafilisiti
Obadiah1:20 Abajyanywe bunyago mu Bayisraheli bazaba baremye icyo gitero: bazanyaga igihugu cy’Abakanahani kugera i Sareputa
Obadiah1:21 Abazaba batsinze bazazamuka umusozi wa Siyoni
Jonah1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Yonasi
Jonah1:2 «Haguruka ujye i Ninivi
Jonah1:3 Yonasi ashyira nzira
Jonah1:4 Nuko Uhoraho ateza inkubi y’umuyaga mu nyanja maze inyanja igira umuhengeri ukabije
Jonah1:5 Abasare bashya ubwoba
Jonah1:6 Umukuru w’abasare aramwegera
Jonah1:7 Nuko barabwirana bati «Nimuze dukoreshe ubufindo
Jonah1:8 Baramubwira bati «Ngaho tubwire ikikugenza! Uraturuka he? Iwanyu ni he? Mbese mu bwoko uri umuki?»
Jonah1:9 Arabasubiza ati «Ndi Umuhebureyi
Jonah1:10 Ba bantu bagira ubwoba bwinshi
Jonah1:11 Baramubwira bati «Tukugenze dute kugira ngo inyanja itworohere?» Kuko inyanja yagendaga irushaho kwicunda.
Jonah1:12 Arabasubiza ati «Nimunterure munjugunye mu nyanja
Jonah1:13 Ba bantu baragashya bagira ngo bashyikire inkombe
Jonah1:14 Ni ko kwambaza Uhoraho
Jonah1:15 Nuko bajuguta Yonasi bamujugunya mu nyanja
Jonah1:16 Ba bantu bagirira Uhoraho igitinyiro cyinshi. Bamutura igitambo kandi bamugirira amasezerano.
Jonah2:1 Uhoraho ategeka ifi nini kumira Yonasi. Yonasi amara mu nda y’ifi iminsi itatu n’amajoro atatu.
Jonah2:2 Aho yari aho mu nda y’ifi
Jonah2:3 «Ubwo nari mu kaga natakiye Uhoraho maze aransubiza. Ubwo nari ikuzimu narahamagaye
Jonah2:4 Wari waranjugunye mu ndiba y’inyanja
Jonah2:5 Nanjye nkavuga nti ’Nciwe mu maso yawe; nzongera kureba nte Ingoro yawe ntagatifu?’
Jonah2:6 Amazi yaramize ngerwa mu mihogo
Jonah2:7 Nagarukiye aho imisozi itewe inkingi
Jonah2:8 Igihe nari nihebye
Jonah2:9 Abibeshya bakiringira ibitagira shinge
Jonah2:10 Jyewe nzagutura igitambo
Jonah2:11 Uhoraho ategeka ifi

Jonah4:2 Yambaza Uhoraho

Nahum1:1 Ibyahanuwe kuri Ninivi. Ngiki igitabo cy’ibyahishuriwe Nahumu w’i Elikoshi.
Nahum1:2 Uhoraho ni Imana ifuha kandi ikihorera
Nahum1:3 Uhoraho atinda kurakara
Nahum1:4 Acyaha inyanja akayumutsa
Nahum1:5 Imisozi irahinda umushyitsi imbere ye
Nahum1:6 Ni nde wahangana n’ubukana bwe
Nahum1:7 Uhoraho ni mwiza
Nahum1:8 ndetse n’iyo haza umuvumba ukabije. Azatsemba abamugomera
Nahum1:9 Mbese Uhoraho
Nahum1:10 Koko bameze nk’amahwa asobekeranye
Nahum1:11 Iwawe habonetse umuntu ugambanira Uhoraho
Nahum1:12 Uhoraho avuze atya: N’ubwo abanzi banyu ari benshi bakagira n’imbaraga
Nahum1:13 Kuva ubu ngiye kujanjagura umutwaro wari ugushikamiye
Nahum1:14 Uhoraho akuvuzeho ibi ngibi: Ntuzongera kugira urubyaro ruzitirirwa izina ryawe; ibigirwamana byawe by’ibibazanyo cyangwa by’ibicurano
Nahum2:1 Ngiyo intumwa itungutse mu mpinga z’imisozi
Nahum2:2 Igitero kiguteye kiguturutse imbere! Rinda ibigo byawe
Nahum2:3 Dore Uhoraho agarukanye ikuzo rya Yakobo
Nahum2:4 Ingabo z’intwari zabo zisize ibara ritukura
Nahum2:5 Mu mayira amagare y’intambara aragenda nk’ayasaze
Nahum2:6 Umwami wa Ninivi ahamagaje abagaba b’ingabo ze
Nahum2:7 Amarembo yerekera ku Ruzi arasunitswe
Nahum2:8 Ishusho ry’imanakazi yabo riramanuwe
Nahum2:9 Kuva kera Ninivi yari nk’ikizenga cy’amazi menshi
Nahum2:10 Nimusahure feza! Musahure na zahabu! Ubukungu bw’aho ntibugira ingano
Nahum2:11 Byose birasenyutse
Nahum2:12 Mbese rya senga ry’intare riri he? Ibyana by’intare ni ho byiberaga
Nahum2:13 Intare yacagaguraga umuhigo ikagaburira ibyana byayo

Nahum3:1 Ugushije ishyano
Nahum3:2 Nimwumve urusaku rw’ikiboko n’urw’inziga zikocagurana
Nahum3:3 Abanyamafarasi biteguye kurasa
Nahum3:4 Ibyo byose ubitewe n’uburaya bwawe bukabije
Nahum3:5 Noneho dore ndakwibasiye
Nahum3:6 Nzakujugunyaho imyanda
Nahum3:7 maze ugukubise amaso wese
Nahum3:8 Waba se hari icyo urusha Tebesi
Nahum3:9 Kushi na Misiri ni byo wishingikirizaga buri gihe
Nahum3:10 Nyamara abaturage bawo barafashwe
Nahum3:11 Nawe rero uramukiwe no gusinda ukarohama! Uzahatirwa gushakira hose ubuhungiro kugira ngo ucike umwanzi!
Nahum3:12 Ibigo byawe bikomeye byose bimeze nk’imitini iriho imbuto zihishije; iyo bayinyeganyeje na gatoya

Malachi1:1 Dore ubutumwa Uhoraho yoherereje Abayisraheli

Malachi1:14 Arakaba ikivume

Matthew8:12 naho abana b’Ingoma bazatabwa hanze mu mwijima: aho bazaririra kandi bagahekenya amenyo.»
Matthew8:13 Hanyuma Yezu abwira uwo mutegeka w’abasirikare
Matthew8:14 Yezu ngo agere kwa Petero
Matthew8:15 Amukoze ku kiganza
Matthew8:16 Bugorobye

Matthew8:19 Umwigishamategeko aramwegera ati «Mwigisha

Matthew8:23 Yezu aherekejwe n’abigishwa be
Matthew8:24 Ni bwo habyutse umuhengeri mwinshi mu nyanja
Matthew8:25 Baramwegera baramukangura

Matthew8:29 Nuko barasakuza bati «Uradushakaho iki
Matthew8:30 Hirya y’aho rero hakaba umukumbi w’ingurube zarishaga.

Matthew12:33 Niba mufite igiti cyiza
Matthew12:34 Mwa nyoko mbi z’impiri mwe

Matthew13:2 Abantu benshi bamuteranira iruhande
Matthew13:3 Ababwirira byinshi mu migani

Matthew13:6 izuba rivuye zirashya
Matthew13:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa

Matthew13:22 Naho imbuto ibibwe mu mahwa
Matthew13:23 Hanyuma imbuto ibibwe mu gitaka cyiza

Matthew13:25 Ariko igihe abantu basinziriye

Matthew13:27 Abagaragu basanga nyir’umurima

Matthew13:32 Ni yo ntoya mu mbuto zose

Matthew13:34 Ibyo byose Yezu yabibwiraga rubanda mu migani
Matthew13:35 bityo huzuzwa ibyo umuhanuzi yavuze ati «Umunwa wanjye uzavuga mu migani
Matthew13:36 Hanyuma asiga aho rubanda
Matthew13:37 Arabasubiza ati «Ubiba imbuto nziza ni Umwana w’umuntu;
Matthew13:38 umurima ni isi; imbuto nziza ni abana b’Ingoma; urumamfu ni abana ba Nyakibi;
Matthew13:39 umwanzi warubibye ni Sekibi; isarura ni iherezo ry’isi; abasaruzi ni abamalayika.
Matthew13:40 Nk’uko rero batoranya urumamfu
Matthew13:41 Umwana w’umuntu azohereza abamalayika be
Matthew13:42 maze babarohe mu nyenga y’umuriro
Matthew13:43 Ubwo intungane zizabengerana nk’izuba mu Ngoma ya Se. Ufite amatwi
Matthew13:44 Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’ikintu cy’agaciro gakomeye gihishe mu murima; umuntu iyo akiguyeho
Matthew13:45 Byongeye kandi Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’umucuruzi washakashakaga amasaro meza.
Matthew13:46 Yabona isaro rimwe ry’agaciro kanini
Matthew13:47 Byongeye kandi Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’urushundura banaze mu nyanja
Matthew13:48 Iyo rwuzuye
Matthew13:49 Ni ko bizamera mu iherezo ry’isi: abamalayika bazaza batandukanye intungane n’abagome.
Matthew13:50 Maze bo babarohe mu nyenga y’umuriro; aho bazaririra kandi bagahekenya amenyo.
Matthew13:51 Ibyo byose mwabyumvise?» Bati «Yee.»
Matthew13:52 Arongera ati «Ni cyo gituma umwigishamategeko wese
Matthew13:53 Yezu arangije iyo migani

Matthew13:56 Bashiki be bose ntiduturanye? None se biriya byose abikomora he?»

Matthew15:8 ’Uyu muryango unyubahisha ururimi gusa
Matthew15:9 Icyubahiro bampa ni amanjwe: inyigisho bigisha ni amategeko y’abantu gusa.’»

Matthew15:17 Ntimwumva se ko igishyirwa mu kanwa cyose
Matthew15:18 naho ibiva mu kanwa bituruka mu mutima akaba ari byo bihumanya umuntu?
Matthew15:19 Koko rero
Matthew15:20 Ngibyo ibyanduza umuntu; naho kurya udakarabye si byo bihumanya umuntu.»

Matthew15:35 Nuko ategeka rubanda kwicara hasi.
Matthew15:36 Hanyuma afata ya migati irindwi na ya mafi
Matthew15:37 Bose bararya barahaga. Nyuma bakoranya ibisate bisigaye
Matthew15:38 Nyamara abariye bari ibihumbi bine

Matthew16:1 Nuko Abafarizayi n’Abasaduseyi baramusanga
Matthew16:2 Arabasubiza ati «Ku mugoroba
Matthew16:3 no mu museke
Matthew16:4 Iki gisekuru kibi kandi cy’abasambanyi kirashaka ikimenyetso! Ariko nta kindi kimenyetso bazabona
Matthew16:5 Igihe bambukaga ngo bafate hakurya
Matthew16:6 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Murabe maso kandi mwirinde umusemburo w’Abafarizayi n’uw’Abasaduseyi.»
Matthew16:7 Naho bo mu mutima baribwira bati «Ni uko tutazanye imigati.»
Matthew16:8 Yezu arabimenya
Matthew16:9 Ntimurasobanukirwa? Ntimwibuka se ya migati itanu yahagije abantu ibihumbi bitanu
Matthew16:10 Ntimwibuka se ya migati irindwi yahagije abantu ibihumbi bine
Matthew16:11 Ni iki gituma mutumva ko atari imigati navugaga
Matthew16:12 Nuko bumva ko atari yababwiye kwirinda umusemburo w’imigati
Matthew16:13 Yezu ageze mu gihugu cya Kayizareya ya Filipo
Matthew16:14 Baramusubiza bati «Bamwe bavuga ko ari Yohani Batisita
Matthew16:15 Yongera kubabaza ati «Mwebwe se
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati «Wowe uri Kristu
Matthew16:17 Yezu amusubiza
Matthew16:18 Noneho nkubwiye ko uri Urutare
Matthew16:19 Nzaguha imfunguzo z’Ingoma y’ijuru: icyo uzaba waboshye mu nsi
Matthew16:20 Hanyuma yihanangiriza abigishwa kutagira uwo babwira ko ari Kristu.
Matthew16:21 Kuva ubwo Yezu atangira kumenyesha abigishwa be ko agomba kujya i Yeruzalemu kuhababarizwa cyane n’abakuru b’imiryango
Matthew16:22 Petero aramwihugikana
Matthew16:23 Ariko we ahindukirana Petero
Matthew16:24 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be
Matthew16:25 Kuko uzashaka gukiza ubugingo bwe
Matthew16:26 Umuntu watunga isi yose
Matthew16:27 Kandi Umwana w’umuntu agomba kuzagaruka mu ikuzo rya Se
Matthew16:28 Ndababwira ukuri: mu bari hano harimo abatazapfa batabonye Umwana w’umuntu aje mu ikuzo ry’Ingoma ye.»
Matthew17:1 Hashize iminsi itandatu

Matthew17:15 «Nyagasani

Matthew18:1 Icyo gihe abigishwa begera Yezu
Matthew18:2 Ahamagara umwana muto
Matthew18:3 nuko aravuga ati «Ndababwira ukuri: nimudahinduka ngo mumere nk’abana
Matthew18:4 Uwicisha bugufi wese nk’uyu mwana
Matthew18:5 Uwakira neza umwana nk’uyu ari jye agirira
Matthew18:6 Ariko nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri bene aba bato banyemera
Matthew18:7 Isi iragowe kubera ibibi byayo bigusha abantu mu byaha! Kubuza ibigusha abantu mu byaha ntibishoboka
Matthew18:8 Niba ikiganza cyawe cyangwa ikirenge cyawe bigutera gukora icyaha
Matthew18:9 Ijisho ryawe kandi nirikubera impamvu yo gukora icyaha
Matthew18:10 Mwirinde kugira uwo musuzugura muri abo bato; koko rero ndababwira ko mu ijuru abamalayika babo badahwema kureba uruhanga rwa Data wo mu ijuru.

Matthew18:12 Mwe murabibona mute? Niba umuntu afite intama ijana
Matthew18:13 Kandi iyo ahiriwe akayibona

Matthew18:15 Mugenzi wawe naramuka acumuye

Matthew19:5 kandi ko yavuze ati ’Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina kugira ngo yegukire umugore we
Matthew19:6 Bityo rero ntibaba bakiri babiri
Matthew19:7 Baramubaza bati «Ariko se

Matthew19:10 Abigishwa baramubwira bati «Niba ari uko bimeze ku mugabo n’umugore

Matthew19:19 jya wubaha so na nyoko
Matthew19:20 Uwo musore aramubwira ati «Ibyo byose ko nabikurikije

Matthew19:22 Umusore yumvise iryo jambo

Matthew19:24 Koko nongere mbibabwire: byoroheye ingamiya guca mu mwenge w’urushinge kurusha uko byoroheye umukungu kwinjira mu Ngoma y’ijuru.»

Matthew20:1 Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nka nyir’umurima wazindutse mu museke
Matthew20:2 Amaze gusezerana n’abakozi idenari imwe ku munsi

Matthew20:6 Yongera kugenda ku isaha ya cumi n’imwe
