Matthew25:2 Batanu muri bo bari abapfayongo
Matthew25:3 Abakobwa b’abapfayongo bafata amatara yabo
Matthew25:4 naho abanyamutima bafata amatara hamwe n’amavuta mu tweso.
Matthew25:5 Nuko rero umukwe atinze
Matthew25:6 Ariko mu gicuku akamu karavuga ngo ’Dore umukwe araje
Matthew25:7 Nuko ba bakobwa bose barabaduka
Matthew25:8 Ab’abapfayongo babwira ab’abanyamutima bati ’Nimuduhe ku mavuta yanyu
Matthew25:9 Ariko abanyamutima barabasubiza bati ’Ahubwo nimugane abacuruzi
Matthew25:10 Igihe bagiye kuyagura
Matthew25:11 Hanyuma ba bakobwa bandi baraza
Matthew25:12 We rero arabasubiza ati ’Ndababwira ukuri: simbazi!’
Matthew25:13 Nuko rero
Matthew25:14 Koko
Matthew25:15 Umwe amuha amatalenta atanu
Matthew25:16 Ako kanya uwari wahawe amatalenta atanu ajya kuyakoresha maze yunguka andi atanu.
Matthew25:17 Uwari wahawe abiri na we
Matthew25:18 Naho uwari wahawe imwe
Matthew25:19 Hashize igihe kirekire
Matthew25:20 Uwahawe amatalenta atanu aregera maze amuhereza amatalenta atanu yandi
Matthew25:21 Shebuja aramubwira ati ’Ni uko
Matthew25:22 Uwahawe amatalenta abiri
Matthew25:23 Shebuja aramubwira ati ’Ni uko
Matthew25:24 Haza uwahawe talenta imwe
Matthew25:25 Naratinye
Matthew25:26 Naho shebuja aramusubiza ati ’Mugaragu mubi kandi w’umunebwe
Matthew25:27 uba rero warabikije imari yanjye abari kunyungukira
Matthew25:28 Nimumwambure talenta ye maze muyihe ufite amatalenta cumi;
Matthew25:29 kuko utunze bazamuha agakungahara; naho udafite na mba bazamwaka n’utwo yaganyiragaho.
Matthew25:30 Naho uwo mugaragu w’imburamumaro nimumujugunye hanze
Matthew25:31 Igihe Umwana w’umuntu azaza yuje ikuzo
Matthew25:32 Ibihugu byose bizakoranyirizwe imbere ye
Matthew25:33 Azashyira intama iburyo bwe
Matthew25:34 Nuko rero Umwami azabwire abari iburyo bwe
Matthew25:35 kuko nashonje mukamfungurira; nagize inyota mumpa icyo kunywa; naje ndi umugenzi murancumbikira;
Matthew25:36 nari nambaye ubusa muranyambika; nari ndwaye muransura; nari imbohe muza kundeba.’
Matthew25:37 Nuko intungane zizamusubize ziti ’Nyagasani
Matthew25:38 uri umugenzi turagucumbikira; wambaye ubusa turakwambika;
Matthew25:39 urwaye cyangwa se uri imbohe tuza kukureba?’
Matthew25:40 Nuko Umwami azabasubize
Matthew25:41 Hanyuma azabwire n’ab’ibumoso
Matthew25:42 kuko nashonje ntimwamfungurira; nagize inyota ntimwampa icyo nywa;
Matthew25:43 naje ndi umugenzi ntimwancumbikira; nari nambaye ubusa ntimwanyambika; nari ndwaye cyangwa ndi imbohe ntimwaza kunsura.’
Matthew25:44 Nuko abo na bo bazamubaze bati ’Nyagasani
Matthew25:45 Nuko azabasubize
Matthew25:46 Maze abo bazajye mu bubabare bw’iteka
Matthew26:1 Yezu arangije izo nyigisho zose
Matthew26:2 «Muzi ko Pasika izaba mu minsi ibiri
Matthew26:3 Nuko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bakoranira mu ngoro y’umuherezabitambo mukuru witwaga Kayifa
Matthew26:4 kugira ngo bajye inama yo gufata Yezu ku mayeri
Matthew26:5 Icyakora baravugaga bati «Ntibizabe ku munsi mukuru
Matthew26:6 Igihe Yezu yari i Betaniya kwa Simoni umubembe
Matthew26:7 umugore aza amusanga
Matthew26:8 Abigishwa babibonye
Matthew26:9 Uwo mubavu wari kugurwa byinshi bigahabwa abakene!»
Matthew26:10 Yezu arababwira ati «Uwo mugore muramutonganyiriza iki? Dore ibyo amaze kungirira ni byiza.
Matthew26:11 Abakene muzabahorana iteka
Matthew26:12 Kuba asize uyu mubavu umubiri wanjye
Matthew26:13 Ndababwira ukuri: aho iyi Nkuru Nziza izamamazwa hose
Matthew26:14 Nuko umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri witwaga Yuda Isikariyoti
Matthew26:15 arababwira ati «Murampa iki
Matthew26:16 Kuva icyo gihe atangira gushaka uburyo buboneye bwo kumutanga.
Matthew26:17 Umunsi wa mbere wo kurya Imigati idasembuye
Matthew26:18 Ati «Nimujye mu murwa kwa kanaka
Matthew26:19 Abigishwa babigenza uko Yezu yabategetse
Matthew26:20 Bugorobye
Matthew26:21 Nuko rero igihe bafungura
Matthew26:22 Birabababaza cyane
Matthew26:23 Arabasubiza ati «Uwo duhurije intoki ku mbehe
Matthew26:24 Koko Umwana w’umuntu aragiye nk’uko Ibyanditswe bimuvuga! Ariko rero hagowe uwo muntu wemeye kugambanira Umwana w’umuntu; icyari kuba cyiza ni uko uwo muntu aba ataravutse!»
Matthew26:25 Yuda umugambanyi na we aramubaza
Matthew26:26 Nuko bafungura
Matthew26:27 Arongera afata n’inkongoro
Matthew26:28 kuko iki ari amaraso yanjye
Matthew26:29 Ndabibabwiye
Matthew26:30 Bamaze kuririmba zaburi
Matthew26:31 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Iri joro
Matthew26:32 Ariko nimara kuzuka
Matthew26:33 Petero asubiza
Matthew26:34 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ndakubwira ukuri: iri joro
Matthew26:35 Petero aramusubiza ati «N’aho nagomba gupfana nawe
Matthew26:36 Nuko Yezu ajyana na bo ahantu hitwa Getsemani maze abwira abigishwa be
Matthew26:37 Ajyana na Petero na bene Zebedeyi bombi
Matthew26:38 Nuko arababwira ati «Umutima wanjye urashavuye byo gupfa; nimugume aha
Matthew26:39 Hanyuma yigira imbere gato
Matthew26:40 Agaruka ku bigishwa be
Matthew26:41 Nimube maso kandi mwambaze
Matthew26:42 Arongera ajya kwambaza ubwa kabiri
Matthew26:43 Hanyuma agarutse
Matthew26:44 Arabihorera
Matthew26:45 Hanyuma asanga abigishwa be
Matthew26:46 Nimuhaguruke
Matthew26:47 Akivuga ibyo
Matthew26:48 Umugambanyi yari yabahaye iki kimenyetso
Matthew26:49 Maze ako kanya yegera Yezu
Matthew26:50 Naho Yezu aramubwira ati «Ncuti
Matthew26:51 Ni bwo umwe mu bari kumwe na Yezu akuye inkota ye
Matthew26:52 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati «Subiza inkota yawe mu rwubati
Matthew26:53 Ubona ko ntashobora gutabaza Data akampa muri aka kanya imitwe irenze cumi n’ibiri y’abamalayika?
Matthew26:54 Ariko se Ibyanditswe ko ari uko bigomba kumera byazarangira bite?»
Matthew26:55 Ubwo nyine Yezu abwira rubanda
Matthew26:56 Ariko ibyo byose byabereye kugira ngo ibyanditswe n’Abahanuzi byuzuzwe.» Nuko abigishwa baramutererana
Matthew26:57 Abari bafashe Yezu bamujyana kwa Kayifa
Matthew26:58 Petero yari yamukurikiye yitaruye kugera ku ngoro y’umuherezabitambo mukuru
Matthew26:59 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Inama Nkuru yose bashakaga ibyo bahimbira Yezu ngo bamwicishe.
Matthew26:60 Ariko ntibabibona
Matthew26:61 bati «Uyu muntu yaravuze
Matthew26:62 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru arahaguruka
Matthew26:63 Ariko Yezu aricecekera. Umuherezabitambo mukuru aramubwira ati «Nkurahije Imana ihoraho
Matthew26:64 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Wabyivugiye. Byongeye kandi
Matthew26:65 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru ashishimura imyambaro ye
Matthew26:66 Murabibona mute?» Baramusubiza bati «Akwiye urupfu!»
Matthew26:67 Nuko bamucira mu maso
Matthew26:68 bavuga bati «Umva ko uri Kristu
Matthew26:69 Naho ubwo Petero yari yicaye hanze mu rugo. Umuja aregera
Matthew26:70 Ariko we ahakanira imbere ya bose
Matthew26:71 Igihe yerekeye ku irembo
Matthew26:72 Nuko yongera kubihakanisha indahiro
Matthew26:73 Bimaze akanya
Matthew26:74 Noneho atangira gutukana no gucurikiranya indahiro
Matthew26:75 Nuko Petero yibuka ijambo Yezu yari yamubwiye
Matthew27:1 Igitondo gitangaje
Matthew27:2 Bamaze kumuboha baramushorera
Matthew27:3 Nuko Yuda wari wamugambaniye abonye ko bamuciriye urubanza rwo gupfa
Matthew27:4 «Nacumuye
Matthew27:5 Nuko bya biceri abijugunya imbere y’Ingoro
Matthew27:6 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo bafata bya biceri
Matthew27:7 Nuko
Matthew27:8 Ni cyo gituma uwo murima witwa «umurima w’amaraso»
Matthew27:9 Nuko huzuzwa ibyo umuhanuzi Yeremiya yavuze
Matthew27:10 kandi babitanga ku murima w’umubumbyi
Matthew27:11 Yezu ajyanwa imbere y’umutware mukuru w’igihugu. Umutware aramubaza ati «Ni wowe Mwami w’Abayahudi?» Yezu aravuga ati «Urabyivugiye.»
Matthew27:12 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bamurega byinshi
Matthew27:13 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati «Ntiwumva ibyo byose bagushinja?»
Matthew27:14 Nuko ntiyagira ijambo na rimwe amusubiza
Matthew27:15 Buri munsi mukuru Umutware yari yaramenyereye kurekurira rubanda imfungwa imwe bishakiye.
Matthew27:16 Ubwo hari imfungwa y’igihangange yitwaga Barabasi.
Matthew27:17 Pilato abwira rubanda rwakoranye ati «Uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni nde
Matthew27:18 Nyamara yari azi ko bamutanze babitewe n’ishyari.
Matthew27:19 Mu gihe yari yicaye mu rukiko aca urubanza
Matthew27:20 Ariko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bemeza rubanda ko basaba Barabasi
Matthew27:21 Nuko rero Umutware yongera kubabaza ati «Muri abo bombi uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni uwuhe?» Baramusubiza bati «Barabasi!»
Matthew27:22 Pilato arababwira ati «Naho se Yezu bita Kristu
Matthew27:23 We
Matthew27:24 Nuko Pilato abonye ko nta cyo byunguye
Matthew27:25 Rubanda rwose rurasubiza ruti «Amaraso ye araduhame
Matthew27:26 Nuko abarekurira Barabasi; naho Yezu
Matthew27:27 Nuko abasirikare b’Umutware mukuru bajyana Yezu mu gikari cy’ingoro ye
Matthew27:28 Baramwambura
Matthew27:29 hanyuma baboha ikamba ry’amahwa
Matthew27:30 Nuko bakamuvunderezaho amacandwe
Matthew27:31 Bamaze kumukwena
Matthew27:32 Basohotse bahura n’Umunyasireni witwa Simoni
Matthew27:33 Bageze ahantu hitwa Gologota
Matthew27:34 bamuha divayi ivanze n’indurwe ngo anywe; asomyeho yanga kuyinywa.
Matthew27:35 Bamaze kumubamba ku musaraba bigabanya imyambaro ye bakoresheje ubufindo.
Matthew27:36 Nuko bicara aho baramurinda.
Matthew27:37 Hejuru y’umutwe we bahashyira urubaho rwanditseho icyo azize
Matthew27:38 Icyo gihe hari ibisambo bibiri byari bibambanywe na we
Matthew27:39 Abahisi bakamutuka bazunguza umutwe
Matthew27:40 bavuga bati «Wowe usenya Ingoro y’Imana
Matthew27:41 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo na bo bakamuseka
Matthew27:42 «Yakijije abandi
Matthew27:43 Yiringiye Imana; nimukize rero ubu niba imukunze! Kuko yavuze ati ’Ndi Umwana w’Imana.’»
Matthew27:44 N’abambuzi babambanywe na we bakamukwena batyo.
Matthew27:45 Kuva ku isaha ya gatandatu kugeza ku isaha ya cyenda hacura umwijima ku isi yose.
Matthew27:46 Ahagana ku isaha ya cyenda
Matthew27:47 Bamwe mu bari aho bamwumvise
Matthew27:48 Ako kanya umwe muri bo yiruka ajya gufata icyangwe
Matthew27:49 Ariko abandi baramubwira bati «Reka turebe niba Eliya aza kumukiza!»
Matthew27:50 Yezu yongera kurangurura ijwi cyane
Matthew27:51 Ni bwo umubambiko wo mu Ngoro y’Imana utanyutsemo kabiri
Matthew27:52 Imva zirakinguka
Matthew27:53 Yezu amaze kuzuka
Matthew27:54 Umutegeka hamwe n’abasirikare be barindanaga Yezu
Matthew27:55 Aho hari abagore benshi bareberaga kure; abo ni abari barakurikiye Yezu kuva mu Galileya bamukorera.
Matthew27:56 Barimo Mariya Madalena
Matthew27:57 Bugorobye
Matthew27:58 Asanga Pilato
Matthew27:59 Yozefu ajyana umurambo wa Yezu
Matthew27:60 maze awurambika mu mva nshya yari yaricukuriye mu rutare
Matthew27:61 Aho hari Mariya Madalena na Mariya wundi bicaye imbere y’imva.
Matthew27:62 Umunsi w’umwiteguro w’isabato urangiye
Matthew27:63 baramubwira bati «Mutegetsi
Matthew27:64 Nuko rero
Matthew27:65 Pilato arabasubiza ati «Dore abarinzi; nimugende
Matthew27:66 Nuko rero baragenda
Matthew28:1 Isabato irangiye
Matthew28:2 Ubwo isi ihinda umushyitsi mwinshi; umumalayika wa Nyagasani amanuka mu ijuru aregera
Matthew28:3 Yari ameze nk’umurabyo
Matthew28:4 Abarinzi bamurabutswe bakuka umutima
Matthew28:5 Ariko wa mumalayika araterura
Matthew28:6 Ntari hano
Matthew28:7 None rero
Matthew28:8 Ubwo abagore bava ku mva bafite ubwoba buvanze n’ibyishimo byinshi
Matthew28:9 Ni bwo Yezu ahuye na bo ati «Nimugire amahoro!» Baramwegera
Matthew28:10 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Mwitinya! Ahubwo nimugende mubwire abavandimwe banjye bajye mu Galileya; ni ho bazambonera.»
Matthew28:11 Abagore bakiri mu nzira
Matthew28:12 Ni bwo bateraniye hamwe n’abakuru b’umuryango; nuko bajya inama; baha abo basirikare amafaranga menshi
Matthew28:13 babihanangiriza bati «Muvuge ko abigishwa be baje nijoro
Matthew28:14 Umutware w’igihugu nabyumva
Matthew28:15 Bamaze gushyikira amafaranga bagenza uko bari babwirijwe. Nuko iyo nkuru yogera mu Bayahudi kugeza na n’ubu.
Matthew28:16 Nuko abigishwa cumi n’umwe bajya mu Galileya ku musozi Yezu yari yarabarangiye.
Matthew28:17 Bamubonye barapfukama
Matthew28:18 Yezu arabegera
Matthew28:19 Nuko rero
Matthew28:20 mubatoze gukurikiza ibyo nabategetse byose. Dore kandi ndi kumwe namwe iminsi yose
Mark1:1 Intangiriro y’Inkuru Nziza ya Yezu Kristu
Mark1:2 Mu gitabo cya Izayi umuhanuzi
Mark1:3 Ni ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutegure inzira ya Nyagasani
Mark1:4 Nuko Yohani Batisita atunguka mu butayu yamamaza mu bantu batisimu yo kwisubiraho kugira ngo bakire ibyaha.
Mark1:5 Maze intara yose ya Yudeya ikagenda imugana
Mark1:6 Yohani yambaraga umwenda uboheshejwe ubwoya bw’ingamiya
Mark1:7 Yamamazaga avuga ati «Uje ankurikiye andusha ububasha; sinkwiye no kunama ngo mfundure udushumi tw’inkweto ze.
Mark1:8 Jyewe nababatirishije amazi
Mark1:9 Muri iyo minsi Yezu ava i Nazareti ho muri Galileya
Mark1:10 Akiva mu mazi
Mark1:11 Nuko ijwi rituruka mu ijuru
Mark1:12 Ako kanya Roho Mutagatifu amuganisha mu butayu.
Mark1:13 Ahamara iminsi mirongo ine
Mark1:14 Yohani amaze gutangwa
Mark1:15 «Igihe kirageze
Mark1:16 Uko yagendaga akikiye inyanja ya Galileya
Mark1:17 Yezu arababwira ati «Nimunkurikire
Mark1:18 Ako kanya basiga aho inshundura zabo
Mark1:19 Yigiye imbere gatoya
Mark1:20 Ako kanya arabahamagara. Nuko basiga se Zebedeyi mu bwato
Mark1:21 Bagera i Kafarinawumu. Nuko ku munsi w’isabato
Mark1:22 Batangariraga inyigisho ze
Mark1:23 Ubwo nyine mu isengero ryabo hakaba umuntu wahanzweho na roho mbi. Nuko itera hejuru iti
Mark1:24 «Uradushakaho iki
Mark1:25 Yezu ayibwira ayikangara
Mark1:26 Nuko iyo roho mbi iramutigisa cyane
Mark1:27 Bose barumirwa
Mark1:28 Nuko bidatinze
Mark1:29 Bakiva mu isengero
Mark1:30 Ubwo rero nyirabukwe wa Simoni yari aryamye
Mark1:31 Ni ko kumwegera
Mark1:32 Bugorobye
Mark1:33 mbese umugi wose ukoranira imbere y’umuryango.
Mark1:34 Nuko akiza abarwayi benshi bari bababajwe n’indwara z’amoko menshi
Mark1:35 Bukeye bwaho Yezu abyuka mu rukerera
Mark1:36 Simoni na bagenzi be bajya kumushakashaka.
Mark1:37 Bamubonye
Mark1:38 We rero arabasubiza ati «Nimucyo tujye ahandi
Mark1:39 Nuko azenguruka Galileya yose
Mark1:40 Umubembe aza amugana
Mark1:41 Yezu amugirira impuhwe
Mark1:42 Ako kanya ibibembe bimuvaho
Mark1:43 Yezu aramwihanangiriza
Mark1:44 amubwira ati «Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira
Mark1:45 We ariko
Mark2:1 Hashize iminsi mike
Mark2:2 Abantu benshi barahakoranira
Mark2:3 Haza abantu bamuzaniye ikirema gihetswe mu ngobyi.
Mark2:4 Kuko batashoboraga kukimugezaho
Mark2:5 Yezu abonye ukwemera kwabo
Mark2:6 Ubwo hakaba abigishamategeko bamwe
Mark2:7 «Igituma uriya avuga atyo ni iki? Aratuka Imana. Ni nde ushobora gukiza ibyaha
Mark2:8 Ako kanya Yezu amenya ibitekerezo byabo
Mark2:9 Icyoroshye ni ikihe
Mark2:10 None rero
Mark2:11 «Ndabikubwiye: haguruka
Mark2:12 Ako kanya arahaguruka
Mark2:13 Yezu yongera kugenda akikiye inyanja
Mark2:14 Nuko yihitira
Mark2:15 Igihe Yezu yari ku meza iwe
Mark2:16 Abigishamategeko b’Abafarizayi
Mark2:17 Yezu ngo abyumve
Mark2:18 Umunsi umwe abigishwa ba Yohani n’Abafarizayi bari basibye kurya. Nuko baraza babaza Yezu bati «Ni iki gituma abigishwa ba Yohani n’Abafarizayi basiba kurya
Mark2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Birakwiye se ko abakwe basiba kurya
Mark2:20 Ariko hari igihe umukwe azabavanwamo
Mark2:21 Nta we utera igitambaro gishya ku mwenda ushaje
Mark2:22 Nta n’ushyira divayi nshya mu masaho ashaje
Mark2:23 Umunsi umwe
Mark2:24 Abafarizayi ni ko kumubwira bati «Dore re! Kuki bakora ibibujijwe ku isabato?»
Mark2:25 Arabasubiza ati «Ntimwasomye uko Dawudi yabigenjeje
Mark2:26 N’uko yinjiye mu Ngoro y’Imana mu gihe cy’Abiyatari umuherezabitambo mukuru
Mark2:27 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Isabato ibereyeho umuntu
Mark2:28 Ni cyo gituma Umwana w’umuntu agenga ndetse n’isabato!»
Mark3:1 Nuko yongera kwinjira mu isengero
Mark3:2 Ubwo bagenzuraga Yezu ngo berebe ko amukiza ku munsi w’isabato
Mark3:3 Nuko abwira uwo muntu wari ufite ikiganza cyumiranye
Mark3:4 Maze arababwira ati «Ni iki cyemewe ku munsi w’isabato
Mark3:5 Nuko abararanganyamo amaso arakaye
Mark3:6 Abafarizayi basohotse
Mark3:7 Yezu yigira ku nyanja hamwe n’abigishwa be. Abantu benshi baramukurikira
Mark3:8 n’i Yeruzalemu
Mark3:9 Nuko abwira abigishwa be ngo bamuteganyirize ubwato
Mark3:10 Koko rero yari yarakijije benshi
Mark3:11 Abahanzweho na roho mbi na bo
Mark3:12 We ariko akabihanangiriza cyane
Mark3:13 Hanyuma Yezu azamuka umusozi
Mark3:14 Abashyiraho ari cumi na babiri
Mark3:15 abaha n’ububasha bwo kwirukana roho mbi.
Mark3:16 Abo ni Simoni
Mark3:17 na Yakobo mwene Zebedeyi
Mark3:18 na Andereya
Mark3:19 na Yuda Isikariyoti
Mark3:20 Bageze imuhira
Mark3:21 Nuko bene wabo wa Yezu babyumvise
Mark3:22 N’abigishamategeko bari bavuye i Yeruzalemu baravugaga ngo «Yahanzweho na Belizebuli!» kandi ngo «Umutware wa roho mbi ni we yirukanisha roho mbi!»
Mark3:23 Nuko abakoranyiriza iruhande rwe
Mark3:24 Ingoma yibyayemo amahari ntishobora gukomera.
Mark3:25 N’umuryango wabyaye amahari
Mark3:26 Niba rero Sekibi yirwanya akicamo ibice
Mark3:27 Kandi nta muntu ushobora kwinjira mu nzu y’umunyamaboko ngo asahure ibintu bye
Mark3:28 Ndababwira ukuri
Mark3:29 Nyamara uzaba yaratutse Roho Mutagatifu
Mark3:30 Yezu yababwiye ibyo
Mark3:31 Nyina wa Yezu n’abavandimwe be baraza
Mark3:32 Abantu benshi bakaba bicaye bamukikije. Baramubwira bati «Dore nyoko n’abavandimwe bawe bari hanze baragushaka.»
Mark3:33 Arabasubiza ati «Mama ni nde
Mark3:34 Nuko azengurutsa amaso mu bari bicaye bamukikije
Mark3:35 Umuntu wese ukora icyo Imana ishaka
Mark4:1 Arongera atangira kwigishiriza ku nkombe y’inyanja. Abantu benshi cyane bamuteranira iruhande
Mark4:2 Yabigishaga byinshi avugira mu migani
Mark4:3 «Nimutege amatwi! Umubibyi yavuye iwe ajya kubiba.
Mark4:4 Nuko igihe abiba
Mark4:5 Izindi zigwa mu rubuye
Mark4:6 izuba rivuye zirashya
Mark4:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa
Mark4:8 Naho izindi zose zigwa mu gitaka cyiza
Mark4:9 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati «Ufite amatwi yo kumva
Mark4:10 Igihe bari basigaye bonyine
Mark4:11 Arababwira ati «Mwebweho mwahawe kumenya amabanga y’Ingoma y’Imana
Mark4:12 ’ku buryo bitegereza ariko ntibabone
Mark4:13 Nuko yungamo ati «Nta bwo mwumva uwo mugani! Ubwo se iyindi migani yose
Mark4:14 Umubibyi
Mark4:15 Hari rero abari iruhande rw’inzira aho iryo Jambo ribibwa. Bamara kuryumva
Mark4:16 Abandi ni abakirira imbuto nko mu rubuye; iyo bamaze kumva Ijambo
Mark4:17 ariko ntirishore imizi muri bo
Mark4:18 Abandi ni abakirira imbuto nko mu mahwa: bumva Ijambo
Mark4:19 ariko imihihibikano y’isi
Mark4:20 Naho abakirira imbuto nko mu gitaka cyiza
Mark4:21 Yezu arababaza ati «Harya bazanira itara kugira ngo baryubikeho icyibo cyangwa ngo barishyire mu nsi y’urutara? Si ukugira ngo rishyirwe ku gitereko cyaryo?
Mark4:22 Koko rero
Mark4:23 Ufite amatwi yo kumva
Mark4:24 Arongera aravuga ati «Mwitondere ibyo mwumva. Igipimisho muzageresha
Mark4:25 Kuko ufite byinshi azongererwa
Mark4:26 Na none aravuga ati «Iby’Ingoma y’Imana byagereranywa n’umuntu watera imbuto mu gitaka.
Mark4:27 Yasinzira cyangwa yaba maso
Mark4:28 Igitaka ku bwacyo kibanza kumera ingemwe
Mark4:29 Izo mbuto zamara kwera
Mark4:30 Arongera ati «Iby’Ingoma y’Imana twabigereranya n’iki
Mark4:31 Bimeze nk’imbuto ya sinapisi ibibwa mu gitaka
Mark4:32 ariko yamara kubibwa
Mark4:33 Nguko uko yabigishaga Ijambo ry’Imana
Mark4:34 Kandi ntiyigishaga adaciye imigani
Mark4:35 Uwo munsi nyine
Mark4:36 Nuko basiga rubanda aho
Mark4:37 Ni bwo haje umuhengeri mwinshi
Mark4:38 Yezu we yari ku irango asinziriye ku musego. Bamukangura bamubwira bati
Mark4:39 «Mwigisha
Mark4:40 Hanyuma arababwira ati «Icyabateye ubwo bwoba ni iki? Mbese ntimuragira ukwemera?»
Mark4:41 Bagira ubwoba bwinshi
Mark5:1 Nuko bagera hakurya y’inyanja
Mark5:2 Yezu akiva mu bwato
Mark5:3 Yiberaga mu marimbi
Mark5:4 Kenshi yari yaraboheshejwe n’ingoyi n’iminyururu
Mark5:5 Ijoro n’amanywa yahoraga ari mu marimbi
Mark5:6 Nuko abona Yezu akiri kure
Mark5:7 maze atera hejuru cyane ati «Uranshakaho iki
Mark5:8 Yezu koko yarayibwiraga ati «Roho mbi
Mark5:9 Maze arayibaza ati «Izina ryawe ni irihe?» Iramusubiza iti «Nitwa Gitero
Mark5:10 Nuko iramwinginga cyane ngo atazirukana muri icyo gihugu.
Mark5:11 Kuri uwo musozi hari umukumbi munini w’ingurube zarishaga.
Mark5:12 Nuko roho mbi zinginga Yezu
Mark5:13 Arabizemerera. Nuko roho mbi ziva muri uwo muntu
Mark5:14 Nuko abashumba bazo barahunga
Mark5:15 Basanga Yezu
Mark5:16 Abari babibonye batekerereza abandi ibyabaye ku uwahanzweho
Mark5:17 Binginga Yezu ngo abavire mu gihugu.
Mark5:18 Ngo ajye mu bwato
Mark5:19 Yezu ntiyamwemerera
Mark5:20 Uwo muntu aragenda
Mark5:21 Yezu ngo amare kugera ku nkombe yo hakurya ari mu bwato
Mark5:22 Ubwo rero haza umwe mu batware b’isengero
Mark5:23 amutakambira akomeje ati «Umukobwa wanjye yarembye cyane; ngwino
Mark5:24 Yezu ajyana na we
Mark5:25 Ubwo rero hakaba umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva amaraso
Mark5:26 Yari yarahababariye cyane kubera abavuzi benshi
Mark5:27 Uwo mugore rero yari yarumvise ibyo bavugaga kuri Yezu
Mark5:28 Yaribwiraga ati «Byibuze ninkora ku myambaro ye
Mark5:29 Akiyikoraho
Mark5:30 Ako kanya Yezu yumva ko ububasha bumuvuyemo. Arahindukira abaza ikivunge cy’abantu ati «Ni nde ukoze ku myambaro yanjye?»
Mark5:31 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati «Urabona iki kivunge cy’abantu bakubyiga impande zose
Mark5:32 Nuko areba impande zose ngo amenye uwakoze ibyo.
Mark5:33 Umugore rero wari uzi ibyamubayeho
Mark5:34 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mwana wanjye
Mark5:35 Mu gihe akivuga ibyo
Mark5:36 Yezu aba yabumvise
Mark5:37 Nuko ntiyareka hagira undi umukurikira
Mark5:38 Bageze mu rugo rw’umutware w’isengero
Mark5:39 Ngo yinjire
Mark5:40 Nuko baramuseka. Amaze guheza bose
Mark5:41 Nuko afata umwana ukuboko
Mark5:42 Ako kanya umukobwa arahaguruka
Mark5:43 Abihanangiriza akomeje ngo ntihagire umuntu ubimenya
Mark6:1 Yezu ava aho ngaho
Mark6:2 Isabato igeze
Mark6:3 Uriya si wa mubaji tuzi
Mark6:4 Yezu arababwira ati «Nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurwa
Mark6:5 Ntiyashobora kuhakorera igitangaza na kimwe
Mark6:6 Maze atangazwa no kutemera kwabo. Yazengurukaga insisiro zihegereye yigisha.
Mark6:7 Nuko ahamagara ba bandi Cumi na babiri
Mark6:8 Abategeka kutagira icyo bajyana mu rugendo
Mark6:9 keretse kwambara inkweto z’urugendo. Ati «Ariko ntimwambare amakanzu abiri.»
Mark6:10 Yungamo ati «Urugo muzinjiramo rwose
Mark6:11 Nimugera ahantu ntibabakire kandi ntibabumve
Mark6:12 Nuko baragenda
Mark6:13 Birukana roho mbi nyinshi
Mark6:14 Nuko umwami Herodi yumva bavuga ibya Yezu
Mark6:15 Abandi bakavuga ngo «Ni Eliya.» Abandi kandi ngo «Ni umuhanuzi nk’abandi bahanuzi ba kera.»
Mark6:16 Herodi abyumvise aravuga ati «Ni Yohani
Mark6:17 Koko rero Herodi yari yatumye abantu bo gufata Yohani no kumubohera mu buroko
Mark6:18 Kuko Yohani yari yarabwiye Herodi ati «Ubujijwe gutunga umugore wa murumuna wawe.»
Mark6:19 Herodiya na we yahoraga ahigira Yohani agashaka no kumwicisha
Mark6:20 kubera ko Herodi yatinyaga Yohani bigatuma amurengera
Mark6:21 Nuko haza kuba umunsi mukuru
Mark6:22 Umukobwa wa Herodiya araza arabyina
Mark6:23 Aramurahira ati «Icyo unsaba cyose ndakiguha
Mark6:24 Umukobwa arasohoka abaza nyina ati «Nsabe iki?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Saba umutwe wa Yohani Batisita.»
Mark6:25 Umukobwa agaruka bwangu asanga umwami
Mark6:26 Umwami biramushavuza cyane
Mark6:27 Ako kanya umwami yohereza umwe mu ngabo ze
Mark6:28 Nuko azana umutwe ku mbehe
Mark6:29 Abigishwa ba Yohani babyumvise
Mark6:30 Intumwa zihindukiye
Mark6:31 Nuko arazibwira ati «Nimuze ahitaruye
Mark6:32 Nuko bajya mu bwato bambukira ahantu hadatuwe bagira ngo biherere.
Mark6:33 Abenshi mu bababonye bagenda barabamenya
Mark6:34 Yezu amaze kwambuka abona iyo mbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu
Mark6:35 Umunsi uciye ikibu
Mark6:36 none sezerera aba bantu bajye mu ngo no mu nsisiro za hafi kwigurira ibyo barya.»
Mark6:37 Arabasubiza ati «Nimubahe ibyo kurya mwebwe ubwanyu.» Baramubwira bati «Urashaka ko tujya kugura imigati y’amadenari magana abiri
Mark6:38 Arabasubiza ati «Mufite imigati ingahe? Nimujye kureba.» Babimenye baravuga bati «Dufite itanu
Mark6:39 Nuko abategeka kwicaza bose mu bwatsi butoshye
Mark6:40 Bicara ari inteko z’abantu ijana n’iz’abantu mirongo itanu.
Mark6:41 Amaze gufata ya migati itanu na ya mafi abiri
Mark6:42 Bose bararya barahaga.
Mark6:43 Nuko bakoranya ibisate by’imigati byasigaye n’iby’amafi
Mark6:44 Nyamara abari bariye bari abagabo bageze ku bihumbi bitanu.
Mark6:45 Nuko ako kanya ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato no kumutanga hakurya
Mark6:46 Amaze kubasezerera azamuka umusozi
Mark6:47 Umugoroba ukubye
Mark6:48 Abona abigishwa be bananijwe no kugashya
Mark6:49 Babonye agenda hejuru y’inyanja
Mark6:50 Bose bari bamubonye
Mark6:51 Nuko abasanga mu bwato
Mark6:52 kuko batari bumvise iby’imigati; imitima yabo yari ikinangiye.
Mark6:53 Bamaze kwambuka
Mark6:54 Bakiva mu bwato
Mark6:55 nuko bazenguruka ako karere kose

Mark7:4 n’iyo bavuye mu materaniro

Mark7:7 Icyubahiro bampa ni amanjwe: inyigisho bigisha ni amategeko y’abantu gusa.’
Mark7:8 Murenga ku itegeko ry’Imana

Mark7:13 bityo mukavuguruza ijambo ry’Imana mwitwaza umucokarande. Kandi mukora n’ibindi byinshi bisa n’ibyo.»
Mark7:14 Yongera guhamagara rubanda
Mark7:15 Nta kintu kijya mu muntu giturutse inyuma kimuhumanya

Mark7:22 ubuhabara

Mark7:30 Uwo mugore arataha

Mark7:35 Ako kanya

Mark8:3 Nimbasezerera batariye

Mark8:9 Ubwo kandi bari nk’ibihumbi bine. Nuko Yezu arabasezerera.

Mark9:7 Nuko igicu kirabatwikira
Mark9:8 Ako kanya
Mark9:9 Mu gihe bamanukaga umusozi
Mark9:10 Bakomeza kuzirikana iryo jambo

Mark9:12 Arabasubiza ati «Koko Eliya azabanza aze atunganye byose. Nyamara se kuki byanditswe ngo Umwana w’umuntu azababazwa ku buryo bwinshi kandi asuzugurwe?

Mark9:22 Incuro nyinshi yamuroshye mu muriro no mu mazi kugira ngo imwice; ariko niba hari icyo ushobora
Mark9:23 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ngo niba hari icyo ushobora...? Erega byose bishobokera uwemera!»
Mark9:24 Ako kanya se w’umwana arangurura ijwi ati «Ndemera! Ariko komeza ukwemera kwanjye guke!»

Mark9:30 Bavuye aho ngaho

Mark9:33 Nuko bagera i Kafarinawumu. Bari mu nzu
Mark9:34 Baraceceka
Mark9:35 Amaze kwicara
Mark9:36 Nuko afata umwana
Mark9:37 «Umuntu wese wakira umwana nk’uyu nguyu
Mark9:38 Yohani aramubwira ati «Mwigisha
Mark9:39 Yezu ati «Mwibimubuza
Mark9:40 Utaturwanya wese ari kumwe natwe.
Mark9:41 Umuntu wese uzabaha ikirahuri cy’amazi yo kunywa abitewe n’uko muri aba Kristu
Mark9:42 Ariko nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri aba bato bemera
Mark9:43 Niba ikiganza cyawe kigutera gukora icyaha
Mark9:44 aho kujyana ibiganza byawe byombi mu nyenga y’umuriro utazima.
Mark9:45 Niba ikirenge cyawe kigutera gukora icyaha
Mark9:46 aho kurohwa mu nyenga ufite ibirenge byawe byombi.
Mark9:47 Niba ijisho ryawe rigutera gukora icyaha
Mark9:48 aho urunyo rudapfa
Mark9:49 Ahubwo buri wese ajye asukurwa n’umunyu n’umuriro.
Mark9:50 Umunyu ufite akamaro; ariko iyo ukayutse; mwawusubiza mute uburyohe bwawo? Nimwigiremo umunyu kandi mubane mu mahoro.»

Mark10:7 ni yo mpamvu umugabo azasiga se na nyina
Mark10:8 maze bombi bakaba umubiri umwe.’ Bityo ntibaba bakiri babiri
Mark10:9 Nuko rero ntihakagire umuntu utandukanya icyo Imana yafatanyije.»

Mark10:20 Uwo muntu aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha

Mark10:32 Ubwo bari mu nzira bazamuka bajya i Yeruzalemu

Mark10:34 Bazamushinyagurira

Mark10:39 Baramusubiza bati «Turabishobora!» Yezu arababwira ati «Koko inkongoro nzanyweraho muzayinywesha
Mark10:40 naho ibyo kwicara iburyo bwanjye cyangwa ibumoso bwanjye
Mark10:41 Abandi uko ari icumi babyumvise

Mark11:1 Bagiye kugera i Yeruzalemu
Mark11:2 arababwira ati «Nimujye mu ngo ziri imbere yanyu; mukihagera murabona icyana cy’indogobe kiziritse
Mark11:3 Nihagira ubabwira ati ’Ibyo mukora ni ibiki?’ musubize muti ’Umwigisha aragikeneye
Mark11:4 Baragenda
Mark11:5 Bamwe mu bari aho ngaho barababwira bati «Ibyo mukora ni ibiki? Kuki muzitura iyo ndogobe?»
Mark11:6 Bo babasubiza uko Yezu yari yababwiye
Mark11:7 Icyana cy’indogobe bakizanira Yezu
Mark11:8 Nuko abantu benshi basasa ibishura byabo mu nzira; abandi basasa amashami bari batemye mu mirima.
Mark11:9 Abamugendaga imbere n’abari bamukurikiye barangurura ijwi bati «Hozana! Hasingizwe Uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!
Mark11:10 Hasingizwe Ingoma y’umubyeyi wacu Dawudi itugezeho! Hozana
Mark11:11 Nuko Yezu agera i Yeruzalemu
Mark11:12 Bukeye
Mark11:13 Akiri kure
Mark11:14 Abwira icyo giti ati «Ntihakagire umuntu urya imbuto zawe ukundi!» Ubwo abigishwa be baramwumvaga.
Mark11:15 Baragenda
Mark11:16 kandi abuza abikoreraga imitwaro kwahuranya ikibuga cy’Ingoro.
Mark11:17 Nuko abigisha ababwira ati «Mbese ntihanditswe ngo: Inzu yanjye izitwa inzu yo gusengerwamo n’amahanga yose
Mark11:18 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko ngo babimenye
Mark11:19 Bugorobye
Mark11:20 Mu gitondo bahita
Mark11:21 Petero yibuka ibyabaye
Mark11:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Nimwemere Imana!
Mark11:23 Ndababwira nkomeje ko uwizera Imana ashobora kubwira uriya musozi ati ’Shyiguka aho wirohe mu nyanja’
Mark11:24 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti ’Icyo musabye cyose musenga
Mark11:25 Kandi igihe muhagaze musenga
Mark11:26 Naho nimutababarira abandi
Mark11:27 Barongera bagaruka i Yeruzalemu. Ubwo Yezu yagendagendaga mu Ngoro y’Imana
Mark11:28 baramubwira bati «Ibyo ubikoresha bubasha ki? Ni nde waguhaye ubwo bubasha?»
Mark11:29 Yezu arababwira ati «Reka nanjye ngire icyo mbabaza
Mark11:30 Batisimu ya Yohani yaturutse mu ijuru cyangwa ku bantu? Nimunsubize!»
Mark11:31 Naho bo baribwira bati «Nituvuga ko yaturutse mu ijuru
Mark11:32 Nituramuka tuvuze ko yaturutse ku bantu
Mark11:33 Nuko basubiza Yezu bati «Ntitubizi.» Yezu na we arababwira ati «Nanjye rero simbabwiye aho nkura ububasha bwo gukora ibyo mubona.»
Mark12:1 Nuko Yezu atangira kubabwira mu migani
Mark12:2 Igihe cy’isarura kigeze
Mark12:3 Ariko bo basumira uwo mugaragu
Mark12:4 Arongera abatumaho undi mugaragu
Mark12:5 Nuko yoherezayo undi
Mark12:6 Hari hasigaye umwana we yakundaga
Mark12:7 Ariko abahinzi bamubonye
Mark12:8 Nuko baramufata baramwica
Mark12:9 Mbese mubona nyir’imizabibu azakora iki? Azaza
Mark12:10 Ntimwasomye se mu Byanditswe ngo Ibuye ryajugunywe n’abubatsi
Mark12:11 Ngicyo icyo Nyagasani yakoze
Mark12:12 Bashaka uko bafata Yezu
Mark12:13 Hanyuma bamwoherereza bamwe mu Bafarizayi no mu Baherodiyani
Mark12:14 Baraza baramubwira bati «Mwigisha
Mark12:15 Ariko Yezu kuko yari azi uburyarya bwabo
Mark12:16 Barakimuzanira. Yezu arababaza ati «Iri shusho n’iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?» Barasubiza bati «Ni ibya Kayizari.»
Mark12:17 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati «Ibya Kayizari mubisubize Kayizari
Mark12:18 Nuko Abasaduseyi baza bamugana
Mark12:19 «Mwigisha
Mark12:20 Habayeho rero abavandimwe barindwi
Mark12:21 Uwa kabiri acyura wa mupfakazi
Mark12:22 Bose uko ari barindwi bapfa badasize imbuto. Amaherezo wa mugore na we arapfa.
Mark12:23 Igihe cy’izuka
Mark12:24 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Aho ntimwayobejwe no kutamenya Ibyanditswe
Mark12:25 Erega igihe abapfuye bazazuka
Mark12:26 Naho ku byerekeye ko abapfuye bazazuka
Mark12:27 Nta bwo rero Imana ari iy’abapfuye
Mark12:28 Umwe mu bigishamategeko wari wumvise bajya impaka
Mark12:29 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Irya mbere ni iri ngiri: Tega amatwi Israheli
Mark12:30 Urajye ukunda Nyagasani Imana yawe n’umutima wawe wose
Mark12:31 Irya kabiri na ryo ngiri: Urajye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda. Nta rindi tegeko riruta ayo yombi.»
Mark12:32 Uwo mwigishamategeko aramubwira ati «Ni koko
Mark12:33 Kandi kuyikunda n’umutima wawe wose
Mark12:34 Yezu yumvise ko amushubije neza
Mark12:35 Igihe Yezu yigishirizaga mu Ngoro y’Imana
Mark12:36 Kandi Dawudi ubwe yaravuze ati ‘Nyagasani yabwiye Umutegetsi wanjye ati ’Icara iburyo bwanjye
Mark12:37 Uwo Dawudi yita Umutegetsi
Mark12:38 Mu nyigisho ze Yezu akavuga ati «Murajye mwirinda abigishamategeko
Mark12:39 Bakunda kandi guhabwa intebe z’icyubahiro mu masengero n’imyanya y’imbere aho batumiwe.
Mark12:40 Icyabo ni ukurya ingo z’abapfakazi
Mark12:41 Yezu yari yicaye mu Ngoro y’Imana
Mark12:42 Maze haza umupfakazi w’umukene
Mark12:43 Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be
Mark12:44 Kuko bariya bose bashyizemo ku by’ikirenga
Mark13:1 Yezu asohotse mu Ngoro
Mark13:2 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ntureba ariya mazu ukuntu asa? Nkubwiye ko nta buye rizasigara rigeretse ku rindi
Mark13:3 Nuko igihe yari yicaye ku musozi w’Imizeti
Mark13:4 «Tubwire igihe ibyo bizabera
Mark13:5 Yezu ni ko guterura ati «Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya
Mark13:6 kuko hazaza benshi biyitirira izina ryanjye
Mark13:7 Nimwumva bavuga intambara cyangwa impuha zayo
Mark13:8 Igihugu kizahagurukira ikindi
Mark13:9 Namwe ubwanyu
Mark13:10 Icyakora

Mark14:10 Nuko Yuda Isikariyoti
Mark14:11 Ngo babyumve

Mark14:35 Yigiye imbere gato

Mark14:39 Yezu asubirayo
Mark14:40 Hanyuma agarutse
Mark14:41 Ubwa gatatu araza
Mark14:42 Nimuhaguruke tugende! Dore untanga ari hafi.»
Mark14:43 Nuko ako kanya akivuga
Mark14:44 Umugambanyi yari yabahaye ikimenyetso

Mark14:47 Umwe mu bari aho

Mark14:49 Nyamara iminsi yose nabaga ndi kumwe namwe mu Ngoro y'Imana nigisha
Mark14:50 Nuko bose bamusiga aho barahunga.

Mark14:52 We rero arabiyaka
Mark14:53 Nuko Yezu bamushyira umuherezabitambo mukuru

Mark14:55 Ubwo rero abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’inama nkuru yose bashaka icyo bashinja Yezu kugira ngo bamucire urwo gupfa

Mark14:59 Ariko no kuri ibyo
Mark14:60 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru arahaguruka
Mark14:61 We rero araceceka
Mark14:62 Yezu arasubiza ati «Ndi we
Mark14:63 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru ashishimura imyambaro ye
Mark14:64 Mwiyumviye ukuntu atutse Imana. Mubitekerezaho iki?» Bose bahamya ko akwiye gupfa.
Mark14:65 Hanyuma bamwe batangira kumuvunderezaho amacandwe no kumupfuka mu maso

Mark14:72 Nuko Petero yibuka ijambo Yezu yari yamubwiye ati «Isake itarabika ubwa kabiri
Mark15:1 Mu gitondo kare

Mark15:4 Pilato arongera aramubaza ati «Nta cyo usubiza? Ntiwumva ibyo bakurega byose?»
Mark15:5 Yezu ariko ntiyongera kugira icyo asubiza
Mark15:6 Buri munsi mukuru yabarekuriraga imwe mu mfungwa babaga bamusabye.
Mark15:7 Ubwo rero mu buroko hakaba uwitwa Barabasi
Mark15:8 Nuko rubanda rurazamuka

Mark15:10 Yari azi neza ko abaherezabitambo bakuru bari bamutanze babitewe n’ishyari.
Mark15:11 Ubwo ariko abaherezabitambo bakuru boshya rubanda gusaba ko abarekurira Barabasi.
Mark15:12 Pilato arongera arababaza ati «Maze se ngire nte uwo mwita umwami w’Abayahudi?»

Mark15:41 bajyaga bakurikira Yezu kandi bakamukorera igihe yari mu Galileya. Bari kumwe n’abandi bagore benshi bari barazamukanye na we ajya i Yeruzalemu.

Luke1:9 nk’uko abaherezabitambo babigenzaga

Luke1:37 koko nta kinanira Imana.»

Luke1:50 Impuhwe ze zisesekarizwa abamutinya

Luke1:58 Abaturanyi na bene wabo

Luke2:1 Muri iyo minsi
Luke2:2 Iryo barura rya mbere ryabaye igihe Kwirini yari umutware wa Siriya.
Luke2:3 Bose bajyaga kwiyandikisha
Luke2:4 Yozefu na we ava mu mugi wa Nazareti ho mu Galileya
Luke2:5 agira ngo abarwe
Luke2:6 Nuko bagezeyo
Luke2:7 Abyara umuhungu we w’imfura
Luke2:8 Muri ako karere hari abashumba barariraga amatungo yabo ku gasozi.
Luke2:9 Nuko Umumalayika wa Nyagasani abahagarara iruhande
Luke2:10 Malayika arababwira ati «Mwigira ubwoba
Luke2:11 None
Luke2:12 Dore ikimenyetso kimubabwira: murasanga uruhinja rworoshe utwenda
Luke2:13 Nuko ako kanya
Luke2:14 «Imana nikuzwe mu bushorishori bw’ijuru
Luke2:15 Abamalayika babasiga aho
Luke2:16 Nuko bagenda bihuta
Luke2:17 Bamaze kureba bamenyesha hose ibyo bari babwiwe kuri uwo Mwana.
Luke2:18 Maze ababumvaga bose
Luke2:19 Mariya we yashyinguraga mu mutima we ibyabaye byose
Luke2:20 Nuko abashumba bataha bakuza Imana kandi bayisingiza
Luke2:21 Hashize iminsi munani
Luke2:22 Umunsi w’isukurwa ryabo wategetswe na Musa uragera
Luke2:23 nk’uko byanditse mu itegeko rya Nyagasani
Luke2:24 Bari bajyanywe kandi no gutura igitambo cy’intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri bakurikije itegeko rya Nyagasani.
Luke2:25 Icyo gihe
Luke2:26 Byongeye Roho Mutagatifu yari yaramuhishuriye ko atazapfa atabonye Kristu wa Nyagasani.
Luke2:27 Nuko Simewoni aza mu Ngoro y'Imana abibwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu. Igihe Ababyeyi b’Umwana Yezu bamuzanye ngo bamurangirizeho ibyategetswe
Luke2:28 na we amwakira mu biganza bye
Luke2:29 «Nyagasani
Luke2:30 kuko amaso yanjye yabonye agakiza kawe
Luke2:31 wageneye imiryango yose.
Luke2:32 Ni we rumuri ruboneshereza amahanga
Luke2:33 Se na nyina batangazwaga n’ibyo bamuvugagaho.
Luke2:34 Nuko Simewoni arabashima
Luke2:35 Nawe kandi inkota izakwahuranya umutima. Bityo ibitekerezo biri mu mitima ya benshi bigaragare.»
Luke2:36 Hakaba n’umuhanuzikazi Ana
Luke2:37 hanyuma aba umupfakazi kugeza mu kigero cy’imyaka mirongo inani n’ine. Ntiyavaga mu Ngoro
Luke2:38 Nuko uwo mwanya na we arahagoboka
Luke2:39 Bamaze gutunganya ibyategetswe na Nyagasani
Luke2:40 Nuko umwana arakura
Luke2:41 Uko umwaka utashye ababyeyi be bajyaga i Yeruzalemu guhimbaza umunsi mukuru wa Pasika.
Luke2:42 Nuko umwana amaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri
Luke2:43 Iminsi mikuru irangiye barataha
Luke2:44 Bagenda urugendo rw’umunsi wose
Luke2:45 Bamubuze
Luke2:46 Hashize iminsi itatu bamusanga mu Ngoro y'Imana
Luke2:47 Abamwumvaga bose batangariraga ubwenge bwe n’amagambo yabasubizaga.
Luke2:48 Ababyeyi be bamubonye barumirwa
Luke2:49 Arabasubiza ati «Mwanshakiraga iki? Muyobewe ko ngomba kuba mu Nzu ya Data?»
Luke2:50 Bo ariko ntibasobanukirwa n’ibyo ababwiye.
Luke2:51 Nuko ajyana na bo i Nazareti
Luke2:52 Uko Yezu yakuraga

Luke3:2 Ana na Kayifa ari abaherezabitambo bakuru
Luke3:3 Aherako agenda akarere kose ka Yorudani
Luke3:4 nk’uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy’ibyavuzwe na Izayi umuhanuzi ngo «Ni ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutegure inzira ya Nyagasani
Luke3:5 Imanga yose yuzuzwe
Luke3:6 Maze umuntu wese azabone umukiro uturutse ku Mana.’»
Luke3:7 Yohani yabwiraga abantu bamusangaga bagira ngo ababatize
Luke3:8 Noneho nimugaragaze imigenzereze ikwiranye n’ukwisubiraho nyako! Kandi ntimwitwaze ngo ’Abrahamu ni we mubyeyi wacu!’ Ndetse mbiberurire
Luke3:9 Dore intorezo irambitse ku mizi y’ibiti; noneho igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza kigiye gutemwa maze gicanwe.»
Luke3:10 Inteko y’abantu ikabaza Yohani iti «Tubigenze dute?»
Luke3:11 Na we akabasubiza ati «Ufite amakanzu abiri agabane n’utayafite
Luke3:12 Abasoresha na bo bazaga kwibatirisha bakamubaza bati «Mwigisha
Luke3:13 Arabasubiza ati «Ntimugasoreshe ibirenze ibyategetswe.»
Luke3:14 Abasirikare na bo baramubaza bati «Twebwe se
Luke3:15 Kuko rubanda rwari rutegereje
Luke3:16 Yohani ni ko guterura abwira bose ati «Jyewe mbabatirisha amazi
Luke3:17 Afite urutaro mu ntoki
Luke3:18 Nguko uko Yohani yahuguraga rubanda mu nyigisho nyinshi
Luke3:19 Icyo gihe kandi Yohani yacyashye umutware Herodi kubera Herodiya
Luke3:20 Nyamara Herodi we arushaho kugira nabi
Luke3:21 Nuko rubanda rwose rumaze kubatizwa

Luke3:23 Igihe Yezu atangiye kwigisha

Luke4:2 Ahamara iminsi mirongo ine ashukwa na Sekibi; ntiyagira icyo arya muri iyo minsi
Luke4:3 Nuko Sekibi aramubwira ati «Niba uri Umwana w’Imana
Luke4:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Haranditswe ngo ’Umuntu ntatungwa n’umugati gusa.’ »
Luke4:5 Sekibi amujyana ahantu hirengeye
Luke4:6 aramubwira ati «Nzaguha gutegeka biriya bihugu byose
Luke4:7 Wowe rero nundamya
Luke4:8 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Haranditswe ngo ’Uzaramya Nyagasani Imana yawe
Luke4:9 Noneho amujyana i Yeruzalemu
Luke4:10 Kuko handitswe ngo ’Izategeka abamalayika bayo bakurinde.’
Luke4:11 Kandi ngo ’Bazagusama kugira ngo udatsitara ku ibuye.’»
Luke4:12 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Byaravuzwe ngo ’Ntuzagerageze Nyagasani Imana yawe.’ »
Luke4:13 Sekibi amaze kumushuka ku buryo bwose
Luke4:14 Nuko Yezu asubira mu Galileya yuzuye ububasha bwa Roho Mutagatifu
Luke4:15 Yigishirizaga mu masengero yabo

Luke4:17 Bamuhereza igitabo cy’umuhanuzi Izayi
Luke4:18 «Roho wa Nyagasani arantwikiriye
Luke4:19 kandi namamaze umwaka w’impuhwe za Nyagasani.»
Luke4:20 Yezu abumba igitabo
Luke4:21 Nuko atangira kubabwira ati «Ibiri mu isomo mumaze kumva
Luke4:22 Bose baramushima
Luke4:23 Yezu arababwira ati «Nta gushidikanya mugiye kuncira wa mugani ngo ’Muganga
Luke4:24 Yungamo ati «Ndababwira ukuri: nta muhanuzi ushimwa iwabo.
Luke4:25 Ndababwiza ukuri rwose: hariho abapfakazi benshi muri Israheli mu gihe cya Eliya
Luke4:26 nyamara muri bo nta n’umwe Eliya yoherejweho
Luke4:27 Hari kandi n’ababembe benshi muri Israheli mu gihe cy’umuhanuzi Elisha; nyamara muri bo nta n’umwe wakijijwe
Luke4:28 Abari mu isengero bumvise ayo magambo
Luke4:29 nuko bahagurukira icyarimwe
Luke4:30 Nyamara we abanyura hagati arigendera.

Luke4:32 Batangariraga inyigisho ze
Luke4:33 Ubwo nyine
Luke4:34 «Ayi we! Uradushakaho iki
Luke4:35 Yezu ayibwira ayikangara
Luke4:36 Bose ubwoba burabataha
Luke4:37 Nuko Yezu aba ikirangirire muri ako karere kose.
Luke4:38 Yezu ava mu isengero
Luke4:39 Amwunama hejuru
Luke4:40 Izuba rimaze kurenga

Luke4:42 Ngo bucye

Luke5:4 Amaze kwigisha
Luke5:5 Simoni aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha
Luke5:6 Baraziroha
Luke5:7 Barembuza bagenzi babo bari mu bundi bwato ngo babafashe. Baraza
Luke5:8 Simoni Petero abibonye
Luke5:9 Koko
Luke5:10 Barimo Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi bagenzi ba Simoni. Nuko Yezu abwira Simoni ati «Witinya
Luke5:11 Nuko bagarura amato yabo ku nkombe
Luke5:12 Igihe Yezu yari muri umwe muri iyo migi
Luke5:13 Yezu arambura ikiganza

Luke5:17 Umunsi umwe
Luke5:18 Nuko haza abantu bari bahetse ikirema
Luke5:19 Babura aho bakinyuza
Luke5:20 Abonye ukwemera kwabo
Luke5:21 Abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi batangira kwibaza bati «Uyu utuka Imana ni muntu ki? Ni nde ushobora gukiza ibyaha atari Imana yonyine?»

Luke5:23 Icyoroshye ni ikihe: ari ukuvuga ngo ’Ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe’
Luke5:24 Nyamara kugira ngo mumenye ko Umwana w’umuntu afite ububasha bwo gukiza ibyaha mu nsi... »
Luke5:25 Ako kanya
Luke5:26 Nuko bose barumirwa
Luke5:27 Ibyo birangiye
Luke5:28 Undi aherako ahaguruka

Luke5:32 Erega sinazanywe no guhamagara intungane

Luke5:35 Ariko hari igihe umukwe azabavanwamo

Luke5:37 Nta n’ushyira divayi nshya mu masaho ashaje
Luke5:38 Ahubwo igikwiye ni ugushyira divayi nshya mu masaho mashya.

Luke6:1 Nuko ku munsi umwe w’isabato

Luke6:4 Uko yinjiye mu Ngoro y’Imana

Luke6:6 Ku wundi munsi w’isabato

Luke6:8 We rero amenya ibitekerezo byabo
Luke6:9 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Reka mbabaze: icyemewe ku munsi w’isabato ni ikihe? Ari ukugira neza

Luke6:11 Ariko bo barabisha
Luke6:12 Muri iyo minsi
Luke6:13 Bukeye
Luke6:14 Ni bo b’aba: Simoni yise Petero
Luke6:15 na Matayo
Luke6:16 na Yuda mwene Yakobo

Luke6:36 Nimube abanyampuhwe
Luke6:37 Ntimugashinje abandi
Luke6:38 Mujye mutanga
Luke6:39 Abacira n’umugani

Luke7:2 Hakaba umutware w’abasirikare wari urwaje umugaragu yakundaga

Luke7:4 Bageze iruhande rwa Yezu bamwinginga bakomeje
Luke7:5 kuko akunda umuryango wacu
Luke7:6 Nuko Yezu ajyana na bo. Agiye kugera hafi y’urugo
Luke7:7 Ni na cyo cyatumye ndatinyuka kugusanga; ahubwo vuga ijambo rimwe gusa
Luke7:8 Erega
Luke7:9 Yezu yumvise ayo magambo
Luke7:10 Nuko abari batumwe bahindukiye
Luke7:11 Yezu arakomeza ajya mu mugi witwa Nayini. Abigishwa be n’abandi benshi baramukurikira.

Luke7:26 Nk’ubwo se

Luke7:33 Koko rero Yohani Batisita yaje atarya umugati
Luke7:34 Naho Umwana w’umuntu aza arya kandi anywa
Luke7:35 Nyamara ubuhanga bugaragazwa n’ibikorwa byabwo.»

Luke7:45 Ntiwampobeye unsoma; naho we
Luke7:46 Ntiwansize amavuta ahumura mu mutwe; naho we

Luke7:48 Nuko Yezu abwira uwo mugore ati «Ibyaha byawe birakijijwe.»
Luke7:49 Abari kumwe na we ku meza batangira kwibaza bati «Uyu ni muntu ki ugeza n’aho gukiza ibyaha?»
Luke7:50 Nuko Yezu abwira wa mugore ati «Ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije; genda amahoro.»
Luke8:1 Nuko Yezu ashyira nzira
Luke8:2 Hari kandi n’abagore bamwe bari bakijijwe roho mbi n’izindi ndwara; barimo Mariya bise Madalena
Luke8:3 hari na Yohana muka Shuza
Luke8:4 Nuko abantu benshi bamaze guterana
Luke8:5 «Umubibyi yavuye iwe ajya kubiba imbuto ye. Igihe abiba
Luke8:6 Izindi zigwa mu mabuye; zimaze kumera ziruma
Luke8:7 N’izindi zigwa mu mahwa; amahwa arakura
Luke8:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza; ziramera
Luke8:9 Abigishwa be bamubaza icyo uwo mugani ushaka kuvuga.

Luke8:11 Dore rero icyo uwo mugani uvuga: imbuto ibibwa ni ijambo ry’Imana.

Luke8:13 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye mu mabuye
Luke8:14 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye mu mahwa
Luke8:15 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye mu butaka bwiza
Luke8:16 Nta muntu ucana itara ngo arishyire mu nsi y’ikibindi
Luke8:17 Koko rero
Luke8:18 Mwitondere rero uburyo mwumva aya magambo. Kuko ufite byinshi

Luke8:20 Babimenyesha Yezu bati «Nyoko n’abavandimwe bawe bari hanze barifuza ko mubonana.»
Luke8:21 Arabasubiza ati «Mama n’abavandimwe banjye
Luke8:22 Umunsi umwe
Luke8:23 Mu gihe bambuka
Luke8:24 Baramwegera baramukangura

Luke8:26 Bakukira mu gihugu cy’Abanyageraza giteganye n’icya Galileya.

Luke8:28 Abonye Yezu

Luke8:30 Yezu aramubaza ati «Izina ryawe ni irihe?» Aramusubiza ati «Nitwa Gitero.» Kumusubiza atyo yabitewe n’uko roho mbi nyinshi zari zaramwaritsemo.
Luke8:31 Nuko zimwingingira kutazitegeka gusubira mu nyenga.

Luke8:33 Nuko roho mbi ziva muri uwo muntu
Luke8:34 Abashumba babibonye barahunga
Luke8:35 Abantu b’aho barahurura
Luke8:36 Abari babibonye

Luke8:38 Nuko uwo muntu roho mbi zari zavuyemo

Luke8:40 Yezu agarutse
Luke8:41 Nuko haza umuntu witwa Yayiro
Luke8:42 kuko umukobwa we wari ufite nk’imyaka cumi n’ibiri yendaga gupfa. Mu gihe aganayo
Luke8:43 Ubwo rero hakaba umugore wari umaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri ava amaraso
Luke8:44 Amuturuka inyuma
Luke8:45 Nuko Yezu arabaza ati «Ni nde unkozeho?» Bose barahakana. Petero aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha
Luke8:46 Yezu asubiramo ati «Hari umuntu unkozeho
Luke8:47 Umugore abonye ko yamenyekanye

Luke8:49 Mu gihe akivuga ibyo

Luke8:52 Bose baramuririraga

Luke9:7 Icyo gihe Herodi

Luke9:10 Intumwa zihindukiye
Luke9:11 Ariko abantu benshi baza kuhamenya
Luke9:12 Umunsi uciye ikibu

Luke9:14 Koko hari abagabo bageze nko ku bihumbi bitanu. Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati «Nimubicaze mu dutsiko tw’abantu nka mirongo itanu mirongo itanu.»

Luke9:16 Nuko afata ya migati itanu na ya mafi abiri

Luke9:29 Mu gihe yasengaga
Luke9:30 Nuko haza abagabo babiri baganira na we
Luke9:31 Bababonekera babengerana ikuzo
Luke9:32 Icyo gihe Petero na bagenzi be bari batwawe n’ibitotsi. Ngo bakanguke
Luke9:33 Bagiye kugenda
Luke9:34 Akivuga ibyo
Luke9:35 Nuko ijwi rituruka muri cya gihu rivuga riti «Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nihitiyemo; mujye mumwumvira!»
Luke9:36 Ijwi ngo rimare kuvuga

Luke9:38 Maze umuntu wo muri iyo mbaga atera hejuru ati «Mwigisha

Luke9:40 Ninginze abigishwa bawe ngo bayirukane

Luke9:45 Ariko ntibumva iryo jambo
Luke9:46 Ubundi
Luke9:47 Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza
Luke9:48 Arababwira ati «Umuntu wese wakira uyu mwana ari jye abigirira

Luke9:51 Igihe cya Yezu cyo kuvanwa ku isi cyari cyegereje
Luke9:52 Yohereza integuza ngo zimubanzirize imbere. Baragenda binjira mu rusisiro rw’Abanyasamariya kumuteguriza.

Luke9:54 Babiri mu bigishwa be
Luke9:55 We rero arahindukira

Luke9:57 Igihe bari mu nzira bagenda

Luke9:61 Undi na we ati «Mwigisha

Luke10:2 Arababwira ati «Imirima yeze ni myinshi
Luke10:3 Ngaho nimugende; dore mbohereje nk’abana b’intama mu birura.

Luke10:5 Urugo rwose mwinjiyemo

Luke10:9 Mukize n’abarwayi muhasanze
Luke10:10 Naho rero umugi wose muzinjiramo ntibabakire
Luke10:11 ’Dore n’umukungugu w’umugi wanyu wadufashe ku birenge
Luke10:12 Ndabibabwiye: kuri wa munsi w’urubanza
Luke10:13 Iyimbire
Luke10:14 Nyamara ku munsi w’urubanza muzahanwa kurusha Tiri na Sidoni.

Luke10:16 Ubumva
Luke10:17 Ba bigishwa uko bari mirongo irindwi na babiri

Luke10:20 Nyamara
Luke10:21 Ako kanya
Luke10:22 Byose nabyeguriwe na Data

Luke10:25 Nuko umwigishamategeko arahaguruka

Luke10:27 Undi aramusubiza ati «Uzakunde Nyagasani Imana yawe

Luke10:29 Nyamara we

Luke11:9 Nanjye ndabibabwiye nti: musabe
Luke11:10 Kuko usaba wese ahabwa

Luke11:19 Niba ari Belizebuli nirukanisha roho mbi

Luke11:23 Utari kumwe nanjye

Luke12:1 Nuko abantu bageze ku bihumbi n’ibihumbi barakorana ndetse barabyigana. Yezu abanza kubwira abigishwa be ati «Mwirinde umusemburo w’Abafarizayi!» ashaka kuvuga uburyarya bwabo.

Luke12:26 Niba rero n’ibyo byoroheje mutabishoboye

Luke12:28 Niba Imana yambika ityo icyatsi cyo mu murima kiriho none
Luke12:29 Nimureke rero kubunza imitima mwibaza icyo muzarya cyangwa icyo muzanywa.

Luke12:32 Mwitinya
Luke12:33 Nimugurishe ibyo mutunze
Luke12:34 Koko
Luke12:35 Nimukenyere kandi muhorane amatara yaka.

Luke12:38 Naza no mu gicuku cyangwa mu nkoko

Luke16:1 Nuko akomeza kubwira abigishwa be ati «Habayeho umuntu w’umukungu wari ufite umunyabintu yashinze ibintu bye
Luke16:2 Aramuhamagaza
Luke16:3 Nuko uwo munyabintu aribaza ati ’Nzabigenza nte ko databuja ankuye mu bintu bye? Guhinga? Sinabishobora. Gusabiriza? Binteye isoni.
Luke16:4 Mbonye uko nzabigenza kugira ngo
Luke16:5 Nuko ahamagaza abarimo imyenda ya shebuja bose
Luke16:6 Undi aramusubiza ati ’Ibibindi ijana by’amavuta y’imizeti.’ Umunyabintu aramubwira ati ’Akira urupapuro rwawe
Luke16:7 Hanyuma abaza undi ati ’Wowe
Luke16:8 Nuko shebuja atangarira uwo mugaragu w’umuhemu
Luke16:9 Reka rero mbabwire: ayo matindi y’amafaranga nimuyashakishe incuti
Luke16:10 Udahemuka mu bintu byoroheje
Luke16:11 None se nimuterekana ko muri indahemuka mu matindi y’amafaranga
Luke16:12 Niba kandi muterekanye ko muri indahemuka mu bintu bitari ibyanyu
Luke16:13 Nta mugaragu ushobora gukorera ba shebuja babiri: azanga umwe akunde undi
Luke16:14 Abafarizayi bikundiraga amafaranga
Luke16:15 Yezu arababwira ati «Mukunda kwigira intugane mu maso y’abantu
Luke16:16 Amategeko n’Abahanuzi byabayeho kugeza kuri Yohani; kuva ubwo Ingoma y’Imana iramamazwa
Luke16:17 Biroroshye ko ijuru n’isi bishira aho kugira ngo akitso kamwe kave mu Mategeko.
Luke16:18 Umuntu wese usenda umugore we akazana undi
Luke16:19 Habayeho umugabo w’umukungu wambaraga imyambaro myiza y’umuhemba n’iy’imyeru
Luke16:20 Hari n’umukene witwaga Lazaro wari waramazwe n’ibisebe
Luke16:21 Yifuzaga gutungwa n’ibyagwaga hasi bivuye ku meza y’uwo mukungu
Luke16:22 Umukene rero aza gupfa
Luke16:23 Ageze ikuzimu
Luke16:24 Nuko atera hejuru ati ’Mubyeyi Abrahamu
Luke16:25 Abrahamu aramusubiza ati ’Mwana wanjye
Luke16:26 Uretse n’ibyo
Luke16:27 Umukungu arongera ati ’Mubyeyi
Luke16:28 kuko mpafite abavandimwe batanu; agende ababurire ejo na bo batazaza aha hantu h’ububabare.’
Luke16:29 Abrahamu aramusubiza ati ’Bafite Musa n’Abahanuzi
Luke16:30 Undi ati ’Oya
Luke16:31 Abrahamu arongera
Luke17:1 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati «Kubuza ibigusha abantu mu byaha ntibishoboka
Luke17:2 Ikiruta kuri we
Luke17:3 Murabyitondere! Umuvandimwe wawe nagucumuraho
Luke17:4 Ndetse nagucumuraho karindwi mu munsi
Luke17:5 Nuko intumwa zibwira Yezu ziti «Twongerere ukwemera.»
Luke17:6 Nyagasani arabasubiza ati «Iyaba mwari mufite ukwemera kungana n’impeke y’ururo
Luke17:7 Ni ko se

Luke17:9 Mbese shebuja yashimira uwo mugaragu we ko yarangije ibyo yari yategetswe?
Luke17:10 Namwe ni uko
Luke17:11 Yezu yari mu rugendo
Luke17:12 Ageze mu rusisiro
Luke17:13 Nuko barangurura ijwi
Luke17:14 Ababonye
Luke17:15 Umwe muri bo
Luke17:16 Nuko amwikubita imbere
Luke17:17 Yezu araterura aravuga ati «Mbese bose ntibakize uko ari icumi? Abandi icyenda bari hehe?
Luke17:18 Nta wundi wabonetse ngo agaruke gushimira Imana
Luke17:19 Nuko aramubwira ati «Haguruka wigendere; ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije.»
Luke17:20 Abafarizayi baramubaza bati «Ingoma y’Imana izaza gihe ki?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ingoma y’Imana ntizaza yigaragaza mu maso y’abantu
Luke17:21 ngo bagire bati ’Ngiyi
Luke17:22 Yongera kubwira abigishwa be
Luke17:23 Bazababwira bati ’Dore nguyu
Luke17:24 Koko rero
Luke17:25 Ariko agomba kubanza kubabara cyane
Luke17:26 Mbese nk’uko byagenze mu gihe cya Nowa
Luke17:27 Icyo gihe abantu bararyaga bakanywa
Luke17:28 Bizamera nk’uko byagenze mu minsi ya Loti. Icyo igihe abantu bararyaga bakanywa
Luke17:29 ariko umunsi Loti avuye muri Sodoma
Luke17:30 Ni ko bizamera ku munsi Umwana w’umuntu azigaragazaho.
Luke17:31 Kuri uwo munsi
Luke17:32 Nimwibuke umugore wa Loti!
Luke17:33 Uwihambira ku bugingo bwe
Luke17:34 Ndabibabwiye: muri iryo joro
Luke17:35 Abagore babiri bazaba bari hamwe basya
Luke17:36

Luke23:41 Twebwe turazira ukuri

Luke23:43 Yezu ni ko kumusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri: uyu munsi uraba uri kumwe nanjye mu ihirwe ry’Imana.»
Luke23:44 Hari nko ku isaha ya gatandatu
Luke23:45 Umubambiko wo mu Ngoro utanyukamo kabiri.
Luke23:46 Nuko Yezu arangurura ijwi ati «Dawe
Luke23:47 Umutware w’abasirikare abonye ibyo bibaye
Luke23:48 Abantu bose bari bahururiye kureba ibyabaye
Luke23:49 Abamenyi ba Yezu bose bari bahagaze ahitaruye
Luke23:50 Nuko hagoboka umugabo witwa Yozefu
Luke23:51 We ntiyari yemeye imigambi mibi ya bagenzi be n’ibyo bari barakoze. Yakomokaga ahitwa Arimatiya
Luke23:52 Nuko asanga Pilato
Luke23:53 Awumanura ku musaraba
Luke23:54 Wari umunsi w’umwiteguro wabanzirizaga isabato.
Luke23:55 Abagore bari bavanye na Yezu mu Galileya
Luke23:56 Nuko barataha bajya gutegura imibavu n’ibindi bihumura. Maze ku isabato bararuhuka nk’uko byari bitegetswe.
Luke24:1 Ku wa mbere ukurikira isabato
Luke24:2 Basanga ibuye ryakingaga imva rihirikiye ku ruhande.
Luke24:3 Ariko binjiye
Luke24:4 Barumirwa
Luke24:5 Abo bagore bashya ubwoba bubika amaso; ba bagabo ni ko kubabwira bati «Ni kuki mushakira umuzima mu bapfuye?
Luke24:6 Ntari hano
Luke24:7 ngo ’Umwana w’umuntu agomba kugabizwa amaboko y’abanyabyaha
Luke24:8 Nuko abagore bibuka ayo magambo ye.
Luke24:9 Bavuye ku mva
Luke24:10 Hari Mariya Madalena
Luke24:11 Ariko amagambo yabo bayita uburondogozi
Luke24:12 Nyamara Petero we arahaguruka
Luke24:13 Kuri uwo munsi nyine
Luke24:14 Bagendaga baganira ibyari bimaze kuba byose.
Luke24:15 Igihe rero bakibivugana kandi babyibazaho
Luke24:16 Ariko amaso yabo yari ameze nk’ahumye
Luke24:17 Yezu arababwira ati «Ese ibyo mugenda muvugana ni ibiki?» Baherako barahagarara
Luke24:18 Umwe muri bo witwaga Kiliyofasi
Luke24:19 Arababaza ati «Ni ibiki se?» Baramusubiza bati «Ni ibyabaye kuri Yezu w’i Nazareti
Luke24:20 Twavuganaga n’ukuntu abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru bacu bamutanze ngo apfe
Luke24:21 Twebweho
Luke24:22 Icyakora bamwe mu bagore b’iwacu badutangaje. Mu gitondo cya kare bagiye ku mva
Luke24:23 maze ntibahasanga umurambo we
Luke24:24 Ubundi kandi bamwe muri twe bagiye ku mva babisanga uko abagore bari babivuze
Luke24:25 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Mwa biburabwenge mwe
Luke24:26 None se Kristu ntiyagombaga kubabara atyo ngo abone kwinjira mu ikuzo rye?»
Luke24:27 Nuko ahera kuri Musa n’Abahanuzi bose
Luke24:28 Bageze hafi y’urusisiro bajyagamo
Luke24:29 Ariko bo baramwinginga bati «Gumana natwe kuko bugorobye
Luke24:30 Igihe rero yari ku meza hamwe na bo
Luke24:31 Nuko amaso yabo arahumuka noneho baramumenya. Hanyuma agira atya arazimira
Luke24:32 Basigara babwirana bati «Mbega ukuntu imitima yacu yari yuzuye ibinezaneza igihe yatuganirizaga mu nzira
Luke24:33 Ako kanya barahaguruka basubira i Yeruzalemu. Bahasanga ba Cumi n’umwe bateranye
Luke24:34 bavuga bati «Ni koko! Nyagasani yazutse kandi yabonekeye Simoni!»
Luke24:35 Na bo rero babatekerereza uko byagenze mu nzira
Luke24:36 Igihe bakivuga ibyo
Luke24:37 Barakangarana
Luke24:38 Nuko arababwira ati «Ubwo bwoba bwose mufite ni ubw’iki? Kandi mutewe n’iki gushidikanya mu mitima yanyu?
Luke24:39 Nimurebe ibiganza n’ibirenge byanjye: ni jyewe ubwanjye. Nimunkoreho
Luke24:40 Avuga ibyo abereka ibiganza n’ibirenge bye.
Luke24:41 Uko bakamazwe n’ibyishimo ntibanyurwa
Luke24:42 Bamuhereza igice cy’ifi yokeje;
Luke24:43 aracyakira
Luke24:44 Nuko arababwira ati «Ibyo ni byo nababwiraga nkiri kumwe namwe
Luke24:45 Aherako ahugura ubwenge bwabo ngo bajye bumva Ibyanditswe.
Luke24:46 Maze arababwira ati «Handitswe ko Kristu agomba kubabara
Luke24:47 kandi ko uhereye i Yeruzalemu abantu bo mu mahanga yose bagomba kwigishwa
Luke24:48 Ibyo ni mwe bagabo bashinzwe kubihamya.
Luke24:49 Jyeweho ngiye kuboherereza icyo Data yasezeranye. Mwebwe rero
Luke24:50 Hanyuma abajyana ahagana i Betaniya
Luke24:51 Igihe akibaha umugisha
Luke24:52 Bamaze kumupfukamira
Luke24:53 Nuko bagahora mu Ngoro basingiza Imana.
John1:1 Mu ntangiriro ya byose Jambo yariho
John1:2 Ubwe mu ntangiriro yabanaga n’Imana.
John1:3 Ni we ibintu byose bikesha kubaho
John1:4 Yari asanzwe yifitemo ubugingo
John1:5 Nuko urumuri rumurika mu mwijima
John1:6 Habayeho rero umuntu woherejwe n’Imana
John1:7 Yazanywe no kuba umugabo wo guhamya iby’urwo rumuri
John1:8 Si we wari urumuri
John1:9 Jambo ni we wari urumuri nyakuri
John1:10 Yari mu isi
John1:11 Yaje mu bye
John1:12 Nyamara abamwakiriye bose
John1:13 Ntibavutse ku bw’amaraso cyangwa ku bushake bw’umubiri
John1:14 Nuko Jambo yigira umuntu maze abana natwe
John1:15 Yohani yabaye umugabo wo guhamya ibimwerekeyeho
John1:16 Kandi twese twahawe ku busendere bwe
John1:17 Uko Amategeko yatanzwe anyuze kuri Musa
John1:18 Nta wigeze abona Imana na rimwe; Umwana w’ikinege uba muri Se
John1:19 Dore ubuhamya bwa Yohani igihe Abayahudi b’i Yeruzalemu bamutumyeho abaherezabitambo n’Abalevi kumubaza ngo «Uri nde?»
John1:20 Yohani yaremeje ntiyahakana
John1:21 Na bo baramubaza bati «Bite se? Uzabe uri Eliya?» Arabasubiza ati «Sindi we.» — «Uzabe se uri wa Muhanuzi ugomba kuza?» Arabasubiza ati «Oya.»
John1:22 Baramubwira bati «Rwose uri nde
John1:23 Arabasubiza ati «Ndi ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani’
John1:24 Abari batumwe bari abo mu Bafarizayi.
John1:25 Bongera kumubaza bati «None se ko ubatiza
John1:26 Yohani arabasubiza ati «Jyewe mbatiriza mu mazi
John1:27 Ni we ugiye kuza ankurikiye; sinkwiye no gupfundura umushumi w’inkweto ze.»
John1:28 Ibyo byabereye i Betaniya
John1:29 Bukeye
John1:30 Ni we navugaga ngira nti ’Ngiye gukurikirwa n’umuntu unduta
John1:31 Jye sinari muzi
John1:32 Nuko Yohani ahamya avuga ati «Nabonye Roho amanuka nk’inuma ivuye mu ijuru
John1:33 Koko jye sinari muzi
John1:34 Naramwiboneye ubwanjye kandi ndahamya ko ari we Mwana w’Imana.»
John1:35 Bukeye
John1:36 Abonye Yezu ahise
John1:37 Ba bigishwa be bombi bumvise avuze atyo
John1:38 Yezu arahindukira
John1:39 Arababwira ati «Nimuze murebe.» Baraza babona aho atuye. Nuko uwo munsi bagumana na we. Hari nk’igihe cy’isaha ya cumi.
John1:40 Andereya
John1:41 Aza guhura mbere na mwene nyina Simoni
John1:42 Nuko amugeza kuri Yezu. Yezu aramwitegereza
John1:43 Bukeye bwaho
John1:44 Filipo yari uw’i Betsayida
John1:45 Filipo na we aza guhura na Natanayeli
John1:46 Nuko Natanayeli aramubwira ati «Hari ikintu cyiza cyaturuka i Nazareti?» Filipo aramusubiza
John1:47 Yezu abonye Natanayeli aje amugana
John1:48 Natanayeli aramubwira ati «Unzi ute?» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Filipo ataraguhamagara
John1:49 Natanayeli aramusubiza ati «Rabbi
John1:50 Yezu aramubwira ati «Wemejwe n’uko nkubwiye ngo nakubonye uri mu nsi y’umutini; uzabona ibitambutse ibyo ngibyo.»
John1:51 Arongera aramubwira ati «Ndakubwira ukuri koko: muzabona ijuru rikinguye n’abamalayika b’Imana bazamuka kandi bamanuka hejuru y’Umwana w’umuntu.»
John2:1 Ku munsi wa gatatu
John2:2 Kandi Yezu n’abigishwa be bari babutumiwemo.
John2:3 Divayi imaze gushira
John2:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Mubyeyi
John2:5 Nyina abwira abaherezaga
John2:6 Hari hateretse intango esheshatu zibaje mu mabuye
John2:7 Yezu arababwira ati «Nimwuzuze amazi izo ntango.» Barazisendereza kugeza ku rugara.
John2:8 Yezu arongera
John2:9 Umutegeka w’ubukwe amaze gusogongera ku mazi yahindutse divayi
John2:10 aramubwira ati «Ubusanzwe umuntu arabanza agatereka inzoga nziza
John2:11 Aho i Kana mu Galileya ni ho Yezu yatangiye ikimenyetso cye cya mbere
John2:12 Ibyo birangiye
John2:13 Pasika y’Abayahudi yari yegereje; Yezu azamuka ajya i Yeruzalemu.
John2:14 Asanga mu Ngoro y’Imana hari abantu bahagurira ibimasa
John2:15 Nuko aboha imigozi mo ikiboko bakubitisha
John2:16 Abwira abacuruzaga inuma
John2:17 Nuko abigishwa be bibuka ko handitswe ngo «Ishyaka mfitiye Ingoro yawe riramparanya.»
John2:18 Nuko Abayahudi baramubaza bati «Utanze kimenyetso ki gitumye wiha kugira utyo?»
John2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nimusenye iyi Ngoro y'Imana
John2:20 Abayahudi baramubwira bati «Kubaka iyi Ngoro y'Imana byamaze imyaka mirongo ine n’itandatu
John2:21 Iyo Ngoro y'Imana Yezu yavugaga
John2:22 Amaze kuzuka
John2:23 Igihe yari i Yeruzalemu mu minsi mikuru ya Pasika
John2:24 Nyamara Yezu ubwe ntiyabizeraga
John2:25 kandi ntiyari akeneye umuntu wo kumubwira ikiri muri muntu
John3:1 Mu Bafarizayi
John3:2 Nuko aza nijoro asanga Yezu
John3:3 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri koko: nta muntu n’umwe ushobora kubona Ingoma y’Imana
John3:4 Nikodemu aramubwira ati «Umuntu ashobora ate kuvuka
John3:5 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri koko: umuntu atavutse ku bw’amazi no ku bwa Roho
John3:6 Icyavutse ku mubiri kiba ari umubiri
John3:7 Ntutangazwe n’uko nkubwiye ngo ugomba kongera kuvuka ubwa kabiri.
John3:8 Umuyaga uhuha werekeza aho ushaka
John3:9 Nikodemu aramubaza ati «Ese ibyo bishobora kubaho bite?»
John3:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ukaba umwigisha muri Israheli
John3:11 Ndakubwira ukuri koko: tuvuga ibyo tuzi
John3:12 Niba mutemera mbabwira ibintu byo mu isi
John3:13 Nta wigeze azamuka ajya mu ijuru
John3:14 Mbese nk’uko Musa yamanitse inzoka mu butayu
John3:15 kugira ngo umwemera wese agire ubugingo bw’iteka.»
John3:16 Koko Imana yakunze isi cyane
John3:17 Icyakora
John3:18 Umwemera wese ntacirwa urubanza
John3:19 Dore urwo rubanza urwo ari rwo: ni uko urumuri rwaje mu isi
John3:20 Koko rero ukora ibibi wese
John3:21 Naho rero ukora iby’ukuri
John3:22 Ibyo birangiye
John3:23 Yohani na we yabatirizaga ahitwa Enoni
John3:24 Icyo gihe
John3:25 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani bajya impaka n’Abayahudi bapfa umuhango wo kwiyuhagira.
John3:26 Basanga Yohani
John3:27 Yohani arabasubiza ati «Nta muntu ugira icyo atunga atagihawe no mu ijuru.
John3:28 Ni mwe ntanzeho abagabo b’uko navuze ko ntari Kristu
John3:29 Umukwe ni we nyir’umugeni
John3:30 Koko ni we ugomba gukura
John3:31 Uza aturutse hejuru
John3:32 ahamya ibyo yabonye n’ibyo yumvise
John3:33 Uwakira ibyo ahamya
John3:34 Uwo Imana yatumye
John3:35 Imana Data ikunda Mwana
John3:36 Uwemera Mwana agira ubugingo bw’iteka
John4:1 Yezu amaze kumenya ko Abafarizayi bari bumvise ko afite abigishwa benshi
John4:2 — mu by’ukuri si Yezu wabatizaga
John4:3 ni bwo avuye mu Yudeya
John4:4 yagombaga rero kwambukiranya Samariya.
John4:5 Agera mu mugi wo muri Samariya witwaga Sikari
John4:6 Aho hantu hari iriba rya Yakobo. Yezu ahagera yananijwe n’urugendo
John4:7 Nuko umugore wo kuri Samariya aza kuvoma amazi. Yezu aramubwira ati «Mpa amazi yo kunywa.»
John4:8 Icyo gihe abigishwa be bari bagiye mu mugi kugura ibyo kurya.
John4:9 Umunyasamariyakazi abwira Yezu
John4:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Iyaba wari uzi ingabire y’Imana
John4:11 Umugore aramubwira ati «Nyakubahwa
John4:12 Uzabe uruta umubyeyi wacu Yakobo waduhaye iri riba
John4:13 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Unywa aya mazi wese azongera agire inyota;
John4:14 ariko uzanywa amazi nzamuha
John4:15 Umugore aramubwira
John4:16 Yezu aramubwira ati «Jya guhamagara umugabo wawe
John4:17 Umugore aramusubiza ati «Nta mugabo mfite.» Yezu ati «Uvuze neza
John4:18 kuko wagize abagabo batanu
John4:19 Umugore abwira Yezu ati «Nyakubahwa
John4:20 Ba sogokuruza bacu basengeraga kuri uyu musozi
John4:21 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mugore
John4:22 Mwebwe musenga Uwo mutazi
John4:23 Igihe kiregereje
John4:24 Imana ni Roho
John4:25 Umugore abwira Yezu ati «Nzi ko Umukiza
John4:26 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ni jye uvugana nawe.»
John4:27 Abigishwa be baba barahindukiye
John4:28 Nuko umugore asiga ikibindi aho
John4:29 «Nimuze murebe umuntu wambwiye ibyo nakoze byose. Aho none ntiyaba ari we Kristu?»
John4:30 Ni bwo bavuye mu mugi
John4:31 Hagati aho
John4:32 Yezu arababwira ati «Mfite ibyo kurya mwebwe mutazi.»
John4:33 Nuko abigishwa batangira kubazanya bati «Ese hari uwamuzaniye ibyo kurya?»
John4:34 Yezu arababwira ati «Ibyo kurya bintunga
John4:35 Si mwe musanzwe muvuga ngo hasigaye amezi ane
John4:36 Usarura wese aba abonye igihembo
John4:37 Ubwo ibyo bikagaragaza ukuri kw’ibivugwa ngo: ubiba si we usarura.
John4:38 Nabohereje gusarura ibyo mutaruhiye; abandi bararushye
John4:39 Nuko Abanyasamariya benshi b’uwo mugi bemera Yezu
John4:40 Abanyasamariya baramusanga
John4:41 Nuko abantu benshi cyane baremera
John4:42 Babwira wa mugore
John4:43 Iyo minsi ibiri irangiye
John4:44 Yari yigeze kwemera ubwe ko ari nta muhanuzi wubahwa mu gihugu avukamo.
John4:45 Nuko agera mu Galileya
John4:46 Yezu agaruka rero i Kana ka Galileya
John4:47 Yumvise ko Yezu yavuye mu Yudeya akaza mu Galileya
John4:48 Yezu aramubwira ati «Iyo mutabonye ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza
John4:49 Umutware aramubwira ati «Nyagasani
John4:50 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Genda
John4:51 Abaye agitirimuka
John4:52 Ababaza igihe yoroherewe
John4:53 Se w’umwana amenya ko kuri iyo saha
John4:54 Icyo kiba ikimenyetso cya kabiri. Yezu yagikoze avuye mu Yudeya
John5:1 Ibyo birangiye
John5:2 Aho i Yeruzalemu hafi y’irembo ry’intama
John5:3 Muri ayo mabaraza hari haryamye abarwayi batabarika
John5:4 Kuko rimwe na rimwe
John5:5 Aho ngaho rero hari umuntu wari umaranye ubumuga imyaka mirongo itatu n’umunani.
John5:6 Yezu abonye uwo murwayi aryamye
John5:7 Umurwayi aramusubiza ati «Mubyeyi
John5:8 Yezu aramubwira ati «Haguruka
John5:9 Ako kanya
John5:10 Uwo munsi hari ku isabato. Abayahudi babwira uwakijijwe bati «None ni umunsi w’isabato: nta burenganzira ufite bwo kwikorera ingobyi yawe.»
John5:11 Arabasubiza ati «Uwankijije ni we wambwiye ngo nimfate ingobyi yanjye maze ngende.»
John5:12 Baramubaza bati «Uwo muntu ni nde wakubwiye ngo fata ingobyi yawe ugende?»
John5:13 Ariko uwakijijwe ntiyari azi uwamukijije uwo ari we
John5:14 Hanyuma
John5:15 Nuko uwo muntu aragenda
John5:16 Iyo iba impamvu yatumye Abayahudi batoteza Yezu
John5:17 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Kugeza ubu Data arakora
John5:18 Ayo magambo atuma Abayahudi barushaho gushaka impamvu yo kumwica
John5:19 Nuko Yezu aboneraho
John5:20 Koko rero Data akunda Mwana
John5:21 Uko Data azura abapfuye kandi akabeshaho
John5:22 Nyamara Data nta we acira urubanza; imanza zose yazeguriye Mwana
John5:23 kugira ngo bose bubahe Mwana nk’uko bubaha Data. Utubaha Mwana ntiyubaha na Data wamwohereje.
John5:24 Ndababwira ukuri koko: uwumva ijambo ryanjye kandi akemera n’Uwantumye
John5:25 Ndababwira ukuri koko: igihe kiregereje ndetse tukirimo
John5:26 Uko Data yifitemo ubugingo
John5:27 Kandi amuha ububasha bwo guca imanza
John5:28 Ibyo ntibibatangaze
John5:29 Nuko abazaba barakoze neza
John5:30 Nta cyo nshobora gukora ku bwanjye. Nca urubanza nkurikije ibyo numvise
John5:31 Ndamutse ari jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho
John5:32 Hariho Undi uhamya ibyanjye
John5:33 Mwebwe mwatumye kuri Yohani
John5:34 Jye sinkeneye umuntu uhamya ibinyerekeyeho
John5:35 Yohani yari itara ryaka kandi rimurika
John5:36 Jye mfite icyemezo kiruta icya Yohani
John5:37 Kandi Data wantumye
John5:38 Byongeye
John5:39 Mushakashakira mu Byanditswe
John5:40 Ariko mwanga kunsanga
John5:41 Ikuzo ryanjye sindikesha abantu;
John5:42 ariko mwebwe ndabazi: nta rukundo rw’Imana mwifitemo.
John5:43 Jye naje mu izina rya Data maze ntimwanyakira
John5:44 Mwashobora mute kwemera
John5:45 Ntimugire ngo ni jyewe uzabarega kuri Data
John5:46 Iyaba mwemeraga Musa
John5:47 Niba rero mutemera ibyo yanditse
John6:1 Ibyo birangiye
John6:2 Abantu benshi baramukurikira
John6:3 Nuko Yezu aterera umusozi
John6:4 Ubwo Pasika
John6:5 Yezu arambura amaso
John6:6 Ibyo yabimubwiye amwinja
John6:7 Filipo aramusubiza ati «N’uwagura imigati y’amadenari magana abiri
John6:8 Umwe mu bigishwa be witwaga Andereya
John6:9 «Hano hari agahungu gafite imigati itanu y’ingano za bushoki n’amafi abiri
John6:10 Yezu ati «Nimwicaze abantu.» Aho hantu hari ibyatsi byinshi. Nuko baricara
John6:11 Maze Yezu afata imigati
John6:12 Bamaze guhaga
John6:13 Babishyira hamwe
John6:14 Abo bantu babonye ikimenyetso Yezu amaze gukora
John6:15 Yezu rero amenya ko bagiye kuza kumujyana ku mbaraga
John6:16 Bugorobye
John6:17 Bajya mu bwato
John6:18 Hahuha umuyaga mwinshi
John6:19 Bamaze kugashya ahantu h’amasitadi makumyabiri n’atanu cyangwa mirongo itatu
John6:20 Ni bwo Yezu ababwiye ati «Nimuhumure
John6:21 Bashatse kumushyira mu bwato
John6:22 Bukeye
John6:23 Icyakora andi mato yari yaturutse i Tiberiya
John6:24 Ya mbaga y’abantu ibonye ko Yezu n’abigishwa be batagihari
John6:25 Bamusanze hakurya y’inyanja
John6:26 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: ntimunshakira ko mwabonye ibimenyetso
John6:27 Nimujye mukora mudaharanira ibiribwa bishira
John6:28 Baramubaza bati «Twagenza dute kugira ngo dukore ibyo Imana ishima?»
John6:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Igikorwa Imana ishima
John6:30 Nuko baramubwira bati «Ikimenyetso utanze ni ikihe
John6:31 Mu butayu
John6:32 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: Musa si we wabahaye umugati wo mu ijuru
John6:33 Kuko umugati Imana itanga ari umanuka mu ijuru
John6:34 Nuko baramubwira bati «Mwigisha
John6:35 Yezu arababwira ati «Ni jyewe mugati utanga ubugingo. Unsanga wese ntazasonza bibaho
John6:36 Nyamara narabibabwiye: murambona ariko mukanga kwemera.
John6:37 Uwo Data ampa wese angeraho
John6:38 Namanutse mu ijuru ntazanywe no gukora ibyo nshaka
John6:39 Icyo Uwantumye ashaka ni ukutagira n’umwe nzimiza mu bo yampaye
John6:40 Icyo Data ashaka
John6:41 Nuko Abayahudi barijujuta
John6:42 Maze baravuga bati «Uriya si Yezu
John6:43 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nimureke kuvugana mwijujuta.
John6:44 Nta we ushobora kungeraho atabihawe na Data wanyohereje
John6:45 Mu gitabo cy’Abahanuzi haranditse ngo ’Bose baziyigishirizwa n’Imana.’ Umuntu wese wumvise Data akigishwa
John6:46 Nta wigeze abona Data
John6:47 Ndababwira ukuri koko: uwemera agira ubugingo bw’iteka.
John6:48 Ni jye mugati w’ubugingo.
John6:49 Ba sogokuruza banyu baririye manu mu butayu
John6:50 Nguyu umugati wamanutse mu ijuru
John6:51 Ni jye mugati muzima wamanutse mu ijuru. Urya uwo mugati azabaho iteka; kandi umugati nzatanga
John6:52 Ni bwo Abayahudi batangiye kujya impaka ubwabo
John6:53 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: nimutarya umubiri w’Umwana w’umuntu
John6:54 Naho urya umubiri wanjye
John6:55 Kuko umubiri wanjye ari ikiribwa koko
John6:56 Urya umubiri wanjye kandi akanywa amaraso yanjye
John6:57 Mbese nk’uko Data wantumye ariho
John6:58 Nguyu umugati wamanutse mu ijuru: si nk’uwo ba sogokuruza banyu bariye bakarenga bagapfa; urya uyu mugati azabaho iteka ryose.»
John6:59 Ibyo yabivuze igihe yigishirizaga mu isengero ry’i Kafarinawumu.
John6:60 Abenshi mu bigishwa be bamaze kumwumva
John6:61 Yezu amenya ko abigishwa be bijujutiye ayo magambo
John6:62 Noneho ubwo hacura iki mubonye Umwana w’umuntu azamutse ajya aho yahoze mbere hose?
John6:63 Roho ni we ubeshaho
John6:64 Ariko muri mwe harimo abatemera.» Koko Yezu yari azi mbere hose abatemera
John6:65 Arongera ati «Ngiyo impamvu yatumye mbabwira ko ari nta we ushobora kunsanga atabihawe na Data.»
John6:66 Kuva ubwo
John6:67 Nuko Yezu abwira ba Cumi na babiri
John6:68 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani
John6:69 Twe twaremeye
John6:70 Yezu arababwira ati «Si jye wabatoye uko muri Cumi na babiri? Nyamara umwe muri mwe ni uwa Sekibi.»
John6:71 Uwo ni Yuda
John7:1 Ibyo birangiye
John7:2 Umunsi mukuru w’Abayahudi witwa uw’Ingando ukaba wegereje.
John7:3 Abavandimwe be baramubwira bati «Haguruka
John7:4 Nta we ukorera ibintu ahihishe ashaka kuba ahagaragara; ubwo ukora bene ibyo
John7:5 Koko rero n’abavandimwe be ntibamwemeraga.
John7:6 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Igihe cyanjye ntikiragera
John7:7 Isi ntishobora kubanga
John7:8 Mwe nimugende
John7:9 Amaze kubabwira atyo
John7:10 Abavandimwe be bamaze kugenda bajya mu munsi mukuru
John7:11 Abayahudi bamushakiraga mu munsi mukuru
John7:12 Rubanda bahwihwisaga byinshi bimwerekeyeho
John7:13 Nta muntu watinyukaga kuvuga ibimwerekeyeho yeruye
John7:14 Umunsi mukuru ugeze hagati
John7:15 Abayahudi baratangara
John7:16 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Inyigisho mvuga
John7:17 Ukereye gukora icyo Imana ishaka
John7:18 Uvuga ibye bwite
John7:19 Mbese nta mategeko Musa yabahaye? Nyamara nta n’umwe muri mwe uyakurikiza.
John7:20 Kuki mushaka kunyica?» Rubanda baramusubiza bati «Aho ntuhanzweho na roho mbi? Ni nde ushaka kukwica?»
John7:21 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nakoze igikorwa kimwe
John7:22 Musa yabahaye umuhango wo kugenya kandi utamuturutseho
John7:23 Niba umuntu agenywa ku munsi w’isabato
John7:24 Ntimugace urubanza mukurikije ibigaragara
John7:25 Bamwe mu batuye i Yeruzalemu baravuga bati «Uriya si wa wundi bahigaga bashaka kumwica?
John7:26 Nyamara dore aravugira mu ruhame
John7:27 Ariko uyu tuzi aho akomoka
John7:28 Yezu yigishiriza mu Ngoro y'Imana aranguruye ijwi
John7:29 Jye ndamuzi
John7:30 Ni bwo bashatse kumufata
John7:31 Icyakora benshi muri rubanda baramwemera
John7:32 Abafarizayi bumvise ko rubanda rukomeza guhwihwisa ibyo byose
John7:33 Yezu aravuga ati «Ndacyari kumwe namwe igihe gito
John7:34 Muzanshaka mumbure
John7:35 Abayahudi batangira kubazanya bati «Agiye kuzajya he
John7:36 Aya magambo avuze arashaka kuvuga iki
John7:37 Ku munsi usoza iminsi mikuru
John7:38 Unyemera
John7:39 Ibyo yabivuze abyerekeje kuri Roho uzahabwa abamwemera. Kugeza icyo gihe
John7:40 Benshi muri rubanda bumvise ayo magambo
John7:41 Abandi bati «Ni Kristu.» Abandi na bo bati «Kristu azaturuke se mu Galileya?
John7:42 Ibyanditswe ntibivuga ko Kristu ari uwo mu nkomoko ya Dawudi
John7:43 Ibyo bituma rubanda bicamo ibice kubera we.
John7:44 Bamwe muri bo bashakaga kumufata
John7:45 Nuko abagaragu baragaruka basanga abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi; barababaza bati «Ko mutamuzanye ni iki?»
John7:46 Abagaragu barabasubiza bati «Nta muntu wigeze avuga nk’uwo muntu.»
John7:47 Abafarizayi bati «Ese namwe mwashukitse?
John7:48 Hari n’umwe mu Bategetsi cyangwa se mu Bafarizayi wamwemeye?
John7:49 Si rubanda ruriya rutazi amategeko? Ni ibivume.»
John7:50 Umwe muri bo
John7:51 «Harya amategeko yacu apfa gucira umuntu urubanza
John7:52 Baramusubiza bati «Mbese nawe uri Umunyagalileya? Uzashishoze
John7:53 Nuko bose barikubura barataha
John8:1 Naho Yezu yigira ku musozi w’Imizeti.
John8:2 Bugicya
John8:3 Ni bwo abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi bamuzaniye umugore wari wafashwe asambana
John8:4 Babwira Yezu bati «Mwigisha
John8:5 Mu Mategeko
John8:6 Ibyo babivugiraga kumwinja
John8:7 Bakomeje kumubaza
John8:8 Yongera kunama
John8:9 Bumvise avuze atyo
John8:10 Nuko Yezu asigara aho wenyine na wa mugore agihagaze aho hagati.
John8:11 Yezu yunamutse aramubaza ati «Mugore
John8:12 Nuko Yezu yongera kubabwira ati «Ndi urumuri rw’isi
John8:13 Abafarizayi baramubwira bati «Ubwo ari wowe ubwawe uhamya ibikwerekeyeho
John8:14 Yezu arabasubiza ati «N’ubwo ari jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho
John8:15 Mwe muca urubanza mukurikije umubiri
John8:16 N’iyo nciye urubanza
John8:17 Ni na ko byanditse mu Mategeko yanyu ngo ’Icyo abagabo babiri bemeje
John8:18 Koko ni jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho
John8:19 Baramubwira bati «So aba hehe?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ari jye ari na Data
John8:20 Ayo magambo Yezu yayavugiye iruhande rw’ububiko
John8:21 Yezu yongera kubabwira ati «Ndagiye kandi muzanshaka
John8:22 Abayahudi baravuga bati «Aho ntagiye kwiyahura
John8:23 Yezu arababwira ati «Mwe muri abo hasi
John8:24 Nababwiye ko muzapfana ibyaha byanyu. Muramutse mutemeye ko ndi uriho
John8:25 Nuko baramubaza bati «Uri nde?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndi uwo nababwiye ngitangira.
John8:26 Mfite byinshi mbavugaho n’urubanza nabacira. Ariko Uwantumye ni umunyakuri
John8:27 Ntibamenya ko yababwiraga Se.
John8:28 Yezu yungamo ati «Nimumara kwerereza Umwana w’umuntu
John8:29 Uwantumye turahorana
John8:30 Amaze kuvuga atyo
John8:31 Nuko Yezu abwira Abayahudi bari bamwemeye
John8:32 Kandi muzamenya ukuri
John8:33 Baramusubiza bati «Turi abo mu nkomoko ya Abrahamu
John8:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: umuntu wese ukora icyaha aba ari umugaragu w’icyaha.
John8:35 Burya umugaragu ntahora iteka mu nzu
John8:36 Mwana nabakura ku bugaragu
John8:37 Nzi ko mukomoka kuri Abrahamu
John8:38 Jye mvuga ibyo nabonye kwa Data
John8:39 Baramusubiza bati «Umubyeyi wacu ni Abrahamu.» Yezu na we arababwira ati «Niba muri abana ba Abrahamu
John8:40 Ubu rero murashaka kunyica
John8:41 Mwe murakora ibyo so akora.» Baramubwira bati «Nta bwo turi ibibyarirano. Dufite Data umwe
John8:42 Yezu arababwira ati «Iyaba Imana yari so mwankunze
John8:43 Kuki mudasobanukirwa n’ibyo mvuga? Ni uko mudashobora kwakira ijambo ryanjye.
John8:44 Ubabyara koko ni Sekibi
John8:45 None jye navuga ukuri
John8:46 Muri mwe
John8:47 Umuntu w’Imana yumva amagambo y’Imana. Ngaho mwamenya igituma mutumva
John8:48 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati «Si ngaha twavuga ukuri
John8:49 Yezu arasubiza ati «Simpanzweho na Sekibi
John8:50 Jye simparanira ikuzo ryanjye
John8:51 Ndababwira ukuri koko: ukomera ku magambo yanjye
John8:52 Abayahudi baramubwira bati «Ngaha twamenya ko wahanzweho na Sekibi! Abrahamu yarapfuye
John8:53 Uzabe se uruta umubyeyi wacu Abrahamu wapfuye? N’abahanuzi na bo barapfuye! None ubwawe
John8:54 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Niba ubwanjye niha ikuzo
John8:55 Nyamara ntimumuzi
John8:56 Umubyeyi wanyu Abrahamu yahimbajwe no kubona umunsi wanjye
