John8:58 Yezu arababwira ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: Abrahamu atarabaho nari ndiho.»
John8:59 Ni bwo bafashe amabuye yo kumutera; Yezu arihisha
John9:1 Yihitira abona umuntu wavutse ari impumyi.
John9:2 Maze abigishwa be baramubaza bati «Mwigisha
John9:3 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ari we
John9:4 Ni ngombwa gukora imirimo y’Uwantumye hakibona; ijoro riraje
John9:5 Igihe nkiri ku isi
John9:6 Amaze kuvuga atyo
John9:7 Maze arayibwira ati «Jya kwiyuhagira mu cyuzi cya Silowe» (bivuga ngo: uwatumwe). Nuko impumyi iragenda
John9:8 Bituma abaturanyi n’abandi bari barabonye asabiriza bavuga bati «Uriya si wa wundi wajyaga yirirwa yicaye asabiriza?»
John9:9 Bamwe bati «Ni we»
John9:10 Ni bwo bamubwiye bati «Amaso yawe yahumutse ate?»
John9:11 Arabasubiza ati «Ni wa muntu bita Yezu: yatobye akondo
John9:12 Baramubwira bati «Uwo muntu ari hehe?» Arabasubiza ati «Simpazi.»
John9:13 Nuko uwahoze ari impumyi bamushyira Abafarizayi.
John9:14 Hari ku munsi w’isabato igihe Yezu atobye akondo
John9:15 Abafarizayi na bo bongera kumubaza uko yahumutse. Arababwira ati «Yansize akondo ku maso
John9:16 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi baravuga bati «Uwo muntu ntakomoka ku Mana
John9:17 Barongera babwira impumyi bati «Wowe se
John9:18 Abayahudi banga kwemera ko yari impumyi n’uko yahumutse
John9:19 Barababaza bati «Uyu koko ni umwana wanyu muvuga ko yavutse ari impumyi? Ubu se ahumutse ate?»
John9:20 Ababyeyi be barasubiza bati «Icyo tuzi
John9:21 Uko byagenze kugira ngo abone ntitubizi
John9:22 Ababyeyi be bavuze batyo babitewe no gutinya Abayahudi
John9:23 Ni cyo cyateye ababyeyi be kuvuga bati «Arakuze
John9:24 Abayahudi bongera guhamagara ubwa kabiri uwo muntu wahoze ari impumyi
John9:25 Arababwira ati «Niba ari umunyabyaha
John9:26 Bongera kumubaza bati «Yakugenjereje ate? Yaguhumuye amaso ate?»
John9:27 Arabasubiza ati «Nabibabwiye kandi ntimwabyumva
John9:28 Nuko bamuhunda ibitutsi
John9:29 Tuzi ko Imana yavuganye na Musa
John9:30 Wa muntu arabasubiza ati «Ibyo biratangaje
John9:31 Tuzi neza ko Imana itumva abanyabyaha
John9:32 Kuva na kera kose nta wigeze yumva bavuga ko hari uwahumuye uwavutse ari impumyi.
John9:33 Uwo muntu iyo adaturuka ku Mana
John9:34 Baramusubiza bati «Wazikamye wese mu byaha ukivuka
John9:35 Yezu aza kumva ko bamuroshye hanze. Bahuye
John9:36 We arasubiza ati «Nyakubahwa
John9:37 Yezu aramubwira ati «Wamubonye
John9:38 Ni bwo avuze ati «Ndemera
John9:39 Yezu aramubwira ati «Naje mu nsi nje guca urubanza
John9:40 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi bari kumwe na we babyumvise
John9:41 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Iyo muba impumyi
John10:1 Ndababwira ukuri koko: umuntu utinjirira mu irembo ry’urugo rw’intama
John10:2 Unyura mu irembo we
John10:3 Uwugarira irembo
John10:4 Intama ze zose iyo amaze kuzikura mu rugo
John10:5 Ntizikurikira uw’ahandi
John10:6 Yezu yabahaye icyo kigereranyo
John10:7 Nuko Yezu ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: ni jye rembo ry’intama.
John10:8 Abandi bose baje mbere yanjye
John10:9 Ni jye rembo; uzanyuraho yinjira azakizwa
John10:10 Umujura agenzwa no kwiba
John10:11 Ni jye mushumba mwiza. Umushumba mwiza yigurana intama ze.
John10:12 Naho umucanshuro utari umushumba
John10:13 Agenza atyo abitewe n’uko aba ari umucanshuro
John10:14 Ni jye mushumba mwiza; nzi intama zanjye
John10:15 mbese nk’uko Data anzi
John10:16 Mfite n’izindi ntama zitari muri uru rugo
John10:17 Ngicyo igitera Data kunkunda
John10:18 Nta we ubunyaga
John10:19 Abayahudi bongera kwicamo ibice babitewe n’ayo magambo.
John10:20 Benshi muri bo bati «Yahanzweho na roho mbi
John10:21 Abandi ariko bati «Aya magambo si ay’uwahanzweho na roho mbi; roho mbi yashobora ite guhumura amaso y’impumyi?»
John10:22 I Yeruzalemu bahimbazaga umunsi mukuru wo gutaha Ingoro y’Imana. Hari mu itumba.
John10:23 Yezu yagendagendaga mu Ngoro yImana mu nsi y’Ibaraza rya Salomoni.
John10:24 Abayahudi baramukikiza
John10:25 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira mukanga kwemera; ibikorwa nkora mu izina rya Data
John10:26 Mwe ntimwemera
John10:27 Intama zanjye zumva ijwi ryanjye
John10:28 Nziha ubugingo bw’iteka
John10:29 Data wazimpaye
John10:30 Jye na Data turi umwe.»
John10:31 Abayahudi bongera gufata amabuye yo kumutera.
John10:32 Ni bwo Yezu ababwiye ati «Naberetse ibikorwa byiza byinshi bituruka kuri Data
John10:33 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati «Si igikorwa cyiza gituma tugutera amabuye; turakuziza igitutsi ututse Imana
John10:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Mu Mategeko yanyu ntihanditse ngo ’Naravuze nti: muri imana’?
John10:35 Ubwo Amategeko yita imana ababwiwe ijambo ry’Imana
John10:36 mushobora mute kubwira uwo Data yatagatifuje akamutuma mu nsi
John10:37 Niba koko ndakora ibikorwa bya Data
John10:38 Ariko niba mbikora
John10:39 Nuko bongera gushaka kumufata
John10:40 Asubira hakurya ya Yorudani
John10:41 Abantu benshi barahamusanga bavuga bati «Nta gitangaza na kimwe Yohani yigeze akora
John10:42 Abari aho benshi baramwemera.
John11:1 I Betaniya
John11:2 Mariya ni we wari wasize Nyagasani umubavu

John11:7 Hanyuma abwira abigishwa be ati «Nimuze dusubire mu Yudeya.»
John11:8 Abigishwa baramubwira bati «Mwigisha
John11:9 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Mbese umunsi ntufite amasaha cumi n’abiri? Iyo umuntu agenda ku manywa ntatsitara
John11:10 Ariko umuntu ugenda nijoro aratsitara
John11:11 Amaze kubabwira ibyo
John11:12 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati «Mwigisha

John11:14 Yezu noneho araberurira

John11:21 Marita abwira Yezu
John11:22 Ariko n’ubu ngubu

John11:24 Marita arasubiza ati «Nzi ko azazuka igihe cy’izuka ku munsi w’imperuka.»
John11:25 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ni jye zuka n’ubugingo; unyemera
John11:26 Byongeye umuntu wese uriho kandi akanyemera
John11:27 Marita ati «Yego
John11:28 Amaze kuvuga atyo
John11:29 Mariya abyumvise
John11:30 Ubwo Yezu yari ataragera aho atuye

John11:32 Mariya ageze aho Yezu yari ari
John11:33 Yezu amubonye arira

John11:35 Nuko Yezu asuka amarira.
John11:36 Abayahudi baravuga bati «Nimurebe ukuntu yamukundaga.»
John11:37 Ariko bamwe muri bo baravuga bati «Uwashoboye guhumura ya mpumyi
John11:38 Yezu yongera gushenguka umutima maze ajya ku mva; iyo mva yari ubuvumo bari bakingishije ibuye.
John11:39 Yezu ati «Nimukureho ibuye.» Marita
John11:40 Yezu aramubwira ati «Sinakubwiye ko niwemera uri bubone ikuzo ry’Imana?»
John11:41 Nuko ibuye barikuraho. Yezu yubura amaso ayerekeza hejuru
John11:42 Jye nari nsanzwe nzi ko unyumva
John11:43 Amaze kuvuga atyo
John11:44 Uwari warapfuye arasohoka
John11:45 Benshi mu Bayahudi bari baje kwa Mariya
John11:46 Abandi muri bo basanga Abafarizayi
John11:47 Nuko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi bakoranya inama nkuru
John11:48 Nitumureka agakomeza kuriya
John11:49 Umwe muri bo witwaga Kayifa
John11:50 Ntimubona ko ikiruta ari uko umuntu umwe yapfa mu kigwi cy’imbaga
John11:51 Ibyo ntiyabivuze ku bwe; yabitewe no kuba umuherezabitambo mukuru w’uwo mwaka bimuha guhanura
John11:52 Bitari no gupfira rubanda gusa
John11:53 Nuko guhera uwo munsi bashaka uko bamwicisha.

John12:1 Hasigaye iminsi itandatu Pasika ikaba
John12:2 Bahamuzimanirira ibya nimugoroba. Marita ni we waherezaga
John12:3 Nuko Mariya areba incuro y’amavuta y’umubavu w’ukuri kandi uhenda cyane
John12:4 Ni bwo Yuda Isikariyoti
John12:5 «Nk’uriya mubavu wajyaga kugurwa amadenari magana atatu
John12:6 Ibyo ariko ntiyabivugiraga ko yari ababajwe n’abakene
John12:7 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati «Nimumwihorere
John12:8 Abakene bo muzabahorana
John12:9 Nuko imbaga nyamwinshi y’Abayahudi iza kumenya ko Yezu yari aho ngaho; ni bwo baje
John12:10 Nyamara abatware b’abaherezabitambo bajya inama yo kwica na Lazaro
John12:11 kuko yatumaga Abayahudi benshi babacikaho
John12:12 Bukeye bwaho
John12:13 Bafata amashami y’imikindo
John12:14 Yezu abonye icyana cy’indogobe acyicaraho
John12:15 «Witinya
John12:16 Abigishwa be babanza kuyoberwa icyo ibyo bivuga
John12:17 Abari kumwe na we bose igihe ahamagaye Lazaro mu mva akamuzura mu bapfuye
John12:18 Ni na cyo cyatumye rubanda ruza kumusanganira
John12:19 Nuko Abafarizayi baravugana bati «Ntimubona ko ari nta cyo bibamariye! Dore igihugu cyose cyashitse kimuyoboka!»
John12:20 Hari n’Abagereki bari baje gusenga ku munsi mukuru.
John12:21 Begera Filipo wari uw’i Betsayida ho mu Galileya
John12:22 Filipo na we ajya kubibwira Andereya. Andereya na Filipo bajya kubibwira Yezu.
John12:23 Yezu abasubiza avuga ati «Koko igihe kirageze
John12:24 Ndababwira ukuri koko: imbuto y’ingano iyo itaguye mu gitaka ngo ihugute
John12:25 Ukunda ubuzima bwe arabubura
John12:26 Ushaka kumbera umugaragu nankurikire
John12:27 Ubu ariko umutima wanjye urahagaze
John12:28 Dawe
John12:29 Abantu bari bahagaze aho kandi bari bumvise
John12:30 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Iryo jwi si jye rivugiye
John12:31 Ubu igihe cyo gucira isi urubanza kirageze; ubu umutware w’iyi si agiye gusukwa hanze.
John12:32 Nanjye nimara kwererezwa hejuru y’isi
John12:33 Ibyo yabivuze yerekana urupfu yari agiye kuzapfa.
John12:34 Nuko rubanda baramusubiza bati «Twumvise Amategeko avuga ko Kristu ahoraho iteka
John12:35 Yezu arababwira ati «Ubu ni igihe gito urumuri rubarimo; cyo nimugende mugifite urumuri
John12:36 Igihe mugifite urumuri
John12:37 N’ubwo yari yaraberetse ibyo bimenyetso byose
John12:38 bityo harangira ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Izayi ati «Nyagasani
John12:39 Ngicyo icyatumaga badashobora kwemera. Izayi yunzemo ati
John12:40 «Yabahumye amaso
John12:41 Izayi yavuze ibyo
John12:42 Icyakora benshi
John12:43 kuko bakunze ikuzo ry’abantu kuruta ikuzo ry’Imana.
John12:44 Nuko Yezu arangurura ijwi ati «Unyemera si jye aba yemeye
John12:45 kandi rero umbona aba abonye n’Uwantumye.
John12:46 Naje mu nsi ndi urumuri
John12:47 Nihagira uwumva amagambo yanjye ntayakurikize
John12:48 Ungaya kandi ntiyakire amagambo yanjye
John12:49 Kuko ntavuze ku bwanjye
John12:50 Kandi nzi ko itegeko rye ari ubugingo bw’iteka. Jye rero ibyo mvuga
John13:1 Mbere y’umunsi mukuru wa Pasika
John13:2 Nuko nimugoroba igihe bafunguraga
John13:3 Yezu azirikanye ko Se yamweguriye byose
John13:4 ni ko guhaguruka ava ku meza. Yikuramo umwitero we
John13:5 Nuko asuka amazi ku ibesani
John13:6 Aza kugera imbere ya Simoni Petero
John13:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ibyo nkora ubu ntiwabimenya

John13:9 Petero aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani
John13:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Uwiyuhagiye nta kindi aba ashigaje kitari ukoga ibirenge
John13:11 Yari azi neza uri bumugambanire
John13:12 Amaze kuboza ibirenge no gusubizamo umwitero we
John13:13 Munyita Umwigisha na Nyagasani
John13:14 Ubwo rero mbogeje ibirenge
John13:15 Ni urugero mbahaye
John13:16 Ndababwira ukuri koko: nta mugaragu usumba shebuja
John13:17 Ubwo mumenye ibyo
John13:18 Simvuze mwese: abo natoye ndabazi
John13:19 Mbaburiye hakiri kare bitaraba
John13:20 Ndababwira ukuri koko: uwakiriye uwo ntumye
John13:21 Yezu amaze kuvuga ayo magambo
John13:22 Abigishwa be batangira kurebana
John13:23 Nuko umwe mu bigishwa
John13:24 Simoni Petero amwicira ijisho
John13:25 Wa mwigishwa uko yakegamye mu gituza cya Yezu
John13:26 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ni uwo ngiye gukoreza umugati nkawumuha.» Nuko akoza ikimanyu cy’umugati
John13:27 Yuda ngo amare kwakira uwo mugati
John13:28 Ariko mu bari aho ku meza
John13:29 Kubera ko Yuda yari asanzwe ari umubitsi
John13:30 Amaze kumira icyo kimanyu cy’umugati
John13:31 Yuda amaze kugenda
John13:32 Ubwo rero Imana iherewe ikuzo muri we
John13:33 Twana twanjye
John13:34 Mbahaye itegeko rishya: nimukundane
John13:35 Icyo bose bazamenyeraho ko muri abigishwa banjye
John13:36 Simoni Petero aramubwira ati «Nyagasani
John13:37 Petero aramubwira ati «Mwigisha
John13:38 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Uzampfira? Ndakubwira ukuri koko: isake ntiza kubika
John14:1 Ntimugakuke umutima. Nimwemere Imana nanjye munyemere.
John14:2 Mu nzu ya Data hari ibyicaro byinshi; iyo bitaba byo
John14:3 Nimara kugenda
John14:4 Aho ngiye murahazi n’inzira yaho murayizi.»
John14:5 Tomasi aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani
John14:6 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ni jye Nzira
John14:7 Iyaba mwari munzi
John14:8 Filipo ni ko guhita amubwira ati «Nyagasani
John14:9 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Filipo we
John14:10 Rwose ntimwemera ko ndi muri Data
John14:11 Nimwemere ko ndi muri Data
John14:12 Ndababwira ukuri koko: unyemera azakora imirimo nkora
John14:13 Byongeye kandi

John14:15 Niba munkunda koko

John14:17 Uwo ni Roho Nyir’ukuri isi idashobora kwakira

John14:19 Hasigaye igihe gito isi ntizongere kumbona. Ariko mwe muzambona
John14:20 Uwo munsi muzamenya ko mba muri Data

John14:24 Utankunda ntamenya n’ijambo ryanjye; kandi rero ijambo mwumvise si iryanjye

John15:2 Ishami ryose riterera imbuto muri jye
John15:3 Mwe murakeye kubera ijambo nababwiye.
John15:4 Nimube rero muri jyewe
John15:5 Jye ndi umuzabibu
John15:6 Utaba muri jye
John15:7 Nimumbamo n’amagambo yanjye akababamo
John15:8 Igihesha Data ikuzo ni uko mwakwera imbuto nyinshi
John15:9 Uko Data yankunze
John15:10 Nimwubaha amategeko yanjye
John15:11 Ibyo mbibabwiye ngira ngo ibyishimo byanjye bibabemo
John15:12 Ngiri itegeko mbahaye: nimujye mukundana nk’uko nanjye nabakunze.
John15:13 Nta wagira urukundo ruruta urw’umuntu uhara amagara ye kubera incuti ze.

John15:15 Jye sinkibita abagaragu

John15:18 Isi nibazira
John15:19 Iyo muba ab’isi

John16:2 Bazabaca mu masengero; ndetse n’igihe kirageze

John16:8 Kandi namara kuza

John16:10 azabereka aho ubutungane buri

John16:13 Ariko Roho Nyir’ukuri uwo naza
John16:14 Azampesha ikuzo

John16:19 Yezu amenya ko bashaka kugira icyo bamubaza
John16:20 Ndababwira ukuri koko: mwe muzarira ndetse muganye
John16:21 Umugore iyo agiye kubyara
John16:22 Namwe ubu koko mufite ishavu
John16:23 Uwo munsi kandi ntimuzongera kugira icyo mumbaza. Ndababwira ukuri koko: nimugira icyo musaba Data mu izina ryanjye
John16:24 Kugeza ubu nta cyo mwigeze musaba mu izina ryanjye. Nimusabe muzahabwa
John16:25 Ibyo nabibabwiye mu bigereranyo; igihe kirageze noneho simbe nkibabwiza ibigereranyo

John17:2 nk’uko wamuhaye ububasha ku kiremwa cyose
John17:3 Ubwo bugingo bw’iteka ni ukukumenya
John17:4 Jye naguhesheje ikuzo
John17:5 None ubu

John17:8 kuko nababwiye amagambo wambwiye
John17:9 Ubu ni bo nsabira; sinsabira isi

John17:12 Igihe nari kumwe na bo
John17:13 Ubu rero nje ngusanga

John17:16 Si ab’isi
John17:17 Batagatifurize mu kuri: ijambo ryawe ni ukuri.

John18:1 Yezu amaze kuvuga ibyo
John18:2 Yuda wajyaga kumugambanira akamenya aho hantu
John18:3 Nuko Yuda amaze kubona abasirikare n’abagaragu yahawe n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi
John18:4 Yezu wari uzi ibigiye kumubaho byose
John18:5 Baramusubiza bati «Yezu w’i Nazareti.» Yezu arababwira ati «Ni jyewe.» Yuda wamugambaniraga
John18:6 Yezu amaze kubabwira ati «Ni jyewe»
John18:7 Yongera kubabaza ati «Murashaka nde?» Barongera bati «Yezu w’i Nazareti.»
John18:8 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nababwiye ko ari jye. Niba rero ari jye mushaka
John18:9 Bityo harangira ijambo yari yaravuze ati «Abo wampaye nta n’umwe najimije muri bo.»
John18:10 Nuko Simoni Petero wari ufite inkota arayikura
John18:11 Yezu abwira Petero ati «Subiza inkota yawe mu rwubati. Inkongoro Data ampaye
John18:12 Abasirikare n’umutware wabo
John18:13 Babanza kumujyana kwa Ana wari sebukwe wa Kayifa
John18:14 Kayifa uwo ni we wari waragiriye Abayahudi inama
John18:15 Simoni Petero yari yakurikiye Yezu hamwe n’undi mwigishwa. Uwo mwigishwa wundi akaba yaraziranye n’umuherezabitambo mukuru
John18:16 Petero we asigara ahagaze hanze inyuma y’irembo; wa mwigishwa wundi wari uzwi n’umuherezabitambo mukuru
John18:17 Nuko uwo muja w’umukumirizi abwira Petero ati «Aho none ntiwaba uri uwo mu bigishwa b’uriya muntu?» Petero arasubiza ati «Sindi we.»
John18:18 Abagaragu n’abafasha bari bacanye umuriro bota
John18:19 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru abaza Yezu iby’abigishwa be n’inyigisho ze.
John18:20 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Navugiye ahagaragara mbwira isi yose. Nigishirije iteka mu masengero no mu Ngoro y’Imana
John18:21 Urambaza iki? Baza abanyumvise icyo nababwiye. Bo bazi ibyo navuze.»
John18:22 Amaze kuvuga ibyo
John18:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Niba mvuze nabi
John18:24 Nuko Ana amwohereza aboshye kwa Kayifa
John18:25 Simoni Petero yari ahagaze aho yota. Nuko baramubaza bati «Aho nawe nturi uwo mu bigishwa be?» Arahakana ati «Sindi we.»
John18:26 Umwe mu bagaragu b’umuherezabitambo mukuru
John18:27 Petero yongera guhakana. Ako kanya isake irabika.
John18:28 Nuko bavana Yezu kwa Kayifa
John18:29 Pilato arasohoka arabasanga
John18:30 Baramusubiza bati «Iyo ataba umugiranabi ntituba tumukuzaniye.»
John18:31 Nuko Pilato arababwira ati «Nimumujyane mumucire urubanza
John18:32 Bityo ijambo Yezu yari yaravuze ryerekeye ku rupfu yari agiye gupfa riruzuzwa.
John18:33 Nuko Pilato asubira mu rugo rwe
John18:34 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ibyo ubivuze ku bwawe
John18:35 Pilato arasubiza ati «Aho ntugira ngo nanjye ndi Umuyahudi? Bene wanyu n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo ni bo bakunzaniye; wakoze iki?»
John18:36 Yezu arasubiza ati «Ingoma yanjye si iyo kuri iyi si; iyo ingoma yanjye iza kuba iyo kuri iyi si
John18:37 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati «Noneho rero uri umwami?» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Urabyivugiye ko ndi umwami! Cyakora icyo jyewe navukiye
John18:38 Pilato aramubaza ati «Ukuri ni iki?» Amaze kuvuga atyo
John18:39 Birasanzwe ko mbarekurira imbohe imwe mwishakiye
John18:40 Nuko bose barongera batera hejuru

John19:30 Yezu amaze kunywa kuri iyo divayi irura

Acts1:3 Ni na bo yari yariyeretse nyuma y’ibabara rye ari muzima

Acts1:5 ngo Yohani yabatirishije amazi
Acts1:6 Nuko bakaba bateraniye hamwe

Acts1:9 Amaze kuvuga atyo azamurwa mu ijuru bamureba
Acts1:10 Uko bagahanze amaso ejuru
Acts1:11 Barababaza bati «Yemwe bagabo b’i Galileya
Acts1:12 Bava ku musozi witwa uw’Imizeti bagaruka i Yeruzalemu
Acts1:13 Bahageze
Acts1:14 Bose barangwaga n’umutima umwe
Acts1:15 Muri iyo minsi
Acts1:16 «Bavandimwe
Acts1:17 Uwo yari umwe muri twe kandi yari yaratorewe uyu murimo wacu.
Acts1:18 Nuko rero
Acts1:19 Abatuye i Yeruzalemu bose barabimenya
Acts1:20 Koko rero
Acts1:21 None rero
Acts1:22 uhereye kuri batisimu ya Yohani ukageza ku munsi atuvanywemo. Ni ngombwa rero ko umwe muri bo yafatanya natwe kuba umuhamya w’izuka rya Yezu.»
Acts1:23 Nuko bazana babiri muri bo; umwe akaba Yozefu witwaga Barisaba

Acts1:25 kugira ngo ahabwe umwanya mu murimo wa gitumwa Yuda yaretse

Acts2:5 Aho rero i Yeruzalemu habaga Abayahudi bubaha Imana
Acts2:6 Ngo bumve urwo rusaku
Acts2:7 Barashoberwa
Acts2:8 Bishoboka bite se ko buri muntu muri twe abumva bavuga mu rurimi rwe kavukire?

Acts2:10 muri Furujiya no muri Pamfiliya
Acts2:11 Abayahudi kavukire n’abayoboke b’idini yabo
Acts2:12 Bose bari bumiwe

Acts2:14 Nuko Petero ahagararanye na ba Cumi n’umwe
Acts2:15 Aba bantu ntibanyoye nk’uko mubitekereza
Acts2:16 ahubwo ibi mureba ni ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Yoweli
Acts2:17 ’Mu minsi ya nyuma
Acts2:18 Koko muri iyo minsi
Acts2:19 Nzakora ibintu bitangaje hejuru mu kirere
Acts2:20 Izuba rizijima n’ukwezi guhinduke amaraso
Acts2:21 Ubwo rero umuntu wese uziyambaza izina rya Nyagasani
Acts2:22 Yemwe Bayisraheli
Acts2:23 uwo muntu rero
Acts2:24 Ariko Imana yaramuzuye
Acts2:25 Koko kandi
Acts2:26 Ni cyo gituma umutima wanjye uri mu byishimo
Acts2:27 kuko utazatererana ubugingo bwanjye mu kuzimu
Acts2:28 Wamenyesheje inzira zigana mu bugingo
Acts2:29 Bavandimwe
Acts2:30 Nyamara
Acts2:31 yabonye atyo mbere y’igihe iby’izuka rya Kristu
Acts2:32 Yezu uwo rero Imana yaramuzuye
Acts2:33 Aho amariye gukuzwa n’ububasha bw’Imana
Acts2:34 Dawudi we n’ubwo atazamutse mu ijuru
Acts2:35 kugeza ko abanzi bawe
Acts2:36 Nuko rero
Acts2:37 Ngo bumve ayo magambo barakangarana
Acts2:38 Petero arabasubiza ati «Nimwisubireho
Acts2:39 Kuko Isezerano ari mwe ryagenewe kimwe n’abana banyu
Acts2:40 Ababwira n’andi magambo menshi yo kubemeza no kubakomeza
Acts2:41 Nuko abemeye izo nyigisho barabatizwa
Acts2:42 Bahoraga bashishikariye kumva inyigisho z’Intumwa
Acts2:43 Abantu bose bagiraga ubwoba kubera ibitangaza n’ibimenyetso bikomeye byakorwaga n’Intumwa.
Acts2:44 Abemera bose bari bashyize hamwe
Acts2:45 Bagurishaga amasambu yabo n’ibintu byabo
Acts2:46 Iminsi yose bashishikariraga kujya mu Ngoro y’Imana bashyize hamwe
Acts2:47 Basingizaga Imana kandi bagashimwa n’abantu bose; nuko Nyagasani akagwiza uko bukeye umubare w’abacunguwe.

Acts3:8 arabaduka
Acts3:9 Nuko rubanda rwose ngo bamubone agenda kandi asingiza Imana
Acts3:10 baramumenya: koko yari wa wundi wajyaga asabiriza
Acts3:11 Kubera ko uwo muntu yanze kuvirira Petero na Yohani
Acts3:12 Petero abibonye ni ko kubwira rubanda ati «Bantu ba Israheli
Acts3:13 Imana ya Abrahamu
Acts3:14 Mwihakanye Umutagatifu n’Intungane
Acts3:15 Mwicishije Umugenga w’ubugingo
Acts3:16 Kubera ko twiringiye izina rya Yezu
Acts3:17 None rero
Acts3:18 Nyamara Imana yujuje ityo ibyo yari yaravugishije Abahanuzi bose mbere y’uko biba
Acts3:19 Nimwisubireho rero kandi mugarukire Imana
Acts3:20 bityo hazabeho ibihe by’ihumure muhawe na Nyagasani
Acts3:21 Uwo ijuru rigomba kwakira kuzageza ku bihe by’ivugururwa ry’ibintu byose: ngibyo ibyo Imana yavugishije Abahanuzi bayo batagatifu bo mu bihe bya kera.
Acts3:22 Koko Musa yaravuze ati ’Nyagasani Imana azababonera mu bavandimwe banyu Umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye; muzamwumvire mu byo azababwira byose.
Acts3:23 Umuntu wese utazumvira uwo Muhanuzi
Acts3:24 Kandi n’Abahanuzi bose
Acts3:25 Ni mwebwe abaragwa b’Abahanuzi
Acts3:26 Ni mwebwe mbere na mbere Imana yahingukirije Umugaragu wayo

Acts4:20 Twe rero ntidushobora guceceka ibyo twiboneye kandi tukabyiyumvira.»

Acts4:22 Koko kandi

Acts5:1 Ariko umuntu witwa Ananiya

Acts5:4 Ntiwashoboraga se kugumana isambu yawe ntuyigurishe
Acts5:5 Ananiya ngo yumve ayo magambo
Acts5:6 Nuko abasore baraza baramupfunya
Acts5:7 Hashize nk’amasaha atatu
Acts5:8 Petero aramubaza ati «Ni ko ye
Acts5:9 Petero ni ko kumubwira ati «Mwaje guhuza mute umugambi
Acts5:10 Ako kanya agwa imbere ya Petero
Acts5:11 Kiliziya yose n’abumvise ibyabaye bose bashya ubwoba.
Acts5:12 Intumwa zikomeza gutanga ibimenyetso no gukora ibitangaza byinshi muri rubanda

Acts5:14 Nyamara abantu batabarika
Acts5:15 Byageraga n’aho bazana abarwayi mu mihanda y’umugi
Acts5:16 Ndetse n’imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu bagashika
Acts5:17 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru kimwe n’abari kumwe na we bose — ari byo kuvuga abo mu gatsiko k’Abasaduseyi — bashengurwa n’ishyari;

Acts5:28 «Twari twarabihanangirije dukomeje kutazongera kwigisha mwitwaje iryo zina
Acts5:29 Petero n’izindi Ntumwa barabasubiza bati «Tugomba kumvira Imana kuruta abantu.
Acts5:30 Imana y’abasekuruza bacu yazuye Yezu
Acts5:31 Ni we Imana yakurishije ububasha bwayo ngo abe Umutegetsi n’Umukiza
Acts5:32 Turi abagabo bo kubihamya
Acts5:33 Bo ngo babyumve

Acts5:40 bahamagara Intumwa bazikubita ibiboko

Acts7:5 Nyamara ntiyigera imukebera isambu muri iki gihugu
Acts7:6 Imana ni ko kumubwira iti ’Urubyaro rwawe ruzatura mu gihugu cy’amahanga
Acts7:7 Nyamara igihugu kizabagira abacakara

Acts7:10 imugobotora mu magorwa ye yose

Acts9:43 Nuko Petero amara iminsi myinshi i Yope

Acts10:12 Muri uwo mwenda harimo inyamaswa zose z’amaguru ane

Acts10:15 Rya jwi rero ryongera kumubwira ku ncuro ya kabiri
Acts10:16 Ibyo biba incuro eshatu

Acts10:21 Petero aramanuka asanga ba bantu

Acts10:29 Ni na cyo cyatumye untumira nkaza ntashidikanya. None rero ndashaka kumenya impamvu yatumye untumira.»

Acts10:35 ahubwo inyurwa n’umuntu wa buri hanga iryo ari ryo ryose uyitinya kandi agaharanira ubutungane.
Acts10:36 Ubwo butumwa bwayo yabwoherereje Abayisraheli
Acts10:37 Mwese muzi ibyabaye muri Yudeya yose
Acts10:38 Muzi n’ibya Yezu w’i Nazareti: ukuntu Imana yamusize amavuta y’ubutore ibigirishije Roho Mutagatifu
Acts10:39 Natwe rero turi abahamya b’ibyo yakoze mu gihugu cy’Abayahudi kimwe n’i Yeruzalemu. Bamwishe bamumanitse ku giti
Acts10:40 ariko Imana yamuzuye ku munsi wa gatatu
Acts10:41 atari kuri rubanda rwose
Acts10:42 Nuko adutegeka kwamamaza no guhamya muri rubanda ko ari we washyizweho n’Imana kuba umucamanza w’abazima n’abapfuye;
Acts10:43 abahanuzi bose bemeza ko umwemera wese azaronka imbabazi z’ibyaha

Acts10:45 Nuko abemera bo mu bagenywe bari baraherekeje Petero batangazwa no kubona ingabire ya Roho Mutagatifu yasesekaye no ku banyamahanga.

Romans1:1 Jyewe Pawulo
Romans1:2 Imana yari yarateguje abahanuzi bayo mu Byanditswe bitagatifu.
Romans1:3 Iyo Nkuru Nziza yerekeye Umwana wayo
Romans1:4 ariko izuka rye ava mu bapfuye rikagaragaza ko ari Umwana w’Imana mu bubasha bwose ku bwa Roho Mutagatifu.
Romans1:5 Ni na We waduhesheje ubutumwa bwo kuyobora mu ikuzo ry’izina rye amahanga yose ku kwemera
Romans1:6 ari yo mubarirwamo namwe
Romans1:7 Mwebwe rero
Romans1:8 Mbere na mbere
Romans1:9 Imana nyitanzeho umugabo
Romans1:10 ngasaba iteka mu masengesho yanjye ko nazagira amahirwe yo kuzashyira nkagera iwanyu niba Imana ibishatse.
Romans1:11 Koko kandi
Romans1:12 bambe kugira ngo mumare igishyika mu kwemera duhuriyeho
Romans1:13 Sinabahisha kandi
Romans1:14 Ngomba kwita ku Bagereki no ku batari bo
Romans1:15 ikaba ari yo mpamvu nshishikajwe no kubigisha Inkuru Nziza namwe ab’i Roma.
Romans1:16 Koko rero
Romans1:17 Koko kandi ni muri yo ubutungane bw’Imana buhishurirwa
Romans1:18 Koko rero uburakari bw’Imana bwihishura buva mu ijuru burwanya abagomeramana bose
Romans1:19 Kuko icyo umuntu yamenya ku Mana kirabigaragariza: Imana yarakibahishuriye.
Romans1:20 Koko rero
Romans1:21 kuko bamenye Imana
Romans1:22 Birataga kuba abanyabwenge
Romans1:23 maze ikuzo ry’Imana idapfa barigurana ishusho isa n’umuntu uzapfa
Romans1:24 Ngiyo impamvu yatumye Imana ibagabiza iby’umutima wabo urarikira
Romans1:25 Bo baguranye ukuri kw’Imana ikinyoma
Romans1:26 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana ibagabiza ingeso z’urukozasoni: dore abagore babo bateshejwe gukoresha imibiri yabo ibihuje na kamere
Romans1:27 abagabo na bo aho kugana umugore uko kamere ishaka
Romans1:28 Byongeye kandi
Romans1:29 Buzuye icyitwa inabi cyose
Romans1:30 batera urubwa
Romans1:31 ni ibiburabwenge
Romans1:32 N’ubwo bazi iteka ry’Imana ricira urwo gupfa abakora bene ibyo
Romans2:1 Nuko rero nta cyo uzabona wireguza
Romans2:2 Tuzi ko Imana izacira urubanza abagenza batyo ikurikije ukuri.
Romans2:3 None se
Romans2:4 Cyangwa se waba usuzugura impuhwe zayo zitabarika
Romans2:5 Noneho rero
Romans2:6 Yo izitura buri wese ikurikije ibikorwa bye:
Romans2:7 ubugingo bw’iteka ku batacogoye mu gukora ikiri cyiza bashakashaka ikuzo
Romans2:8 naho uburakari n’umujinya ku bivumbuye
Romans2:9 Impagarara n’ishavu birakokama buri mutima w’umuntu ukora ikibi
Romans2:10 naho ikuzo
Romans2:11 Kuko Imana itareba igihagararo cy’abantu.
Romans2:12 Koko rero
Romans2:13 Kuko abumva amategeko atari bo ntungane ku Mana
Romans2:14 Iyo abanyamahanga bakora ku bwa kamere ibihuje n’amategeko
Romans2:15 Bagaragaza batyo ko icyo amategeko agamije cyanditswe mu mitima yabo. N’umutimanama wabo na wo ni intangamugabo hamwe n’imitima ibarwanamo
Romans2:16 Nk’uko nabivuze mu Nkuru Nziza yanjye
Romans2:17 Wowe rero witwa Umuyahudi
Romans2:18 wowe uzi kandi ugushaka kwayo
Romans2:19 wowe wiyemera ngo ni wowe warandata impumyi
Romans2:20 wahugura injiji
Romans2:21 Ko wigisha abandi
Romans2:22 ko ubuza gusambana
Romans2:23 ko wiratana amategeko
Romans2:24 nk’uko byanditswe ngo: «Izina ry’Imana bararituka mu mahanga ku mpamvu yanyu».
Romans2:25 Koko kuba waragenywe byagira akamaro ukurikije amategeko
Romans2:26 Niba se utagenywe akurikije ibitunganiye amategeko
Romans2:27 Ndetse utagenywe umubiri

Romans3:1 Umuyahudi arusha iki abandi? Ukugenywa bimaze iki?
Romans3:2 Bifite akamaro kanini kandi ku buryo bwose. Mbere na mbere kuko ari bo baragijwe amagambo y’Imana.
Romans3:3 Bite rero? Niba bamwe muri bo barahemutse
Romans3:4 Ntibikabeho! Imana irabe imvugakuri
Romans3:5 Ariko se niba inabi yacu igaragaza ubutungane bw’Imana
Romans3:6 Ndavuga ku buryo bw’abantu. Ntibikabe! Naho ubundi se
Romans3:7 Nyamara se
Romans3:8 Kandi ni iki kitubuza gukora ibibi ngo bibyare ibyiza
Romans3:9 Bite rero? Hari icyo turusha abandi se? Habe na mba! Dore tumaze guhamya bose icyaha
Romans3:10 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nta ntungane wabona
Romans3:11 nta we uzi ubwenge
Romans3:12 Bose barayobye
Romans3:13 Umuhogo wabo ni imva irangaye
Romans3:14 akanwa kabo kuzuyemo imivumo n’amagambo asesereza.
Romans3:15 Ibirenge byabo byihutira kumena amaraso
Romans3:16 amatongo n’imiborogo ni byo biranga aho banyuze.
Romans3:17 Ntibazi inzira y’amahoro
Romans3:18 nta gitinyiro cy’Imana mu maso yabo.
Romans3:19 Nyamara tuzi ko ibyo amategeko avuze byose
Romans3:20 Ni yo mpamvu nta n’umwe uzagirwa intungane mu maso yayo n’uko yubahiriza amategeko
Romans3:21 Ubu ngubu ariko ubutungane bw’Imana bwarahishuwe hatagombye amategeko; intangamugabo ni amategeko n’abahanuzi.
Romans3:22 Ni ubutungane bw’Imana butangwa no kwemera Yezu Kristu
Romans3:23 Kuko bose bagomye
Romans3:24 Ariko bahabwa kuba intungane n’ineza yayo ku buntu
Romans3:25 Ni We Imana yagize intangacyiru mu maraso ye ku bw’ukwemera
Romans3:26 mu gihe yabyihanganiraga. Ubu ngubu rero igaragaza ubutungane bwayo kugira ngo ibe intungane
Romans3:27 Wa mwirato ushingiye he se noneho? Warashize. Uzize irihe teka? Iryo kubahiriza amategeko? Oya! Ahubwo itegeko ry’ukwemera.
Romans3:28 Koko rero
Romans3:29 Mbese Imana yaba iy’Abayahudi bonyine? Nta bwo se ari n’iy’abanyamahanga? Yego
Romans3:30 Ubwo ari Imana imwe
Romans3:31 Ubwo se turambura amategeko agaciro kayo tuvuga ukwemera? Ntibikabe! Ahubwo tuyahaye ishingiro.
Romans4:1 Twavuga iki ku mukurambere wacu Abrahamu? Hari icyo yaba yararonse ku bw’umubiri?
Romans4:2 Niba Abrahamu yarabaye intungane abikesheje ibyo yakoze
Romans4:3 None se ibyanditswe bivuga iki? Ngo «Abrahamu yemera Uhoraho
Romans4:4 Umuntu kandi ukoze umurimo
Romans4:5 Naho utagize icyo akora
Romans4:6 Nk’uko Dawudi avuga amahirwe y’umuntu Imana iha kuba intungane kandi nta bikorwa
Romans4:7 «Hahirwa abababariwe ibicumuro
Romans4:8 Hahirwa umuntu Nyagasani adashinja icyaha.»
Romans4:9 Mbese ayo mahirwe ni ay’abagenywe bonyine cyangwa ni n’ay’abatagenywe? Tuvuga ko «ukwemera kwahaye Abrahamu kuba intungane.»
Romans4:10 Kwabimuhaye buryo ki? Mbere cyangwa nyuma yo kugenywa? Si nyuma
Romans4:11 Nyuma ukugenywa yaguhaweho ikimenyetso
Romans4:12 n’umubyeyi kandi w’abagenywe
Romans4:13 Koko rero
Romans4:14 Kuko niba abiringiye amategeko ari bo ngenerwamurage
Romans4:15 Kuko amategeko akurura uburakari. Ariko ahataba amategeko
Romans4:16 Ni yo mpamvu
Romans4:17 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nakugize sekuru w’amahanga menshi.» Yemeye Imana
Romans4:18 Yizeye ibidashoboka nyamara aremera
Romans4:19 Ntiyigeze acogora mu kwemera areba umubiri we washaje — yakabakabaga imyaka ijana — n’inda ya Sara yumiranye
Romans4:20 Ntiyabura ubwizere ngo ashidikanye isezerano ry’Imana
Romans4:21 Yiyemeza rwose ko ishobora kuzuza icyo yasezeranye.
Romans4:22 Ni yo mpamvu ibyo byatumye agirwa intungane.
Romans4:23 Nyamara si we wenyine byandikiwe ko ukwemera kugeza ku butungane;
Romans4:24 natwe ni uko bizamera
Romans4:25 watangiwe ibyaha byacu
Romans5:1 Ubwo rero twagizwe intungane n’ukwemera
Romans5:2 Ku bwe twashyikiriye

Romans5:4 ukwihangana kugatera kudahemuka
Romans5:5 ukwizera ntigutamaze

Romans5:8 Imana rero yerekanye urukundo idufitiye kuko Kristu yadupfiriye kandi twari abanyabyaha.

Romans5:14 Nyamara urupfu rwaraganje kuva kuri Adamu kugera kuri Musa

Romans6:1 Twabivugaho iki rero? Twigumire mu cyaha se ngo ineza ikunde igwire?
Romans6:2 Ntibikabeho! Ko twebwe twapfuye ku cyaha
Romans6:3 Ntimuzi se ko twebwe twese ababatijwe muri Kristu Yezu
Romans6:4 Koko rero ku bwa batisimu twahambanywe na we mu rupfu rwe kugira ngo
Romans6:5 Niba koko twarabaye umwe na We dusangira urupfu rwe
Romans6:6 Tumenye neza ko muntu w’igisazira twari we kera yabambanywe na We
Romans6:7 Kuko upfuye
Romans6:8 Niba rero twarapfanye na Kristu
Romans6:9 Tuzi ko Kristu yazutse mu bapfuye akaba atazongera gupfa ukundi
Romans6:10 Kuko igihe apfuye
Romans6:11 Bityo namwe mumenye ko ubwanyu mwapfuye ku cyaha mukaba mubereyeho Imana muri Kristu Yezu.
Romans6:12 Icyaha rero nticyongere kugenga umubiri wanyu uzapfa ngo gitume mwumvira irari ryawo.
Romans6:13 Kandi imibiri yanyu ntimukayegurire icyaha ngo ibe intwaro z’ukugira nabi
Romans6:14 Koko rero icyaha ntikikibafiteho ububasha
Romans6:15 Bite rero? Tuzacumure se ngo aha ntitukigengwa n’amategeko
Romans6:16 Mbese ntimuzi ko uwo mwiyeguriye mukamubera abagaragu bamwumvira
Romans6:17 Imana ishimwe kuko mwahoze muri abagaragu b’icyaha none mukaba mwarayobotse mubikuye ku mutima inyigisho mwaragijwe.
Romans6:18 Mwarokowe ubucakara bw’icyaha
Romans6:19 Ndavuga ku buryo bw’abantu mbitewe n’intege nke zanyu. Ubwo mwari mwareguriye imibiri yanyu gukora ibiterasoni n’ubwigomeke
Romans6:20 Koko rero
Romans6:21 Mbese byabunguye iki icyo gihe? Ko ahubwo ubu ngubu bibateye isoni
Romans6:22 Ariko ubu ngubu
Romans6:23 Nuko rero ingaruka y’icyaha ni urupfu

Romans7:5 Koko rero
Romans7:6 Naho ubu ngubu

Romans7:9 Kera

Romans8:30 Abo yabigeneye kandi

Romans9:1 Ndavuga ukuri muri Kristu rwose simbeshya: icyemezo ndagitangana umutimanama wanjye muri Roho Mutagatifu.
Romans9:2 Mfite agahinda kenshi n’intimba inshengura umutima ubutitsa.
Romans9:3 Koko rero nakwiyifuriza kuba ikivume jyewe ubwanjye ngatandukana na Kristu
Romans9:4 ari bo Abayisraheli. Ni bo batowe
Romans9:5 Abasekuruza babo ni bo Kristu akomokaho ku bw’umubiri
Romans9:6 Nyamara ariko ijambo ry’Imana ntiryapfuye ubusa. Koko rero abakomoka kuri Israheli
Romans9:7 No kuba inkomoko ya Abrahamu
Romans9:8 Ari byo kuvuga ko kuba abana be ku bw’umubiri
Romans9:9 Ngiri rero ijambo ry’isezerano «Igihe nk’iki nzahindukira

Romans9:11 Igihe abana bataravuka
Romans9:12 atari ku bikorwa
Romans9:13 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nikundiye Yakobo
Romans9:14 Twabivugaho iki rero? Ko Imana ibera? Oya
Romans9:15 Yabwiye Musa iti «Nzagirira ineza uwo nzashaka kuyigirira
Romans9:16 Nuko rero

Romans9:18 Nuko rero Imana ibabarira uwo ishaka
Romans9:19 Ubwo rero wagira uti «Imana iracyadushakaho iki?» Mbese ni nde warwanya ugushaka kwayo?
Romans9:20 Mbe muntu
Romans9:21 Mbese umubumbyi ntashobora kuvana mu ibumba rimwe igikoresho cy’agaciro n’igikoresho gisanzwe?
Romans9:22 Bityo rero Imana yashatse kwerekana uburakari bwayo no kugaragaza ububasha bwayo. Yihanganiye bihagije ibibumbano bibi byari bikwiriye kujanjagurwa.
Romans9:23 Ibyo kwari ukugira ngo ibibumbano bikwiriye impuhwe byateganyirijwe ikuzo
Romans9:24 ibyo bibumbano ni twebwe yahamagaye tutavuye mu Bayahudi gusa
Romans9:25 Nk’uko yabivuze muri Hozeya ati «Umuryango utari uwanjye nzawita umuryango wanjye
Romans9:26 kandi ahantu babwiriwe ngo ntimuri umuryango wanjye
Romans9:27 Izayi na we yavuze ibyerekeye Israheli ati «Naho umubare w’abana ba Israheli wangana n’umusenyi wo ku nyanja
Romans9:28 kuko Nyagasani azasohoza ijambo rye ku isi
Romans9:29 Ni nk’uko kandi Izayi yabihanuye ati «Iyo Nyagasani Umutegetsi w’ingabo atatuzigamira imbuto
Romans9:30 Twabivugaho iki? Ko abanyamahanga batashakashakaga ubutungane babushyikiriye
Romans9:31 naho Israheli yashakaga itegeko ritanga ubutungane
Romans9:32 Ni ku mpamvu ki rero? Ni uko itashakiye ubutungane ku kwemera
Romans9:33 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye ry’ubutsikire n’urutare rugusha

Romans10:2 Ndahamya rwose ko bafitiye Imana ishyaka
Romans10:3 kuko bayobewe ubutungane buturuka ku Mana
Romans10:4 Kuko amategeko agarukira kuri Kristu
Romans10:5 Koko rero Musa yanditse ko ubutungane buturuka ku mategeko
Romans10:6 Naho ubutungane buturuka ku kwemera bwo bukavuga buti «Ntukavuge mu mutima wawe ngo ’Ni nde uzazamuka mu ijuru?’» ari byo kuvuga kumanurayo Kristu
Romans10:7 cyangwa ngo «Ni nde uzamanuka ikuzimu?» ari byo kuvuga kuzamura Kristu mu bapfuye.
Romans10:8 Ni ukuvuga iki se ahubwo? «Ijambo rikuri bugufi cyane
Romans10:9 Kuko niba wamamarisha umunwa wawe ko Kristu ari Nyagasani kandi ukemera mu mutima wawe ko Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye
Romans10:10 Nuko rero umuntu yemera n’umutima bikamuha ubutungane
Romans10:11 Kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo «Umwemera wese ntazakozwa isoni.»
Romans10:12 Nta tandukanyirizo rero hagati y’Umuyahudi n’Umugereki: Nyagasani ni umwe kuri bose
Romans10:13 Kuko «umuntu wese uzambaza izina rya Nyagasani
Romans10:14 Bakwiyambaza bate rero Uwo bataremera? Bakwemera bate se Uwo batarumva? Bamwumva bate ntawamwamamaje?
Romans10:15 Bamwamamaza bate niba batatumwe? Nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Mbega ngo biraba byiza ibirenge by’abogeza inkuru nziza!»
Romans10:16 Nyamara si ko bose bumviye Inkuru Nziza. Koko rero Izayi yaravuze ati «Nyagasani
Romans10:17 Bityo rero
Romans10:18 Reka nanjye mbaze: mbese ntibumvise? Barumvise. Ahubwo ndetse ngo «Ijwi ryabo ryakwiriye isi yose
Romans10:19 Nongere mbaze: mbese Israheli yaba itarasobanukiwe? Musa ni we wabanje kuvuga ati «Nzabaharika ikitari umuryango muterwe ishyari.» n’ihanga ritagira ubwenge
Romans10:20 Izayi we ntatinya kuvuga ati «Nabonywe n’abatanshakashakaga
Romans10:21 naho Israheli akayibwira ati «Nirije umunsi ntegeye amaboko umuryango utanyumvira

Romans11:2 Nta bwo Imana yaciye umuryango wayo kandi ari wo yari yaratoye. Cyangwa se ntimuzi icyo Ibyanditswe bivuga aho Eliya arega Israheli ku Mana
Romans11:3 «Nyagasani

Galatians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo intumwa
Galatians1:2 n’abavandimwe bose turi kumwe
Galatians1:3 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana Umubyeyi wacu
Galatians1:4 witangiye ibyaha byacu ngo aturokore iyi si mbi
Galatians1:5 Nahabwe ikuzo uko ibihe bihora bisimburana. Amen.
Galatians1:6 Ntangazwa n’ukuntu
Galatians1:7 Si uko haba hari indi Nkuru Nziza ibaho. Ni uko hadutse abantu bashaka ko muhagarika imitima
Galatians1:8 Ariko rero
Galatians1:9 Mbese nk’uko twababwiye
Galatians1:10 Mbese ubu ngubu nkurikiranye gushimwa n’abantu cyangwa n’Imana? Aho ntimugira ngo mparanira kuneza abantu? Mbaye nkigamije kuneza abantu
Galatians1:11 Mbibamenyeshe rero
Galatians1:12 si n’umuntu nyikesha
Galatians1:13 Mwumvise kandi imigirire yanjye kera nkiri mu kiyahudi: ko natotezaga bikabije Kiliziya y’Imana nshaka kuyitsemba.
Galatians1:14 Kandi benshi mu bo tungana
Galatians1:15 Nyamara umunsi Uwanyitoranyirije nkiri mu nda ya mama
Galatians1:16 ngo ampishurire Umwana we
Galatians1:17 habe no kuzamuka i Yeruzalemu ngo nsange abantanze kuba intumwa; ahubwo nagiye muri Arabiya
Galatians1:18 Nyuma y’imyaka itatu
Galatians1:19 Nta yindi ntumwa twabonanye
Galatians1:20 Ibi mbandikira

Philippians1:8 Koko ndabakunda n’umutima wanjye wose

Philippians1:10 kugira ngo mushobore guhitamo ibitunganye. Bityo muzabe abaziranenge n’indahemuka kugera ku munsi wa Kristu
Philippians1:11 maze muzere imbuto z’ubutungane zituruka kuri Kristu
Philippians1:12 Bavandimwe

2Thessalonians3:3 Nyagasani ni indahemuka: azabakomeza

2Thessalonians3:5 Nyagasani nayobore imitima yanyu
2Thessalonians3:6 Bavandimwe

2Thessalonians3:9 Si ukuvuga ko tutari tubifitiye uburenganzira
2Thessalonians3:10 Igihe twari iwanyu

1Timothy1:2 kuri Timote
1Timothy1:3 Igihe nendaga kujya i Masedoniya
1Timothy1:4 no kwibanda ku migani y’amahomvu hamwe n’ibisokuruza by’urudaca
1Timothy1:5 Ibyo mbivugiye guteza imbere urukundo rukomoka ku mutima usukuye
1Timothy1:6 Kubera ko bamwe bataye uwo murongo
1Timothy1:7 Bibwira ko ari abahanga mu by’Amategeko

1Timothy2:3 Ngicyo ikintu gikwiye kandi kinogeye Imana Umukiza wacu
1Timothy2:4 Yo ishaka ko abantu bose bakira kandi bakamenya ukuri.
1Timothy2:5 Koko rero
1Timothy2:6 witanze ngo abe incungu ya bose. Ngicyo icyemezo cy’ugukizwa kwacu cyatanzwe igihe cyabigenewe kigeze
1Timothy2:7 kandi nanjye ubwanjye nkaba naratorewe kuba intumwa yo kubyamamaza no kubyogeza. Ndavuga ukuri simbeshya
1Timothy2:8 None rero ndashaka ko abagabo bajya basenga

1Timothy2:15 Nyamara ariko azakizwa no kuba umubyeyi

1Timothy3:3 ntabe umunywi cyangwa umunyamahane
1Timothy3:4 Akamenya kugenga urugo rwe no gutoza abana be kumvira; ibyo byose bigakorwa mu bwiyubahe.

1Timothy4:2 bahendwe ubwenge n’abanyabinyoma buje uburyarya kandi basabitswe n’iyo ngeso ku mutima.

1Timothy4:7 Naho imigani y’amanjwe hamwe n’uburondogozi bw’abakecuru

Hebrews4:4 nk’uko hari aho bavuga iby’umunsi wa karindwi
Hebrews4:5 Hanyuma kandi nk’uko bimaze kuvugwa ngo «Ntibazinjira mu buruhukiro bwanjye.»

Hebrews4:11 Nitwihutire rero kwinjira muri icyo kiruhuko

Hebrews5:1 Umuherezabitambo mukuru wese atorwa mu bantu kandi agashyirirwaho gufasha abantu mu mubano wabo n’Imana; ashinzwe guhereza amaturo n’ibitambo bihongerera ibyaha.
Hebrews5:2 Ubwo na we ari umunyantege nke muri byinshi
Hebrews5:3 kandi nk’uko atambirira ibyaha by’imbaga
Hebrews5:4 Nta wiha ubwe bwite icyo cyubahiro

Hebrews7:1 Uwo Malekisedeki
Hebrews7:2 Ni we kandi Abrahamu yeguriye igice cya cumi cy’iminyago. Izina rye risobanura mbere na mbere «umwami w’ubutabera»

Hebrews7:10 kuko yari akiri mu nda ya sekuruza igihe asanganiwe na Malekisedeki.
Hebrews7:11 Iyaba ubuherezabitambo bwa Levi bwari bwuzuye — kandi mu by’ukuri ari bwo shingiro ry’amategeko yahawe Israheli — ntibiba byarabaye ngombwa ko haduka undi muherezabitambo
Hebrews7:12 Igihe rero ubuherezabitambo buhindutse

Hebrews7:19 Amategeko koko nta cyo yigeze ageza ku ndunduro; ni yo mpamvu twahawe amizero yisumbuye ari yo dukesha kwegera Imana.
Hebrews7:20 Uretse ibyo kandi habaye n’indahiro y’Imana: ubwo abaherezabitambo ba mbere bashyirwagaho nta ndahiro

Hebrews11:1 Ukwemera ni ishingiro ry’ibyo twizeye

Hebrews13:1 Nimwikomezemo urukundo rwa kivandimwe.
Hebrews13:2 Ntimukibagirwe kwakira abashyitsi
Hebrews13:3 Muzirikane abari mu buroko nk’aho mwabaye imbohe hamwe na bo; muzirikane kandi abababazwa kuko namwe mufite umubiri.
Hebrews13:4 Ugushyingirwa nikubahwe na bose
Hebrews13:5 Imibereho yanyu izire ubugugu
Hebrews13:6 ku buryo dushobora kuvuga nta shiti tuti «Nyagasani arampagarikiye
Hebrews13:7 Nimuzirikane abayobozi banyu
Hebrews13:8 Yezu Kristu ntahinduka
Hebrews13:9 Ntimugatwarwe n’inyigisho z’amoko menshi kandi zitandukira
Hebrews13:10 Twebweho dufite urutambiro abakorera mu ihema badafitiye uruhusa rwo kurya ibiruvuyeho.
Hebrews13:11 Koko kandi amaraso y’ibitungwa ajyanwa n’umuherezabitambo mukuru ahatagatifu rwose ngo ahongerere ibyaha
Hebrews13:12 Ni na yo mpamvu Yezu yababarijwe inyuma y’umurwa
Hebrews13:13 Nidusohoke natwe tumusanganirire inyuma y’ingando
Hebrews13:14 Kuko nta murwa uzahoraho dufite hano ku isi
Hebrews13:15 Ku bwe rero ntiduhweme guhereza Imana igitambo cy’ibisingizo
Hebrews13:16 Ntimukibagirwe kugira neza no gushyira hamwe ibyo mutunze
Hebrews13:17 Nimwumvire abayobozi banyu kandi mubashobokere
Hebrews13:18 Nimudusabire; mu by’ukuri umutimanama wacu uraboneye
Hebrews13:19 Ndabasabye
Hebrews13:20 Imana Nyir’amahoro
Hebrews13:21 Yo ubwayo ibahe gukora icyiza cyose gihuje n’ugushaka kwayo
Hebrews13:22 Bavandimwe
Hebrews13:23 Mumenye ko umuvandimwe wacu Timote yafunguwe. Nangeraho vuba
Hebrews13:24 Nimutashye abayobozi banyu n’abatagatifujwe bose. Abo mu Butaliyani barabatashya.
Hebrews13:25 Ineza y’Imana ihorane namwe mwese!
James1:1 Jyewe Yakobo
James1:2 Bavandimwe
James1:3 mumenye kandi ko ibigerageza ukwemera kwanyu bibyara ubwiyumanganye.
James1:4 Ariko rero ubwo bwiyumanganye bugomba kuba bugaragara
James1:5 Niba muri mwe hari ubuze ubuhanga
James1:6 Ariko rero
James1:7 Bene uwo muntu ntakibwire ko hari icyo Nyagasani yakwihera
James1:8 umuntu w’imberabyombi
James1:9 Umuvandimwe w’umukene niyishimire ikuzwa rye
James1:10 n’umukire yishimire ugucishwa bugufi kwe
James1:11 Izuba ryararashe n’ubushyuhe bwaryo bwinshi
James1:12 Hahirwa umuntu uba intwari mu bigeragezo
James1:13 Nihagira ugwa mu gishuko
James1:14 Buri muntu ashukwa n’irari rye bwite rimukurura
James1:15 Iyo iryo rari rimaze gusama
James1:16 Ntimukibeshye rero
James1:17 Icyitwa ingabire y’agaciro cyose
James1:18 Ni ku bwende bwe bwite yatwibyariye akoresheje ijambo rye ry’amanyakuri
James1:19 Mubimenye rero
James1:20 kuko uburakari bw’umuntu budakora igihuje n’ubutungane bw’Imana.
James1:21 Nimwitandukanye rero n’icyitwa ubwandure cyose
James1:22 Mube abantu bagaragaza mu bikorwa ijambo ry’Imana
James1:23 Koko rero
James1:24 iyo amaze kwireba
James1:25 Naho uwibanda ku itegeko rihamye
James1:26 Niba hari uwibwira ko ari umuyoboke w’Imana
James1:27 Iyobokamana risukuye kandi ritagira amakemwa mu maso y’Imana Data ni iri ngiri: ni ugusura imfubyi n’abapfakazi mu magorwa yabo

James2:2 Koko rero
James2:3 maze mukarangamira umuntu wambaye imyambaro myiza
James2:4 ubwo se ntimuba mwivanguye ubwanyu? Ntimuba se mubaye abacamanza b’ibitekerezo bifutamye?
James2:5 Nimwumve
James2:6 Nyamara mwebwe mwima umukene icyubahiro cye! Mbese ye
James2:7 Si bo se batuka izina rya Kristu mwitiriwe?

James2:20 Muntu w’ikiburabwenge
James2:21 Ni ko ye

James3:2 kuko kenshi twese duteshuka mu magambo. Niba umuntu adateshutswe mu magambo
James3:3 Niba dushyize imikoba mu munwa w’amafarasi kugira ngo atwumvire
James3:4 Nimwitegereze n’amato; n’ubwo ari manini bwose kandi agasunikwa n’inkubi y’umuyaga
James3:5 Bityo rero
James3:6 Ururimi na rwo ni nk’umuriro
James3:7 Koko rero nta bwoko na bumwe
James3:8 ariko ururimi
James3:9 Ni rwo tuvugisha dusingiza Nyagasani n’Umubyeyi
James3:10 bityo mu munwa umwe hagasohoka umugisha n’umuvumo. Bavandimwe rero
James3:11 Ese ye
James3:12 Cyo se bavandimwe
James3:13 Ni nde w’umuhanga n’umunyabwenge muri mwe? Nabyerekanishe imyifatire ye myiza

James3:18 Imbuto y’ubutungane ibibwa mu mahoro
James4:1 Amakimbirane akomoka he? Cyangwa se intambara muri mwe zituruka he? Aho ibyo byose ntibyaba bituruka ku byifuzo byanyu
James4:2 Murararikira
James4:3 Murasaba ariko ntimuronke
James4:4 Mwa basambanyi mwe

James4:11 Bavandimwe

James4:13 Nuko rero namwe abavuga muti «Uyu munsi
James4:14 nyamara mutazi uko ejo muzamera; kuko muri nk’ibihu bigaragara mu kanya gato
James4:15 Aho mwagize muti «Niba Nyagasani abishatse tuzabaho
James4:16 ahubwo murirata muteganya ibintu bikomeye mutazageraho. Bene ubwo bwirasi ni bubi.
James4:17 Bityo rero

James5:2 Ubukungu bwanyu bwaraboze

James5:14 Mwaba se mwifitemo umurwayi? Nahamagaze abakuru ba Kiliziya bamuvugireho amasengesho bamaze kumusiga amavuta mu izina rya Nyagasani.

James5:18 hanyuma yongera gusaba

1Peter1:1 Jyewe Petero
1Peter1:2 mukaba ari mwebwe Imana Data yatoranije bikurikije umugambi wayo
1Peter1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana
1Peter1:4 no kugira ngo dutunge umurage udashobora gushanguka
1Peter1:5 mwebwe abo ububasha bw’Imana buragirishije ukwemera
1Peter1:6 Nimwishime kandi munezerwe
1Peter1:7 Uko zahabu bayiyungururisha umuriro
1Peter1:8 Koko ni We mukunda mutamurora
1Peter1:9 kuko mwashyikiriye igihembo cy’ukwemera kwanyu
1Peter1:10 Iby’uwo mukiro
1Peter1:11 Bashakashakaga uko batahura igihe n’uburyo ibyo bari bumvishijwe na Roho wa Kristu wari ubarimo bizabera
1Peter1:12 Abo bahanuzi Imana yabahishuriye ko ubwo butumwa atari bo bwagenewe
1Peter1:13 Nimuhore rero mwiteguye
1Peter1:14 Nimube nk’abana bumvira
1Peter1:15 ahubwo mube intungane mu migenzereze yanyu yose
1Peter1:16 kuko byanditswe ngo «Nimube intungane
1Peter1:17 Niba mwiyambaza Imana nk’Umubyeyi wanyu
1Peter1:18 kuko muzi y’uko atari ibintu bishanguka nka zahabu cyangwa feza byabarokoye mu migenzereze mibi mwarazwe n’abakurambere banyu;
1Peter1:19 ahubwo ko mwarokowe n’amaraso y’agaciro gakomeye ya Kristu
1Peter1:20 Kristu ni We watoranyijwe mbere y’ihangwa ry’isi
1Peter1:21 Ni na We mukesha kwemera Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye kandi ikamukuza
1Peter1:22 Mwasukuwe imitima yanyu mwumvira ukuri
1Peter1:23 mwebwe abavutse bundi bushya ku mbuto itari inyabushanguke
1Peter1:24 Kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo «Ikinyamubiri cyose ni nk’icyatsi
1Peter1:25 ariko ijambo ry’Uhoraho rizahoraho iteka.» Iryo jambo rero ni ryo Nkuru Nziza mwamenyeshejwe.
1Peter2:1 Nuko rero nimwitandukanye n’icyitwa ubugome n’ubuhendanyi bwose
1Peter2:2 Mbese kimwe n’abana bakimara kuvuka
1Peter2:3 niba koko mwarasogongeyeho mukumva ukuntu Nyagasani aryohereye.
1Peter2:4 Nimwegere Nyagasani
1Peter2:5 bityo namwe mube nk’amabuye mazima
1Peter2:6 Koko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo «Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye ry’insanganyarukuta
1Peter2:7 Mwebwe rero abemera
1Peter2:8 ariko kandi ribabera ibuye basitaraho n’urutare batembaho.» Barisitaraho kuko banze kwemera ijambo ry’Imana
1Peter2:9 Naho mwebwe muri ubwoko bwatoranyijwe
1Peter2:10 mwebwe abatari umuryango w’Imana kuva kera
1Peter2:11 Nkoramutima zanjye
1Peter2:12 Nimugire imyifatire myiza imbere y’abatemera Imana nyakuri
1Peter2:13 Nimuyoboke rero ubutegetsi bwose bw’abantu ku mpamvu ya Nyagasani: yaba umwami mu mwanya we w’ikirenga
1Peter2:14 baba abatware batumwe na we kugira ngo bahane abagiranabi kandi bashime abakora neza;
1Peter2:15 kuko icyo Imana ishaka ari uko mwacubya ubujiji bw’abantu b’ibiburabwenge
1Peter2:16 Nimubeho nk’abantu bigenga
1Peter2:17 Nimwubahe abantu bose
1Peter2:18 Bagaragu
1Peter2:19 Koko rero kwiyumanganya imibabaro yose ugirirwa uzira akarengane ni ingabire
1Peter2:20 Murabona byabamo kuzo nyabaki kwiyumanganya inkoni mukubitwa
1Peter2:21 Nuko rero
1Peter2:22 We utigeze akora icyaha
1Peter2:23 agatukwa
1Peter2:24 We wajyanye ibyaha byacu mu mubiri we bwite ku musaraba

2Peter2:20 Abigobotoye ubwandure bw’isi babikesheje kumenya Umwami wacu n’Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristu
2Peter2:21 byajyaga kurutaho kuri bo iyo batamenya inzira y’ubutungane
2Peter2:22 Ibyababayeho bihuje mu by’ukuri n’uyu mugani ugira uti «Imbwa yasubiye ku birutsi byayo». cyangwa ngo «Ingurube ikimara kwiyuhagira yongeye kwivuruguta mu isayo.»
2Peter3:1 Nkoramutima zanjye
2Peter3:2 Nimwibuke amagambo yavuzwe kera n’abahanuzi batagatifu
2Peter3:3 Mbere na mbere
2Peter3:4 maze bakazabakwena bagira bati «Mbese isezerano ry’uko azaza ryaba rigeze he? Kuko kuva igihe ababyeyi bacu bapfiriye
2Peter3:5 Iyo bavuga batyo
2Peter3:6 akaba ari na cyo cyatumye isi ya kera irengwaho n’amazi
2Peter3:7 Naho ku byerekeye ijuru n’isi biriho ubu ngubu
2Peter3:8 Nyamara rero
2Peter3:9 None rero
2Peter3:10 Umunsi wa Nyagasani uzaza nk’umujura; uwo munsi ijuru rizazimirana n’urusaku rukaze
2Peter3:11 Ubwo rero ibyo byose bigomba kurimbuka kuri ubwo buryo
2Peter3:12 mwebwe abategereje kandi mugashaka gutebutsa umunsi w’Imana
2Peter3:13 Ariko nk’uko Imana yabisezeranye
2Peter3:14 Ni yo mpamvu
2Peter3:15 Kandi mumenye ko Nyagasani akomeza kubihanganira agira ngo abakize
2Peter3:16 Ni na cyo avuga mu mabaruwa ye yose
2Peter3:17 Nuko rero
2Peter3:18 Ahubwo nimukomeze kujya mbere mu ngabire n’ubumenyi by’Umwami wacu n’Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristu. Nahabwe ikuzo ubu ngubu n’iteka ryose. Amen!
1John1:1 Ibyariho kuva mu ntangiriro n’ibyo twiyumviye kuri Jambo Nyir’ubugingo

1John1:7 Ariko niba tugendera mu rumuri
1John1:8 Niba tuvuze tuti «Nta cyaha tugira»
1John1:9 Ariko niba twishinje ibyaha byacu
1John1:10 Niba rero tuvuze tuti «Nta cyaha twigeze dukora»

1John2:2 ni na We gitambo cy’impongano y’ibyaha byacu

1John3:13 Bavandimwe

1John5:1 Umuntu wese wemera ko Yezu ari Kristu
1John5:2 Dore icyo tumenyeraho ko dukunda abana b’Imana: ni uko dukunda Imana kandi tugakurikiza amategeko yayo.
1John5:3 Dore gukunda Imana icyo ari cyo: ni uko twakurikiza amategeko yayo. Kandi amategeko yayo ntavunanye
1John5:4 kuko icyabyawe n’Imana cyose gitsinda isi. Intsinzi kandi yaganje isi
1John5:5 Ni nde utsinda isi atari uwemera ko Yezu ari Umwana w’Imana?
1John5:6 Uwo nyine ni We waje ku bw’amazi n’amaraso
1John5:7 Ubwo rero hari ibintu bitatu byo kubihamya:
1John5:8 Roho
1John5:9 Niba twakira ubuhamya bw’abantu
1John5:10 Uwemera Umwana w’Imana aba yakiriye muri we ubwo buhamya. Naho utemera Imana aba ayigize umubeshyi
1John5:11 Dore rero ubwo buhamya: Imana yaduhaye ubugingo buhoraho
1John5:12 Ufite Mwana
1John5:13 Nabandikiye ibyo byose kugira ngo mwebwe
1John5:14 Dore rero amizero dufite muri We: nitugira icyo tumusaba
1John5:15 Ubwo rero tuzi ko atwumva mu byo tumusabye ibyo ari byo byose
1John5:16 Niba umuntu abonye umuvandimwe we akora icyaha
1John5:17 Ubugome bwose ni icyaha
1John5:18 Tuzi ko umuntu wese wabyawe n’Imana atongera gucumura ukundi
1John5:19 Tuzi yuko turi ab’Imana
1John5:20 Tuzi kandi ko Umwana w’Imana yaje
1John5:21 Twana twanjye

3John1:10 Ni cyo gituma igihe nzazira
